Peter, it’s been a busy past couple of weeks fighting for the South Bronx in Congress!

Take a look at what I’ve been up to: | **LGBTQ MENTAL HEALTH**
LGBTQ youth deserve to be safe, live their authentic lives, and have access to mental health support and services. As an Equality Caucus Co-Chair, and someone who’s struggled with mental health issues most of my life, I’m proud to co-lead the _Pride in Mental Health_ act with Rep. Sharice Davids.

**ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE**
AI is so revolutionary that it transcends bipartisanship. As Congress explores regulatory framework, a mandatory disclaimer is a place to start. People need to know if the content they’re consuming is real or not. That’s why I introduced the _AI Disclosure Act of 2023._
---
June is especially important because we have a huge FEC deadline at the end of the month.

And if Democrats like me want to keep pushing forward, taking back the House is a non-negotiable.

Friend,
Our Founding Fathers declared that America would be _“A Republic,**IF** you can keep it...”_
Now that the Biden regime is trying to **JAIL** its leading opponent for 400 YEARS in order to avoid a free and fair election, it’s clear that our Republic is hanging by a thread.
_The 2024 election will determine whether we can keep our Republic or whether our nation has finally succumbed to the dark forces of tyranny._
_**But mark my words: we will win the White House in 2024 and we will save our Republic.**_
I have full faith that the American people will rise to the occasion to save our Republic from becoming a third-world country.
Just like Americans before you had the chance to vote for Washington and Lincoln, YOU now stand at a very unique point in our nation’s history to cast a monumental vote to SAVE our Republic and stop our descent into tyranny.

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Take a stand for gun safety (petition)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Add your name to speak out against gun violence: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65131592/412460044/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230620_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmQ5N2U1NC1jZTBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8QKN1hReIkRBANp7NgCsUa1j46IGB37PQNVbImPI4p8=&emci=92d97e54-ce0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=bbd97e54-ce0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)
---
Twice this year, federal appeals courts have blocked bans on bump stocks, saying it’s “up to Congress” to do something. So I did something. I introduced the _Banning Unlawful Machinegun Parts (BUMP) Act_ to finally ban these devices once and for all. **[It’s up to us to keep our communities safe. We need to show a groundswell of support for this critical legislation — and it’s important to me to include your voice. Will you add your name to become a citizen co-sponsor of the _BUMP Act_?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65131593/412460045/-36604734?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230620_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmQ5N2U1NC1jZTBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8QKN1hReIkRBANp7NgCsUa1j46IGB37PQNVbImPI4p8=&emci=92d97e54-ce0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=bbd97e54-ce0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65131594/412460046/-36604734?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230620_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmQ5N2U1NC1jZTBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8QKN1hReIkRBANp7NgCsUa1j46IGB37PQNVbImPI4p8=&emci=92d97e54-ce0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=bbd97e54-ce0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)
---
Bump stocks and similar devices are dangerous, allowing semi-automatic firearms to increase their rate of fire and essentially operate as machine guns.
We saw the horrific impact of bump stocks in 2017 in Las Vegas, when a shooter who used them killed 60 people and wounded hundreds more in the deadliest mass shooting in modern American history. **We must keep these devices out of the wrong hands.**
Gun safety and responsible gun ownership are top priorities of mine. Last year, I helped broker a historic gun safety bill — the first one to pass Congress in decades.
**But that is only the start of our work to protect our communities from gun violence, and I’m hoping you’ll help us take another step toward progress today.**
**[Please, add your name next to mine to become a citizen co-sponsor of the _BUMP Act_ and take a stand for gun safety:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65131595/412460047/-36604734?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230620_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmQ5N2U1NC1jZTBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8QKN1hReIkRBANp7NgCsUa1j46IGB37PQNVbImPI4p8=&emci=92d97e54-ce0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=bbd97e54-ce0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)**

clean_body: Add your name to speak out against gun violence: Twice this year, federal appeals courts have blocked bans on bump stocks, saying it’s “up to Congress” to do something. So I did something. I introduced the Banning Unlawful Machinegun Parts (BUMP) Act to finally ban these devices once and for all. | Bump stocks and similar devices are dangerous, allowing semi-automatic firearms to increase their rate of fire and essentially operate as machine guns. We saw the horrific impact of bump stocks in 2017 in Las Vegas, when a shooter who used them killed 60 people and wounded hundreds more in the deadliest mass shooting in modern American history. We must keep these devices out of the wrong hands. Gun safety and responsible gun ownership are top priorities of mine. Last year, I helped broker a historic gun safety bill — the first one to pass Congress in decades. But that is only the start of our work to protect our communities from gun violence, and I’m hoping you’ll help us take another step toward progress today. Thank you for speaking out. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. I can’t take on Joe Biden alone, but with you on my team, I know we can defeat his disgusting administration and get America back on track. | | Thank you, Senator Scott | | | A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott: Joe Biden’s America includes record high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. I can’t do it without patriots like you, so Thank you for your support, Senator Rick Scott | | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Rick Scott for Florida. If you no longer wish to receive emails, please click here: .

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Why you should care about the abuse of Congress’ censure power
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2626%2E5257348%2ES3PbMu ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Hi Derek, I
can hardly believe they’re trying this again —

MAGA Republican Anna Paulina Luna just reintroduced another resolution to
censure me in the House. During her entire time in Congress, she has only
introduced 5 bills, and 4 of them are attacking me.

I know what you’re thinking, and no, this is not the same resolution that
just failed on the House floor just two days ago, with nearly 1 in 10
Republicans opposed.

But it is another effort to silence and intimidate Democratic members of
Congress who stand up to the corrupt former president. Especially ones
they believe are particularly effective in defense of our democracy.

There are two very important reasons why this should matter to you:

First, if they succeed in discouraging members of Congress from exposing
the corruption of their party, it will only breed further corruption.
There is already a dangerous strand of authoritarianism running through
today’s GOP, and silencing the opposition is a dangerous part of that
playbook.

And second, these political smear tactics divert the resources of the
House away from the pressing priorities that Congress should be
addressing, and that I want to tackle as your Senator — homelessness, the
high cost of housing and health care, gun violence, the restoration of
reproductive rights and more. This is the second week that Kevin McCarthy
is using the time of the people’s House to engage in destructive political
exercises, not the work that we need to be doing to move the country
forward.

I am working every day to bring down the cost of housing and find shelter
for people living on the street. I am seeking new funding for the
treatment of mental illness and to end the opioid crisis. I am working
hard to pass a Green New Deal and to save our planet. And I am fighting
for an economy that works for everyone, so that another generation of
Americans can enjoy the American dream. But we have to take this
seriously.

Only 24 members of Congress in history have been formally censured, and
for actual transgressions — not as retribution for investigating and
impeaching the now-indicted former president — and the resolution’s
passage would be another terrible lurch away from democracy and a body
blow to the institution.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20230620_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2626%2E5257348%2ES3PbMu ]So
Derek, I
have to ask you again: Rush an urgent donation to help our campaign
respond right now to this concerted effort by MAGA Republicans to silence
those who defend our democracy and hold the corrupt to account. We have to
fight this effort with everything we’ve got.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=jun2023_abs_em.0Agatv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20230620_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2626%2E5257348%2ES3PbMu ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jun2023_abs_em.9HINAX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20230620_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2626%2E5257348%2ES3PbMu ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=jun2023_abs_em.5j4Bsc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20230620_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2626%2E5257348%2ES3PbMu ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jun2023_abs_em.RWa6IA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20230620_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2626%2E5257348%2ES3PbMu ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jun2023_abs_em.9Bj7kB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20230620_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2626%2E5257348%2ES3PbMu ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20230620_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2626%2E5257348%2ES3PbMu ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I’ll be sure to let you know when more develops — for now, thanks for
being such a dedicated member of this team. Because this isn’t just an
attack on me, it’s an attack on anyone attempting to pursue constitutional
oversight and accountability, and our democracy.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20230620_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2626%2E5257348%2ES3PbMu ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=jun2023_abs_em.hzT4iC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20230620_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=2626%2E5257348%2ES3PbMu ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=2626%2E5257348%2ES3PbMu ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=2626%2E5257348%2ES3PbMu ]Privacy Policy

# [How Ron DeSantis Helped Conceal The Truth About Jeffrey Epstein's Sex Crimes In Florida The Same Year Epstein Allgedley "Killed Himself"](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1123743&post_id=129706588&utm_source=post-email-title&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTI5NzA2NTg4LCJpYXQiOjE2ODczMTI5NTAsImV4cCI6MTY4OTkwNDk1MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMjM3NDMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.uEecdYxfL8nGNXkJ6h2FDfNERP5I8bOSMhmi6mS2lIk)
### The aspiring GOP Presidential candidate indulged the request of the Democrat Palm Beach Sheriff who oversaw the work release program that convicted sexual predator Jeffrey Epstein participated in.
| | [Laura Loomer](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/8537fd4b-6129-4844-8fac-3d057ed9022b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

If you don 't want to miss any of my hard-hitting reports and commentary, please subscribe today!_
The life and death of world renowned sexual predator and pedophile Jefrey Epstein is commonplace, and riddled with theories and unanswered questions. It shocked the world when it was announced that Jeffrey Epstein had been found dead in his New York jail cell, which was reported as "suicide" on Aug. 10, 2019, just 35 days after he was arrested.
At the time of his highly suspicious death, Epstein was awaiting trial on sex trafficking charges after he was accused of sexually trafficking dozens of underage girls and engaging in sexual acts with them.
According to the [unsealed federal indictment](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f3a716cd-780d-4458-b5ea-e41aad1c08d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [announcement ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ebe16238-84f3-467c-a34e-c09caa0ea35c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)made by the United States Attorney's Office in the Southern District of New York, prosecutors said in or about 2002, up to and including at least in or about 2005, _" Epstein sexually exploited and abused dozens of underage girls by enticing them to engage in sex acts with him in exchange for money. Epstein allegedly worked with several employees and associates to ensure that he had a steady supply of minor victims to abuse, and paid several of those victims themselves to recruit other underage girls to engage in similar sex acts for money. He committed these offenses in locations including New York, New York, and Palm Beach, Florida."_
The indictment described how Epstein would lure women to his gated compound in Palm Beach, Florida where he would pay young girls, many who were underage, hundreds of dollars to give him nude massages and have sex with him. Epstein and his associate Ghislaine Maxwell also enticed the young girls to recruit other girls to engage in sexual acts with Epstein.
Prior to being arrested and jailed in New York, Epstein, who made his fortune as a financier, had previously been investigated in Florida more ten years earlier in connection with the sexual abuse of underage girls.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..7jYjsZTEorlqicmM8hu9AVzRkD6Yg7gn7VAvynxbAQo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=129706588)
While there's enough salacious details surrounding the the Epstein scandal to fill an encyclopedia, the Florida based investigation into Epstein first began in 2005 by police[ in Palm Beach, Florida ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c58bd574-9abf-498c-957f-96e8f1da286e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)after the family of a 14-year-old girl reported that she was sexually molested inside Epstein's Palm Beach mansion. The allegations grew in numbers as more underage girls, who were local high school students, also told police that Epstein recruited them and paid them to give him sexual massages.
During the Palm Beach Police Department's investigation into Epstein, following the first report made by the 14 year old girl's parents, police rummaged through Epstein's trash, and discovered a piece of paper that had notes from a call written on it. Th note contained the young girl's name on it, along with the names and phone numbers of other underage girls who Epstein wanted to sexually solicit. In October of 2005, the Palm Beach police were granted a warrant to search Epstein's Palm Beach compound.
Despite engaging in pedophilia and prostitution in Florida, Epstein was given a slap on the wrist. In May 2006, Epstein's case was formally referred to a grand jury in Palm Beach after he was charged with multiple counts of unlawful sex with a minor. He was later indicted on a single count of soliciting prostitution, which prompted the FBI to open up a multi-state investigation into Epstein.
In 2007, Epstein's legal team had a private meeting with the US Attorney for the Southern District of Florida, Alex Acosta. It was during this meeting where Acosta struck a deal with Epstein's legal team and agreed to only give Epstein a 13 month prison sentence in a low-security prison, and a total end to the FBI's investigation into Epstein. Along with a 13 month prison sentence for his prostitution crimes, which was ultimately cut short by five months, Epstein also received immunity from being prosecuted on future similar charges brought against him on the condition that he register as a sex offender in Florida twice a year. He was sentenced in June of 2008, and released from prison early in July 2009.
In 2020, following Epstein's alleged suicide, the Justice Department's Office of Professional Responsibility conducted an investigation into Acosta's handling of the Jeffrey Epstein plea deal, and the Department of Justice ultimately concluded that Acosta exercised "poor judgment" when he resolved the federal investigation into Epstein through [the state-based plea agreement](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b4f33e8c-e058-4776-8091-4218adc3d276?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with Epstein's legal team in 2008.
Following his alleged suicide, Epstein's predator behavior in Palm Beach was turned into the Netflix [true crime docuseries, ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/50ac18db-d143-4886-ad25-bd64f37c5e08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[Jeffrey Epstein: Filthy Rich](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/50ac18db-d143-4886-ad25-bd64f37c5e08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ , which focused heavily on the Palm Beach Sheriff Office's handling of the investigation and incarceration of Epstein.
LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..7jYjsZTEorlqicmM8hu9AVzRkD6Yg7gn7VAvynxbAQo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=129706588)
The biggest controversy surrounding Florida's handling of Jeffrey Epstein's cushy plea deal was the decision by Palm Beach County Sheriff Ric Bradshaw, who is a Democrat, to allow Epstein to serve out his prison sentence in a private, low security wing of the Palm Beach County jail where he participated in a work release program under Sheriff Bradshaw. At the time, Epstein was well known and high profile Democrat donor who had close associations with President Bill Clinton.
Under the work release program, Epstein was allowed to leave the jail for 12 hours each day, six days a week. When Epstein wanted to leave the jail, he was picked up by his private driver and a security guard, driven to his office where he conducted work meetings and met with visitors, and he was even allowed to return to his Palm Beach estate, in violation of home visit restrictions for work release.
It is still a mystery as to why Epstein, who was known for having high level connections with politicians, global elites, and many celebrities, including several US Presidents, was ever approved for the Florida work release program. In [a letter dated Dec. 11, 2008, ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a425d647-f6f4-4ce0-9ef6-422a35265838?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Southern Florida Assistant US Attorney A. Marie Villafana said Epstein didn't qualify for the work release program since Florida law bans people who have committed three violations in five years from eligibility. Despite being informed about this, the Palm Beach County Sheriff's office under Bradshaw allowed for Epstein to leave the jail under Bradshaw's work release program.
Making matters worse, while Epstein was incarcerated in Palm Beach and actively engaged in their work release program between 2008 and 2009, [Epstein's Florida based company, Florida Science Foundation paid Palm Beach Sheriff's Office (PBSO) $128,136.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7df3a26e-bdc4-4f00-ae60-ac7d4271335d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) This information was only discovered via records requests, but was hidden from the public by PBSO. Additionally, when his sentence ended and he was given probation, Epstein was allowed to fulfill his court ordered community service hours at the Florida Science Foundation, his own personal nonprofit. It was also later revealed that while under work release, which was supposed to be supervised by PBSO officers, ["more than one woman" was sexually propositioned by Epstein at his Florida Science Foundation office".](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7df3a26e-bdc4-4f00-ae60-ac7d4271335d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
According to the work release program rules, a PBSO deputy was assigned to "remain in the office with Epstein at all times. Thus, it is even more alarming how Epstein was able to sexually proposition multiple women in his office while under PBSO supervision.
Additionally, [according to a report by WPTV](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7f7334ea-a3ff-4627-bad0-c1eb06a4c04b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)'s investigative news team in West Palm Beach, PBSO _" deputy logs show Epstein was escorted to his home by deputies at least nine times" and "deputies left him in his home unsupervised for up to three hours sometimes, despite the fact that agency rules stated Epstein "is not to leave his designated workplace for any reason, with the exception of returning to the PBSO stockade, or for emergency medical treatment."_
Knowing this, why did Palm Beach Sheriff Ric Bradshaw's police department accept nearly $130,000 from a sexual predator and pedophile? And why was this hidden from the public for a decade?
On July 6, 2019, Jeffrey Epstein was arrested and taken into custody on federal charges for the sex trafficking of minors in Florida and New York.
13 days later on July 19, Sheriff Ric Bradshaw of the Palm Beach County Sheriff's office ordered an internal investigation into PBSO's handling of the Jeffrey Epstein Work release relationship, which was overseen by Bradshaw ten years prior.
Oddly, Bradshaw never once called for an investigation into the unethical PBSO work release program between 2008 and 2019, which suggests the investigation was only prompted out of Bradshaw's fear of what would be uncovered about his own unethical and possibly illegal actions as the overseer of the work release program under which Epstein was able to get away with violating the rules and sexually propositioning women in his office.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..7jYjsZTEorlqicmM8hu9AVzRkD6Yg7gn7VAvynxbAQo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=129706588)
Four days after Bradshaw called for an internal investigation into his own work release program, Florida State Senator Lauren Book, who is a Democrat representative in Broward County, Florida, which neighbors Palm Beach County, sent a letter to Florida Governor Ron DeSantis on July 23, 2019 in which she addressed the alarming fact that Epstein was able to sexually abuse young girls while under Sheriff Bradshaw's work release program. In the letter, she said this is _**" yet another breakdown of the system's dealing with this pedophile abuser." Book continued, "We are calling for accountability on all fronts, and to that end, I am formally requesting for you to direct the Florida Department of Law Enforcement (FDLE) to investigate this matter."**_
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b61a6609-fe36-40d8-87d1-d6fb757a18f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I reached out to Senator Book's office and they confirmed the legitimacy of this letter she sent to Governor DeSantis in 2019. After she sent her letter, Senator Book [said she received death threats and over a dozen phone calls from supporters of Palm Beach Sheriff Bradshaw ordering her to cease and desist her efforts ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a50f4fd4-f8e0-4911-a324-38930d4c4451?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)to have Governor DeSantis investigate the Palm Beach County Sheriff's office relationship with Jeffrey Epstein during the work release program.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c766c272-5c36-464b-8a37-35fbcca8ca8f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
> "I've received countless phone calls saying 'Little girl, you don't know what you're getting into,' and telling me that I should just stop," Book [said ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/0c4bf004-0cab-4609-afc7-e00f2bce362a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)in [an interview](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/85ba10d6-5a27-40b6-a4c6-52a7a866b802?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with the _Miami Herald._
Book was warned that calling for an independent investigation into Sheriff Bradshaw would be politically disadvantageous to her career since Bradshaw is close to John Kazanjian, the president of the politically influential Florida Police Benevolent Association (PBA). According to a [report](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/105bae7e-715e-4dc7-ab3e-dec2cccac710?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "Kazanjian, who is also President of the Palm Beach PBA, [endorsed DeSantis for Governor](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/9e7c20ba-c527-418e-8102-83a3162cc188?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and served on DeSantis's public safety transition team. The PBA contributed $25,000 to DeSantis' political action committee".
In a 2018 statemnet, PBA president John Kazanjian[ said,](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/9e7c20ba-c527-418e-8102-83a3162cc188?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) "Ron DeSantis understands the dangers our officers face, in our prisons and on our streets."
PBA also endorsed DeSantis for re-election in 2022. In the PBA's November 2021 endorsement of Ron DeSantis's re-election, Kazanjian [said](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a0aaf484-4c5b-48ed-b9df-e085b049e316?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "We know that he will protect law enforcement officers from the threat of the 'Defund the Police' movement, while also creating an environment that recruits and retains the best and brightest sworn law enforcement officers our country as to offer. **We have his back and we know he has ours, "** Kazanjian added.
The Police Benevolent Association, which endorsed Ron DeSantis's re-election for Governor in 2022, [has thrown their support](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ce782f47-0dba-4a11-bc70-5e7f3374fa0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) behind Bradshaw for 2024. "From improving our working conditions to negotiating superior contracts, Sheriff Bradshaw has always had our backs," said**John Kazanjian** , President of the Palm Beach County Police Benevolent Association**.** "He holds everyone to the highest standards and so do we."
It is rather alarming to know that Sheriff Bradshaw found it appropriate to oversee his own internal investigation of a sexual crime that his police department, under his watch [was accused of being involved in. ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/1ff669d9-9012-4edf-a68d-86991cdea8bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)If it wasn't for Senator Book's letter to Governor DeSantis, which resulted in a firestorm of media coverage and a public pressure campaign on both PBSO and Governor DeSantis, perhaps Bradshaw would have gotten away with overseeing his own investigation into himself.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1123743&post_id=129706588&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTI5NzA2NTg4LCJpYXQiOjE2ODczMTI5NTAsImV4cCI6MTY4OTkwNDk1MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMjM3NDMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.uEecdYxfL8nGNXkJ6h2FDfNERP5I8bOSMhmi6mS2lIk)
However, on August 6, 2019, nearly two weeks after Senator Book sent her letter to Governor DeSantis, PBSO Sheriff Rick Bradshaw sent a hand signed letter to Governor Ron DeSantis asking the Governor to instruct FDLE to assume and lead the criminal investigation into Epstein's work release at PBSO during his incarceration for sex crimes.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d2cc0e3c-79a5-405a-b8f8-1e45b44262eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Letters generally take several days to arrive in the mail. And even if a letter is sent priority or overnight, it would not prompt a response for at least one business day.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b213c601-8b7c-44df-b7fb-8c7c9e9e73df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
However, oddly enough, **on August 6, 2019,**_**the same exact day**_**that Bradshaw sent his letter to Governor DeSantis, DeSantis sent a letter to FDLE Commissioner Rick Swearingen in which he referenced Bradshaw 's letter. In DeSantis's letter to Swearingen, Governor DeSantis said, "I am requesting that FDLE assume the criminal investigation regarding Jeffrey Epstein."**
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c3b2df9d-1ea8-49ce-baab-dc5836489dac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
At the time, Bradshaw, a Democrat, was running for re-election for his fifth term as Palm Beach County Sheriff, and he was being slammed by his opponents, as well as local and national media for overseeing Jeffrey Epstein's work release.
How is it possible that Senator Book's letter to Governor DeSantis, which was hand signed and sent on July 23, 2019, was never officially addressed in the media or responded to by Governor DeSantis, but Bradshaw's letter, in the middle of his election, was addressed by DeSantis the same exact day Bradshaw sent it?
Unsurprisingly, the FDLE investigation, which was ordered by Governor DeSantis on August 6, 2019 was stalled for the duration of the 2020 election in which Bradshaw was a candidate on the ballot. Bradshaw ultimately won re-election in 2020.
Four months later, on December 16, 2019, Sheriff Bradshaw [announced t](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/48d57177-1a1b-4682-8f35-a84af5c31583?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)hat he would be terminating the work release program at the Palm Beach County Sheriff's office and jail.
On November 2, 2020, just one day before Bradshaw's election, [it was announced ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/1ce6b53a-2c99-4869-b12f-0a6cd9cf5a37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)that Jeffrey Epstein's Palm Beach mansion would be DEMOLISHED. This is the same Palm Beach mansion where he carried out his sex crimes and returned several times during his work release program under Sheriff Bradshaw.
On April 22, 2021, Epstein's Palm Beach mansion, located at 358 El Brillo Way, was [officially demolished](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7b546585-7610-4035-9978-94288a0fd913?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) after it was purchased for $18.5 million. The funds from the sale of his estate were allocated to the Victims' Compensation Program to make financial payments to Epstein's victims.
Less than 3 weeks after Epstein's mansion was demolished, and almost two years after Ron DeSantis announced his decision to turn the investigation over to FDLE, FDLE announced the conclusion of their investigation on May 10, 2021. In a [statement, ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f3b7317e-16c3-4696-a2f8-244d3306327d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)FDLE said,
> "no evidence was developed to substantiate that any identified PBSO member engaged in criminal activity during the performance of their duties associated with PBSO's housing and supervision of Jeffrey Epstein."
Jeffrey Epstein is dead, and the circumstances surrounding his death are questionable, at best. Did Jeffrey Epstein kill himself? If not, who killed Jeffrey Epstein? Why did he pay PBSO $130,000 during his imprisonment while under work release? How come the officers who violated work release rules were never held accountable?
Many questions remain unanswered, and many victims have been left unfulfilled of the justice they deserved to receive as victims of a serial pedophile and sexual predator, thanks to Florida's failure to deliver accountability and transparency.
And while Governor Ron DeSantis, who likes to refer to himself on the campaign trail as the "Law and Order candidate" is running for US President in the 2024 GOP primary against President Trump, Sheriff Ric Bradshaw, the longest serving Sheriff in Palm Beach, is currently running for his 6th term as Palm Beach County Sheriff.
There is no denying that Jeffrey Epstein received preferential treatment in Florida during both the investigation of his sexual crimes, as well as his incarceration which was far from normal, and highly inappropriate.
Jeffrey Epstein is the ultimate "Florida Man" story. It's a story of political power that is blind to party affiliation. A story of a broken justice system in which justice and accountability can be negotiated and brokered... if the price is right.

The life and death of world renowned sexual predator and pedophile Jefrey Epstein is commonplace, and riddled with theories and unanswered questions. It shocked the world when it was announced that Jeffrey Epstein had been found dead in his New York jail cell, which was reported as "suicide" on Aug. 10, 2019, just 35 days after he was arrested. At the time of his highly suspicious death, Epstein was awaiting trial on sex trafficking charges after he was accused of sexually trafficking dozens of underage girls and engaging in sexual acts with them. According to the and by the United States Attorney's Office in the Southern District of New York, prosecutors said in or about 2002, up to and including at least in or about 2005, " Epstein sexually exploited and abused dozens of underage girls by enticing them to engage in sex acts with him in exchange for money. Epstein allegedly worked with several employees and associates to ensure that he had a steady supply of minor victims to abuse, and paid several of those victims themselves to recruit other underage girls to engage in similar sex acts for money. He committed these offenses in locations including New York, New York, and Palm Beach, Florida." The indictment described how Epstein would lure women to his gated compound in Palm Beach, Florida where he would pay young girls, many who were underage, hundreds of dollars to give him nude massages and have sex with him. Epstein and his associate Ghislaine Maxwell also enticed the young girls to recruit other girls to engage in sexual acts with Epstein. Prior to being arrested and jailed in New York, Epstein, who made his fortune as a financier, had previously been investigated in Florida more ten years earlier in connection with the sexual abuse of underage girls. While there's enough salacious details surrounding the the Epstein scandal to fill an encyclopedia, the Florida based investigation into Epstein first began in 2005 by police the family of a 14-year-old girl reported that she was sexually molested inside Epstein's Palm Beach mansion. The allegations grew in numbers as more underage girls, who were local high school students, also told police that Epstein recruited them and paid them to give him sexual massages. During the Palm Beach Police Department's investigation into Epstein, following the first report made by the 14 year old girl's parents, police rummaged through Epstein's trash, and discovered a piece of paper that had notes from a call written on it. Th note contained the young girl's name on it, along with the names and phone numbers of other underage girls who Epstein wanted to sexually solicit. In October of 2005, the Palm Beach police were granted a warrant to search Epstein's Palm Beach compound. Despite engaging in pedophilia and prostitution in Florida, Epstein was given a slap on the wrist. In May 2006, Epstein's case was formally referred to a grand jury in Palm Beach after he was charged with multiple counts of unlawful sex with a minor. He was later indicted on a single count of soliciting prostitution, which prompted the FBI to open up a multi-state investigation into Epstein. In 2007, Epstein's legal team had a private meeting with the US Attorney for the Southern District of Florida, Alex Acosta. It was during this meeting where Acosta struck a deal with Epstein's legal team and agreed to only give Epstein a 13 month prison sentence in a low-security prison, and a total end to the FBI's investigation into Epstein. Along with a 13 month prison sentence for his prostitution crimes, which was ultimately cut short by five months, Epstein also received immunity from being prosecuted on future similar charges brought against him on the condition that he register as a sex offender in Florida twice a year. He was sentenced in June of 2008, and released from prison early in July 2009. In 2020, following Epstein's alleged suicide, the Justice Department's Office of Professional Responsibility conducted an investigation into Acosta's handling of the Jeffrey Epstein plea deal, and the Department of Justice ultimately concluded that Acosta exercised "poor judgment" when he resolved the federal investigation into Epstein through with Epstein's legal team in 2008. Following his alleged suicide, Epstein's predator behavior in Palm Beach was turned into the Netflix , which focused heavily on the Palm Beach Sheriff Office's handling of the investigation and incarceration of Epstein. The biggest controversy surrounding Florida's handling of Jeffrey Epstein's cushy plea deal was the decision by Palm Beach County Sheriff Ric Bradshaw, who is a Democrat, to allow Epstein to serve out his prison sentence in a private, low security wing of the Palm Beach County jail where he participated in a work release program under Sheriff Bradshaw. At the time, Epstein was well known and high profile Democrat donor who had close associations with President Bill Clinton. Under the work release program, Epstein was allowed to leave the jail for 12 hours each day, six days a week. When Epstein wanted to leave the jail, he was picked up by his private driver and a security guard, driven to his office where he conducted work meetings and met with visitors, and he was even allowed to return to his Palm Beach estate, in violation of home visit restrictions for work release. It is still a mystery as to why Epstein, who was known for having high level connections with politicians, global elites, and many celebrities, including several US Presidents, was ever approved for the Florida work release program. In Southern Florida Assistant US Attorney A. Marie Villafana said Epstein didn't qualify for the work release program since Florida law bans people who have committed three violations in five years from eligibility. Despite being informed about this, the Palm Beach County Sheriff's office under Bradshaw allowed for Epstein to leave the jail under Bradshaw's work release program. Making matters worse, while Epstein was incarcerated in Palm Beach and actively engaged in their work release program between 2008 and 2009, This information was only discovered via records requests, but was hidden from the public by PBSO. Additionally, when his sentence ended and he was given probation, Epstein was allowed to fulfill his court ordered community service hours at the Florida Science Foundation, his own personal nonprofit. It was also later revealed that while under work release, which was supposed to be supervised by PBSO officers, According to the work release program rules, a PBSO deputy was assigned to "remain in the office with Epstein at all times. Thus, it is even more alarming how Epstein was able to sexually proposition multiple women in his office while under PBSO supervision. Additionally, investigative news team in West Palm Beach, PBSO " deputy logs show Epstein was escorted to his home by deputies at least nine times" and "deputies left him in his home unsupervised for up to three hours sometimes, despite the fact that agency rules stated Epstein "is not to leave his designated workplace for any reason, with the exception of returning to the PBSO stockade, or for emergency medical treatment." Knowing this, why did Palm Beach Sheriff Ric Bradshaw's police department accept nearly $130,000 from a sexual predator and pedophile? And why was this hidden from the public for a decade? On July 6, 2019, Jeffrey Epstein was arrested and taken into custody on federal charges for the sex trafficking of minors in Florida and New York. 13 days later on July 19, Sheriff Ric Bradshaw of the Palm Beach County Sheriff's office ordered an internal investigation into PBSO's handling of the Jeffrey Epstein Work release relationship, which was overseen by Bradshaw ten years prior. Oddly, Bradshaw never once called for an investigation into the unethical PBSO work release program between 2008 and 2019, which suggests the investigation was only prompted out of Bradshaw's fear of what would be uncovered about his own unethical and possibly illegal actions as the overseer of the work release program under which Epstein was able to get away with violating the rules and sexually propositioning women in his office. Four days after Bradshaw called for an internal investigation into his own work release program, Florida State Senator Lauren Book, who is a Democrat representative in Broward County, Florida, which neighbors Palm Beach County, sent a letter to Florida Governor Ron DeSantis on July 23, 2019 in which she addressed the alarming fact that Epstein was able to sexually abuse young girls while under Sheriff Bradshaw's work release program. In the letter, she said this is " yet another breakdown of the system's dealing with this pedophile abuser." Book continued, "We are calling for accountability on all fronts, and to that end, I am formally requesting for you to direct the Florida Department of Law Enforcement (FDLE) to investigate this matter." | | ---|---|--- I reached out to Senator Book's office and they confirmed the legitimacy of this letter she sent to Governor DeSantis in 2019. Book was warned that calling for an independent investigation into Sheriff Bradshaw would be politically disadvantageous to her career since Bradshaw is close to John Kazanjian, the president of the politically influential Florida Police Benevolent Association (PBA). According to a , "Kazanjian, who is also President of the Palm Beach PBA, and served on DeSantis's public safety transition team. The PBA contributed $25,000 to DeSantis' political action committee". name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Fight For Parental Rights: Control, Power, and Politics
body:
Episode #12 of Unleashed with Heidi Ganahl is LIVE!
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-r/) Hi Peter, Parental rights in America are under attack -- and if you're a parent, you are at war even if you don't realize it yet. This week on Unleashed, we explore the Left's obsession with taking rights away from parents and putting a wedge in every American family unit. I am joined by Tamra Farah, a longtime warrior for parents and a leader at [Parents Know Best](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-y/). Read her recent op-ed on Town Hall, [_Pride Month and Why Schools Are Sexualizing Children_](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-j/). I also feature LIVE interviews from the Western Conservative Summit with Cassie Kimbrell and Ken Witt whose local success story out of Woodland Park, Colorado is gaining [national media attention](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-t/). We talked about...➡️ How groups like [Southern Poverty Law Center](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-i/) (who recently declared [Moms for Liberty](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-d/) a hate group) are creating a culture of extremism in America by inflating numbers, conflating dissent with hate, and targeting conservative voices.

➡️ A new law in California that goes as far as saying "non-affirming behavior" is child abuse.

➡️ The history behind gender ideology as a political strategy, the Left's use of education and the public school system to further their agenda, and how to find the best education option for your family.

➡️ The brave steps Cassie and Ken are taking to protect the American Dream in Woodland Park schools and how it's resulted in both massive success and national controversy.
### **Episode #12 - THE FIGHT FOR PARENTAL RIGHTS:
CONTROL, POWER, AND POLITICS**
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-h/) [WATCH ON YOUTUBE](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-k/) [WATCH ON RUMBLE](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-b/) [LISTEN HERE](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-n/) _Not into podcasts? I post transcripts of my monologues and full episode breakdowns every week on my Substack.[You can subscribe here!](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-p/)_
## **STAY TUNED FOR A BIG WEEK ON SOCIAL MEDIA!**
I've got some fun surprises for you on social media! As I mentioned last week, we recorded several interviews at the Western Conservative Summit so today, we'll be dropping a **BONUS EPISODE** that you don't want to miss. _Hint: It features some rockstar Gen-Zers doing some incredible things in the conservative movement here in Colorado._ I'll also be dropping some controversial thoughts on the recent [Robert Kennedy Jr. interview with Joe Rogan](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-x/)... stay tuned and follow along at any of the platforms linked below.[_Substack _](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-m/) _ | _[_ Website_](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-c/) _ | _[_ Facebook_](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-q/) _ | _[_ Instagram_](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-a/) _ | _[_ LinkedIn_](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-f/) _ | _[_ YouTube_](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-z/) _ | _[_ Rumble_](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-v/) _ | _[_ Truth Social_](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-e/) _ | _[_ Gettr_](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-s/)
## **THE COLORADO KIDS UNLEASHED!
SUMMER CHALLENGE UPDATE**
The Ganahl family has been having lots of fun with the Colorado Kids' Unleashed! Summer Challenge! We've been riding roller coasters at Elitches, learning how to figure skate during the Broadmoor World Arena Summer Skate sessions, and traveling to places like Florida with longtime friends, Copper Mountain for a BBQ competition, and Utah for a basketball tournament. How's the challenge been for you and your family?**Reply to this email with some updates!** And if you're not doing the challenge yet, it's not too late to start. Join us and [download the tracker](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-g/) to get the whole family engaged! Listen to [Episode 10](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-w/) for a full breakdown. [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-yd/) Have a great week!Heidi [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-yh/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-yk/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-yu/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-jl/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-jr/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-jy/) | Heidi GanahlLone Tree, CO [Preferences](https://heidi4gov.updatemyprofile.com/i-abdlhk-E8C3E4FD-ttjjilthht-jj) | [Unsubscribe](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-u-abdlhk-ttjjilthht-jt/)

name: Paul "Bud" Haedike, American Veterans Center
subject: I was at D-Day
body:
My plane was shot down by the Germans in my first combat mission in World War II.

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0g3l55j88kotihvpd9p459kvchg3dr9lp16eji0_rp22sh2s8i66o77cpgm8or6cdh2bs)
---
Fellow American, My plane was shot down by the Germans in my first combat mission in World War II. Our rookie B-17 crew was in "Tail End Charlie," which is what we called the last plane in the formation to pass over the target. The Germans had zeroed in on us with 88 millimeter cannons -- which could fire five miles up -- and they hit our number one and number two engine. A B-17 is not made to stay up on two engines. But with skill, determination, and good fortune, we crash-landed in Belgium just over the Nazi lines. Five days later, we were rescued ... and I went on to fly 22 more missions.
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfhj7bp60e092upb8k8cjpkq47nttqr6dsp0onjg_rp22sh2s8i66o77cpgm8or6cdh2bs)
---
_Above: The American Veterans Center recorded and released a 30-minute video documentary with me about my service in World War II._
---
**A few years ago, my friends at the American Veterans Center invited me to record a video documentary about my experience in World War II.** I was proud to share my story with the American Veterans Center (AVC), both to honor the memories of the brave men I served with and to pass on our hard-fought lessons to the next generation. Right now, the American Veterans Center is working around the clock to interview and record as many video documentaries as possible with World War II veterans like me. [**May I ask you to chip in $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today to help fund the American Veterans Center** ’**s critical video documentary project? As a non-profit, AVC depends on the contributions of patriotic Americans like you.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zej2g5b6tfj39iou3664b8fkhmi0l2crkcqiiv9g_rp22sh2s8i66o77cpgm8or6cdh2bs)
---
[Help the American Veterans Center](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr9b8lp0gaitqgoij59q1l72nc66qirkh9fu8ks0_rp22sh2s8i66o77cpgm8or6cdh2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center records video documentaries with veterans like me:
• The experienced AVC video team coordinates travel plans with the veteran and his or her family. Oftentimes, AVC will even send out their staff to veterans’ homes – of course, at no cost to the veteran.

• AVC records a beautiful, professional-quality video documentary that lets veterans tell their own stories in their own words. A keepsake copy is also given to the veteran and their family to enjoy. • AVC makes available – for free! – these powerful video documentaries to be used as part of our shared American history. These videos reach millions on YouTube and have been used by the Library of Congress, presidential museums, and award-winning films. [**Can I count on you to help the American Veterans Center record even more video documentaries with your gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today? Your gift is urgently needed for AVC to continue their efforts.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zesiq2fc8vma715n8kujeii0btkrd961k54k71vo_rp22sh2s8i66o77cpgm8or6cdh2bs)
---
[Help the American Veterans Center](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zon2q3kg0k5rhrmnb4ujrdf6nhi8p89ii0d6lk8o_rp22sh2s8i66o77cpgm8or6cdh2bs)
---
The history books will teach you the facts, but only the servicemen and women of World War II can tell you what it was really like. In the beginning of the war, they said if a guy flew six or eight missions, he was on borrowed time. There were many men who served with me who didn't come home. They didn't get to be husbands, didn't get to be dads, and none of them got to be grandfathers -- which you can't understand until you reach that point in your own life. _Thanks to the American Veterans Center, and generous Americans like you who made my video documentary possible, my story, and the story of the young men in the Eighth Air Force, has entered our shared American history._ [**To help preserve the legacy of more World War II veterans like me, please make your most generous gift to the American Veterans Center today.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zadivt3079n9kq6a7gdpnsf63dr4orflh98c9vh8_rp22sh2s8i66o77cpgm8or6cdh2bs) I understand first-hand what good, important work the American Veterans Center does – and why their mission to record video documentaries with more veterans like me is so urgent. [**That** ’**s why I** ’**m asking for your support of the American Veterans Center today.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk9a2sa7bkelk1uk16jlm2qt113jl0ktnfhh2vjg_rp22sh2s8i66o77cpgm8or6cdh2bs) Thank you,

---

clean_body: My plane was shot down by the Germans in my first combat mission in World War II. | | | Fellow American, My plane was shot down by the Germans in my first combat mission in World War II. Our rookie B-17 crew was in "Tail End Charlie," which is what we called the last plane in the formation to pass over the target. The Germans had zeroed in on us with 88 millimeter cannons -- which could fire five miles up -- and they hit our number one and number two engine. A B-17 is not made to stay up on two engines. But with skill, determination, and good fortune, we crash-landed in Belgium just over the Nazi lines. Five days later, we were rescued ... and I went on to fly 22 more missions. Above: The American Veterans Center recorded and released a 30-minute video documentary with me about my service in World War II. A few years ago, my friends at the American Veterans Center invited me to record a video documentary about my experience in World War II. I was proud to share my story with the American Veterans Center (AVC), both to honor the memories of the brave men I served with and to pass on our hard-fought lessons to the next generation. Right now, the American Veterans Center is working around the clock to interview and record as many video documentaries as possible with World War II veterans like me. When the American Veterans Center records video documentaries with veterans like me: • The experienced AVC video team coordinates travel plans with the veteran and his or her family. Oftentimes, AVC will even send out their staff to veterans’ homes – of course, at no cost to the veteran. • AVC records a beautiful, professional-quality video documentary that lets veterans tell their own stories in their own words. A keepsake copy is also given to the veteran and their family to enjoy. • AVC makes available – for free! – these powerful video documentaries to be used as part of our shared American history. These videos reach millions on YouTube and have been used by the Library of Congress, presidential museums, and award-winning films. The history books will teach you the facts, but only the servicemen and women of World War II can tell you what it was really like. In the beginning of the war, they said if a guy flew six or eight missions, he was on borrowed time. There were many men who served with me who didn't come home. They didn't get to be husbands, didn't get to be dads, and none of them got to be grandfathers -- which you can't understand until you reach that point in your own life. Thanks to the American Veterans Center, and generous Americans like you who made my video documentary possible, my story, and the story of the young men in the Eighth Air Force, has entered our shared American history. I understand first-hand what good, important work the American Veterans Center does – and why their mission to record video documentaries with more veterans like me is so urgent. name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Hillsdale College

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWQXABzDtN

Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey
on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWQXABzDtN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Friend,

Your participation in Hillsdale
College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is
requested.

Your response will only take a few
minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and
the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the
proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court
differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the
bench.

Do you agree that the role of the
Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and
NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?

YES

NO

Even worse, progressives dismayed by
recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with
additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put
it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to
a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by
four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme
Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me
using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme
Court right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form
effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the
importance of the Constitution to liberty-including the proper
role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution
instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your National
Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61943777:WQXABzDtN:m:3:2532013465:697FE9B74D525B2CDE5C3C428174CFFD:r

And after you give your views, I hope
you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a
tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's
schools to provide young people with a proper education in
American history and government makes it easier for progressives
to undermine the separation of powers at the heart of limited
government.

I'm sure you agree that too many
Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary
in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has
expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty
nationwide, directly reaching and teaching millions of Americans
in all 50 states-including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of
anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across
America.

Your support will help us to expand our
educational outreach, including:

Teaching millions of citizens
nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution
101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S.
Supreme Court."

Reaching over six million
households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's
free digest of liberty.

Sending millions of pocket-size
copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and
students in K-12 schools across America.

Restoring excellence to K-12
education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70
classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong
American history and civics curriculum.

We undertake our educational outreach
efforts on behalf of liberty-as we do all of our work-without
accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in
the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work-including
reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of
liberty-depends entirely on the support of Americans like you,
who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with
Hillsdale using the College's National Survey on the United
States Supreme Court right away-the link is below.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61943777:WQXABzDtN:m:3:2532013465:697FE9B74D525B2CDE5C3C428174CFFD:r

Then please consider giving a generous
tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations
through education.

Thank you for your time and
attention-and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty
since 1844

Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI
49242 USA

clean_body: Hillsdale College Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested. Please see a special message from our sponsor: Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested. Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America. The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution. But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench. Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda? YES NO Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda. As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats." What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic? Please share your thoughts with me using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away. Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty-including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench. You can easily complete your National Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link: And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to undermine the separation of powers at the heart of limited government. I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order. That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly reaching and teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states-including yours! These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America. Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court." Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty. Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America. Restoring excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum. We undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty-as we do all of our work-without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. That means all of our work-including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty-depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away-the link is below. Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education. Thank you for your time and attention-and for your support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 18, 2022. As a former athlete, mother of two daughters who are athletes, lifelong runner, and former coach of girls’ sports teams, I know how much of a positive impact sports can have on girls’ lives. It offers opportunities for young girls to discover their strengths and teaches them that hard work pays off. The fact that women’s sports are under attack from the Left makes no sense. Biological men and women are physically different and should be respected for those differences. Having biological men compete against women in athletics takes away opportunities for women and girls to succeed. Bottom line: We cannot allow that to happen. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=49e738d557a751e02f2a33b033abf9b4d2ab5c74b0973576c1355b4dc08dc3d1954122d843f427e1521f3535fcc0a9c20010f18a1361e812 That’s why I’m a proud champion of defending women’s place in sports. I led on this issue when I was in the Senate in Virginia, and I continue to fight for it today. Just recently, I proudly cast my vote in favor of legislation to put these protections into federal law. If you also want to protect women’s sports for future generations, I’m asking you to sign our official citizens petition. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=49e738d557a751e02f2a33b033abf9b4d2ab5c74b0973576c1355b4dc08dc3d1954122d843f427e1521f3535fcc0a9c20010f18a1361e812 Help Jen Protect Women’s Sports >>> This is an important fight, one for our daughters, sisters, and mothers. And we can’t afford to stay out of it. We need every American to make themselves heard, and I hope that you will take a stand today. I’m trying to get 782 more signatures on my Protect Women's Sports petition by 11:59 PM tonight, and https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=49e738d557a751e01cbcaee6852234a5b4b0d4f22702c11f1a41238197106879a1fca432a37150806fec74e4fd3a780de2491de8939ca223 I’m asking you to add your name, Peter. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=49e738d557a751e02f2a33b033abf9b4d2ab5c74b0973576c1355b4dc08dc3d1954122d843f427e1521f3535fcc0a9c20010f18a1361e812 Protect Women’s Sports >>> Add Your Name Our movement to protect women’s sports is growing, but we still have a ways to go in taking this victory home. The way that we’ll get there is by making our voices heard. Join me in this fight today. Thanks in advance for your help, https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=49e738d557a751e02f2a33b033abf9b4d2ab5c74b0973576c1355b4dc08dc3d1954122d843f427e1521f3535fcc0a9c20010f18a1361e812 Jen Kiggans Paid for by Kiggans for Congress USE OF MILITARY IMAGES OR RANK DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT BY THE U.S. DEPT. name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: Primary Results/ Thank You!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013WZRATqttLw6HVKvKUFYn1qNW6P2Izm1_bILsfnrD82PXcC-EhQVAZO5xxaoPgQeYNzexxzjlT6dLe19nEPa5ayUsttOt8Ltdh8f2THyeLms_ozgpIxYhiQtIL6mMaIaq0PVgl5ZUKL-vJH4qgBDzzKQphljqo0L&c=JAWvkZtyivj5L-KbuMt_Jfw-FLJP3hfQ0v3Dx2xhgSnXxdmh2M0DFg==&ch=Gv4aw-dQjC5C-71MXgd_xxQDg8-v1BoOkRzzrni5Nlc0wjzMiHUa-Q==)
---
| Thanks to many prayers and an amazing team, I won the Republican nomination with a landslide win on May 6 at a convention held at Buckingham County High School. I've been told it was one of the biggest four way convention wins ever. Thank you!
Now I have to defeat the democrat in November. We are working hard to help other Republicans win as well. Now, that the primaries are over, it's time to unite!
[Click this link for all June 20 Virginia Primary election results.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013WZRATqttLw6HVKvKUFYn1qNW6P2Izm1_bILsfnrD82PXcC-EhQVAbu-Eq0FBd3W7CeYdYdRYzcZ5N4Y9VsZfxoeWfzWN2FK-T0bAY87ogz23SrdIJUWqyiSGWnHQBI3aX8ttvuO2s_DLNNNyFU-R8p4H_kFPP91jRwEtDXFjUugEJGdyf88jjuJsulopnkJn6EWl-8YhQhaH4giyLOpuuMtYTbAZqRRXY6BhWfXekU=&c=JAWvkZtyivj5L-KbuMt_Jfw-FLJP3hfQ0v3Dx2xhgSnXxdmh2M0DFg==&ch=Gv4aw-dQjC5C-71MXgd_xxQDg8-v1BoOkRzzrni5Nlc0wjzMiHUa-Q==)
We have more details later. Below are a few Congratulations!
---
| Congratulations Delegate Buddy Fowler
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013WZRATqttLw6HVKvKUFYn1qNW6P2Izm1_bILsfnrD82PXcC-EhQVAePibsLXvtSYihQQKoASSPOg7cscKv2tLEWQkyh6E5K1MimJQ68oPYFr2vNSOHcQ7CAjUSQ4FKhbSMYJzkdaWBUkgRIn6mprYQ==&c=JAWvkZtyivj5L-KbuMt_Jfw-FLJP3hfQ0v3Dx2xhgSnXxdmh2M0DFg==&ch=Gv4aw-dQjC5C-71MXgd_xxQDg8-v1BoOkRzzrni5Nlc0wjzMiHUa-Q==)
---
| Congratulations to my friend and fellow Republican, Delegate Buddy Fowler for winning the Republican nomination for District 59. We had a lot of fun talking with constituents while knocking doors, waving at cars, etc. With your help Buddy will go on to win in November and do a great job for Louisa, Hanover, and Henrico. Thank you for for the support.
[Click here for Buddy Fowler Website.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013WZRATqttLw6HVKvKUFYn1qNW6P2Izm1_bILsfnrD82PXcC-EhQVAePibsLXvtSYihQQKoASSPOg7cscKv2tLEWQkyh6E5K1MimJQ68oPYFr2vNSOHcQ7CAjUSQ4FKhbSMYJzkdaWBUkgRIn6mprYQ==&c=JAWvkZtyivj5L-KbuMt_Jfw-FLJP3hfQ0v3Dx2xhgSnXxdmh2M0DFg==&ch=Gv4aw-dQjC5C-71MXgd_xxQDg8-v1BoOkRzzrni5Nlc0wjzMiHUa-Q==)
[Click here for District 59 map.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013WZRATqttLw6HVKvKUFYn1qNW6P2Izm1_bILsfnrD82PXcC-EhQVAbDBL94FfFmU0sELcyhgk-DgV4sQsPxCqVGxjlh27wh3JOMPcAyw4vszkigvengPpWznDPqKAL0UAW2jxwK-bnQ68XTysrlH1KkQTdF0huCkhXeTnWVXtH9e1-GRn0AjN5N6-TmePxbEVvrJ_Jo16iw=&c=JAWvkZtyivj5L-KbuMt_Jfw-FLJP3hfQ0v3Dx2xhgSnXxdmh2M0DFg==&ch=Gv4aw-dQjC5C-71MXgd_xxQDg8-v1BoOkRzzrni5Nlc0wjzMiHUa-Q==)
---
| Congratulations Mark Earley for Delegate
---
|
---
| Congratulations Mark Earley for winning the Republican nomination for House of Delegates District 73. With your continued help Mark will go on to win in November and do a great job for Chesterfield. Thank you for for the support.
[Click here for District 73 map.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013WZRATqttLw6HVKvKUFYn1qNW6P2Izm1_bILsfnrD82PXcC-EhQVAfRAE6o5HRihSJTAD70DCLE6fwWzgAseSd81UZoHu5q-fAJFeCxj6Zwk0bVjo54I91wvhHZzu3TuL8TUfjtSWQnv--w-ZfJJyJN76EFF1Cc4YFwYxUXbs04DHkURBO9vmQ4e2SEdnZVV52scAvT76tg=&c=JAWvkZtyivj5L-KbuMt_Jfw-FLJP3hfQ0v3Dx2xhgSnXxdmh2M0DFg==&ch=Gv4aw-dQjC5C-71MXgd_xxQDg8-v1BoOkRzzrni5Nlc0wjzMiHUa-Q==)

I've been told it was one of the biggest four way convention wins ever. Thank you! Now I have to defeat the democrat in November. We are working hard to help other Republicans win as well. Now, that the primaries are over, it's time to unite! == We have more details later. Below are a few Congratulations! | Congratulations Delegate Buddy Fowler | == | Congratulations to my friend and fellow Republican, Delegate Buddy Fowler for winning the Republican nomination for District 59. We had a lot of fun talking with constituents while knocking doors, waving at cars, etc. With your help Buddy will go on to win in November and do a great job for Louisa, Hanover, and Henrico. Thank you for for the support. == == | Congratulations Mark Earley for Delegate | | Congratulations Mark Earley for winning the Republican nomination for House of Delegates District 73. subject: Hunter Biden Pleads Guilty, Flying Taxis Prepare for Paris, and a Dazzling Drone Display
body:
Hunter Biden agreed to a deal on federal tax charges that will avert a felony gun charge and most likely save him from going to jail in return for his guilty plea.

# WEDNESDAY, JUNE 21, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day 78 years ago, America declared victory in Okinawa—the fierce and final battle of the Pacific campaign. U.S. casualties totaled nearly 50,000 in the brutal 82-day fight, but on June 21, 1945, U.S. troops took the island. In today's edition, we discuss Hunter Biden's guilty plea, flying two-seater taxis preparing for the Paris Olympics, and an amazing display of drone artistry over Shenzhen.

Have thoughts on what we can do better? [Please send us a note](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover)**** and let us know. We read every email and value your ideas! ## Hunter Biden Pleads Guilty
Hunter Biden agreed to a [deal on federal tax charges](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1vwyAUAH-NvRHhx6cHhi7Z0rWjBY9HTIXBsmnS_vsqnTuebjndx225-Vxyvb_7jVxPbfHY84MWrhlMDMQCY3SJCEiM5CZtjZBaSTmuzk4JhZaIoI31XCkhTEppkgq1FlaP2QEHwTVMfFYgxSVNxFM0YsYQFZIdJKeYezsuny3XvlIqP-1BxwXbNha39r6fg3gb4DrA1e-VnudLveDoGQsNcF2_aqeDhRypMlz9caeT5YptI9b9N3uS31tl5HUwNsrgkQsTPcggrZqtCvMccMLxcHF_5lLyqc0g-X3zufx19P-3_AYAAP__rF1jJA) that will avert a felony gun charge and most likely save him from going to jail in return for his guilty plea.

The agreement immediately [sparked outrage](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uwyAURp8Gb1j48mN7YOjiLV07WgQu8a2IsYDE7dtXydztkz7pHOl8XdaLo0T77dPd0baYV-cbPXEVhsPAQa7QBRsRAWWHdjDTKJXRSnWbDVPwcVKj13qaBzOMPjoQfgpzkFqPqiMLAqQwMIhZg5J9HFDEMMrZX4P2ODElMFDLpf_OtLcNY_rNTyy9z_cu2a21ozL5wWBhsJzn2bsfyvX1MlhebAaLMO_NYPF5vxWslRc8HtdE3u2Vb4-9YeFXCrjzI6HjAV3qig3HSSlRNSNT4nZ3lN7W9n-EvwAAAP__sHJdTQ) among some Republicans, who pointed to the disparity between the Hunter Biden deal and the Biden administration's ongoing charges against Donald Trump.

House leaders said the plea deal [wouldn't stop their investigation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2OqzAQxfGnMR1oPHYcKFzchi633RL5Yxxm5dgInKB9-1VSb3eKI_2k_9dtuTnOXO7_3YNsS3VxofGLFjA9yh7Vgl20iQhJdWSlGa9Km4vW3WonSKOP0QdNYHzyk0tykuPopIlJkezYIqACgxKmC2o1JEmQ4lVNwcdLoFFooMit7sN35dJWSvmnvmgfQn102a6tbYdQ_wTOAufzPIetZm4c6vsgcC50HgLntyJwBvPZAue1Pg_qd9qePnNw5ejXZ2m0954jlR5AAhpjut3G7eSc-TBXoeH-cJw_dvs7xW8AAAD__2x0XrI) into bribery allegations against Hunter Biden. They continue to press the FBI for the release of whistle-blower documents.
## Time Running Out for Titanic Submersible
A [growing armada](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1vgzAQQH8NbET2-QMYPHTJlq4dkX0-k2sNRLYb1H9fpXPHp7c8vY_bcvOceV_f_UaupWPx2PhJi7ADyAHUAn10iQhI9eSknUalrdG6v7vRBGkiGgiozYzaTlaGICdINEtKoWcHApSwIMVsQKtLkiRSHNWMIRqkqdOCIrejXD4P3tudUv45nlQueGx9dvfWHrVTbx1cO7j6x05nfakXlMaYqYNr4-Z3xuEshF9-pWHjWnlfh_odNiqVQ6ZhToKsTShjMnFOkqYIFiKOSEIqQ31x8XFyzlzt2Gmxbp7zX0X7f8pvAAAA__-yK2O7) of ships and airplanes is searching the North Atlantic for a missing submersible that disappeared on its way to visit the Titanic wreckage. The underwater ship has only a day or two of oxygen left.

The [five passengers ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj71uxCAQhJ_G7rBgwdguKNJcd2lTWvws542wOQF3Vt4-cupUI80U831f9_VuKdHx-LQ7mhbzan2jN65cMxAM5Ap9MBERUPZohJ4nqfSoVL-Z6LhQAqV107xY1DDzZZ5HB17HZRS8JwMcJNcg-DKCkkMUyGOY5OJdGD3OneIYqOUyfGc62oYx_eQ3lsHnvU9ma-1ZO_nRwa2D23meQ8FXw1Kv_WpySeHKLVfmsi2B7VQrHQ_WqNmDPKsvxy4IdvnwDm59MeF5UkpU9dQp_tgtpb-_9r_-bwAAAP__vfxbAw)on the tiny ship include a British billionaire; a top Pakistani executive for a giant conglomerate and his son; a French explorer who is an underwater expert; and the founder of OceanGate, the submersible company.

OceanGate charges up to $250,000 for a seat on the sub, which [barely has room ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj71u9CAQAJ8GOlvL8mcKiq-57r42pYVhORNhc7LJWXn76FKnnZFGmo_7fA-llv3xP2zke25ziL28aAYzoBhQzsiTz0RIkpMXZrJSGa0UX72zsESthM4OLQgpwhSn6DSAJYdL4sUjoASDApxGJccsCHKy0sUl6UgTU0Cp9HaMn63sfaVcv9uLjjG2jVe_9v48mfzH8Mbwdl3XuCzx7RjedrrON2xHTcPXOcSwhxQGo50BFJYfPj2vUms5jWUKHlso9Tfb_778CQAA__-pEFG0)for five passengers to sit on the floor. There's one bathroom with a curtain for privacy, a large viewing porthole, and a modified video game controller for steering.

## Dominos to Deliver Wherever You Are
Domino's Pizza is rolling out a new technology that lets people get [pizza delivered almost anywhere](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOtCAUhZ8GOwxeEJyC4m_s5m-3NAiX8W5QjLKa8ek3Tr3dyTnJl5Pv6zk8HSVaXv_djLbEPDhf6MBBaA4NBzlAFWxEBJQV2kZ3RirdKlVN9gHSixajaZX0zTi6MToDGqEzwYXOVGRBgBQaGvFoQck6NihiMPLhx9B67JgSGKjkrf7OtJQJY3rnA7fa57lKdipl3Zn8x6Bn0J_nWftl9PfIoL_RDHqhP5lBH_JMS975StfleFgv_rMcSOlulvXm84CJDtzefMftII_1VOZUbTasJ6VEuzZMidfsKH0elL-F_AYAAP__uuVivg), from parks to beaches to baseball fields.

The new ["Pinpoint Delivery"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDHvpCAQxT8NdpphEJSC4hq6vfZKgzLsckExyK1xP_3Frf_Vb4rJ-728P4_p4WKK2_O3W8nUkCe31PimCVSLvEUxYeNNIEISDRmuxkH0SvZ98zI9l4LrUco5uNmPTuMsOWrgCpSeZ2iiQUABCjloib3oAicIfhB6mb1caGQ9kI81l-5vjlt9UUhXflPplrw2ybxq3Q8mfjG0DO15nt2_w9Xs3XU_MLRHzeViaNe80c2Qs2dobytDC-p7M7Q-r3HLR7vHz8fd2Pbb13pK8U3laveSn8XdkQMIoWFUAAND2xTj9zOmFA81sB6eq4vp267-PNb_AAAA___Gqmje) service uses an app allowing customers to drop a pin on a map, no address necessary. The delivery can be tracked in real time.

Domino's says it's the first "quick-service" restaurant brand to offer delivery using a pin location rather than an address.
