clean_body: Hunter Biden agreed to a deal on federal tax charges that will avert a felony gun charge and most likely save him from going to jail in return for his guilty plea. | | | | | | WEDNESDAY, JUNE 21, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! On this day 78 years ago, America declared victory in Okinawa—the fierce and final battle of the Pacific campaign. U.S. casualties totaled nearly 50,000 in the brutal 82-day fight, but on June 21, 1945, U.S. troops took the island. In today's edition, we discuss Hunter Biden's guilty plea, flying two-seater taxis preparing for the Paris Olympics, and an amazing display of drone artistry over Shenzhen. Have thoughts on what we can do better? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover** and let us know. We read every email and value your ideas! If this is your first time reading The Flyover, and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, | Hunter Biden Pleads Guilty Hunter Biden agreed to a that will avert a felony gun charge and most likely save him from going to jail in return for his guilty plea. The agreement immediately among some Republicans, who pointed to the disparity between the Hunter Biden deal and the Biden administration's ongoing charges against Donald Trump. House leaders said the plea deal into bribery allegations against Hunter Biden. They continue to press the FBI for the release of whistle-blower documents. Time Running Out for Titanic Submersible A of ships and airplanes is searching the North Atlantic for a missing submersible that disappeared on its way to visit the Titanic wreckage. The underwater ship has only a day or two of oxygen left. The the tiny ship include a British billionaire; a top Pakistani executive for a giant conglomerate and his son; a French explorer who is an underwater expert; and the founder of OceanGate, the submersible company. OceanGate charges up to $250,000 for a seat on the sub, which five passengers to sit on the floor. There's one bathroom with a curtain for privacy, a large viewing porthole, and a modified video game controller for steering. Dominos to Deliver Wherever You Are Domino's Pizza is rolling out a new technology that lets people get , from parks to beaches to baseball fields. The new service uses an app allowing customers to drop a pin on a map, no address necessary. The delivery can be tracked in real time. Domino's says it's the first "quick-service" restaurant brand to offer delivery using a pin location rather than an address. name: Paul  Bud  Haedike, American Veterans Center
subject: D-Day from a paratrooper who was there
body:
My plane was shot down by the Germans in my first combat mission in World War II.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2399f230ae6e4a45909078903bee79a6&_e=h97GoNcuClhPWykKEV0YhRYQU6BQkWy98iBF52erTw-QhPeDf1NaG0EqLKjLbc9GerKLx50UdC80qMmik9f0sbCwMba7ALOHq9ScFLFUSujNIAbEEEFhcTR_cMhhLDgy4ln22Z_ztw49f4hMwbsmVmLS_VfuLgmn-52PO4A5KFZJMG57JfDriu-fLwO_ULDO35U_Rt1jPOvg8-jIoA299L-Ccsc03qxjSpjsdC1lUPzpw5Ijy7U9jb9B_FzjQNuDGBgboC78RpaWKxL8uNTp6eFQilzIB2e83tPG2WSkosk%3D)
---
Fellow American, My plane was shot down by the Germans in my first combat mission in World War II. Our rookie B-17 crew was in "Tail End Charlie," which is what we called the last plane in the formation to pass over the target. The Germans had zeroed in on us with 88 millimeter cannons -- which could fire five miles up -- and they hit our number one and number two engine. A B-17 is not made to stay up on two engines. But with skill, determination, and good fortune, we crash-landed in Belgium just over the Nazi lines. Five days later, we were rescued ... and I went on to fly 22 more missions.
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2399f230ae6e4a45909078903bee79a6&_e=h97GoNcuClhPWykKEV0YhRYQU6BQkWy98iBF52erTw-QhPeDf1NaG0EqLKjLbc9GerKLx50UdC80qMmik9f0sbCwMba7ALOHq9ScFLFUSujNIAbEEEFhcTR_cMhhLDgy4ln22Z_ztw49f4hMwbsmVr8CDaCSVL0aVtudyBy2FtCcTtrCXraqCRAiUv7E0kJLyPb8R3VE7zjJE_ULTJO5HbTRqajL37xFs7rDZRQR89gFRcmi59iVs_w-9zFc7Rhs3toeWr8Fjq85KVw4TDvs5koyuG0gzsAyOW2s8K5PUO0%3D)
---
_Above: The American Veterans Center recorded and released a 30-minute video documentary with me about my service in World War II._
---
**A few years ago, my friends at the American Veterans Center invited me to record a video documentary about my experience in World War II.** I was proud to share my story with the American Veterans Center (AVC), both to honor the memories of the brave men I served with and to pass on our hard-fought lessons to the next generation. Right now, the American Veterans Center is working around the clock to interview and record as many video documentaries as possible with World War II veterans like me. [**May I ask you to chip in $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today to help fund the American Veterans Center** '**s critical video documentary project? As a non-profit, AVC depends on the contributions of patriotic Americans like you.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2399f230ae6e4a45909078903bee79a6&_e=h97GoNcuClhPWykKEV0YhRYQU6BQkWy98iBF52erTw-QhPeDf1NaG0EqLKjLbc9GerKLx50UdC80qMmik9f0sbCwMba7ALOHq9ScFLFUSujNIAbEEEFhcTR_cMhhLDgy4ln22Z_ztw49f4hMwbsmVknNT8ShqAnrx4c4jo5R7qRqWPZcZYUFuhzlQazKn-vx7768bcyPc9UyPxPk3HNf6HYipjn2pdAaqSBSFzHY7rE2nwAernU1QNr18ouirJ5Js4EoMvqSQH8Pz24W8EXtROdY0--FJWXZkfhKAtMIQcg%3D)
---
[Help the American Veterans Center](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2399f230ae6e4a45909078903bee79a6&_e=h97GoNcuClhPWykKEV0YhRYQU6BQkWy98iBF52erTw-QhPeDf1NaG0EqLKjLbc9GerKLx50UdC80qMmik9f0sbCwMba7ALOHq9ScFLFUSujNIAbEEEFhcTR_cMhhLDgy4ln22Z_ztw49f4hMwbsmVrtsRZ-VSEcZsvTqsURlrJHi_Jau1Rv_gvwvqMoEN9F-vrtFDwZFDwwL4ZIpnTeYTn_yy5ERGp6iF8sale--5TAZZFPnEIHZolFfDfP-3p9KqINqgqinGfezLWpfsyLK4C-A7LuM1RaapTREWeaAeS0%3D)
---
When the American Veterans Center records video documentaries with veterans like me:
• The experienced AVC video team coordinates travel plans with the veteran and his or her family. Oftentimes, AVC will even send out their staff to veterans' homes - of course, at no cost to the veteran.

• AVC records a beautiful, professional-quality video documentary that lets veterans tell their own stories in their own words. A keepsake copy is also given to the veteran and their family to enjoy. • AVC makes available - for free! - these powerful video documentaries to be used as part of our shared American history. These videos reach millions on YouTube and have been used by the Library of Congress, presidential museums, and award-winning films. [**Can I count on you to help the American Veterans Center record even more video documentaries with your gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today? Your gift is urgently needed for AVC to continue their efforts.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2399f230ae6e4a45909078903bee79a6&_e=h97GoNcuClhPWykKEV0YhRYQU6BQkWy98iBF52erTw-QhPeDf1NaG0EqLKjLbc9GerKLx50UdC80qMmik9f0sbCwMba7ALOHq9ScFLFUSujNIAbEEEFhcTR_cMhhLDgy4ln22Z_ztw49f4hMwbsmVsNaGbjFfMkfZnqkNTTp4sMfQDQM_u6kM4AaUm6TDdmDxX-w06YrfVlvUo4Jyf2wa3CBT3Iuo1MWLqa-P0D-gXnA0ebtrB2ItFnutn1lwfp0d_UqHrykqmsOQpjAI5XpYTMF_kXdzPm-nhR_IgTCH3g%3D)
---
[Help the American Veterans Center](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2399f230ae6e4a45909078903bee79a6&_e=h97GoNcuClhPWykKEV0YhRYQU6BQkWy98iBF52erTw-QhPeDf1NaG0EqLKjLbc9GerKLx50UdC80qMmik9f0sbCwMba7ALOHq9ScFLFUSujNIAbEEEFhcTR_cMhhLDgy4ln22Z_ztw49f4hMwbsmVmpLPqB_wU_mrM_N5CA1M0Q_17O1xhvefJ7Qc_1aNGxFCR-oADXDsoy3q5MzU1mn76SRi_S9Z2YEzKgQ0eZ-_fRCEsicGDZGNwmY5JuP1CCicbXAQoO9LiK6pLdnJE42wCeou0CT5wEQucwkXtRYuYc%3D)
---
The history books will teach you the facts, but only the servicemen and women of World War II can tell you what it was really like. In the beginning of the war, they said if a guy flew six or eight missions, he was on borrowed time. There were many men who served with me who didn't come home. They didn't get to be husbands, didn't get to be dads, and none of them got to be grandfathers -- which you can't understand until you reach that point in your own life. _Thanks to the American Veterans Center, and generous Americans like you who made my video documentary possible, my story, and the story of the young men in the Eighth Air Force, has entered our shared American history._ [**To help preserve the legacy of more World War II veterans like me, please make your most generous gift to the American Veterans Center today.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2399f230ae6e4a45909078903bee79a6&_e=h97GoNcuClhPWykKEV0YhRYQU6BQkWy98iBF52erTw-QhPeDf1NaG0EqLKjLbc9GerKLx50UdC80qMmik9f0sbCwMba7ALOHq9ScFLFUSujNIAbEEEFhcTR_cMhhLDgy4ln22Z_ztw49f4hMwbsmVggRBTb95T_RBOAGw4EFvPiZFVdc4mq5yl9pTT2zLWhmpfiTuJoR-m9TsxzdhkujL3IXp1S2tYgRdSJeiXi5CfX6xHjI45tLQKvu4aSnT9ka9bcNFqR8txoXSIRAsPXSVfX_v3LJJmJSnIX2RLfwbjc%3D) I understand first-hand what good, important work the American Veterans Center does - and why their mission to record video documentaries with more veterans like me is so urgent. clean_body: My plane was shot down by the Germans in my first combat mission in World War II. | | | Fellow American, My plane was shot down by the Germans in my first combat mission in World War II. Our rookie B-17 crew was in "Tail End Charlie," which is what we called the last plane in the formation to pass over the target. The Germans had zeroed in on us with 88 millimeter cannons -- which could fire five miles up -- and they hit our number one and number two engine. A B-17 is not made to stay up on two engines. But with skill, determination, and good fortune, we crash-landed in Belgium just over the Nazi lines. Five days later, we were rescued ... and I went on to fly 22 more missions. Above: The American Veterans Center recorded and released a 30-minute video documentary with me about my service in World War II. A few years ago, my friends at the American Veterans Center invited me to record a video documentary about my experience in World War II. I was proud to share my story with the American Veterans Center (AVC), both to honor the memories of the brave men I served with and to pass on our hard-fought lessons to the next generation. Right now, the American Veterans Center is working around the clock to interview and record as many video documentaries as possible with World War II veterans like me. When the American Veterans Center records video documentaries with veterans like me: • The experienced AVC video team coordinates travel plans with the veteran and his or her family. Oftentimes, AVC will even send out their staff to veterans' homes - of course, at no cost to the veteran. • AVC records a beautiful, professional-quality video documentary that lets veterans tell their own stories in their own words. A keepsake copy is also given to the veteran and their family to enjoy. • AVC makes available - for free! - these powerful video documentaries to be used as part of our shared American history. These videos reach millions on YouTube and have been used by the Library of Congress, presidential museums, and award-winning films. The history books will teach you the facts, but only the servicemen and women of World War II can tell you what it was really like. In the beginning of the war, they said if a guy flew six or eight missions, he was on borrowed time. There were many men who served with me who didn't come home. They didn't get to be husbands, didn't get to be dads, and none of them got to be grandfathers -- which you can't understand until you reach that point in your own life. Thanks to the American Veterans Center, and generous Americans like you who made my video documentary possible, my story, and the story of the young men in the Eighth Air Force, has entered our shared American history. I understand first-hand what good, important work the American Veterans Center does - and why their mission to record video documentaries with more veterans like me is so urgent. Thank you, Paul "Bud" Haedike World War II Veteran For the American Veterans Center | The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201 Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

# Be the change you'd like to see in the world - run for office and WIN your seat at the table with our support!

|

|

# We Help Everyday Americans
---
Are you ready to embark on a journey towards political office but unsure where to begin? We have great news for you! **[Our Time To Run, the leading platform for aspiring candidates, is thrilled to offer you an exclusive opportunity to claim a no-obligation free 20-day trial membership.](https://nje015.keap-link014.com/v2/click/1871b5bc36d62260f7e64d0ca029fa9b/eJyNkMsKwkAMRf8l69KXVXR2pUgZqi5E11LagKNtZhhTi0j_3fFBVwpuk3NPuLkDI5XEsgYBdMIwmoIHFitlFBJnmrisXttkEs9CDxpF59zqzoC4f82OwHMcx3MP-GbQEbttmhVykx9WclM40JTWXfhLEyVhskhG03KdyhUMw081toqXV2e_gGDb4bNRrVwr3tvG8UdmcxFB0Pe9rzvLqkXWtiO_0m1w0oqcozQGqf48oMDb2zQ8APc2Y7g=)** Running for political office can seem overwhelming, especially if you've never attempted it before. That's why Our Time To Run is here to provide you with the guidance, support, and resources you need to kickstart your campaign on the right foot.
---
|

|

**Building a campaign team is a critical step in running a successful campaign for any political office. Here are some tips for building a strong team:**
---
|
---
**Identify key roles:** Start by determining the key roles and positions required to support your campaign effectively. This may include a campaign manager, treasurer, communications director, volunteer coordinator, and policy advisor. Assign responsibilities based on individuals' skills and expertise.
**Assemble a diverse team:** Look for individuals who bring different perspectives, talents, and connections to the table. Diversity within your support committee will enrich your campaign's strategies and outreach efforts.
**Define goals and expectations:** Clearly communicate your campaign's goals, objectives, and timeline to your support committee. Ensure everyone is aligned with your vision and understands their roles and responsibilities.
**Delegate tasks:** Once roles are established, delegate specific tasks and establish deadlines. Regularly communicate with your committee members, provide guidance, and offer assistance when needed.
**Foster collaboration:** Encourage collaboration and open communication within your committee. Regular meetings, brainstorming sessions, and sharing of ideas will strengthen your team and lead to more innovative campaign strategies.

name: Shift WA
subject: A timely and tragic story
body:
A special edition Newsmaker Interview featured Susanna Keilman, who recently played a pivotal role in organizing a vigil and march to honor the memory of Eina Kwon and her unborn child. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61941713:W_S89zDNF:m:1:2610672541:A57DF0D6A56BD873794D6C11F2ECD9C8:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends,

Thousands of people have now taken our survey requesting input on the topics we should prioritize in forming our future candidate questionnaires! Thank you for participating and helping to shape our upcoming work. We are so appreciative of the time and effort you dedicated to providing us with your insights.

We look forward to sharing the survey results with you when we return from our break after the 4th of July. In the meantime, we wanted to direct you to a timely - and very important - [interview we shared on our website](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61941714:W_S89zDNF:m:1:2610672541:A57DF0D6A56BD873794D6C11F2ECD9C8:r) earlier this week.

A [special edition Newsmaker Interview featured](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61941714:W_S89zDNF:m:1:2610672541:A57DF0D6A56BD873794D6C11F2ECD9C8:r) Susanna Keilman, who recently played a pivotal role in organizing a vigil and march to honor the memory of Eina Kwon and her unborn child. Eina and her baby were murdered in a senseless - and apparently random - attack on Tuesday, June 13, in Seattle's Belltown neighborhood.

With little notice, hundreds of people gathered at the location where the tragic murder took place. From there, they marched in unity to Aburiya Bento House, the beloved Western Avenue restaurant owned by Eina and her husband Sung, who was injured during the attack.

During the interview, Keilman explained how the rally was the result of much anger and frustration - both within the Asian and Pacific Islander community and throughout the region - over liberal policies (crime, drug, homelessness and mental health) which have caused Seattle to be an unsafe place to live, work, and visit.

**Take a moment to read the interview[here](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61941714:W_S89zDNF:m:1:2610672541:A57DF0D6A56BD873794D6C11F2ECD9C8:r). **

Thank you for your ongoing readership,

The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61941715:W_S89zDNF:m:1:2610672541:A57DF0D6A56BD873794D6C11F2ECD9C8:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14230039&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oW_S89zDNF).
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsxab9zDNO

ACI - Religious Liberty Survey

I am fearful that legal persecution will intensify
against Americans holding to faith-based values

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osxab9zDNO

Fellow
American,

There is
a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me
worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values.

After the
Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and
signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only
intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Are you
concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our
founding-Religious Liberty?

In
addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act, numerous
examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v.
BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL
RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few
examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to
faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to
their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act,
brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal
Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and
organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex
marriage failed.

This has
the potential to only intensify legal persecution against
individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to
faith-based values.

The
American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to
preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation
for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty,
Community, and Life.

Whether
it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield
after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a
cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I
am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?

Please
share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning
religious liberty in America.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61944485:sxab9zDNO:m:3:2627245898:58B19C789D317A4E4FDED11CD24779C4:r

Thank you
for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder &
Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Bees being POISONED by flowers and agriculture
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1833806?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Stop the EPA from approving BEE-KILLING pesticides for another 15 years! [Sign your name and help save bees!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1833807?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** This summer you might see furry round bumblebees buzzing between flowers, or their smaller honeybee counterparts collecting nectar. Our pollinator friends don’t just bring life to our green spaces -- they’re also responsible for**1 of 3 bites of food we eat,** supplying nutrition to you, your friends, and family. But you might also notice that there are far fewer pollinators than even just a few years ago. Wild bee populations are SPIRALING downward at a dangerous pace, and toxic pesticides called neonics are a big reason why. **_Neonics can KILL BEES on contact_** \-- but they are still widely applied on farms, lawns, and in gardens. According to the U.N., **40% of insect pollinators face extinction.** Yet, the EPA is prepared to approve neonics for another 15 years. [**That’s 15 MORE YEARS of killing bees! Friend, help SAVE BEES and DEMAND the EPA ban toxic pesticides by 11:59pm TONIGHT! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1833808?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1833809?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
There are **90% fewer American bumblebees today** than there were just two and a half decades ago. Widespread use of neonics is POISONING the nectar that bees need. If current trends continue, **we could be among the last generation to share the Earth with many wild bee species, Friend.**
This doesn’t have to be the case -- and banning neonic pesticides would be a BIG step towards making sure it isn’t. But the EPA won’t act unless it hears from people like you.**Every second that we waste, more bees are dying, Friend. [We need 8,394 more signatures to hit our signature goal to the EPA to help protect bees, people, and the planet from toxic pesticides. Please add your name!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1833810?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1833809?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Kendra Klein
Deputy director of science,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Fire Ted Cruz
subject: When Trump was arrested last week, Ted Cruz, who might be Trump’s biggest suck-up in the Senate and embarrassment to us all, was still defending him by attacking our democracy, our justice system & lying about President Biden. Cruz is an embarrassment to the Senate and the country.
body:
Is Cruz the actual worst?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d111548-09fe-4567-a926-31f405d71499/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **After Donald Trump was arrested this week, Ted Cruz, perhaps his biggest suck-up in the Senate and embarrassment to us all, was still defending him by attacking our democracy, justice system & lying about President Biden.** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T876e4e8f-21b4-4b59-81e7-467862661c11/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cruz is pure slime. _Luckily, we have a terrific opportunity to replace Cruz with former NFL star, Obama Administration appointee & Texas Congressman, Colin Allred, who knocked out an incumbent GOP Representative to win a key swing seat in 2018._ **_I can't imagine a better resume to take on traitor, coward and all around awful "human being," Cruz. It's why the political prognosticators changed their rankings when Allred got in the race to call it competitive._** [**_As Cruz defends Trump, Allred defends democracy. Let's defend Allred by giving him $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to get a real Senator from TX._ **](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc7afa30b-50c9-4189-84f1-cce5dfcb3eda/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting for the Senate. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: a few pressing matters to update you on...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent.

| |

---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669975%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bgLng9JdrU%2bW8pJMly2K6A&sysid=1 "Kellyanne Conway")
---

Hey there, it’s Kellyanne...

_**[This might just be the single most important email I’ve ever sent. I have a few pressing matters to update you on as soon as possible:](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669976%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y1cauLoSqtTS6Nsewx95Dw&sysid=1 "I have three urgent
matters to discuss with you:")**_
** 1. ** Republicans have an **EXTREMELY** slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control ** 2. ** Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is **UNLOADING** $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power ** 3. ** The latest FEC reports have Democrats **OUTRAISING**
Republicans by _$12,000,000+_ since we took back the House in January
**When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... _[So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL June deadline?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669977%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TPiZ6j0ylBthSPtGTFR8sw&sysid=1 "So here it goes: our House
Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us.
Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim
House Majority before our FINAL June deadline?")_**
---
**[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669978%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WZIUGx4A7SmNyHAkJpyFbQ&sysid=1)[**YES**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669979%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C4sD3BPoyK%2bNwsqa%2bgZ6ow&sysid=1) _[**NO**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669970%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JcckTdb%2flM4Begwu8HUxyw&sysid=1)**
---
Look, I don’t like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies.

Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC.

They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer’s radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. **That’s why this email is especially important.**

**_[Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669971%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6ADsvEDeJXUaLTlReTUguw&sysid=1 "Here’s my plan: I set a
goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five
or ten dollars.")_ **

If everyone reading this gives that much, we’ll catch up just in time before our June deadline.

YOU are key to my goal. We’ve stood together before, and I know we can win big again! Can I count on you?
---
**[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669978%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WZIUGx4A7SmNyHAkJpyFbQ&sysid=1)[**YES**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669979%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C4sD3BPoyK%2bNwsqa%2bgZ6ow&sysid=1) _[**NO**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669970%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JcckTdb%2flM4Begwu8HUxyw&sysid=1)**
---
Thanks for all you do for freedom.

- Kellyanne Conway
---

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: a few pressing matters to update you on...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent.

| |

---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjlmbd95s40n7qjjitue3h9pi5nk0dduu521n1t0_rp22sh2s8i66o77cphm4pj3c1h2bs "Kellyanne Conway")
---

Hey there, it's Kellyanne...

_**[This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent. I have a few pressing matters to update you on as soon as possible:](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5jto8paokv90bj5fr7g9fb7vh467eb6ns35rtcg_rp22sh2s8i66o77cphm4pj3c1h2bs "I have three urgent matters to discuss with you:")**_
** 1. ** Republicans have an **EXTREMELY** slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control ** 2. ** Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is **UNLOADING** $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power ** 3. ** The latest FEC reports have Democrats **OUTRAISING**
Republicans by _$12,000,000+_ since we took back the House in January
**When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... _[So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL June deadline?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjm8egqo1tvmokejn4rb0hg7j9snce7k9ju8jek0_rp22sh2s8i66o77cphm4pj3c1h2bs "So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL June deadline?")_**
---
**[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk5ehim51qdjvvu00ahg3c1np2lg4t5khcpl2rl0_rp22sh2s8i66o77cphm4pj3c1h2bs)[**YES**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3q5ntqckh3hhm96k298a1uf94tu1afk60ufeoao_rp22sh2s8i66o77cphm4pj3c1h2bs) _[**NO**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zse8u3ls8ru8tidfn76t3qtvq4u8jcujrk43v5h0_rp22sh2s8i66o77cphm4pj3c1h2bs)**
---
Look, I don't like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies.

Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC.

They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. **That 's why this email is especially important.**

**_[Here's my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0a6706e7npctrlpv5bdpcqfe62lm21m9b6472go_rp22sh2s8i66o77cphm4pj3c1h2bs "Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.")_ **

If everyone reading this gives that much, we'll catch up just in time before our June deadline.

YOU are key to my goal. We've stood together before, and I know we can win big again! Can I count on you?
---
**[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze98chm62ogc4qq1knj5gpmdds10qm1jsp6jrrg8_rp22sh2s8i66o77cphm4pj3c1h2bs)[**YES**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6maiarue62gh9otdg4o1goa13m86q8q8eet8s4g_rp22sh2s8i66o77cphm4pj3c1h2bs) _[**NO**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2ce3g4sh9or2qn46t06q6r01k2pudntq7j2lmcg_rp22sh2s8i66o77cphm4pj3c1h2bs)**
---
Thanks for all you do for freedom.

- Kellyanne Conway
---

**_We're Being Watched_**
Fellow American,

I’m writing to ask for your help today on the occasion that as of today, we have just nine more days to hit our 2nd quarter fundraising goal.

The fact that we’re already more than half-way through the month is concerning to me for only one reason: _we’re seriously behind on funds raised for my Senate campaign._

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

The Supreme Court's decision to uphold the Voting Rights Acts marks a momentous victory for Black Alabamians and for every person in our nation who believes in a fair and inclusive democracy. While we won the case, the work continues. Now we have to ensure that a fair map is drawn and implemented by the courts to replace the illegal one created by the Alabama legislature.

clean_body: but the work continues. | Friend -- our fight for fair maps has reached a significant milestone that reaffirms the transformative power of your support. Our dedicated mapping team has been diligently working to create maps and conduct vital analyses that will help protect the rights of ALL Americans. = = The Supreme Court's decision to uphold the Voting Rights Acts marks a momentous victory for Black Alabamians and for every person in our nation who believes in a fair and inclusive democracy. While we won the case, the work continues. Now we have to ensure that a fair map is drawn and implemented by the courts to replace the illegal one created by the Alabama legislature. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Our mapping team works hard to identify and highlight disparities in representation across the country and we continue to shed light on the urgent need for equitable voting districts in Alabama and beyond. = Support from folks like you empowers us to continue our mapping efforts, bolstering our ability to expose the injustices imposed by gerrymandering and ensuring that every voice is heard and every vote is counted. = Thank you for being a valuable member of our movement for fairness, justice, and people! \-- Fred Gilford Director of Geospatial Analytics All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. name: Joe Sweeney
subject: About Last Night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
Putting in the work for a stronger New Hampshire future

| | | | |
---
Derek,

Last night I spoke with the Epping Republican Town Committee and we had a great conversation about Epping, our State of New Hampshire, and the need to deliver real wins for conservatives in local and state elections.

Newly elected Chairman of the Epping GOP, John Scully, ran a great meeting that included State Representative Michael Vose, Epping Selectman John Cody, and dedicated activists and engaged citizens determined to making Epping and New Hampshire a better place with a prosperous future ahead.

**We talked about the need to build real connections within our communities in order to win elections.****
**
Epping is a great place to start the conversation about what Republicans have achieved in this current session and what we hope to achieve in the 2024 elections as well.

In the last few months despite a razor-thin Republican Majority in the New Hampshire House, **we successfully achieved the following major accomplishments:**

**✅****_A balanced budget with no income, sales, or capital gains tax.
_✅ _No new taxes
_ ✅ _Expanded our successful Educational Freedom Accounts program_**
✅** _ Protected ratepayers and housing providers from costly red tape
_****✅ **_**Eliminating the State's Interest & Dividends Tax by 2025 **_

I also discussed in Epping our need to expand our House Majority **by electing 240 Republicans across the state to the New Hampshire House in 2024.** We can only do so by winning in towns like Epping, which is currently represented by Republican Michael Vose and Democrat Mark Vallone.

When we replace Democrat Mark Vallone in 2024 with a Republican State Representative, we will be that much closer to expanding our wins in New Hampshire and setting our state up for success for the long run. But, we can only do that with your involvement, support, and dedication. **Elections are won by those who put the effort at the door, mailbox, and inbox.**

We already know what the Democrats will do if they take control of our State House next year:

**🚨****_Drivers Licenses to Illegal Immigrants
_ 🚨 _Full support for Gavin Newsom's national gun grab
_ 🚨 _Re-impose the Interest & Dividends Tax
_🚨 _Impose a State Income or Sales Tax to appease their union bosses_**

Per usual, I'm going to ask you, if you haven't already, [to donate $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today to Granite Solutions so we can continue building a support network throughout the state to put conservative candidates over the top in 2024.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Fdonate/1/01000188ddf0842d-67ae85e8-9d99-4200-ad2b-a8774cd0b015-000000/NOFZp13HSrqNUiazplp4d--Mbuk=327)

**Can't donate?** [Sign up to knock on doors.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Fvolunteer/1/01000188ddf0842d-67ae85e8-9d99-4200-ad2b-a8774cd0b015-000000/Vt_yvOOtC8FxH9ocDghIrDOv2ho=327)
**Can't knock on doors?** [Sign up to make phone calls.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Fvolunteer/2/01000188ddf0842d-67ae85e8-9d99-4200-ad2b-a8774cd0b015-000000/ntL7dPu87TMbS9-jzPG0f8hnFRw=327)

Everything we do between now and November 5th, 2024 will matter towards the control of the New Hampshire House and Senate, and we must remain vigilant. I'll be spending my summer and fall going to as many communities in the state that I can to talk about our Republican accomplishments at the State House and what we hope to do when we have 240 Republican Representatives after the next election.

I hope you can support Granite Solutions by [donating your treasure](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Fdonate/2/01000188ddf0842d-67ae85e8-9d99-4200-ad2b-a8774cd0b015-000000/fE4sIaZRzaM3_tfTs7arOOnfSHk=327), [volunteering your time](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Fvolunteer/3/01000188ddf0842d-67ae85e8-9d99-4200-ad2b-a8774cd0b015-000000/niwx4g50BhguNs0vlD9QMI5oD9U=327), or alerting your own network by sharing this message with them today.

I truly appreciate everything you do for our state and look forward to fighting this battle with you all.

Best,

Rep. Joe Sweeney
Founder, Granite Solutions

clean_body: Putting in the work for a stronger New Hampshire future | | | | | Derek, Last night I spoke with the Epping Republican Town Committee and we had a great conversation about Epping, our State of New Hampshire, and the need to deliver real wins for conservatives in local and state elections. Newly elected Chairman of the Epping GOP, John Scully, ran a great meeting that included State Representative Michael Vose, Epping Selectman John Cody, and dedicated activists and engaged citizens determined to making Epping and New Hampshire a better place with a prosperous future ahead. We talked about the need to build real connections within our communities in order to win elections. Epping is a great place to start the conversation about what Republicans have achieved in this current session and what we hope to achieve in the 2024 elections as well. In the last few months despite a razor-thin Republican Majority in the New Hampshire House, we successfully achieved the following major accomplishments: ✅A balanced budget with no income, sales, or capital gains tax. ✅ No new taxes ✅ Expanded our successful Educational Freedom Accounts program ✅ Protected ratepayers and housing providers from costly red tape ✅ Eliminating the State's Interest & Dividends Tax by 2025 I also discussed in Epping our need to expand our House Majority by electing 240 Republicans across the state to the New Hampshire House in 2024. We can only do so by winning in towns like Epping, which is currently represented by Republican Michael Vose and Democrat Mark Vallone. When we replace Democrat Mark Vallone in 2024 with a Republican State Representative, we will be that much closer to expanding our wins in New Hampshire and setting our state up for success for the long run. But, we can only do that with your involvement, support, and dedication. Elections are won by those who put the effort at the door, mailbox, and inbox. We already know what the Democrats will do if they take control of our State House next year: 🚨Drivers Licenses to Illegal Immigrants 🚨 Full support for Gavin Newsom's national gun grab 🚨 Re-impose the Interest & Dividends Tax 🚨 Impose a State Income or Sales Tax to appease their union bosses Per usual, I'm going to ask you, if you haven't already, Can't donate? Can't knock on doors? Everything we do between now and November 5th, 2024 will matter towards the control of the New Hampshire House and Senate, and we must remain vigilant. I'll be spending my summer and fall going to as many communities in the state that I can to talk about our Republican accomplishments at the State House and what we hope to do when we have 240 Republican Representatives after the next election. I hope you can support Granite Solutions by , , or alerting your own network by sharing this message with them today. I truly appreciate everything you do for our state and look forward to fighting this battle with you all. Best, Rep. Joe Sweeney Founder, Granite Solutions | | | | "Donate $10" | | | "Donate $25" | | | "Donate $50" | | | "Donate $100" | | | "Donate $250" | | | "Donate $500" | | "Donate to Granite Solutions" | P.S. name: Jon Tester
subject: “summer slump”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Hey folks, Jon here.

I’ve got to be honest with you, I’m disappointed. My team just let me know
that we didn’t reach our fundraising goal. With the public FEC deadline
right around the corner, this is bad news.

I didn’t expect the “summer fundraising slump” to start this early. And
with a GOP opponent joining the race any day now, we’re at serious risk of
falling vulnerable to far-right attacks.

This team always shows up when I need them most. With your help, a little
luck, and some hard work, I know we’ll get back on track in no time.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18976?t=1001&akid=3329%2E346206%2ERTGywI ]So what do you say, folks? Can I count on you to chip in right now to
help us make up the difference so we can keep me in the Senate to fight
for our Montana values? Your donation will be split between my campaign
and Charles Booker.

CHIP IN →

Thanks for stepping up today. Your support means a whole lot to me and the
entire team.

Jon

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18976?t=1002&akid=3329%2E346206%2ERTGywI ][IMG]

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230621-3329-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3329_346206_RTGywI&akid=3329%2E346206%2ERTGywI

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3329%2E346206%2ERTGywI

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.donatetorondesantis.com/u/click?_t=39b5827fb2524894a9b1d5b4f58e45b1&_m=62ff3a045b75451c9a0168435537babf&_e=UEJk0YIaHqNnwxoAvPdPTjX3eapAljteonpeVVkKRH5R6ybgM-yMOAEK5uRBxVuKglVe6_qhW2hNWH9O4mEv8nHnYuSjrV3tJgQaX_5_C0yRRHrcb-zN1elNJgNY2-xXuG_gasQ4NuMglF7Q5l7VRyUjAZr6COGCFrhy17EGFivTJ-uZw4hb5f4UYV6FIxinKb25qR5ZAOgzr0cfIUb63LS2kSJ3qu068347Uam-xWxiFDxyFwi4VpqoZNrvub_36BSxdDgtnN8Tm1lXY7jRJBdbPkkJZP2RHkI3nh1dbHB0miVJRl-DiJ-BCCRySjYyB8vP_f0koZnNDfPIWMZu6Z7zNpeQQLBajL2NWjgWsVUqIbiz1fap8jbQX2VysGI5-Lat0SoYka9yMIsjXfb-pw%3D%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---
| Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
---
|
---

Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. subject: CTA June 21: how do you survive socialism?
body:
| | | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2NDQ0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/QO4dwRBhetY8VOd-1vc6oA)
---
|
---
---
This week, use our AlignAct petitions to impeach Biden’s Attorney General Merrick Garland and stop his abuse of power. Independence Day is almost here, and there’s no better time to help young Americans in your life understand the dangers of Socialism. Find out more about how to host a watch party of our latest documentary – “Surviving Socialism” – below.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
Attorney General Merrick Garland has violated his oath of office and abused his power as U.S. Attorney General. His decision to bring politically motivated charges against Donald Trump, use the FBI to intimidate concerned parents, and meddle in elections is completely un-American. **[Sign the petition and make a phone call to urge your Member of Congress to impeach Garland.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._d9tUbtaqRJMfScvv0Zg)**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-6UXpnmwZzy-CiHQ)
---
|
---
| | The Biden administration has spent more than [$974 million](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) in taxpayer dollars on dead people since the day the president took office. According to fiscal watchdog group, OpenTheBooks, a Missouri man "collected $200,000 in checks for his dead mother for 26 years before the government found out, while a Michigan man collected $500,000 under the name of a dead relative." The millions of dollars irresponsibly sent to deceased citizens make up just a fraction of the $528 billion wasted by the administration on improper payments to Americans who shouldn't have received them. The administration set a new record for improper payments in fiscal year 2022, totaling $247 billion. During the COVID-19 pandemic, Biden went so far as to dole out nearly [$40 million](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-IOy-7mnWkQ) of COVID funding to dead people. The deceased likewise received $974.3 million through federal retirement services and Social Security according to the report. "Biden just doubled the workforce of the IRS and proposed one of the largest tax hikes in history,” said OpenTheBooks founder and CEO Adam Andrzejewski. “While on track to waste $1 trillion of your taxes, they want to tax you even more."
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._56qlJ8UoahLhx1jFkybJg)
---
Biden’s Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas has not only lied to Congress about the state of our security but also allowed the border to be overrun by dangerous criminals, drug dealers, and terrorists. He also weaponized the Department of Homeland Security against conservatives, as we now know. **[It is time for the American people to take action to remove Secretary Mayorkas.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._jj67x_refwuc5qX1-s_Q)
---
|
---
| | The Biden administration is [snooping](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) on American citizens through methods just as intrusive as wiretapping, cyber espionage or physical surveillance. The administration is buying and selling information from peoples’ phones, cars and web browsers, according to a recent[ report](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) by the nation’s top spy agency.

Very few policies limit the collection of such personal data, and the U.S. Government can assign personal identities to the data it collects. Sen. Ron Wyden (D-OR), who requested the report, lamented that “if the government can buy its way around Fourth Amendment due process, there will be few meaningful limits on government surveillance.” FBI Deputy Director Paul Abbate, meanwhile, [conceded](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) that the administration has spied on its citizens in a Senate Judiciary Committee hearing with Sen. Josh Hawley (R-MO). “Your institution is the one that, according to the court, the FISA court, ran 278,000 unwarranted — probably illegal — queries on Americans, right? That was your institution, correct?” Hawley asked Abbate. “With respect to the compliance incident, yes,” Abbate responded. “Compliance. You characterized the unlawful querying, 278,000 times, of American citizens as ‘compliance issues’?” Hawley questioned.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
Would our country survive if 70% of young Americans supported socialist candidates? That’s the reality we’re dealing with today. You can help educate young Americans about the importance of your conservative values **[by hosting a watch party for “Surviving Socialism”](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)** , featuring the brightest young conservatives: Candace Owens, Scott Presler, and Morgan Zegers!
---
[HOST A PARTY](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._jsddRS5hTwCpcv10YQ)
---
|
---
| | Leftwing activists handed Democratic candidates an electoral advantage in recent election contests through their organized push of early voting, mail-in ballots and more controversially, ballot harvesting, a tactic in which a designated person collects multiple voters’ ballots and submits them at a collection site. Republican Party officials who initially expressed concerns with threats to voting integrity [have embraced the reality](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) that until conservatives are able to gain the power to ban these practices, they must fight fire with fire. A new GOP initiative called “Bank Your Vote” will focus on “maximizing pre-Election Day voting.” Not only will Republican voters be encouraged to vote as far in advance of Election Day as possible, but in states where it’s legal, designated persons will be tasked with collecting multiple voters’ ballots and submitting them at collection sites or at polling places – a tactic known as ballot harvesting. Republican officials concede that the new emphasis on early voting, while important, is no panacea to efforts by leftwing billionaires to corrupt and influence the election process.
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26066%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aWwTrtL6sfkDzvkkodbHbw&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26067%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q8RWTYMumuTD8is%2b3WW1Hg&sysid=1) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26068%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iU00%2fjmBp73%2bknnezmeveg&sysid=1)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26069%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=69VLEBVjHcf6%2fcJL%2fL97jA&sysid=1)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---
Your America News

subject: Wrong. Inappropriate. Outrageous.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsR9ntzDN9

We've had ENOUGH, friend

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osR9ntzDN9

Friend,

Topless dancers. "Our children." A Gay Pride flag hung in equal
height to our American flag-is this the new symbol of what we
stand for?

We
do NOT stand for the sexualization of children. We will not stand
for this insanity.

"At
the White House...this transgender flag as the precedence over
the American flag, that's wrong. That is NOT how you display the
American flag." - Gov. DeSantis

And, Friend, Gov. DeSantis has one question for Biden and his
woke cronies:

"Why do you want to have that curriculum jammed into a second
grader's classroom?" - Gov. DeSantis

This is wrong, inappropriate, and outrageous.

Governor DeSantis is the ONLY candidate in this race who has a
record of bucking the woke mob. You can be sure that he'll stand
up to protect America's future because they're not "all our
kids." Your child is YOUR kid.

DONATE $47

DONATE $75

DONATE $100

DONATE $250

DONATE ANY AMOUNT

Chip in today to defeat Joe Biden and get America back on the
right track.

In
Freedom,

Team DeSantis

Meet Ron DeSantis

A native Floridian with
blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a
nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin
High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he
was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated
with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission
in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service,
Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah,
Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military
decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service
and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron
also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child
predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a
platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits
and a balanced budget amendment.

In
Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the
weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to
hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in
manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a
veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our
country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans
and expand support for mental health.

In
2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As
governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for
the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when
the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media
united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis
stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding
principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to
transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival.
Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative
priorities:

Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine
mandates,

Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border
crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against
illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured
professors accountable,

Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital
currency,

Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

Protecting the unborn,

Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a
constitutional carry state,

Expanding education freedom,

Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and
entities,

Lowering prescription drug costs,

Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

Creating a universal school choice program,

Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme
Court,

...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout
his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of
nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the
largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than
1.5 million votes.

But
history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the
majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional
wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently
as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30
points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red,
including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties
overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor
DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics,
and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with
battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing
down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his
inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense
suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of
sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even
for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we
choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than
cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe
place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership,
Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education
opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden
administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that
seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to
the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered
the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's
history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:

Record tax relief

ESG prohibitions

Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering
transparency

Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

Improvements to our state's infrastructure

Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death
penalty for child rapists

The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border
crisis

Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward
school unions

Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No
leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor
DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country,
leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron
is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television
anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters,
Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron
DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his
military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not
imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department
of Defense.

name: Andy Kim
subject: I felt betrayed by my own Congressperson – so I ran against him
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
This month marks six years since I first ran for Congress.

I'm not someone who ever thought that I would run for office. But six years ago, things changed.

My area of New Jersey was represented by someone who was the lead author of a horrendous bill to repeal health care coverage. In 2017 it passed the House of Representatives with an amendment that gutted pre-existing condition protections.

That was my Congressman from New Jersey.

He represented me and my family.

He was the one that came up with the idea to gut preexisting condition protections.

I felt betrayed by my own Congressperson.

I couldn't believe that he represented my community, my family. My father had polio and beat it – I'm the son of a polio survivor. My youngest son, who was just a newborn at that time, had health challenges of his own. He now had a preexisting condition.

After they passed that terrible health care bill in the House, I told my wife that I felt we could and needed to do something to hold our congressperson accountable. It was unacceptable to support ripping health care coverage away from millions with preexisting conditions.

So I decided to run.

The person I was taking on had won his previous election by a large margin, and Trump had easily won this district. So when I announced I was running, a lot of people, including people within my own political party, told me, you know, you seem like a nice guy and all, but there's no way you're going to be able to win this seat in Congress . I didn't listen. I was determined to bring people together and build a movement for change.

Six years later, I'm glad that not only was I able to continue on but show that we can win . I can say with certainty that I wouldn't be in Congress without the support of our grassroots movement and people like you.This is still a divided district, and today, I am asking for your continued support. My campaign is approaching our end-of-quarter deadline, and we need to raise $14,315 more to reach our goal. Can you support our grassroots movement with a donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-06-21-6yearsago-s&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=93632dc4-3510-ee11-907c-00224832eb73]

More soon,

Andy
