clean_body: This month marks six years since I first ran for Congress. I'm not someone who ever thought that I would run for office. But six years ago, things changed. My area of New Jersey was represented by someone who was the lead author of a horrendous bill to repeal health care coverage. In 2017 it passed the House of Representatives with an amendment that gutted pre-existing condition protections. That was my Congressman from New Jersey. He represented me and my family. He was the one that came up with the idea to gut preexisting condition protections. I felt betrayed by my own Congressperson. I couldn't believe that he represented my community, my family. My father had polio and beat it – I'm the son of a polio survivor. My youngest son, who was just a newborn at that time, had health challenges of his own. He now had a preexisting condition. After they passed that terrible health care bill in the House, I told my wife that I felt we could and needed to do something to hold our congressperson accountable. It was unacceptable to support ripping health care coverage away from millions with preexisting conditions. So I decided to run. The person I was taking on had won his previous election by a large margin, and Trump had easily won this district. So when I announced I was running, a lot of people, including people within my own political party, told me, you know, you seem like a nice guy and all, but there's no way you're going to be able to win this seat in Congress . I didn't listen. I was determined to bring people together and build a movement for change. Six years later, I'm glad that not only was I able to continue on but show that we can win . I can say with certainty that I wouldn't be in Congress without the support of our grassroots movement and people like you.This is still a divided district, and today, I am asking for your continued support. My campaign is approaching our end-of-quarter deadline, and we need to raise $14,315 more to reach our goal. Can you support our grassroots movement with a donation today? [] More soon, Andy Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: $5 [] $15 [] $25 [] $50 [] Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress.

name: Paul "Bud" Haedike, American Veterans Center
subject: I was at D-Day
body:
My plane was shot down by the Germans in my first combat mission in World War II.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsstaiemu9ob7or6mfdl9ldmac0k52ekp17d9rpg_rp22sh2s8i66o77cphmepr7c9h2bs)
---
Fellow American, My plane was shot down by the Germans in my first combat mission in World War II. Our rookie B-17 crew was in "Tail End Charlie," which is what we called the last plane in the formation to pass over the target. The Germans had zeroed in on us with 88 millimeter cannons -- which could fire five miles up -- and they hit our number one and number two engine. A B-17 is not made to stay up on two engines. But with skill, determination, and good fortune, we crash-landed in Belgium just over the Nazi lines. Five days later, we were rescued ... and I went on to fly 22 more missions.
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z584v6ak9ah3cns6rlns70chasn4fhcab35qp3uo_rp22sh2s8i66o77cphmepr7c9h2bs)
---
_Above: The American Veterans Center recorded and released a 30-minute video documentary with me about my service in World War II._
---
**A few years ago, my friends at the American Veterans Center invited me to record a video documentary about my experience in World War II.** I was proud to share my story with the American Veterans Center (AVC), both to honor the memories of the brave men I served with and to pass on our hard-fought lessons to the next generation. Right now, the American Veterans Center is working around the clock to interview and record as many video documentaries as possible with World War II veterans like me. [**May I ask you to chip in $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today to help fund the American Veterans Center** ’**s critical video documentary project? As a non-profit, AVC depends on the contributions of patriotic Americans like you.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgtbppc2r11bj5vpgec394vva77ue5aukil5rpdg_rp22sh2s8i66o77cphmepr7c9h2bs)
---
[Help the American Veterans Center](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfr7eiujann91k0ivi4dsbf1vc0c2o56obibncm0_rp22sh2s8i66o77cphmepr7c9h2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center records video documentaries with veterans like me:
• The experienced AVC video team coordinates travel plans with the veteran and his or her family. Oftentimes, AVC will even send out their staff to veterans’ homes – of course, at no cost to the veteran.

• AVC records a beautiful, professional-quality video documentary that lets veterans tell their own stories in their own words. A keepsake copy is also given to the veteran and their family to enjoy. • AVC makes available – for free! – these powerful video documentaries to be used as part of our shared American history. These videos reach millions on YouTube and have been used by the Library of Congress, presidential museums, and award-winning films. [**Can I count on you to help the American Veterans Center record even more video documentaries with your gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today? Your gift is urgently needed for AVC to continue their efforts.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsfpv3noogqoqts7hgvcquq1i4qbqvk8h8jh6uk0_rp22sh2s8i66o77cphmepr7c9h2bs)
---
[Help the American Veterans Center](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd3gjm5s9kjtrfs989gaile9dif9471g8lffld3o_rp22sh2s8i66o77cphmepr7c9h2bs)
---
The history books will teach you the facts, but only the servicemen and women of World War II can tell you what it was really like. In the beginning of the war, they said if a guy flew six or eight missions, he was on borrowed time. There were many men who served with me who didn't come home. They didn't get to be husbands, didn't get to be dads, and none of them got to be grandfathers -- which you can't understand until you reach that point in your own life. _Thanks to the American Veterans Center, and generous Americans like you who made my video documentary possible, my story, and the story of the young men in the Eighth Air Force, has entered our shared American history._ [**To help preserve the legacy of more World War II veterans like me, please make your most generous gift to the American Veterans Center today.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3fm2q40ojj131gbdc6ntsr7rd21o9d6bik3leqg_rp22sh2s8i66o77cphmepr7c9h2bs) I understand first-hand what good, important work the American Veterans Center does – and why their mission to record video documentaries with more veterans like me is so urgent. [**That** ’**s why I** ’**m asking for your support of the American Veterans Center today.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj305n74fapelftkq70pu67cfa1vfo5m1529u9p8_rp22sh2s8i66o77cphmepr7c9h2bs) Thank you,
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zloiap7k2ia3ofi1868q28tdv6knmej6brlpufn0_rp22sh2s8i66o77cphmepr7c9h2bs)
---
Paul "Bud" Haedike World War II Veteran For the American Veterans Center
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6pkj1l9hjvrh1j9hs0vp445v3f95rvup7ko0s78_rp22sh2s8i66o77cphmepr7c9h2bs)
---
|

| | | |

| | Dear Friend, Our compromised president is making more excuses for Communist China and the infamous spy balloon. President Biden said the ordeal was [“more embarrassing” for Beijing](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=07cb830642404a779ecda6f4ae781582&_e=W1R7RRu9rhU3w8hn87TckXpijG4Q0zYc56ywlNPI84oqJUAYBikC-sjzCFKDKRAkTc9dAI88i_-sH560ArNCooahUbFlWsdg760stj_vsZUbNGWvoZzcrVKh5PEsbfUZ1olODLBSFhx-Tl54L9pJU_3KM5s-GVUlZ_iS6P6gIDq0eCW-0aECrUqBS5yiehSirX3qJq9WfOWIZsVeyhoaQsI4Aa6HrOaxKBioIBOQKzb-E_RsvQQXe8wQFBfKeE6RFRWYODtVDP7IwC_BJN8VT92ztMyS2cnHIcyz0I9VVcQ%3D) “than it was intentional.” Yes, you read that correctly. We’re supposed to believe it was all a big accident. To make matters worse, Antony Blinken landed in China on Sunday, making him the first secretary of state to visit the country in five years. Just hours later, he stood before reporters and said the U.S. [does not support Taiwan independence](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=07cb830642404a779ecda6f4ae781582&_e=W1R7RRu9rhU3w8hn87Tcke47ugPPD-bsTXhJP4KFmBfghogkg796r1aereoDzCzRr-LvAYrg0Grv5ofWuuwfuDcwhjF-uua8HaMU4t242hmgaABq3zt7mLOlxOuEkKZdf1NXCvasVaIzCNzVyAtHfm4__emF3Y0usmhIzSg38Cl1gtjE20NLRXqFtadR6XWVw46e8Es1H8aMt7eLnRqiKYkAdIRXjp7PB2O-KpHgkq6ySuduNqYQOKkFS8yZRFlkDl772A2jGwp-xhrUDoBYYQF5cw7mqs8b13UCuXAn7JsfRyHtiQJ27IWI-tyy5MVlimzpveqGCvIhaLln4u9zjQ%3D%3D). China is our greatest adversary, and we’re saddled with an administration determined to bend backward to please communists. **[> > Are you worried about China’s growing influence? Chip in $25 to show your support.](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=07cb830642404a779ecda6f4ae781582&_e=W1R7RRu9rhU3w8hn87TckZz_k8yocQKVFe7NWkdD4kV5kBz6EOr3--3g596tpbDJKdA7HwMgP6Uq1ePfM3j1rnGHz-__N9sjsLvFbMnn01_v7hwJctrU4dRhIsH9Bfv7ZH5vwqHT_BtdQB1k7mFpKsUYD5xkAA0qEWLk_MB9x6oCEmmcAg_Jn724iFGZvbeMory4PgeCmQzYhGsSJS1N8Ijb4v94S5DSZ7Ci5i1E62L57cCFtNMX2TT89dqDWLppNRab5ktQo1s8s7AWHuBxV-lvV4xEm2YLiw2MlFFCDyYj0ZDgwv3qFiKT6CFSRZDmP6XkVJYSVnrgxo1SZ-p2NslCH8xIwaLaHsxTtfObC2s%3D)** Our failure to stand up to China isn't just embarrassing; it's suspicious. President Biden is giving China the green light to bully us, along with everyone else in the world. Many of my colleagues are aware of China's threat to our national security and want to do something about it. Take the [bipartisan effort](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=07cb830642404a779ecda6f4ae781582&_e=W1R7RRu9rhU3w8hn87Tcke9QwJdSN_Ai0yFAHfofwsI5TER7hB9L387-m2fgDB5YRaqF5M-0qSzT-quBHY0-vvFrRRw5DX9nCrVrxpSUDCZHf-qul33kF7Bo3RXs63bg7kBqiFFSudTuvsrKXZsXdB5ja5n_kAbszKX7LH25a70obqP-KErKIkecUTZI-Hfjt_irfuYTx2G0CadetmB7Og1LyWam48ecJBsjORxzif9EyB5i5cZcLILRMqWvtx1-hV7sqIfJpQVI1ak0Y46vkcoRO7-S8iMlcfs2b6JmLKrbS11vHS5lMn1MCcocmfDXpTI7oeeItwai2vV-YxOhPw%3D%3D) in the works that would limit China's ability to purchase farmland. This is a step in the right direction. We need more oversight and accountability when it comes to these people point-blank.

name: Tiffany Smiley
subject: This isn’t easy to admit...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Smiley Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Smiley for Washington Inc
body:
Help finish the fight that we started| | | Fellow Patriot,

It’s Tiffany, I need to get something off my chest.

My campaign for Senate in 2022 was one of the greatest challenges of my life. I fought a grueling battle against an enemy who had us outnumbered. I wouldn’t have been able to make it to election day without you.

But here’s the tough reality of it all: my campaign took on some serious debt that needs to be paid off.

I put everything on the table to win, and even though it didn’t work out I’m still in the fight.

[ ](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=f01cd91bcf4a4a9e83f2dcbd15abc599&_e=VoT7umVrGlYdRHwTU4cnL2vIwI4ot3BmEMWh3DqnJOmHAmi5HPU5kgetQEymPRClFSXD2MgNfDvAveHOP50Ynre2bclo3f6wLxE83F5-eA_Knx91B1deaTcJ2SqZ_6jPbw2fqgm2pgz-5H3OGeHbpLWcwHPdSYnh1LIkhn9bR0yXg48aJzpLA91Rl6eF3SbGltRXV52yUcuKkPF_pFCjzy9u5MneYegrxziZVeKpAu4kPkaGwstkGHjZCmPTnRCAObkaheDYCZvaZzqp3Ce6mqcHILSyi1-BDAsQbJuDm4etRHjzXMVmXSuGJ28GKaeDwE310U0s4Xw04VPl-TrzXpvXQzZGgDqn0VYinfufYIxZUYi4IXpArQvEi28JBifk)[**We’re not at the finish line yet, can you help me finish what we started on a strong note?**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=f01cd91bcf4a4a9e83f2dcbd15abc599&_e=VoT7umVrGlYdRHwTU4cnL2vIwI4ot3BmEMWh3DqnJOmHAmi5HPU5kgetQEymPRClzlNJrHJ_vqXwfA1EiePccAtyPiEcw0WctWjf03zW49ehIoVZVo48CwDCdZVgi5AfLCYKn4kyWHvLPHBh25OsPMOjv-_eM0l4ZmHLfzxetdynAg3A-qQr5ca_AdjA3G_W-d3XhZl5FLV9BR73hV8aVAPZNuZSk75GBPZHE2OE9Os2j8rVhWPtq6lvyFxozT3stKZmEb9Izpa_rX0zDKDH_3DBaRtP0r61FRMndHD6Djb8U0LYgGW1BbqYeegIdcVE3PiBczuKpqHxj_NrMg2hEqUOF253weDqkP3Ec-OoiN5-JsJ2lsdgWI-pwiGdlD2HNI8WT6MXb9p3CuKjYEU79w%3D%3D)
All I’m asking for you to contribute any amount whether its $1 or $100 - it will go a long way in seeing this through.

[**We’ve been through so much together and I know I’ve asked you for a lot but i hope you will help again, Fellow Patriot.**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=f01cd91bcf4a4a9e83f2dcbd15abc599&_e=VoT7umVrGlYdRHwTU4cnL2vIwI4ot3BmEMWh3DqnJOmHAmi5HPU5kgetQEymPRClzlNJrHJ_vqXwfA1EiePccAtyPiEcw0WctWjf03zW49ehIoVZVo48CwDCdZVgi5AfLCYKn4kyWHvLPHBh25OsPMOjv-_eM0l4ZmHLfzxetdynAg3A-qQr5ca_AdjA3G_W-d3XhZl5FLV9BR73hV8aVAPZNuZSk75GBPZHE2OE9OtfNe72bmxRLlrUndUTuq4POEqtY9cUDI4Ng-TFalroCWpAtY0aLN0bNrfJLIn59dJ21O4fICYlpL_DbnvfXJW1booGlb9Ckx7HlJ6LNuElFbsm5TMfrCfcLwx1F-FMcklH_holdxZicnPle6ejDiP7ATejJnzoGfY7i7CRIC2zzg%3D%3D)
Thank you and take care,

clean_body: Help finish the fight that we started| | | Fellow Patriot, It’s Tiffany, I need to get something off my chest. My campaign for Senate in 2022 was one of the greatest challenges of my life. I fought a grueling battle against an enemy who had us outnumbered. I wouldn’t have been able to make it to election day without you. But here’s the tough reality of it all: my campaign took on some serious debt that needs to be paid off. I put everything on the table to win, and even though it didn’t work out I’m still in the fight. All I’m asking for you to contribute any amount whether its $1 or $100 - it will go a long way in seeing this through. name: Charles Harper, Evergreen Action
subject: We're missing your comment, Friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN COLLABORATIVE
body:
Last chance to finalize the strongest possible MATS rule
| | | | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3139?t=2&akid=13428%2E53494%2E5vmNYY)
---
| | Friend, **Scientists tell us there is no safe level of mercury pollution.** And yet, coal-fired power plants continue to spew the greatest levels of mercury pollution into our air—harming our communities, and as is often the case, hitting low-income and communities of color the hardest. The solution is clear and proven: EPA must finalize the strongest Mercury and Air Toxics Standards (MATS) to regulate this type of deadly pollution. [And today is the last day for you to send your comment to us so we can deliver it directly to decision makers.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-go-further-to-protect-us-from-toxic-air-pollution/?source=ema_2023_06_21_MATS-rule&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=100clean&utm_source=email2023_06_21&t=3&akid=13428%2E53494%2E5vmNYY)
---

name: Ret. SEAL Eli Crane
subject: Every spineless Republican is afraid to say it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Crane For Congress
body:
There are SERIOUS questions about Election integrity.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd6gd85k9v4joea03vstokp4ja111s23kd3c2crg_rp22sh2s8i66o77cphm9pb4cjh2bs)
---

Every spineless Republican is afraid to say it, but I will:
**There are __SERIOUS__ questions about Election integrity. **
They'll call me a liar. They'll probably even try to _censor_ this email.

So what happens today will decide everything.

My name is Eli Crane - you might not know me, but I'm a Navy SEAL, a businessman, a husband, a father, and a humble servant of God.

I'm also the Pro-Trump, Pro-America conservative who represents AZ-02 - the biggest race on the map.

The Democrats hate me & want me silenced. Hell, many of the Republicans want me silenced too. **_The Establishment and anti-Trump haters will do ANYTHING to destroy me. There is no time left._**

They have all the power & resources they need, and that's why I'm humbly swallowing my pride to ask you for help today.

**[Will you stand with me and chip in just a few bucks by midnight?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrbvvjhvcsnjjtctskcpqck9uhrsc5u1ebi0cojg_rp22sh2s8i66o77cphm9pb4cjh2bs "Will you stand with me and chip in just a few bucks by midnight?")**

---
| | [STAND WITH A PRO-TRUMP WARRIOR](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl40h0p0ulbmr95kh4dio7dlthgh8o31fdgf76v8_rp22sh2s8i66o77cphm9pb4cjh2bs)
---

Look, I'm a Navy SEAL. I've been on 5 war-time deployments - I'm the last guy who normally asks for help, but if this text message doesn't work, it's over.

**[So, from the bottom of my heart - will you help out a Navy SEAL stand up to the radical Left& establishment?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrln9frk5484qmsoc3bpeu4cq1gnjc81unbbfhfo_rp22sh2s8i66o77cphm9pb4cjh2bs "So, from the bottom of my heart - will you help out a Navy SEAL stand up to the radical Left & establishment?")**

Thank you for standing up for what's right.

God bless you. - Eli

**WATCH: Chris Christie Makes Rounds On TV After Surging In Polls**
Yesterday, Governor Chris Christie spent time discussing his campaign on CNBC’s _Squawk Box_ , _CBS Mornings_ , and Fox News’ _The Story with Martha McCallum_.
In his trademark bold, blunt, and unafraid style, Governor Christie discussed the big issues facing the country, including the economy, immigration, and entitlement reform, while differentiating himself from the rest of the Republican primary field as the best candidate to defeat Joe Biden.
Here are some highlights:
**“Donald Trump Is A Paper Tiger”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=a2969e170b&e=d0a9afa930)
**“I Want To Do Big Things For This Country”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=821cd61961&e=d0a9afa930)
**“Prosecute The Case Against Trump’s Second Term”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=108b3a62f0&e=d0a9afa930)

These interviews come on the heels of new polling which shows significant _**MOMENTUM**_ behind Governor Christie’s campaign.
Less than two weeks since announcing his campaign, Governor Christie has [_SURGED_](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=5798883120&e=d0a9afa930) into third place in New Hampshire, where he returns this week for a series of campaign events.
**Keep the momentum going.** Consider chipping in $1 today to help Governor Christie meet the RNC criteria of 40,000 individual donors needed in order to qualify for the GOP debate in August.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: January 6th 2021 - I was ready to fight that day.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
A lot of people have asked me what that day was like for me as a combat veteran, so I wanted to take a moment to share some reflections with you.
#

See this? That's me on January 6:
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june23.4TsbMb&refcode=em230621-1-f&t=1&akid=730%2E734936%2Edz3W7E)
As a Marine Corps veteran, I never imagined having to use my training to protect myself and my colleagues on the House floor.
I never imagined teaching my House colleagues how to put on a gas mask and regulate their breathing.
I never imagined I’d be helping frightened colleagues move to safety as insurrectionists started streaming into the Capitol.
I never imagined I’d stay behind after the Capitol security came in to do one more sweep for colleagues who might have frozen and gone to cocoon somewhere hard to find.
I never imagined I would ever have to teach my staff how to knock on the door of our office a certain way to signal it was them and not some attacker -- something we did in the Marine Corps when surrounded by insurgents and you didn’t know who was good and who was bad.
And I never imagined I’d have to text members of the House and urge them not to get on buses ready to evacuate us from the Capitol because if we left we’d lose the building to the coup.
Maybe it is the Marine in me, but I will always fight for our democracy. I'd have done it in the Capitol that day -- and I will fight as hard as I can to win this race and keep GOP election-deniers out of the Senate.
Nothing less than our democracy is at stake in this election. If Republicans win Arizona, they win the presidency and they take control of the Senate. We can't let that happen, and I can't do it without you.
[**Can you please contribute $3 today to my campaign for United States Senate? Everything comes down to Arizona, and I cannot do this without you. Please, Peter.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june23.4TsbMb&refcode=em230621-1-f&t=2&akid=730%2E734936%2Edz3W7E)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1045?c0=ruben-em-june23.igTjd9&refcode=em230621-1-f&t=21&akid=730%2E734936%2Edz3W7E)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-june23.geDyoN&refcode=em230621-1-f&t=22&akid=730%2E734936%2Edz3W7E)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-june23.gRozeA&refcode=em230621-1-f&t=23&akid=730%2E734936%2Edz3W7E)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-june23.fhvROJ&refcode=em230621-1-f&t=24&akid=730%2E734936%2Edz3W7E)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-june23.TiGU6A&refcode=em230621-1-f&t=25&akid=730%2E734936%2Edz3W7E)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-june23.btIcr7&refcode=em230621-1-f&t=26&akid=730%2E734936%2Edz3W7E)**
---
****
And as someone who joined the United States Marine Corps to defend this country and protect our democracy, you can always count on me to be on the front lines of this battle.
Thank you,
Ruben Gallego

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=730%2E734936%2Edz3W7E). I never imagined I’d stay behind after the Capitol security came in to do one more sweep for colleagues who might have frozen and gone to cocoon somewhere hard to find. name: Letitia James
subject: FWD: Did you miss this email, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
Sorry to bother you again, but it looks like you still haven’t taken my Mid-Year 2023 Priorities Survey.

---
Peter, sorry to bother you again, but it looks like you still haven’t taken my Mid-Year 2023 Priorities Survey.
When I first called on this powerful community to help guide my work for the next half of 2023, the initial response was overwhelming. I received responses from thousands of supporters across the nation, but I never saw yours come through.

**That’s why I've decided to reopen this survey to give you one more chance to make your voice heard – but the survey will _only_ remain open until 11:59 p.m. tonight. **
**So please, will you take 60 seconds now to respond to my Mid-Year 2023 Priorities Survey? Here’s the best link to access the form:[surveys.signforgood.com/LJ4NY23-june-priorities](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65160859/412514322/-37019199?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1118-su-nd&refcode=jtk1118-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGIxOTE5ZC0zYzEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2x2WX91p4cIPnI_u_0P4CJEP2dS8Uf7l-KhUjilNm4M=&emci=232c3fa8-680c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=44b1919d-3c10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
Thank you.

Letitia James
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Letitia James**
Date: Sun, Jun 4, 2023
Subject: before we enter the next half of the year
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65160860/412514323/-1997846888?code=jtk1118-su-nd&refcode=jtk1118-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGIxOTE5ZC0zYzEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2x2WX91p4cIPnI_u_0P4CJEP2dS8Uf7l-KhUjilNm4M=)
---
Peter, I didn’t grow up with power or privilege.
I was born and raised in a working-class family in one of Brooklyn’s many diverse neighborhoods. And, throughout my entire childhood and into my young adulthood, I had no real platform to voice my opinions or speak out against the decisions that were _directly_ affecting me and my family.
But when I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black woman _ever_ to serve as New York's attorney general, I vowed that I would never let another person feel as voiceless as I did then. **And this priorities survey is a key part of upholding that vow.**
**Peter, I will _always_ fight for you and your loved ones – but to do that most effectively, I must know what concerns are top of mind for you. That's why I sent around my Mid-Year Priorities Survey – but it looks like your response is still _missing_.**
| | **2023 MID-YEAR PRIORITIES SURVEY**
---
NAME: Peter
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com
STATUS: INCOMPLETE
Please record your response before 11:59 p.m. to make your voice heard

body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ Peter, My conservative values stem from my upbringing, instilled in me by my father, a World War II veteran and account manager for steel companies, and my mother, a VA registered nurse. I was raised to fight for my beliefs and never retreat from a challenge. I put myself through college and law school by working multiple jobs. After law school, I nearly endured bankruptcy. But I pulled myself up, waited tables, picked up odd jobs, practiced law, and worked long hours to make ends meet. Being able to overcome life’s obstacles and become successful is the embodiment of the American Dream, so I work hard every day to ensure future generations can succeed. I became the first Republican Attorney General elected in West Virginia since 1933. When I launched my campaign, the establishment thought we couldn’t win. But I worked hard, knocked on doors, went to every corner of the state, and built a coalition of grassroots patriots that helped topple a longtime incumbent. I will use those values of hard work and determination every day as Governor to ensure that future generations have the opportunity to succeed. https://click.action.morriseyforwv.com/?qs=afddf65ff7b7a7a2fb53f45889d5f99028d26234948efb00317e6b56b0ff002d5fc7d10fb37859507da6af5594faa16eec76c6a10bae3b8a But now I need your help to ensure we have the resources to spread my positive message of delivering conservative victories to every corner of the state. Trust me, I know the Biden economy has left many folks struggling to get by. https://click.action.morriseyforwv.com/?qs=afddf65ff7b7a7a2fb53f45889d5f99028d26234948efb00317e6b56b0ff002d5fc7d10fb37859507da6af5594faa16eec76c6a10bae3b8a But I would be grateful if you could chip in $10 to my campaign. I promise you that every dollar we raise will go directly to our grassroots campaign to ensure we win this critical election. I have been blessed to live my version of the American dream – but it is up to us to ensure future generations can succeed. -Patrick https://click.action.morriseyforwv.com/?qs=afddf65ff7b7a7a2ae7af915928471820302a4634270ce940e66ce57ad2c2696a910e4a9fd2a38691338967e14becc9aefccc44befa8de6a As Americans suffer from the far-left’s extreme agenda, Patrick Morrisey has been the last line of defense fighting against the Democrats’ unlawful and unconstitutional actions. Patrick is ready to take the next step in the fight to save our country. As Governor, he will ensure West Virginia remains at the forefront of fighting against the Liberal's extreme and out-of-touch agenda. https://click.action.morriseyforwv.com/?qs=afddf65ff7b7a7a2ae7af915928471820302a4634270ce940e66ce57ad2c2696a910e4a9fd2a38691338967e14becc9aefccc44befa8de6a Can we count on you to help Patrick by chipping in $5, $10, $25, $50 or even $100? name: Sean Feucht
subject: We're almost at our goal
body:
The three year anniversary is THIS FRIDAY| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=bb3d8fef6e4c4101a5df0a838b5bfd11&_e=lbQHRK3yuVHRqzwnJn0aEKBzlKfVxNUU6GQkRchgY3astkTvUOqnTRhCMFqWwyRY8FZ3CSg6eE-f4UIunSUa-whjDgOhevLXXoqOYcN5kzRIT20Ke6tV_vUqDfVrkC9dyZW5qFCjj0QM76IvE0dOdeR5Zad-KOL_UEO7XOJpM0ZtaWIKjkkkIUbwAHGoe4d1tbc6zk_evvUiIPYB3L5MXoTQM7bT2ZkPGObn7UNvCa_ratE9ukr5S584kxDiHXxJnaBq7LNqThGFD8cwOSj_Oij1oI8tTdwZOf8zJfEhcfLFsMP1aU-yWKhtzk45jGMm)
---
Dear Friend,
---
THIS SUNDAY, we are celebrating all that God has done over the last 3 years through the Let Us Worship movement!! And let me tell you, one night isn't enough!!

This is going to be a night to remember, and we want to put on a revival worthy of all He's done in the lives of thousands of Believers. This revival was born in California, and we're holding our 3-year anniversary in California. This means permits, regulations, and a host of financial challenges. We are 65% of the way toward meeting our need. If you would like to help contribute to the goal, please contribute below.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=bb3d8fef6e4c4101a5df0a838b5bfd11&_e=lbQHRK3yuVHRqzwnJn0aEKBzlKfVxNUU6GQkRchgY3astkTvUOqnTRhCMFqWwyRY8FZ3CSg6eE-f4UIunSUa-whjDgOhevLXXoqOYcN5kzRIT20Ke6tV_vUqDfVrkC9dyZW5qFCjj0QM76IvE0dOdeR5Zad-KOL_UEO7XOJpM0Z2Ks7t6x20p-G4SCF0SYaCfbmBdWwPyiTiY6JBhr2H_vd4X7T0NB6vVZ5UFLck6gsiJ5yXSAUAxtf-BvmIwD5k32OS35zWm3cd5a4VQAlb4VgpUj-sSlcKcIeNbC9EzIfD6WLH-abnGMCasmEzr3V4)
---
We've seen addicts freed from addiction, and suicidal thoughts replaced with God-breathed worth. God has restored marriages, brought prodigals home, and emboldened Believers, both young and old, to toss off complacency and reject the lies of those who willfully tried to silence worship. We may be only three years in, but God's best is yet to come!
---
[****
**SUPPORT LET US WORSHIP >>>**
****](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=bb3d8fef6e4c4101a5df0a838b5bfd11&_e=lbQHRK3yuVHRqzwnJn0aEKBzlKfVxNUU6GQkRchgY3astkTvUOqnTRhCMFqWwyRY8FZ3CSg6eE-f4UIunSUa-whjDgOhevLXXoqOYcN5kzRIT20Ke6tV_vUqDfVrkC9dyZW5qFCjj0QM76IvE0dOdeR5Zad-KOL_UEO7XOJpM0aIarpJcmTb7CdiuU81wbb_QYMcWlXhf5705__p-g7KxIeHSd5soo7GvLOKNnkVHOL4rsEUJYYNTyrmLxBFT7F4uIApE-LOqYQBZZlNIbxSlVc_BP9oWB_iE3bLC0CMmrDMowKKZRnTG2bL8tMzDR7w)
---
Till All Hear,
---
---
Sean Feucht
---
P.S. — we are waiting on an estimate on bus repairs, but we know it's going to be expensive. We are still accepting donations to the bus repair fund. If you would like to contribute to that, please do so **[HERE](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=bb3d8fef6e4c4101a5df0a838b5bfd11&_e=lbQHRK3yuVHRqzwnJn0aEKBzlKfVxNUU6GQkRchgY3YKG-pcNOT9yKo-o7_UKo4fI-7LWgcY6AYHSijEiaA5g-ZcmAn0ZoMN7v9rPHzTDySwNTWv627qCa--_1B4tXJ-m6Lhr-I6rOZBolJX46fBoozPuPQkBCvYyNA-EnuPn0ro7zk_6N732LuVjPMUwK85Qh7hK70y65uvf8cS3qe74VJuPX7P28PHVEbeFJ-B2138TSAS8zJhabr851W1QC1IxuOjE9kUJmsYarHdOPIQ0UTP0cmv_zqwOS-0jp_Jko2J5b-JdGdrnZxpOIwjVf8H)** or at **[letusworship.us/bus_repair](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=bb3d8fef6e4c4101a5df0a838b5bfd11&_e=lbQHRK3yuVHRqzwnJn0aEKBzlKfVxNUU6GQkRchgY3YKG-pcNOT9yKo-o7_UKo4fI-7LWgcY6AYHSijEiaA5g-ZcmAn0ZoMN7v9rPHzTDySwNTWv627qCa--_1B4tXJ-m6Lhr-I6rOZBolJX46fBoozPuPQkBCvYyNA-EnuPn0r8xppO8HYCv9FTPUnTrHxsy7kREhLY2jWH-GsRxAhgELyhFW5KDnBnBh848DPpvsVChch0W5GgnsfmePWuozGTMcipwDpUiqQ86ipTlWLuNYFlUDKBPrWXfW5BsbhSg2celHkleti6vXqiLTm9UdTx)**.

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Proud
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
#
Derek -
From its very beginnings, this country and its Military have depended on marginalized communities for strength and security. These communities often fought to defend rights and freedoms they themselves were never granted.
That’s a legacy that VoteVets is working to address. So this month, we’re taking some time to recognize the LGBTQ community and their long record of service. There are an estimated 1 million LGBTQ Veterans in the United States. Today, their rights are under attack again — like at no time in recent history.
So we’re here to say it: We’re proud of them. We were proud to serve alongside them, and we’re proud to fight for them now.
If you’re proud too, join us: **[Donate any amount to this email and we’ll send you our “Serve With Pride” sticker. It’s a statement of support at a time when that support is critically needed.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-pride.XFyGmG&refcode=em230621-1-15&t=1&akid=9797%2E3013755%2EwCwdl_)
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-pride.XFyGmG&refcode=em230621-1-15&t=2&akid=9797%2E3013755%2EwCwdl_)
Any amount gets you the sticker, but a lot of people give $5-10 to cover the cost for the ones who can’t afford to give more. We’ll ship it for free.
| [GET THE STICKER](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-pride.XFyGmG&refcode=em230621-1-15&t=3&akid=9797%2E3013755%2EwCwdl_)
---
Proud to be with you in this,
The team at VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=9797%2E3013755%2EwCwdl_).

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65164147/412520175/2045957508?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTYyZTNlNjUtM2YxMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5MYw-Ig_0wt5kTIlW0kFgbyORB3YSQEl3zTBi60yG2k=&emci=874949c4-ef06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=562e3e65-3f10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=10481059)
---

| | Peter – I had the pleasure of serving as the Principal of Markham Middle School in Watts when Nick Melvoin was a 7th grade teacher there. In my over 30 years in education, I don't think there's anyone else who did more to transform a school than Nick. He was assigned to teach English, but he did much, _much_ , more than that. He took it upon himself to launch the school paper. And coach baseball. And soccer. And help me out whenever I needed it. If you've ever met Nick, you know he's not someone who says, "that's not my job." **Nick does what needs to be done — and that's why we need him in Congress.[Donate today toward a leader who will get results.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65164149/412520177/1183499175?refcode=2023-06-21-principal&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=562e3e65-3f10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTYyZTNlNjUtM2YxMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5MYw-Ig_0wt5kTIlW0kFgbyORB3YSQEl3zTBi60yG2k=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65164150/412520178/-524197044?refcode=2023-06-21-principal&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=562e3e65-3f10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTYyZTNlNjUtM2YxMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5MYw-Ig_0wt5kTIlW0kFgbyORB3YSQEl3zTBi60yG2k=)[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65164151/412520181/-524197044?refcode=2023-06-21-principal&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=562e3e65-3f10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTYyZTNlNjUtM2YxMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5MYw-Ig_0wt5kTIlW0kFgbyORB3YSQEl3zTBi60yG2k=) **Nick didn't stop at extracurriculars.** When budget cuts and outdated seniority rules resulted in inadequate resources for his students, Nick and two-thirds of our teachers were going to be laid off. **Rather than stay silent, Nick fought back** by pushing to re-hire quality teachers to ensure students had access to the best educators, regardless of seniority. Eventually, Nick joined the ACLU, Mayor Villaraigosa, and others to bring a ground-breaking civil rights lawsuit which argued that LAUSD's indiscriminate, seniority-based layoffs violated the rights of students. I have seen Nick cut through bureaucratic tape and truly make a difference in the lives of students and families right here in Los Angeles.** I have a lot of respect for Nick, and I know that he will work to find solutions in Congress just like he did here in LA. ** Now, more than ever, we need _real_ results from politicians — not someone who will simply turn away from injustice. **[Please chip clean_body: | | | | Peter – I had the pleasure of serving as the Principal of Markham Middle School in Watts when Nick Melvoin was a 7th grade teacher there. In my over 30 years in education, I don't think there's anyone else who did more to transform a school than Nick. He was assigned to teach English, but he did much, much , more than that. He took it upon himself to launch the school paper. And coach baseball. And soccer. And help me out whenever I needed it. If you've ever met Nick, you know he's not someone who says, "that's not my job." Nick does what needs to be done — and that's why we need him in Congress.= = Nick didn't stop at extracurriculars. When budget cuts and outdated seniority rules resulted in inadequate resources for his students, Nick and two-thirds of our teachers were going to be laid off. Rather than stay silent, Nick fought back by pushing to re-hire quality teachers to ensure students had access to the best educators, regardless of seniority. Eventually, Nick joined the ACLU, Mayor Villaraigosa, and others to bring a ground-breaking civil rights lawsuit which argued that LAUSD's indiscriminate, seniority-based layoffs violated the rights of students. I have seen Nick cut through bureaucratic tape and truly make a difference in the lives of students and families right here in Los Angeles. I have a lot of respect for Nick, and I know that he will work to find solutions in Congress just like he did here in LA. Now, more than ever, we need real results from politicians — not someone who will simply turn away from injustice. = = Former Principal Markham Middle School, LAUSD | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289 |

name: Karen Greenhalgh
subject: We're in this together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Greenhalgh for Delegate
body:
| | |
---
| | Hi there - I wanted to circle back and express my thanks to everyone who took my 2023 Issue Survey last week! SO many of you took the time to let me know what your top concerns are right now, and I can’t tell you how much the feedback is already informing my campaign and the agenda I plan to pursue in Richmond. **Top of the list? Crime.**** ** Wow, this is a no-brainer. A lot of you are concerned about crime in the community, which makes sense given that a [recent report by the Virginia State Police](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/171581f8a4777e23/af156b3d1a65f827c3d6b838967d376c/37923) shows violent crime increased 5% in 2022. That’s not a statistic I like reading. It also makes me concerned about the safety of my friends and family - and I’m sure I’m not alone. ** ** Here’s what I’ll tell you: As Delegate, I’ve already voted to give pay raises to law enforcement and I’ve worked to try and repeal dangerous soft-on-crime legislation that was passed by the previous General Assembly. ** ** But clearly, the work isn’t done. If you send me back to Richmond, I’ll do everything I can from day one to support first responders, back the blue, and hold criminals accountable. That said, I could really use your help. The truth is, no one gets elected with the help and financial support of people just like you, and if we’re going to get tough on crime we need to do it TOGETHER. ** **[Can I count on you? Every little bit helps.](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/171581f8a4777e23/cb67450440c36a17c3d6b838967d376c/37923)
---
[Pitch in today!](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/171581f8a4777e23/cd71e1f8f8c921adc3d6b838967d376c/37923)
---
Thank you!
---
---
| |
---
| **Delegate Karen S. Greenhalgh****House of Delegates, 85th District** 1-757-598-1733 District Office1-804-698-1185; Room E425 Pocahontas Building[karengreenhalgh.com](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/171581f8a4777e23/34b52f597b39f6afc3d6b838967d376c/37923)

Peter, remember these guys? [**We can't stop until every corrupt politican is behind bars. In a moment we'll remind you about Glen and Cade if you forgot about them, but first, will you sign on and support our call for Cameron Sexton's resignation?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65164559/412521871/1593217285?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230621_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yjc0N2UxYi00MDEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZZeFLvWoRChgETg1U56QTO97S00os9uf5XgweSGgXbQ=&emci=24242251-3610-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5b747e1b-4010-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892) _via the Tennessean_ In case you forgot, that’s former House Speaker Glen Casada and his top aide, Cade Cothren, who resigned amid arguably one of the worst political scandals in the last century. **But Peter, that’s not why we’re in your inbox today. Remember this guy? Cameron Sexton?** _via the Tennessean_ According to Cothren, there are numerous texts between him and Speaker Sexton alleging that the disgraced former aide helped him win the seat he currently holds. Cothren and Casada are awaiting trial on a multitude of charges, including federal theft, bribery, wire fraud, and money laundering — all so that the GOP could maintain their power and pass their extremist agenda. **Birds of a feather flock togetherPeter, . Cameron Sexton has lied and cheated his way into the speakership to maintain the GOP’s power. We have to put a stop to this, but we need support from all 95 counties.[Will you sign on and support our call for Speaker Sexton’s resignation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65164597/412521936/1593217285?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230621_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yjc0N2UxYi00MDEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZZeFLvWoRChgETg1U56QTO97S00os9uf5XgweSGgXbQ=&emci=24242251-3610-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5b747e1b-4010-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65164609/412521947/1593217285?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230621_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yjc0N2UxYi00MDEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZZeFLvWoRChgETg1U56QTO97S00os9uf5XgweSGgXbQ=&emci=24242251-3610-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5b747e1b-4010-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892)

Fellow Conservative, Last month, far-left politicians made New York the first state to ban gas stoves. subject: Summer Solstice Update
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/a76e7d8b9240/summer-solstice-update?e=b254a3b575)
Summer Solstice Greetings!

After years of the Democrat party searching for a crime and repeated failed attempts, a very sad day in American politics has come. Former President Donald Trump was indicted.

Stalin’s Soviet Secret Police Chief, Lavrentiy Beria said, “Show me the man and I’ll find you the crime.”

Not only has the Biden administration indicted a former president, they have also indicted Biden’s number one political opponent and the leader of the Republican party. In my opinion, this is election interference.

This indictment of former President Trump has occurred in spite of the fact that while serving as vice president, Joe Biden, according to the Department of Treasury, took a $5-million-dollar bribe from a Ukrainian company and his son Hunter accepted a $5-million-dollar bribe as well. Fred Fleitz is originally from Lansdowne, Pennsylvania, and serves as Vice Chair of the Center for American Security at AFPI. He also is a Newsmax TV contributor. Fleitz served in 2018 as a Deputy Assistant to President Donald Trump and Chief of Staff of the National Security Council. Fleitz served in U.S. national security positions for 25 years with the CIA, DIA, the Department of State and the House Intelligence Committee staff. Fleitz is a prolific writer who has written extensively on the Iranian and North Korean nuclear program, the growing threat to U.S. security from China, the politicization of U.S. intelligence, and many other national security topics. He is the author or editor of seven books. Fleitz’s last book, Defending Against Biothreats: What We Can Learn from the Coronavirus Pandemic to Enhance U.S. Defenses Against Pandemics and Biological Weapons, was published in 2020. Fleitz holds a B.A. in Politics from St. Joseph’s University in Philadelphia and an M.A. in Political
Economy from Fordham University in New York. He lives in Frederick, Maryland with his wife Julie, who he met at the CIA, and his daughter Marie.

name: Bob Casey
subject: I’ll be the first to admit
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=174%2E552475%2E74y5fM)
Peter,
I’ll be the first to admit that I can go on and on (and on) about Pennsylvania history. Can you blame me? Our Commonwealth has made such an impact on our Nation.
We’re the birthplace of the Declaration of Independence, the home of the Liberty Bell, the place where President Lincoln gave the Gettysburg Address, and more.
Clearly, Pennsylvania is no stranger to influencing the path of American history – **and 2024 is no exception.**
The fate of the Senate could be decided right here in PA, and we have to work every day to make sure we win this race. With you behind us, I know we can overcome whatever the GOP throws at us and hold our Senate majority.
**[Please, Peter, will you chip in $5 or more today to support our campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230621-1?refcode=em20230621-1&refcode2=174_552475_74y5fM&akid=174%2E552475%2E74y5fM)**

Thank you. I’m grateful for your support, as always.
Bob Casey

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Pramila Jayapal and the Progressive Caucus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I'm writing to ask you to split a contribution between Pramila Jayapal and the Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC. Together we must continue organizing to elect progressive candidates across the country who will take on the billionaire class and fight for justice. This is important.
#
Peter,
We are engaged in many struggles right now for the future of our country and our planet. We are trying to save the planet from the ravages of climate change. We're trying to create an economy that works for all and not just the billionaire class. We're trying to defend our democracy against those who are moving us toward authoritarianism. And that's just to name a few.
But it is not all doom and gloom, Peter. One thing that makes me optimistic about the future is that there are more really strong young progressives — often people of color — in the House now than ever before.
But we cannot stop here.
We need to continue electing candidates who will take on corporate greed, authoritarianism, and bigotry and who are prepared to fight for justice. And in order to do that, we must bring our people together in a multi-generational, multi-racial movement to take on the big-money interests that have so much political and economic power in our country.
[**So today, I am asking you to join me in supporting strong progressive candidates across the country by splitting a contribution between Pramila Jayapal and the Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42513?refcode=em20230621-2625&t=1&akid=2625%2E420207%2EI_Vhvh)
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42513?refcode=em20230621-2625&t=20&akid=2625%2E420207%2EI_Vhvh)**
In 1991, I co-founded the Congressional Progressive Caucus alongside 5 of my colleagues because I believed that working people needed more of a voice in Congress. And today, I'm proud to see that it has grown to more than 100 members, including Pramila, and is now one of the largest caucuses in Congress.
In the midst of all the struggles facing our nation and our planet, we cannot simply remain on the defensive. We need to continue building our movement to transform this country. And that means electing progressive leaders who will fight to protect social security, raise the minimum wage, get big money out of politics, and guarantee health care as a human right.
But it is not going to be easy.
Big Pharma, Big Oil, and other corporate interests have in past election cycles spent many millions of dollars attacking progressive candidates.
The good news is that despite the avalanche of right-wing spending, we have still been able to elect many strong candidates like Pramila.
The bad news is that some excellent progressive candidates have been defeated by this right-wing money.
It should not be a radical proposition to say that the very wealthiest people in this country should not be able to control our political system and who represents us in government.
This great nation and its government belongs to ALL of our people, not just right-wing billionaires and their Super PACs.
[**So please, split a contribution between Pramila****and the Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC and help us take on the outrageous sums of money flowing into our political system.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42513?refcode=em20230621-2625&t=21&akid=2625%2E420207%2EI_Vhvh)
All across the country, people are coming together and saying "enough is enough." They are tired of tinkering around the edges of the problem — on climate change, on racial justice, on economic justice.
We've already shown what's possible when working people stand together — and if we continue to do so, together we will elect a Congress that works for all of us, not just the 1%.
Thank you again for supporting Pramila and the Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC if you can afford to do so.
In solidarity,
Sen. Bernie Sanders

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230621-2625-footer&t=22&refcode2=2625_420207_I_Vhvh&akid=2625%2E420207%2EI_Vhvh)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=2625%2E420207%2EI_Vhvh)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2625%2E420207%2EI_Vhvh)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

When I think about being the first woman and first person of color to represent Delaware in Congress, I think about my great-great-great grandfather. In 1867, he signed a document that afforded him the right to vote.

Fast forward to 2017, when I was being sworn in to Congress for the first time, my sister, Thea, found the document. That document has come to represent the importance of expanding rights and representation. It’s my proof of where we come from and it’s my inspiration for where we need to go.

The historic nature of our campaign is not lost on me. My family and other families of color have come so far just to be fairly represented. All the way from being enslaved, to finally getting the right to vote, to being elected to represent the First State.

[To make history on launch day, my team and I have set a goal to earn the support of 30,000 Founding Donors, and we’re counting on generous donors like you to help get there. Can you rush anything right now, split between The Collective PAC and my campaign, so we can get the ball rolling on the race of a lifetime? ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xKsysMWCjOH7z9zOi5HV3cHUapmNJamr3oNyZLaPSj_vTW_JdX9DziwQjrFlsYxiVqa1quESPd28NtxRAQL-7IAEOodFoyMu9CE5C_eAd3VIdo2Ui8BFgOQIsIkk8jPa2fxS7kgtbaxn0A-qk2dgchb5od9RyWMeRk6vcOep2_FYY82OwVIy4IaxUZ6oC6HBdUn-BvnOKmM4A5JjDfhph1WN0WBStqHlOKOHzVnetVGP0knNQuB4NHgusHBZpJig3zmhc5Uo1SMvEIjikzwGZ9aLRXeoD0TCevbGwPwyyk3MeI0x24nZ77f00rDjeFITAsq85UltEnFFt381F_nWUkfdpD5BnEEBqoP0xUDDeIgB6usMouiVfqHvRzhpRuzHmwlR4cObiiZ58wQX4G-gd9vB4eIYjDFwImatQrK846WD3u4evRRpmLvVb4acHVgUP6mFXIZKNjY4Mz6jjCK8vydYzg9HjJM1Nua3xCnWH7heDRTmiOztrtxJIPKsrN5TCwrjDD6XrrZyBtHZ-0i3LA/3x8/oWh6EBUFT_OYFIWuCA5jTA/h4/A2X0-juTj1ZRgmpbE9zNrKCDmhifWEkzJc7SxFWL_1E)

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me: I am officially launching my campaign for the US Senate. | When I think about being the first woman and first person of color to represent Delaware in Congress, I think about my great-great-great grandfather. In 1867, he signed a document that afforded him the right to vote. Fast forward to 2017, when I was being sworn in to Congress for the first time, my sister, Thea, found the document. That document has come to represent the importance of expanding rights and representation. It’s my proof of where we come from and it’s my inspiration for where we need to go. The historic nature of our campaign is not lost on me. My family and other families of color have come so far just to be fairly represented. All the way from being enslaved, to finally getting the right to vote, to being elected to represent the First State. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Lisa Blunt Rochester and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | I am all in for Delaware, Peter. I’ve never been more ready to continue making history as a United States Senator. Lisa Blunt Rochester The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=267%2E791427%2EtY124y)
Friends —
This morning we have FIVE reasons we'd like to ask you to make your first online $5 contribution to Ilhan Omar. Here it goes:
* In 2022, Ilhan won her primary against a challenger by just 2,466 votes. That's a margin too close for comfort, and one we cannot risk again in 2024.

* That slim margin was thanks in large part to the MILLIONS of dollars in outside spending from corporate PACs and right-wing dark money groups against Ilhan.

* Right now, as you read this, those same groups are gearing up for next year's elections, and have already made Ilhan one of their top-priority targets in Congress.

* It's going to take a LOT of resources if we're going to defeat them again.

* And with our official FEC fundraising deadline just around the corner, today is a perfect day to show you stand with Ilhan in our fight.

As you know the only way we're funding our campaign is from lots and lots of grassroots supporters like you chipping in what they can.
But now it's up to you, which is why we're asking:
**[Can you chip in $5 or any amount that makes sense for you to stand with Ilhan Omar today? We wouldn't ask if it weren't so important to our campaign's success.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-june23.qnOuuh&refcode=em230621-1-t1&t=2&akid=267%2E791427%2EtY124y)**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/770?c0=io-em-june23.aBQcv6&refcode=em230621-1-t1&t=3&akid=267%2E791427%2EtY124y)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/15?c0=io-em-june23.5PZPCx&refcode=em230621-1-t1&t=4&akid=267%2E791427%2EtY124y)**
---

| | **[Donate $50](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/8?c0=io-em-june23.iTxEfp&refcode=em230621-1-t1&t=5&akid=267%2E791427%2EtY124y)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/9?c0=io-em-june23.4bH-wr&refcode=em230621-1-t1&t=6&akid=267%2E791427%2EtY124y)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/10?c0=io-em-june23.38HZVV&refcode=em230621-1-t1&t=7&akid=267%2E791427%2EtY124y)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-june23.m9bl_d&refcode=em230621-1-t1&t=8&akid=267%2E791427%2EtY124y)**
---
****
If we're going to defend this seat and continue our movement's fight for justice, it's going to take ALL of us together. Thanks for all you've done — and will do — to keep Ilhan in Congress.
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=12&refcode2=267_791427_tY124y&akid=267%2E791427%2EtY124y)**.
Ilhan for Congress

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Why I’m running for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
This is what we’re fighting for — and why I need your help to get it done.
#
Peter — I’m running for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat to defeat Josh Hawley and take back power for everyday people. Here’s what that means to me:
**Holding politicians + corporate elites accountable:** Too many of our leaders have been bought off by the same massive corporations stripping our communities for parts. That’s why I’m fighting to ban insider trading for members of Congress and abolish ALL corporate PAC donations to campaigns — and holding myself to that same standard.
**Showing up for working Missourians:** Real workers are tired of corporate elites and frauds calling the shots in our country. I’ll always stand on the side of working people by continuing to fight for the right to organize and pushing back against anti-union “Right-to-Work” scams in Missouri + all across the country.
**Putting people in charge of their own lives:** Politicians like Josh Hawley have spent years using their power to control every aspect of our lives. I’m committed to overturning the filibuster so we can protect abortion access in all 50 states — and finally give people the power to make decisions about their own bodies, families, and economic opportunities.
**A Marshall Plan for the Midwest:** DC politicians spent decades wasting trillions of dollars on pointless forever wars. Now, it’s time to invest in the workers and communities that make our country strong so we can rebuild our forgotten towns and finally start making stuff in America again.
**I’m ready to represent Missouri and stand up for everyday people in the U.S. Senate — but I need your help to get there.[So Peter, will you make your first donation of $10 or more today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34316?refcode=em20230621-3291&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3291%2E614464%2Ey-jx75)**

Lucas Kunce

body:
Just $5.
| | |
---
**$5.** This is what we're asking you to pitch in today, friend.
You might not think $5 is all that much. On any other day, maybe it's some spare change or what you'd use to buy lunch and a coffee.
But it's not just your $5. It's your $5 combined with the $5 of thousands of other grassroots supporters who have joined us in the fight to reelect Sherrod, defend Democrats' Senate majority, and protect the Dignity of Work.

In the end, that's what a true people-powered movement is all about: folks like you giving what you can, when you can. And with experts saying Sherrod is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, your $5 could make all the difference in this race.
**So please, friend, can we count on you?****[Pitch in $5 right now to help us win in Ohio and keep Sherrod in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65168229/412535703/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk257-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTE0NTFhZS00NTEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ooWWlBdZzM5Mw_PQGpVsQCgXb9LlOpaCD5NFXb-KcdY=)**

Every dollar makes a huge difference – thank you.

– Sherrod Brown HQ
**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Sherrod Brown:** Friend – thank you for being a part of our grassroots movement and for sharing our commitment to the Dignity of Work.

Fighting for workers means building an economy that prioritizes the needs of workers over tax breaks for billionaires and corporations. No matter who you are or what kind of work you do, I promise to fight for you. But I need your help: Experts say I'm one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection and Senate control could come down to Ohio. The only way we can defend this critical seat is with grassroots contributions from supporters like you.

subject: FW: WOLVES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
We need your help spreading our new ad far and wide.
| | Friend,
---
Our new ad called _**“WOLVES****”**_ shows the American people exactly what we’re up against in 2024...
...Not just the radical Left Democrats, but a Deep State poised to destroy our movement at all costs – _even if that means unlawfully putting President Trump in**JAIL for LIFE** as an innocent man. _

clean_body: We can’t afford to lose a single blue seat = Peter, After last week’s Supreme Court decision striking down racially gerrymandered districts, political pundits are saying that Democrats can win a majority in Congress in 2024. This is huge. Democrats managed to hold on to more seats than we expected in 2022, but now we have a chance to re-establish our majority. That means we can take meaningful action on the issues affecting our country the most, from gun violence prevention, to healthcare accessibility, to reproductive rights, and so much more. But with our Democratic majority on the line, we can’t afford to lose even one blue seat. Dr. Brian Williams is exactly the kind of Democrat with frontline experience that we need fighting for us in TX-32, but he can’t win on his own. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | = = = = = Thanks for standing with us. Together, we can create life-saving change. – Dr. Brian Williams for Congress Dr. Brian Williams is an Air Force Academy graduate, a Harvard-trained surgeon, a former congressional health policy advisor, and a nationally recognized leader at the intersection of public policy and structural racism, gun violence, and health equity. Dr. Williams is ready to bring his years of experience to Congress to fix our broken systems and save lives. Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC.

They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. **That 's why this email is especially important.**

If everyone reading this gives that much, we'll catch up just in time before our June deadline.

YOU are key to my goal. We've stood together before, and I know we can win big again! Can I count on you?

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td3f6477d-f0f9-40b2-ac5e-d206c45b50de/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Last week, Illinois became the first state in the US to OUTLAW book bans in libraries! [They banned book bans](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4fbf1691-7797-4b17-851c-d9ba6046ace5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T458c57c5-9417-4d32-9af4-55c56b3a7e62/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This is a meaningful way to fight back against Republican attacks on our libraries, and we need other states to follow suit. [Sign your name: Tell state leaders to follow Illinois’ lead and BAN book bans >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T47b63e28-5641-42a9-a6d8-cc8c6381bc60/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Republicans have been fighting in states across the country to ban books that discuss women’s issues, race, LGBTQ issues, and more. They’re trying to whitewash and even erase key parts of history and keep kids from learning about important issues. In many cases, books have been banned because of a single complaint. Librarians, educators, publishers, and parents have rightfully been taking a stand against GOP censorship – and we applaud Illinois state leaders for joining the fight. Now we need more states to follow their lead. [Sign your name: Tell state leaders to follow Illinois’ lead and BAN book bans >> ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T81398124-1abe-44b9-a5bb-273795f91a39/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

body:
Our Stop the Insurrectionists Fund was created to fight back against the damage that Republican extremists are doing to our nation. | | |
---
| | **January 6th, 2021.** _Do you remember how horrifying that day was? Watching the seat of our democracy get attacked by a violent mob of extremists egged on by Donald Trump?_ _Do you remember the damage the insurrectionists did? Defacing the U.S. Capitol and assaulting those who were defending it?_ **Yet, despite how violent and deadly the attack was, both Donald Trump and Ron DeSantis – the top candidates for the GOP nomination – are considering pardoning insurrectionists if they win the presidency in 2024. Not only that, but there are still insurrectionists across the country running for office. We must hold them and their allies accountable.** [Our Stop the Insurrectionists Fund was created to hold insurrectionists and their allies at the state level accountable for the damage they’re inflicting on our democracy. Will you chip in $7 right now to defeat insurrectionists and their allies running for office and fuel our work?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xaRu3n0cGNQE4QBeKFCbB9vE7lf25zn2xgqmQkZ2O5_EIQuZXaquUH2tDs4DxYoMmaunY25rKxg3D4ntfDnLKC6UlgEDvCHl2NFwrrYP9WxKAwR-fqMJ98U-BvWzKTOa53XaPUCgJkbTvioTYvxLfRdUqtJZk0E_VQnuhQ9Lb_HdPIvmGiDdq1U0PmW-sutJ00NNAYzU3JdeP48vH-33H6Q1rfe68mso39SC2xn6g8qWkiiir1STLC9DuVpewCaexPKfZ_mnr0GER64hh-td7-Z7aiCj4ssaFFCu8ka6aFzCQt3OQs-u0k3e84HMcp3wI9dUzFjyMxaPcVNMDsYRiK32bKcUncBDXhYNul4jENwkccju70YK5ZD4pN_sg7nHIoDaLtkMJoTghs0demZX2vCuPXdH9Ydio-3fFFTg7I9g/3x8/daXd1wHNSvO53AtdQiOtvg/h0/RuHdcJSgO-zgkXJkLIj9voQ2tqtJsQxY0kqcshENn9I) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

We’ve fought long and hard since 2016 to defend our nation from Donald Trump’s allies.
We’ve done our best to safeguard voting rights, protect health care, ensure every voter has a voice, and so much more – but now both Trump and DeSantis want to unravel all that work.
By offering pardons to insurrectionists, they are sending the message that _anyone_ – no matter how extreme – can execute a deadly attack on the heart of our democracy with no consequences. It would set a dangerous precedent for years to come and embolden even more insurrectionists to run for office.
[Please – we’re relying on you: Donate to our Stop the Insurrectionists Fund to defend our democracy, elect Democrats, and ensure insurrectionists can be held responsible for their horrific actions »](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xaRu3n0cGNQE4QBeKFCbB9vE7lf25zn2xgqmQkZ2O5_EIQuZXaquUH2tDs4DxYoMmaunY25rKxg3D4ntfDnLKC6UlgEDvCHl2NFwrrYP9WxKAwR-fqMJ98U-BvWzKTOa53XaPUCgJkbTvioTYvxLfRdUqtJZk0E_VQnuhQ9Lb_HdPIvmGiDdq1U0PmW-sutJ00NNAYzU3JdeP48vH-33H6-ftgJnBBN3sdHw-5WgYPcRjWPcYEjGFoBIftDOfth46R6AHxQf_JA97NfohIp8BHGlF-H3pbhuc471IREcnUynsZUyDY-tBACsOpkLrw0xBvtohDQQzGDfctBC31bnsjE9-OgR7gtNrOxs0ICChPgMB2WuQKjpm9fCx2TmPRfU4ddBP1k02um2eM3Q6vlgf0opxXQ6B1bw1093tcc6VjHg/3x8/daXd1wHNSvO53AtdQiOtvg/h6/PcntgcsCDJfMkKKDdKv4BOibRcYX9QKlT0YPBu4bk9w)

Yet, despite how violent and deadly the attack was, both Donald Trump and Ron DeSantis – the top candidates for the GOP nomination – are considering pardoning insurrectionists if they win the presidency in 2024. Not only that, but there are still insurrectionists across the country running for office. We must hold them and their allies accountable. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We’ve fought long and hard since 2016 to defend our nation from Donald Trump’s allies. We’ve done our best to safeguard voting rights, protect health care, ensure every voter has a voice, and so much more – but now both Trump and DeSantis want to unravel all that work. By offering pardons to insurrectionists, they are sending the message that anyone – no matter how extreme – can execute a deadly attack on the heart of our democracy with no consequences. It would set a dangerous precedent for years to come and embolden even more insurrectionists to run for office. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. I started working for Dan because he is a leader for Michigan families.

Dan is dedicated to protecting and supporting his home community, writing and passing legislation that brings good-paying, union jobs and resources back to mid-Michigan.

He is fighting to make life-saving prescriptions—including insulin—and health care affordable and to make clean drinking water, free from PFAS chemicals and lead, accessible to all.

And while Dan is fighting for Michiganders, I need you to join me in fighting to keep Dan in Congress.

The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States ** **

_**[This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent. ** 1. ** Republicans have an **EXTREMELY** slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control ** 2. ** Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is **UNLOADING** $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power ** 3. ** The latest FEC reports have Democrats **OUTRAISING**
Republicans by _$12,000,000+_ since we took back the House in January
**When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... _[So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL June deadline?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=933ba98e267d48378d3436c94200a558&_e=lh_ago_j-t4l3Qcng8ONbJJdzA3XkIL3Iz2K6aWs0OrMdBnXavDcsllfbWNliT42MVdMhHFQK7_3qwBFf54M3bcPdylPkiwqo9EROVL_Spd9SU3jUBkp8ba8Tn8-ZbtIkKHTGd4ebb6W7ybifoCfyvkp7WsLcKYUBxZ24f7sTEwpRZL-Vl8Rihe43qZIRWTRTXZ3jyT0x7_PCFq3vGhC3uvljjjMFxZhdhAZw0PTP2BliE9ZbiWbjTeekVJOx5TUmrFeTT7bkll05svxvKPEw390vJ0Zt4ka-ssr9o2eVWAE6BDfjH5xmPZs7wSVqmqzf2T4_4TvaLf7vu3W8aULm1WK8dI4o4h70ZtD03Y5yg0dJuTYh1s2yrhp02OnavZcA6X-dY0JI75zRNfeGTq4tZv41mKO1waMJFA4eL-yexq5qEPuCIzGQPjMp_YBsqiponR6_TXgkHMd_e_Kt-8kIg%3D%3D "So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Look, I don't like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies.

Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC.

They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. **That 's why this email is especially important.**

**_[Here's my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=933ba98e267d48378d3436c94200a558&_e=lh_ago_j-t4l3Qcng8ONbJJdzA3XkIL3Iz2K6aWs0OrMdBnXavDcsllfbWNliT42MVdMhHFQK7_3qwBFf54M3bcPdylPkiwqo9EROVL_Spd9SU3jUBkp8ba8Tn8-ZbtIkKHTGd4ebb6W7ybifoCfyvkp7WsLcKYUBxZ24f7sTEwpRZL-Vl8Rihe43qZIRWTRTXZ3jyT0x7_PCFq3vGhC3uvljjjMFxZhdhAZw0PTP2BliE9ZbiWbjTeekVJOx5TUmrFeTT7bkll05svxvKPEw390vJ0Zt4ka-ssr9o2eVWAE6BDfjH5xmPZs7wSVqmqzJk5P81xaOlve9KPZSnPSWNHlgxiUeoz39rhliK3B7RTHW4TXnzGI7WuE7r5Ygfh0DG_q_UC81BtrgA3aOr_sIiiEa0irsdubtUBi1UA4PM6eAotIkGdA7DKldeFc801tjaW28Eoxfq9RNY_q0GjiJg%3D%3D "Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.")_ **

If everyone reading this gives that much, we'll catch up just in time before our June deadline.

YOU are key to my goal. We've stood together before, and I know we can win big again! Can I count on you?
