Donald J. Trump June 20th, 2023
ICYMI: Stopping Crime and Restoring Safety
**President Donald. J Trump reduced violent crime across the country and stood strongly with America’s law enforcement. On Joe Biden’s watch, violent crime has skyrocketed in virtually every American city and has put targets on the back of our law enforcement officials.**
In Joe Biden’s first year in office, twelve major cities broke all-time high murder records. [[1]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn1)
Since Joe Biden has taken office, over 779 people have been murdered in the city of Los Angeles, a 44% increase from the first two years of President Trump’s term. [[2]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn2) Robberies, assaults, auto thefts in Los Angeles have increased every year since Joe Biden took office. [[3]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn3)
At least nine cities, seven of which are Democrat-run, saw record homicides last year. [[4]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn4)
Philadelphia recorded the highest number of homicides in its history in 2021, followed by its second-highest number of homicides in 2022. [[5]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn5) Crime data shows New York City saw a 22% hike in crime in 2022 from 2021, with the most gun-related arrests in 27 years. [[6]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn6) New York City set new felony crimes record last year, with the most felony crimes reported in at least 15 years. [[7]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn7)
In Washington D.C., carjackings increased for the fifth straight year. [[8]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn8)
In Chicago, crime increased 61% in the first three weeks of 2023 alone, compared to the previous year. [[9]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn9) Murders in Compton, California nearly doubled in Joe Biden’s first year in office—an increase of 89% from 2020. [[10]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn10) Walmart announced that it will be closing half its stores in Chicago. [[11]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn11)
As the Biden administration does little to curb crime across the country, one of America’s biggest retailers, Target reported that looting has resulted in losses in excess of $400 million in 2022 alone. [[12]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn12) CVS, one of the nation’s largest drugstore chains reported a 300% increase in theft in 2022. [[13]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn13)
Rite Aid, a national drugstore chain, suffered over $5 million in losses as a result of theft in New York City, in their most recent quarter alone. [[14]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn14)
As Democrat-run cities become bastions of violence and rioting, Joe Biden ended the practice of supplying local and state law enforcement with surplus military equipment and repeatedly proposed having unarmed civilian mental health officials respond to police calls. [[15]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn15)
In April 2023, Biden commuted the sentences of 31 people convicted of drug crimes. [[16]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn16)
Joe Biden has supported and promoted radical left-wing prosecutors and district attorneys, including hiring Soros-funded DA Rachael Rollins as Massachusetts’s top federal prosecutor. [[17]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn17)
Joe Biden’s condemnation of America’s law enforcement has resulted in 45% increase in police retirements, with another 18% resigning altogether since he took office. [[18]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn18)
The Baltimore Police Department lost about 280 officers last year, with the city short at least 600 officers. [[19]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn19)
It requires little imagination to explain the mass exodus of America’s police officers. Joe Biden publicly denounced his own Border Patrol agents over false claims that horseback agents “whipped” migrants with their reins, even referring four agents for discipline. [[20]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn20)
While the nation faces a police recruitment shortage, Joe Biden past comments include suggesting that police officers should be trained to shoot suspects in the leg, when they feel lethal force is necessary—drawing harsh criticism from the law enforcement community. [[21]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn21)
President Trump respected America’s law enforcement, reduced violent crime, and showed compassion through meaningful criminal justice reform.
During President Trump’s term, violent crime dropped over 5 percent and the murder rate decreased by over 7 percent. [[22]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn22) To combat a surge of violent crime in cities, President Trump launched Operation Legend, resulting in more than 5,500 arrests. [[23]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn23)
President Trump deployed the National Guard and federal law enforcement to Kenosha to stop violence and deployed federal agents to save a federal courthouse in Portland from rioters. [[24]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn24) Additionally, President Trump signed an executive order outlining ten-year prison sentences for destroying federal property and monuments. [[25]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn25)
The Trump administration’s Department of Justice provided nearly $400 million for new law enforcement hiring. President Trump backed America’s law enforcement officers and earned the endorsement of the 355,000 members of the Fraternal Order of Police. [[26]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn26)
President Trump signed an executive order to help prevent violence against law enforcement officers, prosecutors, judges, and their families. [[27]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn27)
To combat protect communities, the Trump administration made hundreds of millions of dollars’ worth of surplus military equipment available to local law enforcement. [[28]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn28) President Trump signed the Fix NICS Act, to keep guns out of the hands of dangerous criminals, the STOP School Violence Act, and created a Commission on School Safety to examine ways to make our schools safer. [[29]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn29)
President Trump established a task force to help combat the tragedy of missing or murdered Native American women and girls. [[30]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn30) Also, President Trump created the first-ever White House position focused solely on combating human trafficking. [[31]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn31)
President Trump has called on Congress to immediately vote to exercise its legal authority over Washington, D.C. to restore law and order to our nation’s capital. [[32]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn32)
If Marxist prosecutors betray their oaths and refuse to protect law-abiding citizens, President Trump has committed to send federal law enforcement into America’s cities to restore peace and public safety. [[33]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn33)
President Trump will ask Congress to ensure that drug smugglers and traffickers can receive the death penalty.
When President Trump is back in the White House, the drug kingpins and vicious traffickers will never sleep soundly again.
President Trump will deliver record funding to hire and retrain police officers, strengthen qualified immunity and other protections for police officers, increase penalties for assaults on law enforcement, put violent offenders and career criminals behind bars, and surge federal prosecutors and the National Guard into high-crime communities. [[34]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#_ftn34)

_**President Donald J. Trump’s Plan to Destroy the Drug Cartels** _
_“The drug cartels are waging war on America—and it’s now time for America to wage war on the cartels.” – Donald J. Trump_
**President Trump laid out an aggressive plan to dismantle the criminal trafficking networks that are destroying lives and communities on both sides of the border.**
**TRUMP ACTION PLAN TO DESTROY THE DRUG CARTELS:**
* Restore all Trump border policies and fully secure border
* Deploy all necessary military assets, including the U.S. Navy, to impose a full naval embargo on the cartels, to ensure they cannot use our region’s waters to traffic illicit drugs to the U.S.
* Order the Department of Defense to make appropriate use of special forces, cyber warfare, and other covert and overt actions to inflict maximum damage on cartel leadership, infrastructure, and operations
* Designate the major drug cartels as foreign terrorist organizations
* Cut off the cartels’ access to the global financial system
* Get full cooperation of neighboring governments to dismantle the cartels, or else fully expose the bribes and corruption that protect these criminal networks
* Ask Congress to ensure drug smugglers and traffickers can receive the Death Penalty

**BIDEN’S DEADLY DESTRUCTION OF OUR BORDER: Joe Biden has spent the last two years dismantling the southern border. Biden’s Open Borders policies are _killing innocent Americans_ , _ravaging American communities,_ _enriching the cartels,_ and _destabilizing large parts of Mexico and Latin America_ . **
* Since Joe Biden took office, an estimated 200,000+ Americans have died from drug overdoses.
* Hundreds of thousands of pounds of ultra-lethal fentanyl, heroin, meth, cocaine, and other illicit narcotics are pouring across our wide-open border and into American communities. Donald J. Trump June 20th, 2023
ICYMI: Agenda47: Ending the Scourge of Drug Addiction in America
**Mar-a-Lago, FL—** In a new Agenda47 video, President Trump announced his plan to eradicate the drug addiction crisis in America.
“We will not rest until we have ended the drug addiction crisis,” President Trump said. “For three decades before my election, drug overdose deaths increased every single year. Under my leadership, we took the drug and fentanyl crisis head on, and we achieved the first reduction in overdose deaths in more than thirty years.”

President Trump proudly signed the SUPPORT Act—the largest investment EVER in combatting the opioid epidemic.
Once President Trump returns to the White House, he will forge new public-private partnerships for companies willing to provide job opportunities and skills training for former addicts and will expand federal support for faith-based counseling, treatment, and recovery programs.
**SAVING AMERICAN LIVES:** President Trump has pledged that he will not rest until we end this crisis. President Trump will:
\- Impose a full naval embargo on the drug cartels and deploy military assets to inflict maximum damage on cartel operations.
\- Insist on the full cooperation of neighboring governments to dismantle the trafficking and smuggling networks in our region.
\- Ask Congress to ensure that drug dealers and human traffickers receive the death penalty.
\- Direct U.S. federal law enforcement to take down the gangs and organized street crime that distribute these deadly narcotics on a local level.
\- Permanently designate fentanyl as a federally controlled substance.
\- Tell China that if they do not clamp down on the export of fentanyl’s chemical precursors, they will pay a steep price.
\- Strengthen the pillars of work, faith, and family which give life meaning and hope for those struggling with addiction.
\- Make it easier for those suffering from addiction to seek treatment without losing their jobs.
\- Forge new public-private partnerships for companies willing to provide job opportunities and skills training to former addicts.
\- Expand federal support for faith-based counseling, treatment, and recovery programs.
\- Ensure that if a parent, child, spouse, or relative needs to take time to care for a family member fighting to overcome addiction, they can take advantage of a family leave program.

**_PRESIDENT TRUMP’S PLAN TO RESTORE EXECUTIVE BRANCH IMPOUNDMENT AUTHORITY TO CUT WASTE, STOP INFLATION, AND CRUSH THE DEEP STATE_ **
__
**PRESIDENT TRUMP WILL RESTORE THE IMPOUNDMENT POWER OF THE EXECUTIVE BRANCH:**
\- President Trump will restore the Impoundment Power, reestablishing the balance of power between the Legislative and the Executive branches.
\- On Day One, President Trump will direct federal agencies to identify portions of their budgets where massive savings are possible through the Impoundment Power, while maintaining the same level of funding for defense, Social Security, and Medicare.
\- President Trump will take action to challenge the constitutionality of limits placed on the Impoundment Power by the [Congressional Budget and Impoundment Control Act of 1974 (CBA)](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJxUT8tq6zAQ_ZrxzkaasSVroUVyc70JhEJTWrpTLclxK8fCUmry98WlFLo8D87DTDGM_q5B7gHxMtoEiEA7QDzW-5eTOD4fD-XpVWF5EE29bir-A8R8j-7X-pNSucmMYWPlobC6Qc9Z4TQXrSRBTYPFRZPjDaExrBdkyHDW9561pIRRhiupilEjQ2ICOReMkCpeO854Lb33yrdvLdTMuvQxeztfTbDveblNsernqQj6knNM35s6wG5d16qfr8PiUqqG-ROwUwTYpWzyLTvA7vG8Oz-d_5dt-weUDwMqWUXri0XbuI4hjElIqNmwPdzKvgIAAP__W6tawA) , the source of Congress’s usurpation of Executive Branch powers.
\- President Trump will also work with Congress to overturn the limits of the CBA.
\- In passing the CBA, Congress handcuffed the president from preventing wasteful spending.
\- The CBA dramatically limited impoundment, the power of the president to choose not to unnecessarily spend taxpayer dollars, forcing the executive branch to spend every penny of congressionally appropriated funds.
\- Under current law, the president can request rescissions of funds, but those requests must be approved by both houses of Congress. The president can only defer the use of funds in limited instances.
\- Leading constitutional scholars agree that impoundment is an inherent power of the president.
\- Congress has the “power of the purse,” so its appropriations necessarily set a ceiling on federal spending for a particular purpose, but it should not set the floor.
\- Article II of the Constitution vests the president with the inherent authority to “take Care that the Laws be faithfully executed,” which has historically been understood to mean that the president can impound funds when doing so allows him to enforce the law more effectively and efficiently.
\- In defense of the president’s impoundment power against attacks from Congress, Joseph Sneed, Deputy Attorney General under President Richard Nixon, explained that the use of executive impoundment “to promote fiscal stability is not usurpation; rather it is in the great tradition of checks and balances upon which our Constitution is based.”
\- Restoring the Impoundment Power will naturally lead the Executive and Legislative Branches to have to work together to negotiate and gain better control of federal spending.
\- Although Congress has the power to appropriate funds, inherent within the president’s power to execute the law is a measure of discretion on how funds are spent, because spending decisions often depend on how laws are executed in practice.
\- The CBA placed crippling burdens on the use of impoundment authority and on the president’s negotiating leverage with Congress over how taxpayer dollars are spent, leaving Congress with virtually unchecked budget authority.
**EXECUTIVE BRANCH’S USE OF ITS CONSTITUTIONAL IMPOUNDMENT POWER DATES BACK TO THE EARLIEST DAYS OF THE REPUBLIC:**
\- The Executive Branch Impoundment Power traces its roots to the Jefferson Administration and the earliest days of the American Republic.
\- In 1803, after France refused the U.S. access to the Port of New Orleans, Congress appropriated funding for 15 gunboats. President Jefferson refused to spend the money after determining that the purchase of the gunboats would jeopardize negotiations with the French.
\- In his third annual message to Congress explaining why he had not purchased the gunboats as authorized by Congress, President Jefferson declared that a “favorable and peaceable turn of affairs on the Mississippi rendered an immediate execution of that law unnecessary.” President Jefferson used his power as the Chief Executive to impound congressionally appropriated funds based on his foreign policy and national security judgment that the use of the funds would be unwise and unnecessary.
\- For 170 years, from President Jefferson to President Nixon, the chief executive routinely used the Impoundment Power to further national interests.
\- In the 19 th century, presidents James Buchanan and Ulysses S. Grant used impoundment in the context of domestic policy to prevent the use of funds to build post offices in Illinois and construct river and harbor improvements.
\- Democratic administrations, such as those of Franklin Roosevelt, Harry Truman, John F. Kennedy, and Lyndon B. Johnson, also exercised the Impoundment Power.
\- Today, the Impoundment Power is regularly used by [43 governors](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kM1ugzAQhJ9muQWt178cOJRSLkip1BzS9gbYbpxCsDARyttXVFWv-63mG003xTH4Rwm6AqJLsAmIgD8BUSuq96Nqz219OH4WdKiVFNtO6RmI1kd0_69_KbmbujDuV11ntpTkGWauZMporriUlF1K3Us99F77whYWjUFOVvdojbdDp4TKQklIHBUxppATz5lwDJnQ3vvCm96AQOvS9-ztfOtGe12X-xTzYZ6ysbysa0y_nRqgZtu2fEvXnQE13bKGYXQJqDlVDBGZIIGStDAahSbOUEitdrPBQnKJXDEC3rQvH-fXt_oEvI6LS8G62wpUhSnO95vNltLGLYxjSEqDwK99g135EwAA__-V6mNg) across the U.S.

**TRANSCRIPT**
****
Crooked Joe Biden, our disgraced president, has wasted trillions of taxpayer dollars in less than three years—causing uncontrolled inflation that is crushing working families.
Reining-in Biden’s wasteful and unnecessary spending is vital to stopping inflation and rescuing our economy from ruin. But the pain of the spending cuts must be borne by the special interests and Washington bureaucrats, NOT by American families and American seniors in particular.
For 200 years under our system of government, it was undisputed that the President had the Constitutional power to stop unnecessary spending through what is known as Impoundment.
Very simply, this meant that if Congress provided more funding than was needed to run the government, the President could refuse to waste the extra funds, and instead return the money to the general treasury and maybe even lower your taxes, although we did give you the biggest tax reduction in history, and the biggest regulation reduction in history, two things I am very proud of. And they still are there, although they are disappearing rapidly under Biden.
Thomas Jefferson famously used this power, as did many other presidents until it was wrongfully curtailed by the Impoundment Control Act of 1974 – not a very good act. This disaster of a law is clearly unconstitutional—a blatant violation of the separation of powers.
When I return to the White House, I will do everything I can to challenge the Impoundment Control Act in court, and if necessary, get Congress to overturn it. We will overturn it.
I will then use the president’s long-recognized Impoundment Power to squeeze the bloated federal bureaucracy for massive savings. This will be in the form of tax reductions for you. This will help quickly to stop inflation and slash the deficit.
To prepare for this eventuality, on Day One, I will order every federal agency to begin identifying large chunks of their budgets that can be saved through efficiencies and waste reduction using Impoundment.
Of course, this will not include national defense and, unlike Ron DeSanctimonious, who doesn’t really know what is happening, I will not lay a finger on Medicare or Social Security. He wants to destroy Social Security and basically obliterate Medicare. These are benefits for our seniors. We are not going to touch it. There are many other things we can do. We are not going to let Ron DeSanctus do anything to hurt Medicare or Social Security.
On the contrary, some of the funds we save through Impoundment from other parts of the government can be used to strengthen Medicare and Social Security for years to come.
Reasserting the president’s historic Impoundment authority will also restore critical negotiating leverage with Congress to keep spending under control. Very simple. We are going to keep spending under control.
We had it done and then Covid came in and we had to do some things to help save our country. We did a great job. But we were starting to make lots of money. We were Energy Independent. We were going to be Energy Dominant. We were going to be taking in massive amounts of money from the liquid gold that we have under our feet. More than any other nation. And we were going to reduce taxes and pay off debt.
This is the ONLY way we will ever return a balanced budget: Impoundment.
Just as importantly, bringing back Impoundment will give us a crucial tool with which to obliterate the Deep State, Drain the Swamp, and starve the Warmongers –-- these people that want wars all over the place; killing, killing, killing, they love killing --- and the Globalists out of government.
We are going to get the Warmongers and the Globalists out of our government.
With Impoundment, we can simply choke off the money.
This policy is anti-inflation, anti-Swamp, anti-globalist—and it’s pro-growth, pro-taxpayer, pro-American, and pro-freedom.

Trump June 20th, 2023 ICYMI: Stopping Crime and Restoring Safety President Donald. J Trump reduced violent crime across the country and stood strongly with America’s law enforcement. On Joe Biden’s watch, violent crime has skyrocketed in virtually every American city and has put targets on the back of our law enforcement officials. In Joe Biden’s first year in office, twelve major cities broke all-time high murder records. [[1]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn1) Since Joe Biden has taken office, over 779 people have been murdered in the city of Los Angeles, a 44% increase from the first two years of President Trump’s term. [[2]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn2) Robberies, assaults, auto thefts in Los Angeles have increased every year since Joe Biden took office. [[3]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn3) At least nine cities, seven of which are Democrat-run, saw record homicides last year. [[4]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn4) Philadelphia recorded the highest number of homicides in its history in 2021, followed by its second-highest number of homicides in 2022. [[5]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn5) Crime data shows New York City saw a 22% hike in crime in 2022 from 2021, with the most gun-related arrests in 27 years. [[6]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn6) New York City set new felony crimes record last year, with the most felony crimes reported in at least 15 years. [[7]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn7) In Washington D.C., carjackings increased for the fifth straight year. [[8]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn8) In Chicago, crime increased 61% in the first three weeks of 2023 alone, compared to the previous year. [[9]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn9) Murders in Compton, California nearly doubled in Joe Biden’s first year in office—an increase of 89% from 2020. [[10]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn10) Walmart announced that it will be closing half its stores in Chicago. [[11]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn11) As the Biden administration does little to curb crime across the country, one of America’s biggest retailers, Target reported that looting has resulted in losses in excess of $400 million in 2022 alone. [[12]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn12) CVS, one of the nation’s largest drugstore chains reported a 300% increase in theft in 2022. [[13]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn13) Rite Aid, a national drugstore chain, suffered over $5 million in losses as a result of theft in New York City, in their most recent quarter alone. [[14]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn14) As Democrat-run cities become bastions of violence and rioting, Joe Biden ended the practice of supplying local and state law enforcement with surplus military equipment and repeatedly proposed having unarmed civilian mental health officials respond to police calls. [[15]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn15) In April 2023, Biden commuted the sentences of 31 people convicted of drug crimes. [[16]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn16) Joe Biden has supported and promoted radical left-wing prosecutors and district attorneys, including hiring Soros-funded DA Rachael Rollins as Massachusetts’s top federal prosecutor. [[17]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn17) Joe Biden’s condemnation of America’s law enforcement has resulted in 45% increase in police retirements, with another 18% resigning altogether since he took office. [[18]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn18) The Baltimore Police Department lost about 280 officers last year, with the city short at least 600 officers. [[19]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn19) It requires little imagination to explain the mass exodus of America’s police officers. Joe Biden publicly denounced his own Border Patrol agents over false claims that horseback agents “whipped” migrants with their reins, even referring four agents for discipline. [[20]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn20) While the nation faces a police recruitment shortage, Joe Biden past comments include suggesting that police officers should be trained to shoot suspects in the leg, when they feel lethal force is necessary—drawing harsh criticism from the law enforcement community. [[21]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn21) President Trump respected America’s law enforcement, reduced violent crime, and showed compassion through meaningful criminal justice reform. During President Trump’s term, violent crime dropped over 5 percent and the murder rate decreased by over 7 percent. [[22]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn22) To combat a surge of violent crime in cities, President Trump launched Operation Legend, resulting in more than 5,500 arrests. [[23]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn23) President Trump deployed the National Guard and federal law enforcement to Kenosha to stop violence and deployed federal agents to save a federal courthouse in Portland from rioters. [[24]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn24) Additionally, President Trump signed an executive order outlining ten-year prison sentences for destroying federal property and monuments. [[25]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn25) The Trump administration’s Department of Justice provided nearly $400 million for new law enforcement hiring. President Trump backed America’s law enforcement officers and earned the endorsement of the 355,000 members of the Fraternal Order of Police. [[26]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn26) President Trump signed an executive order to help prevent violence against law enforcement officers, prosecutors, judges, and their families. [[27]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn27) To combat protect communities, the Trump administration made hundreds of millions of dollars’ worth of surplus military equipment available to local law enforcement. [[28]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn28) President Trump signed the Fix NICS Act, to keep guns out of the hands of dangerous criminals, the STOP School Violence Act, and created a Commission on School Safety to examine ways to make our schools safer. [[29]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn29) President Trump established a task force to help combat the tragedy of missing or murdered Native American women and girls. [[30]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn30) Also, President Trump created the first-ever White House position focused solely on combating human trafficking. [[31]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn31) President Trump has called on Congress to immediately vote to exercise its legal authority over Washington, D.C. to restore law and order to our nation’s capital. [[32]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn32) If Marxist prosecutors betray their oaths and refuse to protect law-abiding citizens, President Trump has committed to send federal law enforcement into America’s cities to restore peace and public safety. [[33]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftn33) President Trump will ask Congress to ensure that drug smugglers and traffickers can receive the death penalty. When President Trump is back in the White House, the drug kingpins and vicious traffickers will never sleep soundly again. President Trump will deliver record funding to hire and retrain police officers, strengthen qualified immunity and other protections for police officers, increase penalties for assaults on law enforcement, put violent offenders and career criminals behind bars, and surge federal prosecutors and the National Guard into high-crime communities. [[34]](applewebdata://1E322E10-3C5B-4D66-A84B-98B162D7D163#ftnref34) | ---|--- Donald J. Trump June 20th, 2023 ICYMI: President Donald J. Trump Announces Plan to Destroy the Drug Cartels Mar-a-Lago, FL – As Joe Biden prepares to make his first-ever trip to the southern border that he deliberately erased, President Trump announced that when he is president again, it will be the official policy of the United States to take down the drug cartels just as we took down ISIS. “The drug cartels are waging war on America—and it's now time for America to wage war on the cartels,” President Trump said. “The drug cartels and their allies in the Biden administration have the blood of countless millions on their hands. Millions and millions of families and people are being destroyed. When I am back in the White House, the drug kingpins and vicious traffickers will never sleep soundly again.” President Donald J. Trump’s Plan to Destroy the Drug Cartels “The drug cartels are waging war on America—and it’s now time for America to wage war on the cartels.” – Donald J. Trump President Trump laid out an aggressive plan to dismantle the criminal trafficking networks that are destroying lives and communities on both sides of the border. TRUMP ACTION PLAN TO DESTROY THE DRUG CARTELS: Restore all Trump border policies and fully secure border Deploy all necessary military assets, including the U.S. Navy, to impose a full naval embargo on the cartels, to ensure they cannot use our region’s waters to traffic illicit drugs to the U.S. Order the Department of Defense to make appropriate use of special forces, cyber warfare, and other covert and overt actions to inflict maximum damage on cartel leadership, infrastructure, and operations Designate the major drug cartels as foreign terrorist organizations Cut off the cartels’ access to the global financial system Get full cooperation of neighboring governments to dismantle the cartels, or else fully expose the bribes and corruption that protect these criminal networks Ask Congress to ensure drug smugglers and traffickers can receive the Death Penalty BIDEN’S DEADLY DESTRUCTION OF OUR BORDER: Joe Biden has spent the last two years dismantling the southern border. Biden’s Open Borders policies are killing innocent Americans , ravaging American communities, enriching the cartels, and destabilizing large parts of Mexico and Latin America . Since Joe Biden took office, an estimated 200,000+ Americans have died from drug overdoses. Hundreds of thousands of pounds of ultra-lethal fentanyl, heroin, meth, cocaine, and other illicit narcotics are pouring across our wide-open border and into American communities. Federal officials that they only seize up to 10% of these drugs. Enough fentanyl was at the border last year to kill every single American. Biden inherited the strongest border in U.S. history, and turned it into the greatest border disaster in the history of the world. Biden stopped wall construction, gutted Remain in Mexico, ripped up asylum cooperation agreements, imposed catch-and-release across the entire southern border, slandered and attacked border agents, announced the cancelation of Title 42, and effectively abolished interior enforcement. Drug cartels and human smugglers have seen their revenue skyrocket by an estimated 2,500%, netting $13 billion this year. President Trump will: \- Impose a full naval embargo on the drug cartels and deploy military assets to inflict maximum damage on cartel operations. \- Insist on the full cooperation of neighboring governments to dismantle the trafficking and smuggling networks in our region. \- Ask Congress to ensure that drug dealers and human traffickers receive the death penalty. \- Direct U.S. federal law enforcement to take down the gangs and organized street crime that distribute these deadly narcotics on a local level. \- Permanently designate fentanyl as a federally controlled substance. \- Tell China that if they do not clamp down on the export of fentanyl’s chemical precursors, they will pay a steep price. \- Strengthen the pillars of work, faith, and family which give life meaning and hope for those struggling with addiction. \- Make it easier for those suffering from addiction to seek treatment without losing their jobs. \- Forge new public-private partnerships for companies willing to provide job opportunities and skills training to former addicts. \- Expand federal support for faith-based counseling, treatment, and recovery programs. \- Ensure that if a parent, child, spouse, or relative needs to take time to care for a family member fighting to overcome addiction, they can take advantage of a family leave program. ADDRESSING THE DRUG OVERDOSE EPIDEMIC: President Trump’s new plan builds on the historic actions he took during his administration to combat the drug addiction crisis in America. \- President Trump’s efforts to combat the drug crisis led to the first in drug overdose deaths in 30 years. \- Between 2017 and 2019, drug overdose deaths by 16.8% in Ohio, 18.7% in Pennsylvania, and 10.6% in West Virginia. \- Drug overdose deaths by 15% in New Hampshire between 2017 and 2020. \- Under Biden, overdose deaths in New Hampshire have risen by 12%. \- In 2017, President Trump the opioid epidemic a public health emergency and began an all-of-government effort to combat it. \- President Trump the SUPPORT Act—the largest investment EVER in combatting the opioid epidemic. \- By October 2018, President Trump had $6 billion to fight the epidemic. \- The Trump administration awarded state and local communities a record $9 billion in federal grants to increase access to treatment and prevention services. \- President Trump provided a fivefold increase in funding to help communities prevent and treat addiction, issuing 8,000 grants to over 1,800 new state and local partners. \- President Trump launched the Initiative to Stop Opioid Abuse and Reduce Drug Supply and Demand to confront the many causes fueling the drug crisis. \- The Trump Administration partnered with the Truth Initiative and Ad Council to launch a media campaign to educate Americans about opioid abuse. The campaign reached 58% of young American adults. \- President Trump - a deal with China to crack down on the production and export of fentanyl’s chemical precursors. \- Under Biden, between China and the U.S. on drug trafficking has nearly come to a halt. \- During the Trump administration, the Department of Justice prosecuted more fentanyl traffickers than ever before and 3,000 drug trafficking organizations. \- From 2017 to 2019 the Trump Administration oversaw a 34% decrease in total amount of opioids being prescribed across the country. \- The DEA’s National Take Back Days recovered a record 4.7 million pounds of unused prescription drugs. BIDEN’S FAILURE TO STOP THE DRUG ADDICTION CRISIS: Biden’s reckless open-border policy has allowed deadly drugs to pour into our country, making it impossible to properly combat the drug overdose epidemic. \- President Trump’s hard-won progress on the drug overdose crisis has been squandered because Biden surrendered our southern border to the cartels. \- Hundreds of thousands of pounds of deadly drugs are now pouring across Biden’s wide-open border and claiming the lives of over 100,000 Americans every year. \- Over two-thirds of these deaths the ultra-lethal fentanyl, which is primarily into our country through Mexico. \- Biden has terminated nearly every one of Trump’s successful border policies, including the end of catch-and-release, Remain in Mexico, Title 42, and Trump-era asylum cooperation agreements. Under Biden, the construction of the wall was halted and interior enforcement has effectively been abolished. \- The amount of fentanyl seized at the border more than from 2020 to 2022. \- In the first five months of this year alone, border patrol enough fentanyl to kill 100 million people. \- Federal agents that they are only able to seize 5 to 10 percent of all drugs being smuggled through the border from Mexico. \- Drug cartels and human smugglers are profiting from Biden’s open border, $13 billion in revenue last year—a 2,500% increase compared to 2018. \- Fueled in large part by Biden’s border disaster, fentanyl deaths have 94% since 2019, and fentanyl is now the cause of death for Americans ages 18 to 45. | ---|--- Donald J. Trump June 20th, 2023 Bedminster, NJ— Today, President Donald J. Trump announced his plan to restore executive branch impoundment authority to cut waste, stop inflation, and crush the Deep State. “For 200 years under our system of government, it was undisputed that the President had the Constitutional power to stop unnecessary spending through what is known as Impoundment," President Trump said. “Very simply, this meant that if Congress provided more funding than was needed to run the government, the President could refuse to waste the extra funds, and instead return the money to the general treasury and maybe even lower your taxes, although we did give you the biggest tax reduction in history, and the biggest regulation reduction in history, two things I am very proud of." President Trump’s plan will naturally lead the Executive and Legislative Branches to work together to negotiate and gain better control of federal spending. “I will use the president’s long-recognized Impoundment Power to squeeze the bloated federal bureaucracy for massive savings. This will be in the form of tax reductions for you. This will help quickly to stop inflation and slash the deficit." PRESIDENT TRUMP’S PLAN TO RESTORE EXECUTIVE BRANCH IMPOUNDMENT AUTHORITY TO CUT WASTE, STOP INFLATION, AND CRUSH THE DEEP STATE PRESIDENT TRUMP WILL RESTORE THE IMPOUNDMENT POWER OF THE EXECUTIVE BRANCH: \- President Trump will restore the Impoundment Power, reestablishing the balance of power between the Legislative and the Executive branches. \- On Day One, President Trump will direct federal agencies to identify portions of their budgets where massive savings are possible through the Impoundment Power, while maintaining the same level of funding for defense, Social Security, and Medicare. \- President Trump will take action to challenge the constitutionality of limits placed on the Impoundment Power by the , the source of Congress’s usurpation of Executive Branch powers. \- President Trump will also work with Congress to overturn the limits of the CBA. \- In passing the CBA, Congress handcuffed the president from preventing wasteful spending. \- The CBA dramatically limited impoundment, the power of the president to choose not to unnecessarily spend taxpayer dollars, forcing the executive branch to spend every penny of congressionally appropriated funds. \- Under current law, the president can request rescissions of funds, but those requests must be approved by both houses of Congress. The president can only defer the use of funds in limited instances. \- Leading constitutional scholars agree that impoundment is an inherent power of the president. \- Congress has the “power of the purse,” so its appropriations necessarily set a ceiling on federal spending for a particular purpose, but it should not set the floor. \- Article II of the Constitution vests the president with the inherent authority to “take Care that the Laws be faithfully executed,” which has historically been understood to mean that the president can impound funds when doing so allows him to enforce the law more effectively and efficiently. \- In defense of the president’s impoundment power against attacks from Congress, Joseph Sneed, Deputy Attorney General under President Richard Nixon, explained that the use of executive impoundment “to promote fiscal stability is not usurpation; rather it is in the great tradition of checks and balances upon which our Constitution is based.” \- Restoring the Impoundment Power will naturally lead the Executive and Legislative Branches to have to work together to negotiate and gain better control of federal spending. \- Although Congress has the power to appropriate funds, inherent within the president’s power to execute the law is a measure of discretion on how funds are spent, because spending decisions often depend on how laws are executed in practice. \- The CBA placed crippling burdens on the use of impoundment authority and on the president’s negotiating leverage with Congress over how taxpayer dollars are spent, leaving Congress with virtually unchecked budget authority. EXECUTIVE BRANCH’S USE OF ITS CONSTITUTIONAL IMPOUNDMENT POWER DATES BACK TO THE EARLIEST DAYS OF THE REPUBLIC: \- The Executive Branch Impoundment Power traces its roots to the Jefferson Administration and the earliest days of the American Republic. \- In 1803, after France refused the U.S. access to the Port of New Orleans, Congress appropriated funding for 15 gunboats. President Jefferson refused to spend the money after determining that the purchase of the gunboats would jeopardize negotiations with the French. \- In his third annual message to Congress explaining why he had not purchased the gunboats as authorized by Congress, President Jefferson declared that a “favorable and peaceable turn of affairs on the Mississippi rendered an immediate execution of that law unnecessary.” President Jefferson used his power as the Chief Executive to impound congressionally appropriated funds based on his foreign policy and national security judgment that the use of the funds would be unwise and unnecessary. \- For 170 years, from President Jefferson to President Nixon, the chief executive routinely used the Impoundment Power to further national interests. \- In the 19 th century, presidents James Buchanan and Ulysses S. Grant used impoundment in the context of domestic policy to prevent the use of funds to build post offices in Illinois and construct river and harbor improvements. \- Democratic administrations, such as those of Franklin Roosevelt, Harry Truman, John F. Kennedy, and Lyndon B. Johnson, also exercised the Impoundment Power. \- Today, the Impoundment Power is regularly used by across the U.S. PRESIDENT TRUMP’S RESTORATION OF THE EXECUTIVE BRANCH IMPOUNDMENT POWER WILL BE AN EFFECTIVE TOOL IN FIGHT AGAINST WASTEFUL SPENDING: \- Since the CBA, wasteful overspending has exploded out of control. \- Congress has run in all but four years since 1974. \- In 1974, the was $475 Billion and 31 percent of the GDP. Today, it is $30.8 trillion and 123 percent of the GDP. \- Since the CBA was enacted, the federal debt has never gone below its 1974 level. \- Improper payments, payments made incorrectly by the federal government, cost the U.S. in 2022. \- The U.S. government has lost nearly in simple payment errors over the last two decades. \- For 50 years, Congress has used the CBA to force the passage of gigantic, wasteful spending packages. \- Since the CBA, Congress has adopted a on time only 6 times, missing the deadline by an average of 40 days. \- Congress has almost never met the for its 12 annual appropriations bills, often resorting to omnibus spending bills to rush appropriations through. TRANSCRIPT ** Crooked Joe Biden, our disgraced president, has wasted trillions of taxpayer dollars in less than three years—causing uncontrolled inflation that is crushing working families. Reining-in Biden’s wasteful and unnecessary spending is vital to stopping inflation and rescuing our economy from ruin. But the pain of the spending cuts must be borne by the special interests and Washington bureaucrats, NOT by American families and American seniors in particular. For 200 years under our system of government, it was undisputed that the President had the Constitutional power to stop unnecessary spending through what is known as Impoundment. Very simply, this meant that if Congress provided more funding than was needed to run the government, the President could refuse to waste the extra funds, and instead return the money to the general treasury and maybe even lower your taxes, although we did give you the biggest tax reduction in history, and the biggest regulation reduction in history, two things I am very proud of. And they still are there, although they are disappearing rapidly under Biden. Thomas Jefferson famously used this power, as did many other presidents until it was wrongfully curtailed by the Impoundment Control Act of 1974 – not a very good act. This disaster of a law is clearly unconstitutional—a blatant violation of the separation of powers. When I return to the White House, I will do everything I can to challenge the Impoundment Control Act in court, and if necessary, get Congress to overturn it. We will overturn it. I will then use the president’s long-recognized Impoundment Power to squeeze the bloated federal bureaucracy for massive savings. This will be in the form of tax reductions for you. This will help quickly to stop inflation and slash the deficit. To prepare for this eventuality, on Day One, I will order every federal agency to begin identifying large chunks of their budgets that can be saved through efficiencies and waste reduction using Impoundment. Of course, this will not include national defense and, unlike Ron DeSanctimonious, who doesn’t really know what is happening, I will not lay a finger on Medicare or Social Security. He wants to destroy Social Security and basically obliterate Medicare. These are benefits for our seniors. We are not going to touch it. There are many other things we can do. We are not going to let Ron DeSanctus do anything to hurt Medicare or Social Security. On the contrary, some of the funds we save through Impoundment from other parts of the government can be used to strengthen Medicare and Social Security for years to come. Reasserting the president’s historic Impoundment authority will also restore critical negotiating leverage with Congress to keep spending under control. Very simple. We are going to keep spending under control. We had it done and then Covid came in and we had to do some things to help save our country. We did a great job. But we were starting to make lots of money. We were Energy Independent. We were going to be Energy Dominant. We were going to be taking in massive amounts of money from the liquid gold that we have under our feet. More than any other nation. And we were going to reduce taxes and pay off debt. This is the ONLY way we will ever return a balanced budget: Impoundment. Just as importantly, bringing back Impoundment will give us a crucial tool with which to obliterate the Deep State, Drain the Swamp, and starve the Warmongers –-- these people that want wars all over the place; killing, killing, killing, they love killing --- and the Globalists out of government. We are going to get the Warmongers and the Globalists out of our government. With Impoundment, we can simply choke off the money. This policy is anti-inflation, anti-Swamp, anti-globalist—and it’s pro-growth, pro-taxpayer, pro-American, and pro-freedom. I alone can get that done. I will get it done and Make America Great Again. Thank you very much. | ---|--- Donald J. Trump June 20th, 2023 ICYMI: Truth from President Donald J. Trump | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- We are up against the FAKE NEWS media, their Democrat Partners, and Big Tech who all want to see us FAIL. We need to do whatever it takes to get the TRUTH out. Thank you, Donald J Trump 45th President of the United States P.S. Text TRUMP to 88022 to receive direct updates from yours truly. I'll be sending a text soon, so don't wait. | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024 and Save America PAC. donaldjtrump.com |

name: Will Rollins via Blue Amp Action
subject: I need your help to defeat Ken Calvert, a staunch opponent of the LGBTQ community
body:
flip California’s 41st Congressional District from red to blue
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T62dd5d85-6e1f-45b5-8f63-135b122079f8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Happy Pride Month, Peter. I’m Will Rollins, a former federal prosecutor and gay Democrat running to flip California’s 41st Congressional District from red to blue. [In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a $20 contribution between Blue Amp Action and our campaign to help us win this race and expand LGBTQ+ representation in Congress, but first I’ll explain why this particular seat is so important.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta78f4ce6-5d38-437a-80c0-246e9f118cdf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) California’s 41st District is home to Palm Springs, and last fall, we made national headlines for going head-to-head in this district against a staunch opponent of LGTBQ+ rights, Ken Calvert. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8fd2d36f-fc66-45c7-a96f-d5ce0cd38eeb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) When it comes to LGBTQ issues, Calvert’s as bad as it gets:
* He opposed gay marriage.
* He voted against allowing gay adoptions.
* He voted down the Equality Act.
* He voted to allow employers to fire employees for being LGBTQ+.
* He voted against the repeal of “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell.”

And if all of that isn’t bad enough, his first electoral victory came in 1994 after he sent out bright pink mailers outing his then political opponent and accused him of harboring a “secret” homosexual agenda. Now Peter, the good news is Ken Calvert’s political career is more vulnerable than ever before. In 2022, I ran against him as a first-time candidate with 0% name ID, and we handed him the closest midterm election he’s ever faced (just 4 points!). National experts say that our campaign was the #3 over-performing Democratic challenger campaign in the nation. Now, in 2024, national Democrats are already calling our district one of 33 initial “offensive targets” to take back the House Majority. So let’s make a strong statement this Pride Month, Peter. Let’s send a staunch anti-LGBTQ+ Republican packing, flip this swing seat, and take back the House. [Split a contribution $20 or more between Blue Amp Action and our campaign if you’re with me »](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc744b520-ece8-4390-bda0-8217db89f2ca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for your support, Will Rollins
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T726d509c-80e5-46b3-b322-569544b290fb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

subject: Our race has officially begun
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Team, this is important.

Earlier this month, two Republican opponents joined the race here in KS-03. Now, we’re facing our first big Federal Election Commission (FEC) reporting deadline since we got these opponents, and we need to use this as an opportunity to show the strength of our grassroots campaign.

**[Everything we raise will go public at the end of this month, so can you rush $20 or any amount today to help my team hit our goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65172215/412551130/1386699406?amount=20&contactdata=iJpqDnA6ZHB+OLcVTKulCB4y6t47/3th6hOI4TzQR0Oh6KM2s398f52DocOG+HR5VgmjdSWLmBloYgRAfVGKTP6Bs/Y11SlCtP4As6+UsIfnEWVH00Q1W6OSEs4nSqdvkq+q24VLO2llpEH7/DHeCw==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230621_FR_mmfr.1.1_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_mmfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTkwMDgwOC00ZjEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7RCTqnjcYh2I7fSnQDMp3-FEsqirX3ZlfcNzVW5uxOs=)**

Our FEC report is a public report that only happens once per quarter. Potential and current opponents will scour our numbers for any signs of weakness, and we can’t let them find anything.

If we don’t report strong numbers, Republicans will take that as a signal that our campaign doesn’t have the grassroots strength to win next year.

**This is the most important deadline we’ve faced so far this cycle, and I need you with me.**

**[Will you chip in $20 or any amount to help us get a headstart on our FEC fundraising push? If we can raise $10,000 this week from online supporters like you, we’ll be well on our way to having a strong FEC report at the end of the month.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65172217/412551132/1386699406?amount=20&contactdata=iJpqDnA6ZHB+OLcVTKulCB4y6t47/3th6hOI4TzQR0Oh6KM2s398f52DocOG+HR5VgmjdSWLmBloYgRAfVGKTP6Bs/Y11SlCtP4As6+UsIfnEWVH00Q1W6OSEs4nSqdvkq+q24VLO2llpEH7/DHeCw==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230621_FR_mmfr.1.1_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_mmfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTkwMDgwOC00ZjEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7RCTqnjcYh2I7fSnQDMp3-FEsqirX3ZlfcNzVW5uxOs=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: School meals
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
These are the stakes in this election, and why it's so important we all do more than just wait for the results.

Friends-
🔴**States:** Republican leaders do nothing even though gun violence is the leading cause of death for kids in America.
🔵**States:** Democrats act to keep our kids safer from gun violence. In California, we have some of the strongest gun laws in the country.
🔴**States:** Republican leaders ban books and put 34 million kids at risk of losing guaranteed mental health care.
🔵**States:** Democrats invest in education. In California, we gave 3.5 million kids college savings accounts and put more counselors in our schools.
Here's one more: School Lunches.
🔴**States:**
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2696?t=1&akid=1458%2E4767699%2EeW539A)
🔵**States:**
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2697?t=2&akid=1458%2E4767699%2EeW539A)
These are just some of the stakes in this election, and why it's so important we all do more than just wait for the results. The result is something for us to manifest.
Let's get it done.
Gavin Newsom
* * *

Contribute $3 to Gavin Newsom’s Campaign for Democracy PAC to help us report a huge number of donations and money raised when this deadline ends.
Contribute $3 because we will put every dollar we receive today toward our work amending the Constitution on guns.
Contribute $3 because every donation we report sends a powerful message about the grassroots support for our constitutional amendment.

Practicing pediatric medicine, this issue is critical to me. I’ll never forget walking into a patient room a few years ago to meet a teenage boy who had been admitted for attempting to kill himself. He was transgender and his parents didn’t support his gender identity. While he waited for a bed to be available at an inpatient psychiatric hospital, he suffered more intrusive thoughts, believing everyone would be happier if he was gone.

This isn’t an uncommon story. This is why I’m asking you to join me in writing a letter to our state reps to demand they stop targeting trans kids with hateful legislation. **_[Click here to start writing.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk2aPz0xx7qbPDkb_Dorpgpvl-pW8pr-kr_dPDju_oj4n9uOfewBBPYEEB9lwNa6h7oyivcNTgtF8UKUqymPcbk4JdY7H-yIV1zP5LmZ2aR4WTGk7nUs9lSxbibOth1lYOrfCQyOMGGUQ6fcPAxhzL1Mas5ygtmYnQGvYlcYUp2zIoOAVfoGV3Ax-N-_Bq7l-EGoY_zXAfhVOrSblvip572BdGk54-6_t-jitlO73Ay96Wt2EVPLop3TL2-MBojR3HMS-6_14tPxuar9-C5bkTD60CJGkNer8DYgOiG-V8yjKM2S5YaQGj5d9SSfC0WH11Mq9BtDpuZUHez5F7PPHczvyMwUDlmIMMVrjtpAYgO_K-mUvrWuQ_1LO1h7GsCboaoEC33hayGtL_jwo-sEyQl/3x8/aky6FFaFS2S7gLdIN0lGgg/h1/YRp9BEGawnnvwlvN4L5mjHkaNKvq8RCuowAtM5mui0w)_**

Here’s the truth: Teenagers are struggling. Transgender teenagers are struggling even more. They want love and acceptance just like every other teenager you know.

Some of them get it at home, some of them do not. Some of them get it at school, some of them do not. Some of them have a supportive adult in their lives, some of them do not.
Here’s what I know: The GOP does not care about transgender people, transgender kids, or gender-affirming care. They care about winning elections. They understand the political power of “othering” the most vulnerable in society, and, right now, that is trans kids.

State laws like South Carolina’s transgender sports ban contribute to the ongoing stigmatization of young people who are just trying to navigate their teenage years. These kids deserve love and acceptance, not bullying.

This isn’t about transgender kids. This is about science. This is about compassion. This is about the abuse of political power.

**_[Will you stand up for trans kids this Pride Month by signing a letter demanding accountability from state reps who have supported anti-trans legislation?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk2aPz0xx7qbPDkb_Dorpgpvl-pW8pr-kr_dPDju_oj4n9uOfewBBPYEEB9lwNa6h7oyivcNTgtF8UKUqymPcbk4JdY7H-yIV1zP5LmZ2aR4aVFLY36-lTzW9LfPPmzW6JFV1S_zqPL0wR4PEp6hxhAEy8gTHdNoKBe9R8bLLJKU8We_5_d24fJQvFz6ckf1dDl1xiqzJbnaMd44azwLM3Rkxi_SaSaoPQF20vf6p66k2CSs2XugUg4vapxuasCmJxmXFjJfu63qJQZy0kZk1_Lt064R9a25lLaEMCEyeTyJ--_Y-iXSy7_BvCVTVphk8pknGCvqWFh82ofmZ-BxGayY2ExkNlO_ryC0DKotIhVdTldU8Nf5tohUmKAvnU4MLjJg6xRSbebJusDuYwW8j3U/3x8/aky6FFaFS2S7gLdIN0lGgg/h2/KDE1Gn-ygQlnTYWIMKM2C-0inxESLvT6gvtOfZYU1Zo)_**
**_[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk2aPz0xx7qbPDkb_Dorpgpvl-pW8pr-kr_dPDju_oj4n9uOfewBBPYEEB9lwNa6h7oyivcNTgtF8UKUqymPcbk4JdY7H-yIV1zP5LmZ2aR4YATqKpCEkHnVKllXHYY4rXlzmdBmoHop11-AWYHJh-uIbaw5-7SmI0gzBE_sXE5Bhr45WIVjU5j2Uso4pc7bZQiVzjlv9JheMqwBPiLduzJFLRh9ZEQXXtryImVXTz_oA8Xacb2nWLnVXyr-l1kDv0KcHKUO2jJP9FxB19R783hXiPGBp2UDddy1rm204HG-4Ss-TWG2jXbZD_jr-lw2cpqFCq2diPXpl1rmPa2NEq3vkiSVInb96aVvbA5Ma-BowdBcTKlvvrp8wPJiRb78AGDFE70ukD6eflz4npnm3BH/3x8/aky6FFaFS2S7gLdIN0lGgg/h3/3zN2qziW5fulZKShcwUJg1O4J-BofzZq9qtASx4Bv0Y)_****** | | [Start Writing](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk2aPz0xx7qbPDkb_Dorpgpvl-pW8pr-kr_dPDju_oj4n9uOfewBBPYEEB9lwNa6h7oyivcNTgtF8UKUqymPcbk4JdY7H-yIV1zP5LmZ2aR4ShaN7ac_8mWrxi1c5EfifsqD51rTSBB7n_nBlLI4Or8W5nwgJylCz7yOD1b_WBjFkyuQREgxZcyxwdAcsRrXQL3-km7o2kSZu2NAIj7mPluZ-TRTtVa5QDnO-SLGpUPVXYXzy-ydeF7Xtark4yCjIIpJvHn0lqglEerSYvffpMydSIeTF_q5y5t3Hr2vO3-20Wi-DwaQcEkYuTseMW1k5F9Wjw2FOOD7c5eKBD00Jl8Y51BIQhNIcBIp_OyTHLxISW2nd1r4OgzIjk00o2UfN9aP0rSSp3DadwOAKHW9P8l/3x8/aky6FFaFS2S7gLdIN0lGgg/h4/92EdR5LEBLAYmqrDpn-_PhKtisZDX-AErPyoFblnTr8)
---

On the day my patient was getting ready to transfer to the psychiatric hospital, as I was leaving his room, I noticed him looking at my ID badge hanging around my neck. He saw my small pink, blue, and white transgender flag button. He looked at me, smiled, and said “I like your button.” It’s a small thing, but it mattered to him.

All kids deserve to have people in their corner who support them, not have their existence be belittled.

Thank you,

Annie

name: David Trone
subject: My nephew Ian
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
Can I share a personal story with you, Peter?

My nephew Ian was one of more than 1 million Americans who died from a drug overdose since the start of the opioid epidemic.

Ian struggled with addiction for years, and despite our family’s best efforts to help him, it wasn't enough. At just 24, Ian tragically succumbed to an overdose. He was a good kid – and he deserved better.

I refuse to let Ian's story be another statistic. Because the reality is, too many families have stories like Ian’s. It’s one of the reasons I got involved in public service to begin with.

No one person can end the opioid epidemic – that’s why as soon as I got to Washington, I founded a bipartisan task force on addiction, which is now the Bipartisan Mental Health and Substance Use Disorder Task Force. We all need to make our voices heard on this issue.

So today, I need your help with answering a simple question:

Do you think Congress should do more to address the opioid epidemic and hold Big Pharma accountable?

>> YES. Congress should step up and put an end to the opioid epidemic. >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/VELVXmEINky6E_yClaRj8w2

>> NO. Congress should not step up to help. >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/VELVXmEINky6E_yClaRj8w2

The opioid epidemic affects millions of Americans every day. It continues to destroy families, communities, and entire regions of our country.

Peter, we need better access to treatment and increased funding for prevention and education programs. That’s exactly what I’ll keep fighting for in the Senate.

This can’t wait. Please take this one-question poll and make your voice heard in the fight to save lives like my nephew Ian’s. >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/VELVXmEINky6E_yClaRj8w2

Take the Poll >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/VELVXmEINky6E_yClaRj8w2

Thank you,

– David Trone

Paid for by David Trone for Maryland.
David Trone for Maryland
P.O. Box 83998
Gaithersburg, MD 20883-3998
United States

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65172976/412554053/823540626?refcode=ea.168db739-5110-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.168db739-5110-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjhkYjczOS01MTEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KwtOQuWdj4OFj_1cEqtdhS5WrBs1oFXOtZVllxBwfx8=&emci=e37a79cf-4310-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=168db739-5110-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter — there are three key ways radical Republicans are threatening our democracy, and we need you to know about them:
1. They’re planning to pass an ultra-partisan gerrymander to give their party a massive edge in legislative elections. And they think a right-wing majority on the NC Supreme Court will let them get away with it.
2. They’re working to make it harder for voters who don’t agree with them to cast a ballot and easier for the GOP to get those ballots thrown out.
3. And they’re trying to take over the State Board of Elections to give Republicans even more power over future election outcomes.

**The far-right knows they can’t win fair and square.** **[Roy needs YOUR HELP to fight the GOP’s attempts to undermine our democracy and steal our state government. clean_body: Roy needs your help to fight back. | Peter — there are three key ways radical Republicans are threatening our democracy, and we need you to know about them: 1. They’re planning to pass an ultra-partisan gerrymander to give their party a massive edge in legislative elections. And they think a right-wing majority on the NC Supreme Court will let them get away with it. 2. They’re working to make it harder for voters who don’t agree with them to cast a ballot and easier for the GOP to get those ballots thrown out. 3. And they’re trying to take over the State Board of Elections to give Republicans even more power over future election outcomes. The far-right knows they can’t win fair and square. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thanks, Team Cooper | = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. name: Sheriff Mark Lamb
subject: We have a lot of catching up to do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

The fact that we’re already mid-way through the month is concerning to me for only one reason: we’re seriously behind on funds raised for my Senate campaign.

**_We're Being Watched_**
Fellow American,

I’m writing to ask for your help today on the occasion that as of today, we have just nine more days to hit our 2nd quarter fundraising goal.

The fact that we’re already more than half-way through the month is concerning to me for only one reason: _we’re seriously behind on funds raised for my Senate campaign._

**I’m not joking when I tell you that the during the first 20 days of fundraising in June, my campaign wound up raising just 45% what we did in May.**

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=35a3c35b64354921a493a319603749a5&_e=la0dN7synq5RnIKBETTOme7DdqEMxau3Zx33V4UE3iWCphIzsIsJxPQqQ9039w_GRW5lT4W8Yl78SdMdbsO0uHDoqa327YLiXNGjvUDdirApD2JAWF85Dv6Z6L4R7ohsQQskN3vw3eiTrvzxQ4wTseuyKOlM6xVKg9oVY1WIk8lQGVXeQ3ShwPGvZ5kpD0_W_AE3bFz_iUsypKekUKkLIdR6xuudLMp02E3WfPfdVc0Ahh4dSvH1P1DADHC3N_9D42vFrOOvXV5MrRYx-XumJhyA_f1jZNqwPOKcGbLNNnrV_FtZgQLvxNBVJVNOG7za2CFd0ZxRZbEA9M6XJhuRQgP3P1avCY4UOQuC3Z_tA4ClZqkxmKqpE8oD6YY3GG-ZylFhFI8fuPgOjaCmDnL-FsSleWNfto5Xi_1dHDnGwso%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=35a3c35b64354921a493a319603749a5&_e=la0dN7synq5RnIKBETTOme7DdqEMxau3Zx33V4UE3iWCphIzsIsJxPQqQ9039w_GRW5lT4W8Yl78SdMdbsO0uHDoqa327YLiXNGjvUDdirApD2JAWF85Dv6Z6L4R7ohsQQskN3vw3eiTrvzxQ4wTseuyKOlM6xVKg9oVY1WIk8lQGVXeQ3ShwPGvZ5kpD0_W_AE3bFz_iUsypKekUKkLIdR6xuudLMp02E3WfPfdVc0Ahh4dSvH1P1DADHC3N_9D42vFrOOvXV5MrRYx-XumJlcQKtvkJ_-ixE6RsXIIwhkWpxEmCvl3d4mdeX_5Josz4MPpCwqmIB6MJDNRcGgNbwu33zwOq8Zs5oohgzBB8rzYd6oWp9t1WtF8k5OduO-ikPNVXmb9vBhTgpDvzbPcLcZKhVRMN4gV2aN6BA3O4hg%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=35a3c35b64354921a493a319603749a5&_e=la0dN7synq5RnIKBETTOme7DdqEMxau3Zx33V4UE3iWCphIzsIsJxPQqQ9039w_GRW5lT4W8Yl78SdMdbsO0uHDoqa327YLiXNGjvUDdirApD2JAWF85Dv6Z6L4R7ohsQQskN3vw3eiTrvzxQ4wTseuyKOlM6xVKg9oVY1WIk8lQGVXeQ3ShwPGvZ5kpD0_W_AE3bFz_iUsypKekUKkLIdR6xuudLMp02E3WfPfdVc0Ahh4dSvH1P1DADHC3N_9D42vFrOOvXV5MrRYx-XumJvix5aNJQwcHMVAWKpozBvHNxdr8yIO8QCvumD0-AKcaqb8ZMnBL4F85B3R4PlDO36zTiENkvoLzVcrs7szneP0X7s1vteEPKAxq7_gZxrhuLe1kDJki4u85NQCFQ1R8zShy66zTTRfOetfCq0_2pI4%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

name: Keep Ohio Blue 2024 (via EmiliaSykesForCongress.com)
subject: What the experts are saying.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
With all eyes on Northeast Ohio, we wanted to keep you in the loop on what multiple non-partisan election forecasters are saying about our race...
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65175463/412563263/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.21_b1_kob2024vesfcdc_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDY2ZjUwNC01NzEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JLTSasxTcNXA-i76X0Mke7-ZeHcSnUVG6mVS_iP3MFU=)
Peter –

With all eyes on Northeast Ohio, we wanted to keep you in the loop on what _multiple_ non-partisan election forecasters are saying about our race... [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65175464/412563270/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.21_b1_kob2024vesfcdc_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDY2ZjUwNC01NzEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JLTSasxTcNXA-i76X0Mke7-ZeHcSnUVG6mVS_iP3MFU=) It couldn’t be more clear that this is going to come down to the wire. **But with our jobs, reproductive freedoms, affordable healthcare, and democracy itself on the line in this election, we can’t afford to leave anything up to chance.**

name: Rep. Young Kim
subject: Throwing in the towel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
This isn’t the news I was hoping to deliver today, Friend.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqmsnlg5je37uns2blofk27r7s0aecfv27fdst88_rp22sh2s8i66o77cpge4p34c9h2bs)
---

This isn’t the news I was hoping to deliver today, Friend.

**FIRST** , Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Hakeem Jeffries all came to California to raise money to defeat me.

**THEN** , House Democrats named me one of their _**TOP 18 TARGETS**_.

**NEXT** , two Far Leftists jumped into my race and Dem attack groups pledged _**MILLIONS**_ to defeat me.

**NOW** , one of my Left-Wing opponents raised _**$100K in HER FIRST WEEK**_ after announcing her campaign.
---
| | | [RUSH DONATE HERE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkihjjdi1cbbnprrur8852l34lvo9p0o9ve8akho_rp22sh2s8i66o77cpge4p34c9h2bs "RUSH DONATE HERE")
---
I hate having to give you bad news like this, but I don’t know where else to turn. My opponent will only continue to grow her coffers - _she has the backing of Hollywood elites and dark money donors. _

With our second quarterly deadline rapidly approaching, catching up to her has never been more important.

**[Today, I’m personally asking if you’ll rush in a few dollars to help us close this gap and protect this seat from the woke Democrats.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zok48h6c3ftsf116n19aup1bavm9af6fdcc00ta0_rp22sh2s8i66o77cpge4p34c9h2bs "Today, I’m personally asking if you’ll rush in a few dollars to help us close this gap and protect this seat from the woke Democrats.")**

No amount is too big or too small and it is all used toward ensuring we defend our razor-thin House Majority.
---

---
I would ask if it wasn’t critical, Friend. My seat could very well decide the House Majority and my radical opponent knows it.

Will you please step up and help us?

Thank you for everything,

Young Kim

---

---
_We’ll get straight to the point, Friend:

We are completely dependent on grassroots support to fuel our efforts against the Democrats.

YOU are the reason Young is in Congress today, and YOU will be the reason she’s able to continue our fight for small business support, lower taxes, slashing red tape, cutting back unnecessary government spending, more educational opportunities for our children, fixing our broken immigration system, and keeping the American Dream alive for generations. **[So, we’re humbly asking for $3, $5, $10, or a greater amount to help keep my seat so I can keep fighting for you.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc1798trnm369lfrsbedskiu37u2nrn3s8i2qqvg_rp22sh2s8i66o77cpge4p34c9h2bs "So, we’re humbly asking for $3, $5, $10, or a greater amount to help keep my seat so I can keep fighting for you.")**_

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: We need your help with H.R. 7
body:
I wanted to make sure you knew about a critical piece of legislation before the House of Representatives.

| [ ](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zekicditdpeig87p55lbbaftfkb4sfl2r30ocmhg_rp22sh2s8i66o77cpgeco36chh2bs)
---
#
Dear Friend,

I wanted to make sure you knew about a critical piece of legislation before the House of Representatives. The No Taxpayer Funding for Abortion Act of 2023--also known as H.R. 7--is a critical piece of legislation that will make a huge impact in the fight to save unborn children.

H.R. 7 prohibits the use of federal funds for abortion services, except in cases of rape, incest, or to save the life of the mother. This policy saves lives! Data shows that the policy against taxpayer subsidized abortion in just one federal program--Medicaid--has saved nearly 2.5 million lives.

This bill would be a major step forward in our fight to protect the lives of unborn children. It's a clear message to the world that America is a nation that values life.

But our work to get this bill signed into law is just getting started. Right now, representatives in Congress are dragging their feet on this bill, and [we need nearly every Republican to vote yes for the bill to pass.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsb8rftq8a4icb9gqgjm47nd1b8iovh3khs42abo_rp22sh2s8i66o77cpgeco36chh2bs) We are working hard to keep up the pressure on Members of Congress to pass this bill.

Friend, I thought you would want to know the latest about this critical piece of legislation and elected officials dragging their feet on something that could save hundreds of thousands. As a pro-life-minded individual, you deserve to know who is actually standing for life by championing laws that will protect babies.

[Together, we can hold elected officials accountable and advance the fight to protect the sanctity of life.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5nat6npje1nevone20fdqftsg2pkm5novkpk6i8_rp22sh2s8i66o77cpgeco36chh2bs)

Sincerely,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President
Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

P.S.: If you believe that holding elected officials accountable is critical to ensuring that babies are protected, we need your help to make sure that H.R. 7 becomes law. Make your contribution using this secure link: [https://secure.sbaprolife.org/help-pass-hr7](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmk3cnj5sc9n5ndvr7h4f4otk0qtpvrdu33rr000_rp22sh2s8i66o77cpgeco36chh2bs)

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjti6u822sa4gh5k236q7g629apv7hk6mmeqlk4o_rp22sh2s8i66o77cpgeco36chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chh62o70cph2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z87srl8pg8kvvfh6crpiu5i4qej3quflrd7002m8_rp22sh2s8i66o77cpgeco36chh2bs)_
