name: Adam Frisch
subject: just $10 to defeat Boebert
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | Hello,

$10.

That’s the amount I am humbly asking you to chip in to my campaign today to help me defeat Lauren Boebert. Yes, just $10.

$10 because last year, I lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes.

$10 because I’m running again, but our race was the closest race in the entire country.

$10 because the first poll of the campaign shows I am tied with Boebert, 45% to 45%.

And $10 because Lauren Boebert and her Super PAC allies are already attacking me, and I need your help to counter their lies if we’re going to win.

subject: BREAKING: I just reintroduced the Equality Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
As a gay man, this means so much to me.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65176557/412566885/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTJlOWVmMy01OTEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3g_xYMNoymcYtc1mz3dUNgs2t_Y6S4ahQ8P567l6z3E=)
---
**Peter — I have breaking news: Moments ago, I proudly reintroduced the Equality Act to the 118th Congress** , a sweeping set of reforms that prohibit discrimination on the basis of sex, sexual orientation and gender identity.

As the first LGBTQ+ person of color elected to Congress, I have faced homophobic attacks. I was publicly outed by my Republican opponent.

**I’ve lived in an America that banned gay marriage. And I’m not going back. **

We all deserve equal rights and equal opportunities – _no matter our race, sexual orientation, or gender_. That’s why I’m leading the fight to stand up against Republican bigotry and fight for LGBTQ+ communities.

[**But Republicans are furious that I’m calling out their hatred. They're going to launch a full-force attack on progressive like me who are leading on LGBTQ+ issues. Will you chip in $7 NOW to help me keep fighting back? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65176558/412566886/656015310?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230621_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTJlOWVmMy01OTEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3g_xYMNoymcYtc1mz3dUNgs2t_Y6S4ahQ8P567l6z3E=) | [CHIP IN $7 NOW TO SUPPORT MY FIGHT FOR LGBTQ+ RIGHTS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65176559/412566887/656015310?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230621_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTJlOWVmMy01OTEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3g_xYMNoymcYtc1mz3dUNgs2t_Y6S4ahQ8P567l6z3E=)
---
The Equality Act will amend the 1964 Civil Rights Act to explicitly prevent discrimination based on sexual orientation and gender identity. That means:
* LGBTQ people can’t be fired because of who they love or their gender identity
* Public accomodations like retail stores can’t refuse business to LGBTQ people
* Broadly expanding protections for LGBTQ people to areas like housing, education, health care, and more!

But Republicans are dead set on seeing this bill FAIL! So Peter, along with my reintroduction of the Equality Act _**I need a groundswell of support from folks like you to prove to Republicans that they’re on the wrong side of this issue.**_

[**Can I count on you to chip in $7 to send an unmistakable message of support for LGBTQ rights? I need 500 donors to step up TODAY. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65176560/412566888/656015310?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230621_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTJlOWVmMy01OTEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3g_xYMNoymcYtc1mz3dUNgs2t_Y6S4ahQ8P567l6z3E=)

subject: Tulare County Supervisors Dennis Townsend, Larry Micari, and Pete Vander Poel Endorse Michael Maher for Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/maherforcongress/5friday-12758158?e=1722d05e10)
---
| | [ ](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=4c30b2a0d5&e=1722d05e10)
---
| |
June 21, 2023
**Tulare County Supervisors Dennis Townsend, Larry Micari, and Pete Vander Poel Endorse Michael Maher for Congress** Military veteran Michael Maher proudly announces endorsements from Tulare County Supervisors Dennis Townsend, Larry Micari, and Pete Vander Poel. Townsend was elected in 2018, is the current Chairman, and represents Supervisorial District 5. Elected in 2020, Supervisor Micari represents Supervisorial District 1 and is the current vice-chair. Supervisor Vander Poel was elected in 2008 and represents Supervisorial District 2.

Tulare County supervisors Micari, Vander Poel, and Townsend join a growing list of local leaders and organizations endorsing Michael Maher’s campaign for Congress, including the Tulare County Republican Party, Tulare County Sheriff Mike Boudreaux, State Senator Shannon Grove, and Congresswoman Connie Conway.

To view a complete list of Michael Maher for Congress endorsements, please click [here](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=c02b236372&e=1722d05e10).
---
| [DONATE](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=df02f1a556&e=1722d05e10 "DONATE")
---
|
---
| _**Background** : Michael Maher is a former FBI Special Agent and US Navy Veteran who was raised in the Central Valley. Michael and his wife, Ann, are raising their young family in Fresno County, and he owns and operates an aviation business. Michael was the 2022 nominee for California's 21st Congressional District._

name: Scott Parkinson
subject: Tim Kaine votes with Bernie Sanders 94% of the time.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Parkinson for Senate
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/9d529c79be2f12a8/accf69d35c3b6cc7c3d6b838967d376c/42903)
---
Dear Peter, In a 51/49 Senate, **every vote, every state,** and**every Senator matters** more than ever before. Which is why **we have to nationalize this Senate race** against Tim Kaine. We need a movement to save the middle class. Tim Kaine **votes with Bernie Sanders 94% of the time.** Our country **cannot afford 94% of Socialism.** **Jobs** are gone. The **middle-class American Dream** is turning into a nightmare, and we are awakened to budding Socialism. Washington has become a **disconnected political oligarchy.** This is why **I’m stepping up** NOW. We need **new leaders** in America that will **never forget their roots** , the promises they’ve made, and **what makes America Great - FREEDOM.** **Let’s STAND UP for freedom and for the middle class!**[**You can join our movement by chipping in $100, $75, $50, or even just $25 to our campaign today.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/9d529c79be2f12a8/c60e57dd6372d77bc3d6b838967d376c/42903)

clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, In a 51/49 Senate, every vote, every state, andevery Senator matters more than ever before. Which is why we have to nationalize this Senate race against Tim Kaine. We need a movement to save the middle class. Tim Kaine votes with Bernie Sanders 94% of the time. Our country cannot afford 94% of Socialism. Jobs are gone. The middle-class American Dream is turning into a nightmare, and we are awakened to budding Socialism. Washington has become a disconnected political oligarchy. This is why I’m stepping up NOW. We need new leaders in America that will never forget their roots , the promises they’ve made, and what makes America Great - FREEDOM. Let’s STAND UP for freedom and for the middle class! I’m not disgruntled ordiscouraged. I’m not disengaged ordisconnected from reality. I’m ready to fight for freedom. I’m ready to fight for families. I’m ready to step up and make a difference. Join me. For Freedom, Scott Parkinson Candidate, U.S. Senate (VA) FOLLOW US ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Parkinson for Senate | |

name: Tuttle Twins
subject: Facepalm: only 13% of 8th graders proficient in history?!
body:
I called it "appalling" and landed on Fox News' home page...

| | | | | |
---
|
---
| Want a free trip for your family to Boston? ✈️ More on that in a sec... But first, a quick question for you. What grade did you get in social studies (history) in 8th grade? I think I got a C. It wasn't pretty. Turns out, I wasn't alone in struggling with learning history in government schools. Check out these recent headlines:
---
| |
---
| They're all talking about a new batch of data that came out showing that _only 13% of 8th graders in government schools are proficient in American history._ 😱 That's appalling! I get fired up about how poorly kids are learning history — and part of it is from personal experience. In school, I hated learning history. I never understood why I was being forced to memorize dates and names and factoids of things that happened a long time ago. _Why does this stuff from 250 years ago matter to my life today?_ I often wondered. My teachers never really had an answer. That's why we've created our new _America's History_ books—and we're launching Volume 2, which covers 1776 to 1791. Like Glenn Beck says, "These are amazing history books that your freedom-loving family needs to inspire your kids!" Most social studies books try to cram kids' minds full of factoids like names and dates—what battle happened when, who said what to whom, etc. Yawn! Our books use storytelling to teach the powerful principles that motivated the founding fathers, as well as how those principles relate to our world today. **Bonus!** When you purchase you'll be entered to win our all-expenses paid vacation giveaway to Boston! ✈️ Details below...
---
| |
---
| Our [newest history book](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhvt224dttnrru332dcooffut6tmunl6m7sk9io8_rp22sh2s8i66o77cpgecor7cth2bs) starts shipping in just a few days, so grab yours today! Your family will be able to celebrate Independence more meaningfully by reading these stories together. This new book covers the Revolutionary War, the creation of the Constitution, the ratification of the Bill of Rights, etc. Powerful ideas and inspiring stories to share! **And for each book you buy, you'll be entered to win our new Boston Vacation Giveaway to see all the amazing sites where the American Revolution started!** I was just there a few weeks ago and _loved_ it. We're sending a family of four and paying for the **entire** thing! Legal jargon and info at the link below, along with your options on getting the book — including the first book in case your family doesn't yet have it!
---
| | [GET THE BOOK + ENTER TO WIN!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfqsk77otjtjl0lq2fittbjh20i82shmd050ar5g_rp22sh2s8i66o77cpgecor7cth2bs)
---
| |
---
| Most people celebrate the "4th of July" with BBQs, fireworks, and fun. And that's great. But what would it look like for your kids to elevate this year's experience? With only 13% of kids proficient in American history, it's critical that you help your kids be the exception rather than the rule — and it starts by helping them learn history that matters today. That's how our books are structured — storytelling that explains why the ideas of the past are relevant today. (You can see sample pages, and download an entire chapter, at the link below.) Hope your family enjoys! Let's level up our Independence Day this year. Get started here:
---
| | [GET THE BOOK + ENTER TO WIN!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5m78bvptsr206hfi032qkovers268c5bkjp9ako_rp22sh2s8i66o77cpgecor7cth2bs)

Fellow Conservative, Tuesday, June 20, 2023 was a sad day for the rule of law in our country. Hunter Biden’s slap on the wrist plea deal is absolutely DISGRACEFUL. _If I did what he did or you did what he did, we’d be in jail..._yet Hunter’s not going to spend a single day behind bars!__ This is a guy who willfully underpaid his taxes by $1.2 million. He was a self-described crack addict who waved around a gun he unlawfully possessed in his twisted home videos. **__Hunter’s sweetheart deal from the Department of Justice is three things at once: CRONYISM, CAMOUFLAGE, and CORRUPTION.** I won’t let up in the fight to expose this coverup and I’m counting on your help. [_**Stand behind me at this critical time >>>**_](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
[**RUSH EMERGENCY SUPPORT**](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Merrick Garland indicted Hunter Biden for two reasons:

1) To insulate Joe Biden from ongoing investigations into his family’s corrupt business dealings, and;

2) To mask his partisan vendetta against President Trump. Evidence is mounting, day after day, that Joe Biden made MILLIONS from Hunter’s deals in Ukraine with Burisma – _and the Department of Justice wants to BURY it!_ They gave Hunter Biden a slap on the wrist to deflect further scrutiny. **Well, I’m here to tell them that WILL NOT HAPPEN on my watch!** [_**Fuel my fight for truth and accountability for the American people HERE >>>**_](http://trk.tedcruz.-A)

For Liberty,

subject: Press Release Official Post Election Statement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
We Will Not Surrender
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ytTOkU6Ump2LUCPFuWMezS3IRpYGIMRs5lg6RfbbcmIhQaLFjgjLWhuRjGI48fyTBM126mEDOLZG9PZl-qcZFYLL6JnkeSnqs5agIlOEtXYe-XIqYRmO-qD63ZIzLcmN4_J3SRzAAOQl_SKquP-lW-4oYO4oBEZJuRQ2qP107ow=&c=qgwCNpftrxfbr6PvuQHMDYw9aIjJ3NaOodR-4UqatUUfUCKnZeouDQ==&ch=WNuKdPgWvE3sVqNoHWFfi5jmZaqbIIjYg_p5lG31tAMI-GEGwDtKqw==)

---
| | |
---|---
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
June 21, 2023

Press Contact:
Chris Farmer
chris@chaseforva.com
804 912 6007

Scheduling Press Interview:
Debbie Gwynn
debbie@chaseforva.com
804 393 2715

We Will Not Surrender

Sturtevant Losing Until 346 Illegal Votes Found in Early Voting

CHESTERFIELD, VA- Senator Chase plans to challenge Tuesday's election results, disputing the early votes that took place during the 45 day early voting period that were done on voting computers that were not in compliance with Virginia State law. She's currently seeking legal counsel to address concerns.

"We're not asking for a recount. A recount won't correct the problem. We will never know for sure if there were bad actors in the early voting certification process. We're asking for those who acted illegally to be held accountable for their unethical actions during early voting.

Chesterfield GOP and Ethics Attorney Chair Leslie Haley and the Sturtevant campaign should be held accountable for their lack of judgment and clear conflict of interest that took place when Sturtevant's campaign manager was illegally chosen as the sole Republican to certify early voting machines during early voting.

As stated in a [press release on May 15](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ytTOkU6Ump2LUCPFuWMezS3IRpYGIMRs5lg6RfbbcmIhQaLFjgjLWsLuLYbeGQwobLw4xw1CP6SdhMqv5rv58qVXCJOqd37EWx5E-dbm1yAx8pacZEUQ1Bi2qt1mQpgMFXlOn6Pg-TW5ST7p2KLYkA==&c=qgwCNpftrxfbr6PvuQHMDYw9aIjJ3NaOodR-4UqatUUfUCKnZeouDQ==&ch=WNuKdPgWvE3sVqNoHWFfi5jmZaqbIIjYg_p5lG31tAMI-GEGwDtKqw==), we have zero confidence that the early voting machines were properly certified. There should be consequences," stated Senator Amanda Chase. "No voter should have been voting early on those voting computers until they were in compliance with Virginia State law."

Senator Amanda Chase won the actual Election Day voting. In fact, she was leading all night Election Night by at least 2%, until the absentee votes were counted. It was only after absentee votes were counted that she came up short by 346 votes.
Senator Amanda Chase announced at her Victory Party last night that she would not concede until she was confident that the official vote count was correct and any election day concerns of voters were resolved.

---
|
---
| "It's time to hold those who put their "thumb on the scale" accountable. We must restore the trust and confidence of voters," stated Senator Amanda Chase.

clean_body: We Will Not Surrender | | | | == | | | | | ---|--- FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE June 21, 2023 Press Contact: Chris Farmer chris@chaseforva.com 804 912 6007 Scheduling Press Interview: Debbie Gwynn debbie@chaseforva.com 804 393 2715 We Will Not Surrender Sturtevant Losing Until 346 Illegal Votes Found in Early Voting CHESTERFIELD, VA- Senator Chase plans to challenge Tuesday's election results, disputing the early votes that took place during the 45 day early voting period that were done on voting computers that were not in compliance with Virginia State law. She's currently seeking legal counsel to address concerns. "We're not asking for a recount. A recount won't correct the problem. We will never know for sure if there were bad actors in the early voting certification process. We're asking for those who acted illegally to be held accountable for their unethical actions during early voting. Chesterfield GOP and Ethics Attorney Chair Leslie Haley and the Sturtevant campaign should be held accountable for their lack of judgment and clear conflict of interest that took place when Sturtevant's campaign manager was illegally chosen as the sole Republican to certify early voting machines during early voting. As stated in a ==, we have zero confidence that the early voting machines were properly certified. There should be consequences," stated Senator Amanda Chase. "No voter should have been voting early on those voting computers until they were in compliance with Virginia State law." Senator Amanda Chase won the actual Election Day voting. In fact, she was leading all night Election Night by at least 2%, until the absentee votes were counted. It was only after absentee votes were counted that she came up short by 346 votes. Senator Amanda Chase announced at her Victory Party last night that she would not concede until she was confident that the official vote count was correct and any election day concerns of voters were resolved. | | "It's time to hold those who put their "thumb on the scale" accountable. We must restore the trust and confidence of voters," stated Senator Amanda Chase. | | | | | | | | | == | | == | | | | | | | | | == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | | | | Senator Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 5811, Midlothian, VA 23112 | | == Sent by mailto:amanda@chaseforva.com powered by == ==

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Americans deserve Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

From routine checkups to emergency services and everything in between, every one of us needs access to healthcare. Yet many find themselves without access to quality, affordable care, foregoing lifesaving treatment or taking on mountains of medical debt.

The United States is one of the only advanced liberal democracies in the world that doesn’t guarantee healthcare to its citizens. Millions of Americans are left uninsured, underinsured, or struggling to meet rising treatment costs while healthcare remains a largely for-profit entity.

There’s only one real solution: Medicare for All.

Sign if you agree: Americans need and deserve access to quality, affordable healthcare. [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-and-send-the-petition-support-the-medicare-for-all-act-2?source=2023Medicare4All_RK&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdk-medicare-for-all-july-2023]

Sign the Petition [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-and-send-the-petition-support-the-medicare-for-all-act-2?source=2023Medicare4All_RK&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdk-medicare-for-all-july-2023]

The Medicare for All Act of 2023 would revolutionize healthcare in the United States. Through a single-payer healthcare system, people would gain widespread coverage for medical care, prescription drug costs, mental health services, supplemental care like dental and vision, and more. No matter one’s income level, employment status, or pre-existing conditions, no one would need to choose between lifesaving care and financial stability.

It’s time to provide every American with access to quality care. It’s time we pass Medicare for All. [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-and-send-the-petition-support-the-medicare-for-all-act-2?source=2023Medicare4All_RK&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdk-medicare-for-all-july-2023]

In solidarity,
Ro

That’s why President Trump recorded a video for you encouraging you to give any amount – even just $1 – to stop these left-wing mega-donors from buying our country in 2024. | | Thank you, Team Trump Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: Brie Bristol
subject: The Wire: One year after Dobbs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee Massachusetts Democratic Party
body:
| | |
---
| | _**Our goal with the MassDems Wire is to give you the tools to boost Democrats and take on the GOP and their Republican allies. Use this information on social media, as the basis for a letter to the editor of your local paper, in emails to your personal network, or in conversation with your friends and neighbors.**_
---
|
---
| | Dear Peter, Last weekend was the one year anniversary of the SCOTUS ruling overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , a decision that has allowed Republican’s to move our nation backwards. Luckily in Massachusetts, we have a governor who will stand up for our rights to abortion and bodily autonomy. But, we need everyone on board to make sure that the rest of the nation is safe as well. This toolkit contains a guide with resources, from the DNC, on language to help spread the word about the consequences of the court’s decision, how it has **paved the way for Republicans to take away Americans’ reproductive rights as Democrats work to protect them** , and what is at stake in the next election**.** **Please forward this email to your networks and don't hesitate to reach out to me directly at brie@massdems.org about using the guidance below.** Sincerely,

**Brie Bristol**
Digital Content Manager
Massachusetts Democratic Party
---
| | |
---
| |
# **Talking Points**
---
| |
* In the year since conservative Supreme Court justices ignored decades of precedent and overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , Republicans across the country have moved swiftly to restrict access to reproductive health care.
* This decision and the consequences that have followed are the direct result of Republicans’ unrelenting, decades-long, radical war on health care and the right to choose.
* The court’s decision paved the way for MAGA Republican governors and state legislatures to pass and enact extreme laws to outlaw abortion, threaten doctors with prison time, and put women’s lives at risk.
* In some states, women and girls have already been forced to choose between carrying out [medically risky](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65177266/412569771/1700657511?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzliZDM3MC01ZDEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAD1dno8UxXI3duyWg3dktPqYhyY0GSjo8-l291YsMs=&emci=9b2e5075-7b0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a39bd370-5d10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=17281370) pregnancies and [fleeing](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65177268/412569773/-148165456?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzliZDM3MC01ZDEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAD1dno8UxXI3duyWg3dktPqYhyY0GSjo8-l291YsMs=&emci=9b2e5075-7b0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a39bd370-5d10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=17281370) their home states for the care they need.
* Republican lawmakers are wildly out of step with the American people when it comes to abortion:
* Nearly a year after the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, a new [poll from NPR, PBS NewsHour, and Marist](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65177269/412569776/1191731284?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzliZDM3MC01ZDEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAD1dno8UxXI3duyWg3dktPqYhyY0GSjo8-l291YsMs=&emci=9b2e5075-7b0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a39bd370-5d10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=17281370) found that **a majority of U.S. adults still say they oppose the justices’ decision**.
* A [Kaiser Family Foundation poll](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65177277/412569777/9586234?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzliZDM3MC01ZDEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAD1dno8UxXI3duyWg3dktPqYhyY0GSjo8-l291YsMs=&emci=9b2e5075-7b0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a39bd370-5d10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=17281370) found that **more Americans prefer the Democratic Party's approach to abortion policy than the Republican approach.**
* Despite the unpopularity of their position, every 2024 Republican presidential candidate is running on an extreme anti-choice record:
* **Donald Trump** laid the groundwork for a national ban by appointing three of the right-wing Supreme Court justices who voted to overturn _Roe_ , and called for “[some form of punishment](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65177279/412569795/378824302?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzliZDM3MC01ZDEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAD1dno8UxXI3duyWg3dktPqYhyY0GSjo8-l291YsMs=&emci=9b2e5075-7b0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a39bd370-5d10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=17281370)” for women who have abortions.
* **Ron DeSantis** signed extreme legislation that bans abortion before many women even know they’re pregnant.
* **Tim Scott** cosponsored multiple abortion bans and vowed to sign “[the most conservative](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65177281/412569798/-1167159054?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzliZDM3MC01ZDEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAD1dno8UxXI3duyWg3dktPqYhyY0GSjo8-l291YsMs=&emci=9b2e5075-7b0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a39bd370-5d10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=17281370)” national abortion ban possible if elected.
* **Nikki Haley** [said](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65177283/412569800/617787336?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzliZDM3MC01ZDEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAD1dno8UxXI3duyWg3dktPqYhyY0GSjo8-l291YsMs=&emci=9b2e5075-7b0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a39bd370-5d10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=17281370#:~:text=In%20South%20Carolina%2C%20Haley%20signed,pledged%20to%20file%20legal%20challenges.) she would support a national abortion ban after signing an abortion ban in SC that had no exceptions for rape or incest and threatened doctors with jail time.
* **Mike Pence** [called](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65177285/412569803/1165261415?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzliZDM3MC01ZDEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAD1dno8UxXI3duyWg3dktPqYhyY0GSjo8-l291YsMs=&emci=9b2e5075-7b0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a39bd370-5d10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=17281370) for banning abortion in every state and [supports](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65177287/412569805/-1557514100?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzliZDM3MC01ZDEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAD1dno8UxXI3duyWg3dktPqYhyY0GSjo8-l291YsMs=&emci=9b2e5075-7b0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a39bd370-5d10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=17281370) outlawing medication abortion.
* **Chris Christie**[backed](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65177289/412569807/-1765409380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzliZDM3MC01ZDEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAD1dno8UxXI3duyWg3dktPqYhyY0GSjo8-l291YsMs=&emci=9b2e5075-7b0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a39bd370-5d10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=17281370) a federal ban and [worked](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65177290/412569809/1670042426?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzliZDM3MC01ZDEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAD1dno8UxXI3duyWg3dktPqYhyY0GSjo8-l291YsMs=&emci=9b2e5075-7b0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a39bd370-5d10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=17281370) with Susan B. Anthony List to coordinate efforts to restrict abortion in every state.
* **Doug Burgum** [signed](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65177292/412569810/-740481550?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzliZDM3MC01ZDEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAD1dno8UxXI3duyWg3dktPqYhyY0GSjo8-l291YsMs=&emci=9b2e5075-7b0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a39bd370-5d10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=17281370) one of the strictest abortion bans in the country as North Dakota governor, with no exceptions for victims of rape or incest after six weeks.
* **Asa Hutchinson** [signed](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65177294/412569812/1037443995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzliZDM3MC01ZDEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAD1dno8UxXI3duyWg3dktPqYhyY0GSjo8-l291YsMs=&emci=9b2e5075-7b0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a39bd370-5d10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=17281370) one of the strictest abortion bans in the country, with no exceptions for rape or incest, and [supports](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65177296/412569814/-488743391?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzliZDM3MC01ZDEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAD1dno8UxXI3duyWg3dktPqYhyY0GSjo8-l291YsMs=&emci=9b2e5075-7b0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a39bd370-5d10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=17281370#:~:text=As%20governor%20in%202021%2C%20Hutchinson,and%20overturn%20the%20Roe%20v.) a national ban.
* **Vivek Ramaswamy** [supports](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65177298/412569816/1389162311?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzliZDM3MC01ZDEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAD1dno8UxXI3duyWg3dktPqYhyY0GSjo8-l291YsMs=&emci=9b2e5075-7b0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a39bd370-5d10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=17281370) six-week abortion bans and called the one DeSantis signed “[reasonable](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65177306/412569818/588752315?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzliZDM3MC01ZDEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAD1dno8UxXI3duyWg3dktPqYhyY0GSjo8-l291YsMs=&emci=9b2e5075-7b0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a39bd370-5d10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=17281370).”
* As Republicans push to restrict abortion nationwide, Democratic governors, attorneys general, state legislators, and other leaders in many states are the last line of defense for Americans’ reproductive rights.
* President Biden has called on Congress to codify Roe v. Wade, making it the law of the land and restoring rights women relied on for fifty years.
* As the President said in his State of the Union address earlier this year, he and Vice President Harris are doing everything they can to protect access to reproductive health care and safeguard patient privacy amid ongoing Republican attacks.
* And if Congress passes a national abortion ban, President Biden has promised to veto it.
* The stakes for 2024 are extremely high: While Republicans are running on their anti-freedom agenda of taking away rights and dictating women’s private health care decisions, Democrats from state legislatures to the Oval Office are committed to making sure people have more rights, not fewer.

# **Additional Resources**
---
| | _Links to polling and other resources to help spread the word_ :
---
| |
* [PBS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65177308/412569826/1191731284?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzliZDM3MC01ZDEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAD1dno8UxXI3duyWg3dktPqYhyY0GSjo8-l291YsMs=&emci=9b2e5075-7b0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a39bd370-5d10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=17281370): “Support for abortion rights has grown in spite of bans and restrictions, poll shows”

* [TIME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65177315/412569834/-625947156?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzliZDM3MC01ZDEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAD1dno8UxXI3duyWg3dktPqYhyY0GSjo8-l291YsMs=&emci=9b2e5075-7b0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a39bd370-5d10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=17281370): “Even Religious Americans Favor Abortion Rights Post-Dobbs”
* [Washington Post](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65177316/412569835/1842804315?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzliZDM3MC01ZDEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAD1dno8UxXI3duyWg3dktPqYhyY0GSjo8-l291YsMs=&emci=9b2e5075-7b0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a39bd370-5d10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=17281370): “Most U.S. adults say the abortion pill mifepristone should stay on the market, Post-ABC poll finds”

| | |

| |
# **Ways to Take Action**
---
| |
* Post on social media by recording a short video about how the SCOTUS ruling effected you. Post a direct-to-camera (selfie!) video on why female representation in politics matters, don’t forget to include hashtags like #DobbsDecision, #SCOTUS, and #RoeVWade

* Use your phone to film yourself vertically from the chest up.
* Record in a well lit room or in front of a window. If possible, try to find a neutral wall or background.
* Make sure you’re in a quiet area and avoid sources of background noise like cars, parks, bodies of water, etc.
* Record less than 30 seconds. Don’t be afraid to record multiple takes to get a clean video!
* Post them on Twitter, Facebook, or Instagram, ask your friends to uplift these posts, and don’t hesitate to flag them for us by DMing @massdems.
* After you film your selfie video, use the sample posts and creative assets below to keep spreading the word about the SCOTUS Dobbs anniversary online:

---

clean_body: | | | | | Our goal with the MassDems Wire is to give you the tools to boost Democrats and take on the GOP and their Republican allies. Use this information on social media, as the basis for a letter to the editor of your local paper, in emails to your personal network, or in conversation with your friends and neighbors. | | | Dear Peter, Last weekend was the one year anniversary of the SCOTUS ruling overturning Roe v. Wade , a decision that has allowed Republican’s to move our nation backwards. Luckily in Massachusetts, we have a governor who will stand up for our rights to abortion and bodily autonomy. But, we need everyone on board to make sure that the rest of the nation is safe as well. This toolkit contains a guide with resources, from the DNC, on language to help spread the word about the consequences of the court’s decision, how it has paved the way for Republicans to take away Americans’ reproductive rights as Democrats work to protect them , and what is at stake in the next election. Please forward this email to your networks and don't hesitate to reach out to me directly at brie@massdems.org about using the guidance below. Sincerely, Brie Bristol Digital Content Manager Massachusetts Democratic Party | | | | | Talking Points | | In the year since conservative Supreme Court justices ignored decades of precedent and overturned Roe v. Wade , Republicans across the country have moved swiftly to restrict access to reproductive health care. This decision and the consequences that have followed are the direct result of Republicans’ unrelenting, decades-long, radical war on health care and the right to choose. The court’s decision paved the way for MAGA Republican governors and state legislatures to pass and enact extreme laws to outlaw abortion, threaten doctors with prison time, and put women’s lives at risk. In some states, women and girls have already been forced to choose between carrying out pregnancies and their home states for the care they need. Republican lawmakers are wildly out of step with the American people when it comes to abortion: Nearly a year after the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, a new found that a majority of U.S. adults still say they oppose the justices’ decision. A found that more Americans prefer the Democratic Party's approach to abortion policy than the Republican approach. Despite the unpopularity of their position, every 2024 Republican presidential candidate is running on an extreme anti-choice record: Donald Trump laid the groundwork for a national ban by appointing three of the right-wing Supreme Court justices who voted to overturn Roe , and called for “” for women who have abortions. Ron DeSantis signed extreme legislation that bans abortion before many women even know they’re pregnant. Tim Scott cosponsored multiple abortion bans and vowed to sign “” national abortion ban possible if elected. Nikki Haley . she would support a national abortion ban after signing an abortion ban in SC that had no exceptions for rape or incest and threatened doctors with jail time. Mike Pence for banning abortion in every state and outlawing medication abortion. Chris Christie a federal ban and with Susan B. Anthony List to coordinate efforts to restrict abortion in every state. Doug Burgum one of the strictest abortion bans in the country as North Dakota governor, with no exceptions for victims of rape or incest after six weeks. Asa Hutchinson one of the strictest abortion bans in the country, with no exceptions for rape or incest, and . a national ban. Vivek Ramaswamy six-week abortion bans and called the one DeSantis signed “.” As Republicans push to restrict abortion nationwide, Democratic governors, attorneys general, state legislators, and other leaders in many states are the last line of defense for Americans’ reproductive rights. President Biden has called on Congress to codify Roe v. Wade, making it the law of the land and restoring rights women relied on for fifty years. As the President said in his State of the Union address earlier this year, he and Vice President Harris are doing everything they can to protect access to reproductive health care and safeguard patient privacy amid ongoing Republican attacks. And if Congress passes a national abortion ban, President Biden has promised to veto it. The stakes for 2024 are extremely high: While Republicans are running on their anti-freedom agenda of taking away rights and dictating women’s private health care decisions, Democrats from state legislatures to the Oval Office are committed to making sure people have more rights, not fewer. | | | | | Additional Resources | | Links to polling and other resources to help spread the word : | | : “Support for abortion rights has grown in spite of bans and restrictions, poll shows” : “Dissatisfaction With U.S. Abortion Policy Hits Another High” : “An Overwhelming Majority of Voters Support Protecting Access to Abortion” : “Trust in Supreme Court fell to lowest point in 50 years after abortion decision, poll shows” : “Even Religious Americans Favor Abortion Rights Post-Dobbs” : “Most U.S. adults say the abortion pill mifepristone should stay on the market, Post-ABC poll finds” | | | | | Ways to Take Action | | Post on social media by recording a short video about how the SCOTUS ruling effected you. Post a direct-to-camera (selfie!) video on why female representation in politics matters, don’t forget to include hashtags like #DobbsDecision, #SCOTUS, and #RoeVWade Use your phone to film yourself vertically from the chest up. Record in a well lit room or in front of a window. If possible, try to find a neutral wall or background. Make sure you’re in a quiet area and avoid sources of background noise like cars, parks, bodies of water, etc. Record less than 30 seconds. Don’t be afraid to record multiple takes to get a clean video! Post them on Twitter, Facebook, or Instagram, ask your friends to uplift these posts, and don’t hesitate to flag them for us by DMing @massdems. * After you film your selfie video, use the sample posts and creative assets below to keep spreading the word about the SCOTUS Dobbs anniversary online: | | Post #1 Every person deserves the right to make decisions about their own body. Access to safe and legal abortion is crucial for reproductive autonomy, bodily autonomy, and gender equality. Let's stand together against Republicans who threaten these rights. Post #2 One year after the Dobbs decision, the battle for reproductive rights still rages on. I refuse to accept a world where access to safe and legal abortion is stripped away. We must fight for the right to choose and protect bodily autonomy for all. We must elect Democrats to protect us. Post #3 The Dobbs anniversary serves as a reminder of the urgent need to protect and expand reproductive healthcare for all. Republicans will continue to come for our rights on the ballot. We must use our voices to fight for our rights. | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee Massachusetts Democratic Party 11 Beacon St Suite 410 Boston, MA 02108 United States | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

You see the headlines, Peter.
Right now, a record number of anti-LGBTQ+ bills are moving through GOP-controlled legislatures across the country. Republican officials are doubling down on fearmongering and scapegoating tactics and emboldening discrimination and harassment towards LGBTQ+ people nationwide.
But state by state, Emerge community members like you are rallying together to demand equal rights and dignity for all, and Emerge alums across the country are fighting back against anti-LGBTQ+ legislation. Our movement for justice, equity, and real representation at every level of government is growing, and we won’t stand aside in the face of anti-LGBTQ+ hate.
We’re committed to flipping GOP-controlled legislatures across the country to ensure ALL communities have their rights protected. **That means Emerge’s work to recruit, train, and empower more LGBTQ+ women to run for office is more urgent than ever, and we’re counting on you to be a part of it. **

Peter:

In 2018, West Virginia Sen. Joe Manchin spent $8.9 million – not including super PAC money – to win another term in the Senate. Sen. Manchin won by 3.3%; **former President Trump would win West Virginia two years later by 39%.**

Sen. Manchin eked out his 2018 win because of the decades of goodwill he’d built up around the state and because he vastly outspent his Republican opponent. Everyone in conservative politics – and on the other side of the aisle, for that matter, thinks they know what Manchin’s next move will be. **Will he run, or won’t he? That’s the $9 million question.**

While Sen. Manchin has not publicly announced his intention to seek a 4th term in the Senate (he’s waiting until December), his allies say it’s “crazy to count him out” at this point.

They’re right. New polling featured two hypothetical matchups – one between Manchin and Rep. Alex Mooney and the other between Manchin and Governor Jim Justice. The results from the two surveys couldn’t have been clearer: **the only West Virginia Republican who can beat Democrat Joe Manchin is Governor Jim Justice. **

[** Pitch in today
Help Republicans Flip West Virginia **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f6edf4ca35634702af34a70d69369e54&_e=QR69Ns5xm8neD-fDUaJmcdYN7_D6H7qrFkQODlHQ7Z07q42_bpmUfVwUai6OFfwMyuiESIAQu7WaX7GTfcWxL0QRFISVPeeletDtCNC6FyhKCccygMdVweWwAIvwIceK9QzGwy0jG2I4P5tFZY8Nmy2o2vUFsNgirWn2nHaUh5iwOmFCVZF_eQQW9p-_CLbav_FinwFqTyaUuQkWBM6HOwjAdnwmLrx2vtr62vyTl5XUpesFpqYg3rup8cSq1-9DRXaAT1S4TW4-3EnX3MH1Ulr84xNaTxVt53BkUkNB1x7gGjtmzIaYXkiCbzykoYu3plfOOUlbikhr_iTz1qvoNAvZb9vSzV0TIHofv0VDEBDIjOJyYTDzyVbpILCRstAzkOhunbdCBYOM_V64D4mtTJLs6MmiYAOnq6Vxlp57XjE%3D)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f6edf4ca35634702af34a70d69369e54&_e=QR69Ns5xm8neD-fDUaJmcdYN7_D6H7qrFkQODlHQ7Z07q42_bpmUfVwUai6OFfwMyuiESIAQu7WaX7GTfcWxL0QRFISVPeeletDtCNC6FyhKCccygMdVweWwAIvwIceK9QzGwy0jG2I4P5tFZY8Nmy2o2vUFsNgirWn2nHaUh5iwOmFCVZF_eQQW9p-_CLbav_FinwFqTyaUuQkWBM6HOwjAdnwmLrx2vtr62vyTl5XUpesFpqYg3rup8cSq1-9DRXaAT1S4TW4-3EnX3MH1UtbtJo52VhtOwxpkuVzBNBtDmTs9pXn5Bq_3Xr67nHYXB-VKCyKVj2EBetVvzeU4MXbpj8UQnMaAjtF0seBQq9pGLRn_rgYHaESMMzxiBq9IP07Y49jGhHVzhheXdvaYmMNzRd3oKF11IYNxy1N3ugQ%3D) We cannot leave anything to chance, Peter. If we sit on the sidelines and don’t do our part to help Jim Justice NOW, **I’m afraid winning the West Virginia Senate seat is no sure bet.**

**[I’m personally asking you to chip in whatever you can to help Governor Justice today](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f6edf4ca35634702af34a70d69369e54&_e=QR69Ns5xm8neD-fDUaJmcdYN7_D6H7qrFkQODlHQ7Z07q42_bpmUfVwUai6OFfwMyuiESIAQu7WaX7GTfcWxL0QRFISVPeeletDtCNC6FyhKCccygMdVweWwAIvwIceK9QzGwy0jG2I4P5tFZY8Nmy2o2vUFsNgirWn2nHaUh5iwOmFCVZF_eQQW9p-_CLbav_FinwFqTyaUuQkWBM6HOwjAdnwmLrx2vtr62vyTl5XUpesFpqYg3rup8cSq1-9DRXaAT1S4TW4-3EnX3MH1Un7LULcm37UWRmf79gT3zIBpRVjrm-WHdpeVMN2UYkjX3CAeUF0kCQTKTm591aAafCmsuXY3Q88WXYAgOF7ivxT2b-cJNddNEgv46ttDhjavhxx_A5aZdgbfAEksX_c51TBvFQcZtNcaUXpbmFnFhyM%3D)**. Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. Whether you're facing a daily stressor or experiencing adversity in your life, there are powerful resilience skills and tools available to help navigate life's challenges. Explore ways to thrive in tough times and develop more meaningful connections at the National Veterans Memorial and Museum's (NVMM) first Resilience Summit in partnership with VA Central Ohio Health Care System's Whole Health Team on June 23 from 9 a.m. to 4 p.m. Registration and participation is free.

name: Team AOC
subject: A real person wrote this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Can we be real with you for a moment?
We understand that a constant stream of emails asking for a contribution can sometimes get on your nerves. That’s okay. Real people wrote this email, we get them as well. We understand how people can get frustrated. _But let us explain why this is vital._
When we’re asking for your support, we don’t expect every person to give. But we ask because we know that when you can support the cause, you will. That’s how this transformative movement works.**It’s a whole lot of people doing their part to make something great.**
[Right now, we’re approaching our end-of-quarter deadline, and we’re hoping to hit our goal in just 9 days. The only way we can get there is through the support of small-dollar donors chipping in whatever they can. If you have the means, can you donate $3 right now? It’ll go a long way.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230621.Fqlteo&refcode=em20230621-4504-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4504%2E2526796%2ErID7l_)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230621.Fqlteo&refcode=em20230621-4504-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4504%2E2526796%2ErID7l_)**
We’re not exaggerating. Most members of Congress fuel their reelection campaigns by dedicating hours of their time asking rich donors for $500, $1000, or even $2900 donations.
**Alexandria is different.** This whole movement is fueled by online contributions like the ones we’re asking for in this email. With these contributions, we’ve built a campaign that is...
1. Raising resources, recruiting volunteers, and making calls to help elect progressive allies across Congress, and build a progressive majority.
2. Reaching out to communities across NY-14 to spread awareness about the Green New Deal, how to influence local, state, and federal leaders, how to access medical abortion by mail, and more.
3. Raising money for community relief organizations, closing critical resources gaps that the federal government has left unfilled.
4. Working day and night to keep Alexandria in Congress and show the world what we can do.

[There are more than enough people reading this email that, if they just donated whatever they can spare, we’d be on track to hit our Q2 contribution targets. If this movement is the model of what you want in our politics, please donate today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230621.Fqlteo&refcode=em20230621-4504-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4504%2E2526796%2ErID7l_)
Thanks for reading,
Team AOC
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230621.Fqlteo&refcode=em20230621-4504-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4504%2E2526796%2ErID7l_)**

clean_body: Can we be real with you for a moment? We understand that a constant stream of emails asking for a contribution can sometimes get on your nerves. That’s okay. Real people wrote this email, we get them as well. We understand how people can get frustrated. But let us explain why this is vital. When we’re asking for your support, we don’t expect every person to give. But we ask because we know that when you can support the cause, you will. That’s how this transformative movement works.It’s a whole lot of people doing their part to make something great. We’re not exaggerating. Most members of Congress fuel their reelection campaigns by dedicating hours of their time asking rich donors for $500, $1000, or even $2900 donations. Alexandria is different. This whole movement is fueled by online contributions like the ones we’re asking for in this email. With these contributions, we’ve built a campaign that is... 1. name: Bob Lorinser
subject: How do we win?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DR BOB**](https://www
body:
The last repeat Democratic candidate we had in Michigan's First District in 2010 made huge gains against the incumbent during a rematch. Gary McDowell's first run garnered him 40% of the vote. Unphased, he received 47% two years later, one point away from unseating incumbent Dan Benshiek. One point.With you, unseating Jack Bergman is very possible.
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/cdOZUxyIN/c?w=0ibqCDAs_JwyuNSZh_czior4XHQEvcwenWpzOfCdW0k.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudm90ZWRyYm9iLmNvbS9zby9jZE9aVXh5SU4_bGFuZ3VhZ2VUYWc9ZW4iLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ)_**

| | |
---
| | How do we win?
---
| | We don't give up.
---
| | [](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/cdOZUxyIN/c?w=JKJixOnADmQZTvNEJacM0HedDmX9wf8qHjBcfJBnDKY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2RicHJvbWlzZSIsInIiOiIwM2VjYjg1ZC1jZDZjLTRhMmUtYmNkMi1jYmUwYjZhMDQyZGUiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ)

| | After the defeat of the last election, maybe you're wondering why you should invest in my race again. Understandable. But, one and done candidates are for the birds. This is a problem facing rural districts - no one is building off the last election cycle, and repeatedly Democrats lose ground. We cannot afford to lose any more ground in this district.
---
| | | [**MAKE A CONTRIBUTION**](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/cdOZUxyIN/c?w=4I3MwI6YtLbzagExghE8rePaghAbUMq9mnMRQnClLkU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2RicHJvbWlzZSIsInIiOiIxMjk0MTg0NS1iNGQzLTRiMjItYmQwZi00MmQwODU5Yzc3NmQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ)
---
| | Democrats represented Michigan's First District from 1933 - 2011, but we've lost our rural footing since then. Good news. For the first time in a decade and half, we finally have a candidate committed to a two-cycle strategy that can have real power at the ballot box. I'm honored to be that candidate. The last repeat Democratic candidate we had in Michigan's First District in 2010 made huge gains against the incumbent during a rematch. Gary McDowell's first run garnered him 40% of the vote. Unphased, he received 47% two years later, one point away from unseating incumbent Dan Benshiek. One point. With you, unseating Jack Bergman is very possible. I've been a fighter my whole life — growing up poor, working my way from community college to get into medical school so I could serve low-income Medicaid recipients. I'm driven by the same perseverance and grit our citizens know well. I'm running again as a proud Democrat, unashamed of being a blue dot in a red sea, and ready to create a tidal wave of change. We will never win back this seat being afraid of who we are. We cannot kowtow to extremists! When we get knocked down, we get back up, and try again. Ballot name-recognition in the general election is huge, and I'll put in the work, but getting us there will require your collective faith, optimism and loyalty. Rural America needs universal healthcare. When I'm elected to Congress, on day one, I'll draft or sponsor its legislation. We need a publicly financed, non-profit national health insurance program that fully covers medical care costs for all Americans. And we need a doctor in the House to get it done.
---

name: Simon for Secretary of State
subject: making our campaign promises into law!

Time is flying.

It’s the first day of summer,

midnight.

name: Team Baldwin
subject: Reproductive rights continue to be under attack
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Tammy isn’t letting up in the fight for reproductive freedom.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=421%2E35263%2EoVlT6N)
Peter — We’re just a few days away from the anniversary of the _Dobbs v. Jackson_ decision — when the Supreme Court’s right-wing majority overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , in what was a devastating, out-of-touch decision. The ramifications of this decision have been catastrophic. After _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned last year, Wisconsin turned back the clock and sent reproductive rights back to 1849. And across the country, Republicans and anti-choice groups haven’t wasted a minute trying to deny millions of people the right to choose. From threats of a national abortion ban, to outrageous laws criminalizing doctors, to lawsuits that have aimed to ban medications — reproductive rights are being attacked on all fronts. **But the will of the people is clear: we want safe and legal abortion access across the country. So while anti-choice politicians try to take us backwards, Tammy isn’t letting up in the fight for reproductive freedom.** She’s been a tireless advocate of women’s health care for years, fighting for the rights of women in Wisconsin and all over the country. That’s why she reintroduced the _Women's Health Protection Act_ earlier this year. This bill would enshrine abortion access at the federal level — allowing women to seek the care they need and doctors to do their jobs without fear of prosecution. Tammy will continue to do everything in her power to get this legislation across the finish line and ensure women everywhere can get the health care they need. And today, we are hoping you’ll be fighting right beside her to protect abortion access. **[Join Tammy in calling for the passage of the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ today. Add your name to our petition today, and together, we will make sure our voices are heard.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2306_DobbsAnniversary_Petition/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20230621_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=421%2E35263%2EoVlT6N)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2306_DobbsAnniversary_Petition/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230621_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=421%2E35263%2EoVlT6N)
---
Thank you for making your voice heard.
— Team Baldwin
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=421%2E35263%2EoVlT6N) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=421%2E35263%2EoVlT6N)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---

body:
I refuse to let you down, Peter.

| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f62421edc02643279485a3421320033e&_e=mhOyiGeaXM4EtbnJyV2CmVCJ03Eo11ZDhOvT4rHMiNkPx4eKW9MtQj19678ARx7CIKj3x9ttalY7VniQbwTaQwd85rf4biliJwFyMkwAGZg3woLOBaVCrcigu-qWWIOkzbZuBtqSm8_R5FzarF7Cq0PM2K2B9PvuY2fbdFSePJtyco8_NvFjruf-9-6b4K8-ZJUPgNYvFdf-sMFzH_X3xwlYaj1WUOO329-CAJruMuckfXx-LSH4UR1IQM3dYYuiqu-J2ByxivPVKVUUWFEdcGZ0HA9RvLAXw5CmxcY9rwVeiDrJXSsmTLqVkdowNbCJF1Y-9oApbWRvgqXggHln1qyf4FwmlSol1YIpSY1T83JgBDpVV_KQgLrYx1gHmf9fSxF3X2jkOcQzL3_StC50aw%3D%3D)
---
Peter, In our first 24 hours, my campaign team raised $8.2 million. This amount, to a blue-collar kid who started out making $6 an hour, leaves me speechless. I am honored by the support that has poured in for my run for President of these United States, and I am doing everything in my power to make sure you know how much I appreciate the true grassroots support that is driving our success. _**This month, my campaign team is helping me take on the work of writing the names of the first 100,000 DeSantis for President donors on a wall inside our headquarters.**_
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f62421edc02643279485a3421320033e&_e=mhOyiGeaXM4EtbnJyV2CmVCJ03Eo11ZDhOvT4rHMiNkPx4eKW9MtQj19678ARx7CIKj3x9ttalY7VniQbwTaQwd85rf4biliJwFyMkwAGZg3woLOBaVCrcigu-qWWIOkzbZuBtqSm8_R5FzarF7Cq0PM2K2B9PvuY2fbdFSePJtyco8_NvFjruf-9-6b4K8-ZJUPgNYvFdf-sMFzH_X3xwlYaj1WUOO329-CAJruMuckfXx-LSH4UR1IQM3dYYuisan7ppO81Pkzyn3E0a87SqYJtKuOukkAzqJITcO0nlJFzuBS0IKJNHuq_i2gDLc78A7SgP8aLXkZo14mTvbkIoz5bdZAacuWZ16x2hgYR17D8kowdsYq7D39OtQXrhXN_U0CEKHAgu_iEttlWjkN1w%3D%3D)
---
Every day that more names are hand-written on this wall, I become more inspired by each supporter that shares with me the vision of better American days ahead. The bottom line is that I'm a servant. I deliver ideas and I dutifully take on leadership, but it is because of you--your donations, your time, your word-of-mouth, your belief in me--that I am motivated each day to fight the good fight. And I refuse to let you down, Peter. On Election Day, it is the voice of the people that rules. Every day on my campaign, I try to be a voice for those who need it most. For the rest of the month, we are writing the names of every donor, no matter the amount donated, and Peter, I want to see yours make history with mine. I would not be here without you, and I will never lose sight of that. I want you on my team. Will you donate to my campaign today? _**[https://RonDeSantis.com/become-a-donor](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f62421edc02643279485a3421320033e&_e=mhOyiGeaXM4EtbnJyV2CmVCJ03Eo11ZDhOvT4rHMiNkPx4eKW9MtQj19678ARx7CIKj3x9ttalY7VniQbwTaQwd85rf4biliJwFyMkwAGZg3woLOBaVCrcigu-qWWIOkzbZuBtqSm8_R5FzarF7Cq0PM2K2B9PvuY2fbdFSePJtyco8_NvFjruf-9-6b4K8-ZJUPgNYvFdf-sMFzH_X3xwlYaj1WUOO329-CAJruMuckfXx-LSH4UR1IQM3dYYuiQIoQb4SfPs-sxo99i89i0Ql7l_M6zFas_ldJzPSvUYc_608UL_nL4rxbWVwwAviSZfOc-ypfE8uh7rDBExHAReRwtmcHd7hauo2ng18qOfyrs1njTT75BAQR8d2pQFth3rC4x8lyzclo3DXBeHW7Gw%3D%3D "https://desantis.com/become-a-donor")**_ Yours in Freedom,
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f62421edc02643279485a3421320033e&_e=mhOyiGeaXM4EtbnJyV2CmVCJ03Eo11ZDhOvT4rHMiNkPx4eKW9MtQj19678ARx7CIKj3x9ttalY7VniQbwTaQwd85rf4biliJwFyMkwAGZg3woLOBaVCrcigu-qWWIOkzbZuBtqSm8_R5FzarF7Cq0PM2K2B9PvuY2fbdFSePJtyco8_NvFjruf-9-6b4K8-ZJUPgNYvFdf-sMFzH_X3xwlYaj1WUOO329-CAJruMuckfXx-LSH4UR1IQM3dYYuiOnllLLGX6pW1yQvPcsqf0QeakcmYpdHXkK0zO0WjCUG873tKCrOQ2bNLSk-Z0dbZ84GzIWjulaCFs3fzqN2Tx6ylyZxcxqjr5j2ZSHKSXSbcxXZKVKa6ZC_dTiX1Y1ixBeuSj6dQTBSZ7Aho36yizg%3D%3D)

Ron DeSantis

|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f62421edc02643279485a3421320033e&_e=mhOyiGeaXM4EtbnJyV2CmVCJ03Eo11ZDhOvT4rHMiNkPx4eKW9MtQj19678ARx7CIKj3x9ttalY7VniQbwTaQwd85rf4biliJwFyMkwAGZg3woLOBaVCrcigu-qWWIOkzbZuBtqSm8_R5FzarF7Cq0PM2K2B9PvuY2fbdFSePJtyco8_NvFjruf-9-6b4K8-ZJUPgNYvFdf-sMFzH_X3xwlYaj1WUOO329-CAJruMuckfXx-LSH4UR1IQM3dYYuiYC6XMmuEob1y8nTiYbqv77Nppz6P5cQurkIx6RjnR0e5J3edLv6btvJr5s8jsVxXTzD8YdwmyPQi7qpYgp72aw5YFZ5m4XYshiK9cB3armC3FLy8QJ5CmZUvEVIgQcbfVAzbNPkRrN_SKK74RM-44Q%3D%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

clean_body: I refuse to let you down, Peter. | | | | | | | | | Please see a message from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, click "here" | Peter, In our first 24 hours, my campaign team raised $8.2 million. This amount, to a blue-collar kid who started out making $6 an hour, leaves me speechless. I am honored by the support that has poured in for my run for President of these United States, and I am doing everything in my power to make sure you know how much I appreciate the true grassroots support that is driving our success. This month, my campaign team is helping me take on the work of writing the names of the first 100,000 DeSantis for President donors on a wall inside our headquarters. | Every day that more names are hand-written on this wall, I become more inspired by each supporter that shares with me the vision of better American days ahead. The bottom line is that I'm a servant. I deliver ideas and I dutifully take on leadership, but it is because of you--your donations, your time, your word-of-mouth, your belief in me--that I am motivated each day to fight the good fight. And I refuse to let you down, Peter. On Election Day, it is the voice of the people that rules. Every day on my campaign, I try to be a voice for those who need it most. For the rest of the month, we are writing the names of every donor, no matter the amount donated, and Peter, I want to see yours make history with mine. I would not be here without you, and I will never lose sight of that. I want you on my team. Will you donate to my campaign today? "" Yours in Freedom, | Ron DeSantis | | | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. name: Biden-Harris Dems
subject: This is a shorter email, Peter

body:
Early donations are key to a successful reelection campaign, and it’s going to take the full support of this grassroots team to get President Biden and Vice President Harris another four years in the White House. | | |

And now that we’re rapidly approaching our campaign’s first FEC filing deadline at the end of this month, it’s more important than ever that we demonstrate the strength of this grassroots team. _It’s no exaggeration to say that YOU play a critical part in this campaign, Peter. clean_body: Early donations are key to a successful reelection campaign, and it’s going to take the full support of this grassroots team to get President Biden and Vice President Harris another four years in the White House. | | | Hey Peter, we’ll keep this short: We checked our records and noticed that you haven’t become a Biden-Harris Founding Donor yet. Early donations are key to a successful reelection campaign, and it’s going to take the full support of this grassroots team to get President Biden and Vice President Harris another four years in the White House. And now that we’re rapidly approaching our campaign’s first FEC filing deadline at the end of this month, it’s more important than ever that we demonstrate the strength of this grassroots team. It’s no exaggeration to say that YOU play a critical part in this campaign, Peter. So: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | With gratitude, \-- Team Biden-Harris
