Fellow American,

**_TRUTH:_** An open border is no border.

**Under Biden's awful immigration policies, illegal border crossings have soared to all-time highs.** This doesn't include illegal aliens who evaded border patrol officers - an estimated 1.5 million. _This is a very real and present threat to national security._

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=f4bf7a1a8b054dd5a62106f85948e735&_e=6DR18keSB8vVVMyjG2WJKAEJhYll4apr_0fFmJl9wvbDi3yD-b-1aa-056dAhLRrAz5KuXXAJ9GO0jN7M-kA1DPkTSqsZDaGqB31baFssEPL_lCnYXc0EdIrejqOyQa0_XqwSGE3igiMTtsE508RB4wG56q0wtt00QfkQ1p9uiHg6rkJp4Gechy6Rhd3I2BYwkuP_2s9DHgQtdp16S5kwJXjNnVe88pW9qKlS-8Fn9n3MVAB95P8SdCihSkW-xI_MF3__YaqeQwPE9FJmjRw5UGDm84diLs5P4BBxbzqifSjfxBvLlyqi3kK4H6Y4gWpKesKPwxX5LTK-e683tDwvQBSnOOAxMyhVgwCfmXo6a-i1tEUMhho7E4lZxvm7PrgwuVVTDIsk8CO2qTRjhBqbg%3D%3D)
**Even President Obama declared a border crisis - at just one-third of the current numbers being reported.** Biden has completely ignored the border and everyday Americans are paying the costs. We need to keep our communities safe from crime and the drugs that are crossing the border.

My plan is simple:
* People whose first act to enter the country illegally **do not belong here.**
* We need to eliminate our lottery-based immigration system and **enact one based on merit.**
* If we can use our military to secure another country's border somewhere else, we can certainly **use our military to secure our own southern border** once and for all.

I believe the border crisis is a unifying American issue - one that takes real leadership to answer. Fellow American, are you done with candidates and politicians that promise action on the southern border but never do anything? **[I am too and I am ready to finally act and secure our nation.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=f4bf7a1a8b054dd5a62106f85948e735&_e=6DR18keSB8vVVMyjG2WJKAEJhYll4apr_0fFmJl9wvbDi3yD-b-1aa-056dAhLRrAz5KuXXAJ9GO0jN7M-kA1DPkTSqsZDaGqB31baFssEPL_lCnYXc0EdIrejqOyQa0_XqwSGE3igiMTtsE508RB4wG56q0wtt00QfkQ1p9uiHg6rkJp4Gechy6Rhd3I2BYwkuP_2s9DHgQtdp16S5kwJXjNnVe88pW9qKlS-8Fn9n3MVAB95P8SdCihSkW-xI_zFTmWD7XKfMgyyAOPTLxGNhUsr5zqxCh4jOYm9jz0k9JTBY8HzK2ETwtRGUjkSA6esi89Tv9Uh9dyQJXifoA2T7-0c_V46QUy4MRygK4YCfer0PvSacG-xJTqb5g_Mr1irdBS0KL4CcJEZQ52KLCxg%3D%3D)**

Thank you,

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=f4bf7a1a8b054dd5a62106f85948e735&_e=6DR18keSB8vVVMyjG2WJKAEJhYll4apr_0fFmJl9wvbDi3yD-b-1aa-056dAhLRrAz5KuXXAJ9GO0jN7M-kA1DPkTSqsZDaGqB31baFssEPL_lCnYXc0EdIrejqOyQa0_XqwSGE3igiMTtsE508RB4wG56q0wtt00QfkQ1p9uiHg6rkJp4Gechy6Rhd3I2BYwkuP_2s9DHgQtdp16S5kwJXjNnVe88pW9qKlS-8Fn9n3MVAB95P8SdCihSkW-xI_SZEy10yAx0NoITr7O5q7Dh0QLoHMhjNXV0DfRcB81Si8X2P8rAsBEcl-Z8ODJi9RmEMCLvud92hBUE41I4J1xsBKNv0U9B3Aou7VhbNo-M6-mFmKoEk0zU6Z7D_a23rIlovYC0jf6TfFosI-7sqJew%3D%3D)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65182429/412579765/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODQ3N2Q4NzUtNjUxMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iAmoImbMcpR8TuT5jsirjTrm52ikQz58j7V5KzFo5cU=) Friend, we have an important campaign update:

**EMILYs List, the leading national organization dedicated to electing pro-choice Democratic women, is endorsing our campaign to represent CA-30!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65182430/412579766/62647395?refcode=em-6.21.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODQ3N2Q4NzUtNjUxMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iAmoImbMcpR8TuT5jsirjTrm52ikQz58j7V5KzFo5cU=) **[This endorsement is a huge boost to our efforts, and I’ll explain why shortly, but first, please join EMILYs List in supporting our campaign by making an $3 donation today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65182431/412579767/62647395?refcode=em-6.21.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODQ3N2Q4NzUtNjUxMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iAmoImbMcpR8TuT5jsirjTrm52ikQz58j7V5KzFo5cU=)** | ****[DONATE $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65182432/412579768/62647395?refcode=em-6.21.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODQ3N2Q4NzUtNjUxMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iAmoImbMcpR8TuT5jsirjTrm52ikQz58j7V5KzFo5cU=)****

Here’s why this endorsement is so meaningful.

With the Supreme Court’s reversal of _Roe v. Wade_ , securing reproductive rights is one of the most pressing issues we face. It’s something I’ve fought for throughout my entire career in the State Assembly, and frankly, my entire life.

I grew up marching for civil liberties and abortion rights with my mom in South Florida, and I remember the agony I felt seeing her life’s work vanish in an instant when the Supreme Court ripped away abortion rights.

I never imagined I’d be running for Congress at a time when young women, like my ten-year-old daughter Rachel, would grow up in a world with less rights than I had. It’s something I can’t accept, and it’s a big reason why I’m running for this seat.

**A woman has never represented this district in Congress. We have the power to change that, and I’m honored to have the backing of groups like EMILYs List who understand what’s at stake and are supporting our efforts.**

**[Will you help us build on this endorsement? A surge of donations from supporters would make all the difference in our push toward this month’s FEC deadline. clean_body: | = Friend, we have an important campaign update: EMILYs List, the leading national organization dedicated to electing pro-choice Democratic women, is endorsing our campaign to represent CA-30! = = | **= Here’s why this endorsement is so meaningful. With the Supreme Court’s reversal of Roe v. Wade , securing reproductive rights is one of the most pressing issues we face. It’s something I’ve fought for throughout my entire career in the State Assembly, and frankly, my entire life. I grew up marching for civil liberties and abortion rights with my mom in South Florida, and I remember the agony I felt seeing her life’s work vanish in an instant when the Supreme Court ripped away abortion rights. I never imagined I’d be running for Congress at a time when young women, like my ten-year-old daughter Rachel, would grow up in a world with less rights than I had. It’s something I can’t accept, and it’s a big reason why I’m running for this seat. A woman has never represented this district in Congress. We have the power to change that, and I’m honored to have the backing of groups like EMILYs List who understand what’s at stake and are supporting our efforts. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Laura =** | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Laura's campaign = To learn more about Laura's progressive record of supporting our working families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Laura Friedman for Congress PO Box 27296 Los Angeles, CA 90027 United States

body:

Last night Rep. Luna reintroduced yet ANOTHER resolution to censure
me, Derek.

The vote and debate will happen imminently. Once more, I have to be on the
House floor to listen as MAGA Republicans push false and defamatory lies
about me.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=jun2023_abs_em.ijd0au&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230621_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2636%2E5257348%2EkJ_8b5 ]Please, rush an urgent donation of $3 to help me fight back against
this political smear campaign, and continue to fight to defend our
democracy.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

This attack isn’t just about me: it’s a test to see how far they can go to
silence the voices of anyone who dares challenge Donald Trump and his
followers. We’re witnessing a dangerous strand of authoritarianism running
through today’s GOP, backed by Speaker Kevin McCarthy, and silencing the
opposition is part of the autocrats' playbook.

That’s not all. Donald Trump demanded I be imprisoned, and he explicitly
called for any Republican who votes against my censure to be primaried. If
these tactics succeed, they will only breed further extremism.

I will continue to do everything I can to fight against the rise of MAGA
extremism in Congress — an extremism fueled by Donald Trump and fanned by
Kevin McCarthy — but I can’t do it alone,
Derek.

subject: I’m running for US Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I am all in for Delaware, Peter. I’ve never been more ready to continue making history as a United States Senator.

| Peter,

I wanted you to hear this directly from me: **I am officially launching my campaign for the US Senate.** [_**Before I get into the details, can you split a donation between my campaign and Fight for Progress to become a Founding Donor of my Senate campaign? It’s going to take a huge team of grassroots supporters to make me the first Black woman to represent Delaware in the Senate, so please chip in:**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65184993/412583615/-61633414?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230621-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ5ZTY1NzVjLTY3MTAtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=g1cM95ZknhDKYp70B0zJb1WqefhX0gTiLUwRJhsajYM=)
---
| [BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR → ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65184994/412583616/-61633414?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230621-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ5ZTY1NzVjLTY3MTAtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=g1cM95ZknhDKYp70B0zJb1WqefhX0gTiLUwRJhsajYM=)
---
When I think about being the first woman and first person of color to represent Delaware in Congress, I think about my great-great-great grandfather. In 1867, he signed a document that afforded him the right to vote.

Fast forward to 2017, when I was being sworn in to Congress for the first time, my sister, Thea, found the document. That document has come to represent the importance of expanding rights and representation. It’s my proof of where we come from and it’s my inspiration for where we need to go.

The historic nature of our campaign is not lost on me. My family and other families of color have come so far just to be fairly represented. All the way from being enslaved, to finally getting the right to vote, to being elected to represent the First State.

[_**To make history on launch day, my team and I have set a goal to earn the support of 30,000 Founding Donors, and we’re counting on generous donors like you to help get there. Can you split a donation right now between my campaign and Fight for Progress so we can get the ball rolling on the race of a lifetime?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65184995/412583617/-61633414?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230621-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ5ZTY1NzVjLTY3MTAtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=g1cM95ZknhDKYp70B0zJb1WqefhX0gTiLUwRJhsajYM=)
| [BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR → ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65184996/412583618/-61633414?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230621-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ5ZTY1NzVjLTY3MTAtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=g1cM95ZknhDKYp70B0zJb1WqefhX0gTiLUwRJhsajYM=)

clean_body: I am all in for Delaware, Peter. I’ve never been more ready to continue making history as a United States Senator. | Peter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me: I am officially launching my campaign for the US Senate. = | = When I think about being the first woman and first person of color to represent Delaware in Congress, I think about my great-great-great grandfather. In 1867, he signed a document that afforded him the right to vote. Fast forward to 2017, when I was being sworn in to Congress for the first time, my sister, Thea, found the document. That document has come to represent the importance of expanding rights and representation. It’s my proof of where we come from and it’s my inspiration for where we need to go. The historic nature of our campaign is not lost on me. My family and other families of color have come so far just to be fairly represented. All the way from being enslaved, to finally getting the right to vote, to being elected to represent the First State. = | = I am all in for Delaware, Peter. I’ve never been more ready to continue making history as a United States Senator. Lisa Blunt Rochester = * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. Hey there, it's Kellyanne...

_**[This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent. I have a few pressing matters to update you on as soon as possible:](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkb_OmzAUxZ_GbEb-AwYGhqoRHap06JLRutg3xI1tkG2S9O0rUnXq8n3zOTrn3N-9nPUZnHdx-QEBx7tJOmVdHjob8HRLmLOLS4BSMGnBhKRMUcG1rOxoB6NAVThy1Xey7wYhq9s4D7a1EvoWuAHGen69gpBGQjf3HOxcufHIYUpwPvBeNHUDzKq2Y6K5tkrJmTQMPKZS3xE3s8blWJFw22fvDMTarKHy462ULRP5hYiJiCmj2RPWTxcT2sNBxFQQAj3ucBmJmMwan_CbWgTrXUSKa6C_9nhIRE7pCEguLkSeStqRCLWXoA2EDdwSiTz9Xc0HfflGv3_9WXPGmkHqwmXbMM4p71pFhMKXLs5-3P9uWWPBWI7qB72bRP8RIkK99vj4X6jSaLen895l1ZGGLQGcf5Mpn3jinwAAAP__lUqesQ "I have three urgent matters to discuss with you:")**_
** 1. ** Republicans have an **EXTREMELY** slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control ** 2. ** Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is **UNLOADING** $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power ** 3. ** The latest FEC reports have Democrats **OUTRAISING**
Republicans by _$12,000,000+_ since we took back the House in January
**When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... _[So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL June deadline?](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkb_OmzAUxZ_GbEb-AwYGhqoRHap06JLRutg3xI1tkG2S9O0rUnXq8n3zOTrn3N-9nPUZnHdx-QEBx7tJOmVdHjob8HRLmLOLS4BSMGnBhKRMUcG1rOxoB6NAVThy1Xey7wYhq9s4D7a1EvoWuAHGen69gpBGQjf3HOxcufHIYUpwPvBeNHUDzKq2Y6K5tkrJmTQMPKZS3xE3s8blWJFw22fvDMTarKHy462ULRP5hYiJiCmj2RPWTxcT2sNBxFQQAj3ucBmJmMwan_CbWgTrXUSKa6C_9nhIRE7pCEguLkSeStqRCLWXoA2EDdwSiTz9Xc0HfflGv3_9WXPGmkHqwmXbMM4p71pFhMKXLs5-3P9uWWPBWI7qB72bRP8RIkK99vj4X6jSaLen895l1ZGGLQGcf5Mpn3jinwAAAP__lUqesQ "So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. "I have three urgent matters to discuss with you:" 1. Republicans have an EXTREMELY slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control 2. Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is UNLOADING $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power 3. The latest FEC reports have Democrats OUTRAISING Republicans by $12,000,000+ since we took back the House in January When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... "So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL June deadline?" "Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars." body:
|

| | Our actions define us. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65186259/412584620/-1524463920?sourceid=1050270&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGJjYjFlOC02NzEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vvPiduWJyhEYrl_EaBl83o2n4l147RWGQ-HDNtCFRNE=&emci=b5cd7169-b00f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=94bcb1e8-6710-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,

Our actions define us.

That's what I've been thinking as I watch today's Republican Party and its devotion to destroying the fundamental freedoms that define us as Americans. Our kids, our schools, our democracy, our bodily autonomy — these are the cornerstones of our nation, and every single one is under attack. Those attacks define the politicians making them. **[How we respond will define us too, Peter. I'm standing with EMILYs List because I strongly believe electing Democratic pro-choice women to office everywhere is what it will take to fight back. Please join me and support EMILYs List with a donation today.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65186268/412584628/-1524463920?sourceid=1050270&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGJjYjFlOC02NzEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vvPiduWJyhEYrl_EaBl83o2n4l147RWGQ-HDNtCFRNE=&emci=b5cd7169-b00f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=94bcb1e8-6710-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**

To put it plainly: We're being tested. This is a generation-defining moment in American history, and it will take generation-defining activism to meet it.

That's where you come in. As a member of the EMILYs List community, you know that **it takes early investment and sustained support to change the world** — because that's what this organization has been doing for 38 years. You know that electing more women up and down the ballot is how we stop dangerous extremism in its tracks, grow pro-choice majorities, and protect the freedoms we hold most dear.

EMILYs List has always been among my strongest supporters, and **I have seen the power of this community first-hand**. I know we have what it takes to stand together, face this struggle for our fundamental rights head-on, _and win_. ****Please join me in supporting EMILYs List today. Your donation helps Democratic pro-choice women fighting for our freedom everywhere. Donate now:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Elect-Women-This-June](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65186269/412584629/-1524463920?sourceid=1050270&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGJjYjFlOC02NzEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vvPiduWJyhEYrl_EaBl83o2n4l147RWGQ-HDNtCFRNE=&emci=b5cd7169-b00f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=94bcb1e8-6710-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you for taking a stand,

Hillary

Hillary Rodham Clinton

name: Josh Hawley
subject: I won't back down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter,
When I was elected Senator for Missouri, I was determined to fight for the next generation.

And in the years since I first took my oath of office, the threats social media and big tech pose to our children have only grown.

body:
| | | Hi there friend, it’s Amy Klobuchar.

One of my mentors, the late U.S. Senator Paul Wellstone, once said that **“Politics is about the improvement of people’s lives.”**

It’s such a simple thought, but it's what drives me every single day.

**That’s why I’m reaching out to ask:[Will you split a $5 donation between my campaign and the DSCC to help us defend our Senate majority and keep improving peoples' lives across the country?](https://go.dscc.org/go/14248?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230621-AmyKlobuchar-KlobucharTandem2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230621-AmyKlobuchar-KlobucharTandem2-ETG-sl1&akid=11097%2E9716520%2EUG0VNm)**

And it's why I'm so proud of what Democrats have been able to accomplish:

* ✔️ We took on Big Pharma and finally made it possible for Medicare to negotiate lower prices for prescription drugs.
* ✔️ We made historic investments to fight climate change.
* ✔️ We passed the bipartisan infrastructure bill to improve our roads and bridges and expand access to broadband.

None of that would have been possible without our Democratic Senate.

**[So please, will you split a donation of $5 or more between my campaign and the DSCC to ensure I can keep fighting for change in Washington with a Democratic Senate majority? >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/14248?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230621-AmyKlobuchar-KlobucharTandem2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230621-AmyKlobuchar-KlobucharTandem2-ETG-sl1&akid=11097%2E9716520%2EUG0VNm)**

clean_body: | | | Hi there friend, it’s Amy Klobuchar. One of my mentors, the late U.S. Senator Paul Wellstone, once said that “Politics is about the improvement of people’s lives.” It’s such a simple thought, but it's what drives me every single day. That’s why I’m reaching out to ask: And it's why I'm so proud of what Democrats have been able to accomplish: ✔️ We took on Big Pharma and finally made it possible for Medicare to negotiate lower prices for prescription drugs. ✔️ We made historic investments to fight climate change. ✔️ We passed the bipartisan infrastructure bill to improve our roads and bridges and expand access to broadband. None of that would have been possible without our Democratic Senate. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Amy Klobuchar and the DSCC. | | | | | Thank you, Amy Amy Klobuchar U.S. Senator, Minnesota | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please . to receive fewer emails. to unsubscribe. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: These fees are out of control
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Working people are getting squeezed, but the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau is fighting back. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65195734/412620197/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ14S_ENG_E_20230621_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWE2NjQ0OC04YjEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wRILqDPqGbfWJ9D2ZYPt9cMxvbH0SiSpYNZ-5hCAa90=&emci=36a66448-8b10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3aa66448-8b10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
I want to talk about one way working people are getting squeezed right now — and how the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau is fighting to get them some relief. Let’s say someone pays their credit card bill a little late. Maybe by just a few hours. It costs the credit card company some money to collect the late payment — let’s say about $8. But then the company gets visions of dollar signs dancing in their eyes. So they charge a bigger late fee. Maybe $20. Or $30. Or $40. That could be up to five times more than the actual cost to the company. So let’s be clear: excessive late fees are designed to wring some extra profits out of someone who’s already stretched thin. The whole missed payment may even be less than the fee. Credit card late fees cost American families about an estimated $12 billion a year. They take a real toll on people’s pocketbooks, and combined with all the other junk fees that giant corporations devise, they can feel like getting stung by a whole swarm of bees. But our government is fighting back. **The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau has proposed a new rule for credit card companies: no more excessive late fees. Companies could still charge what it costs to cover their expenses, but if it’s more than $8, they’ll have to show their math.** Now, this might shock you, so you might want to sit down if you aren’t already: credit card companies aren’t wild about this plan. In fact, they’ve rolled out a massive lobbying campaign to try to stop it in its tracks. They’re claiming that ending excessive late fees would destroy their industry as we know it — even though the rule wouldn’t stop them from charging late fees that cover their costs. **It’s time to beat back the lobbyists, make our voices heard, and help get this rule over the finish line. I’ll keep working to bust the credit card companies’ myths and stand up for the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau’s powerfully important work, but I can’t do it alone.** **[Will you add your name to say you support the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau’s crackdown on excessive credit card late fees? Together, we can push back against corporate greed.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65195735/412620198/-1495129955?contactdata=Csy69MlY1I%2BRp8Y0BzYjGGYq6nqPZXVswaRcPOK4%2F1SZ15%2BAmKVLvo5yGpSXprTXRxe1cZEhXoT9zC8nowmSD2FuSgmrLPerlpCi%2FH%2FjaFQbhpXsX8BzZpI5oPJNcKf8&refcode=EMZ14S_ENG_E_20230621_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWE2NjQ0OC04YjEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wRILqDPqGbfWJ9D2ZYPt9cMxvbH0SiSpYNZ-5hCAa90=&emci=36a66448-8b10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3aa66448-8b10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)** | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65195736/412620199/-1495129955?contactdata=Csy69MlY1I%2BRp8Y0BzYjGGYq6nqPZXVswaRcPOK4%2F1SZ15%2BAmKVLvo5yGpSXprTXRxe1cZEhXoT9zC8nowmSD2FuSgmrLPerlpCi%2FH%2FjaFQbhpXsX8BzZpI5oPJNcKf8&refcode=EMZ14S_ENG_E_20230621_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWE2NjQ0OC04YjEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wRILqDPqGbfWJ9D2ZYPt9cMxvbH0SiSpYNZ-5hCAa90=&emci=36a66448-8b10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3aa66448-8b10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
This is all part of a larger fight to put more money back in people’s pockets. That includes taking on other junk fees. And capping the cost of insulin. And working to cancel student debt.
Through all these efforts and more, the Biden-Harris administration and Democrats in Congress have been putting government on the side of families, not powerful special interests. And I’m in that fight all the way.
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

clean_body: Working people are getting squeezed, but the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau is fighting back. | | | I want to talk about one way working people are getting squeezed right now — and how the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau is fighting to get them some relief. Let’s say someone pays their credit card bill a little late. Maybe by just a few hours. It costs the credit card company some money to collect the late payment — let’s say about $8. But then the company gets visions of dollar signs dancing in their eyes. So they charge a bigger late fee. Maybe $20. Or $30. Or $40. That could be up to five times more than the actual cost to the company. So let’s be clear: excessive late fees are designed to wring some extra profits out of someone who’s already stretched thin. The whole missed payment may even be less than the fee. Credit card late fees cost American families about an estimated $12 billion a year. They take a real toll on people’s pocketbooks, and combined with all the other junk fees that giant corporations devise, they can feel like getting stung by a whole swarm of bees. But our government is fighting back. The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau has proposed a new rule for credit card companies: no more excessive late fees. Companies could still charge what it costs to cover their expenses, but if it’s more than $8, they’ll have to show their math. Now, this might shock you, so you might want to sit down if you aren’t already: credit card companies aren’t wild about this plan. In fact, they’ve rolled out a massive lobbying campaign to try to stop it in its tracks. They’re claiming that ending excessive late fees would destroy their industry as we know it — even though the rule wouldn’t stop them from charging late fees that cover their costs. It’s time to beat back the lobbyists, make our voices heard, and help get this rule over the finish line. I’ll keep working to bust the credit card companies’ myths and stand up for the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau’s powerfully important work, but I can’t do it alone. | This is all part of a larger fight to put more money back in people’s pockets. That includes taking on other junk fees. And capping the cost of insulin. And working to cancel student debt. Through all these efforts and more, the Biden-Harris administration and Democrats in Congress have been putting government on the side of families, not powerful special interests. And I’m in that fight all the way. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2023 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: SmartAsset
subject: Average Retirement Savings By Age: Are You Normal?
body:
Many Americans worry they're not saving enough for retirement, and rightfully so.

| | | |
---
|
# Average Retirement Savings By Age: Are You Normal?
---
| Research behind how much Americans save, and who feels most confident about their plan
---
| | |
---
| Many Americans worry they're not saving enough for retirement, and rightfully so.

The National Institute of Retirement Security reports: Approximately 40 million households have no retirement savings.1

It's never too late to get started. Although results are never guaranteed and risks are involved, [well-managed investments may potentially compound over time.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=477defc743454fe7bc64481d74ea733e&_e=-Q_wEEYyuX1SEntZRdoFfOZURSOLwEhZqI6OgllmMXLAPlEJJ6fLTSkzjAThtvGP1P-O2WvwFXYDlImmni3dPqwUI3QhhzYl_GsuNMhO9_eq3I35cU613vYhZG3nt4-Ivn1eOroAgErnic0u4tcTwFuM-EqLg5u3deP3pAAyT6i_v0UU4bNfi1MKvVdcGgcpOtZuWagrewL3wuB4VLQDVhWyc3YS639aoBsDofdsLZVnpMBXHDFbcvNcvOnAPfd1fwHzePfGQAvZa2qNiQ32j4c3TFgv3WW8n1oExsGXvDy50lUnCQBpFhqwAI68O-eQZsrIkUPbU6uoGzNZqdFFHOp4zjnZgiM-Vd2FkBtldh4FJeeDaYtrN3hAj0qKIkwPH1e9FjpV61VEVyGraC0jGGHCIuvIAhxfSM9suxpB3yXZqHecHhvodnGJz0RMdZ_Aq1-1SCI3viCEl1dtk78FPA%3D%3D)

Fidelity reported in May 2022 that the average 401(k) balance for those who've been saving for over 10 years averaged over $380,000.2

[Find out the recommended savings for your age here.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=477defc743454fe7bc64481d74ea733e&_e=-Q_wEEYyuX1SEntZRdoFfOZURSOLwEhZqI6OgllmMXLAPlEJJ6fLTSkzjAThtvGP1P-O2WvwFXYDlImmni3dPqwUI3QhhzYl_GsuNMhO9_eq3I35cU613vYhZG3nt4-Ivn1eOroAgErnic0u4tcTwFuM-EqLg5u3deP3pAAyT6i_v0UU4bNfi1MKvVdcGgcpOtZuWagrewL3wuB4VLQDVhWyc3YS639aoBsDofdsLZVnpMBXHDFbcvNcvOnAPfd1fwHzePfGQAvZa2qNiQ32j4c3TFgv3WW8n1oExsGXvDy50lUnCQBpFhqwAI68O-eQM0LQ6-tg_COO7rcteaTdig_ZyDlBoQkMXpKcU2n8mxkSNNsPo8lLMxAYfIhmTIGcgIMb5Ydgf5aJE8SrQ6iewcf0Q7h8K3blCmRzCAlmfoy5kt4asf3-jiafCeAAxhVkATP3Y4sSsmcBvHpYAazD6g%3D%3D)

Of course, saving for retirement is different for everyone. If you feel like you're behind in savings, want to make sure you're on track, or want to find investment vehicles to help you save more, talking to an advisor can help you [set and execute a retirement plan.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=477defc743454fe7bc64481d74ea733e&_e=-Q_wEEYyuX1SEntZRdoFfOZURSOLwEhZqI6OgllmMXLAPlEJJ6fLTSkzjAThtvGP1P-O2WvwFXYDlImmni3dPqwUI3QhhzYl_GsuNMhO9_eq3I35cU613vYhZG3nt4-Ivn1eOroAgErnic0u4tcTwFuM-EqLg5u3deP3pAAyT6i_v0UU4bNfi1MKvVdcGgcpOtZuWagrewL3wuB4VLQDVhWyc3YS639aoBsDofdsLZVnpMBXHDFbcvNcvOnAPfd1fwHzePfGQAvZa2qNiQ32j4c3TFgv3WW8n1oExsGXvDy50lUnCQBpFhqwAI68O-eQTFbCl-Ed4Pq2AMrWyDWDninuXUTXROoMTvSddur_kZwTJWVyXXunJMBnymP_2dTFs-fhOq2Np2dGHQImQNtlUkNRSJk_06pi8vZxJTa_cY5fyw92coPDHEKPimdu2XBEM4PHL_Dd2d32RMw44xs2JA%3D%3D)

Not sure where to start? We created [a free quiz](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=477defc743454fe7bc64481d74ea733e&_e=-Q_wEEYyuX1SEntZRdoFfOZURSOLwEhZqI6OgllmMXLAPlEJJ6fLTSkzjAThtvGP1P-O2WvwFXYDlImmni3dPqwUI3QhhzYl_GsuNMhO9_eq3I35cU613vYhZG3nt4-Ivn1eOroAgErnic0u4tcTwFuM-EqLg5u3deP3pAAyT6i_v0UU4bNfi1MKvVdcGgcpOtZuWagrewL3wuB4VLQDVhWyc3YS639aoBsDofdsLZVnpMBXHDFbcvNcvOnAPfd1fwHzePfGQAvZa2qNiQ32j4c3TFgv3WW8n1oExsGXvDy50lUnCQBpFhqwAI68O-eQZMts7Z3ujWecqO5uv9qW20D4qmGw-A-ABIdVq68WVIDqjiYSbeWJT-Zksztdf4V3c0jTXEYbx1PYiEQS-v_S6usuZh05iBCSjEVGsYsjsUxrg98mAIDgk4zYRsgwk4LwGjg3bZc0RcP1MZAQWtyirg%3D%3D) to help Americans find vetted financial advisors who serve your area, obligated to work in your best interest. name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Will I see you this summer?
body:
I hope I have a chance to talk with you| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=a71e8403ac0248aa8fd25241cd5bdea1&_e=Qe7WkSZ5lpt0aAzHVvfojSwgTZH8xJGJZWhZUaOon2BZjXvXvjBZUUSrzz4si98zAdrMEC9k-9SxqJQ0HOCpEb5o-ZwkV_Y8w6bC3W859EWaDkPNEcLWuh-gLaD_xH9zEf59pbNyxcWrgXAWcCiepsybyfl8dM23C20oyCpvNpmC10GDH5hgmAB5bSfZObldjF_2eaovmGi-ku1-9y7SYomM-biVXreVhAjM9tQO6qkapsie_Cu_xqN4kSPrzBQs)
---
Summer is officially here, which can only mean one thing, my friend... **It's Parade**** Season!** I love spending my summers in Wisconsin and attending parades... It gives me an opportunity to meet with so many people and hear directly from them. There's something unique about getting to talk with families across Wisconsin as we all celebrate our shared love for our communities and country. [__**After all, what's better than warm weather, tractors, great food, and even greater people?**__](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=a71e8403ac0248aa8fd25241cd5bdea1&_e=Qe7WkSZ5lpt0aAzHVvfojSwgTZH8xJGJZWhZUaOon2BZjXvXvjBZUUSrzz4si98zAdrMEC9k-9SxqJQ0HOCpEb5o-ZwkV_Y8w6bC3W859EXPciAKubzMGcXQkkmX5N8cffGfA3I_NzFKpjI8zf4Wqlvj73bxfkUQzo7WK85wbuPOt7XJOCroU79jBKJHNnfu4y2_GbW6h32PEcZ05zmPQKcsLncr7jQimLfklkj_NT9wfsS2HeV_wneajvk08MgS) What about you, my friend? Will I see you at an upcoming parade in your area? [_**Click here to share with me what parades you plan on attending this summer with your families!**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=a71e8403ac0248aa8fd25241cd5bdea1&_e=Qe7WkSZ5lpt0aAzHVvfojSwgTZH8xJGJZWhZUaOon2BZjXvXvjBZUUSrzz4si98zAdrMEC9k-9SxqJQ0HOCpEb5o-ZwkV_Y8w6bC3W859EUXbszEtyl6L2O0m-MnA-gllqZdMTFu22klfSAoD0KRq7ONSVo9dO25VQIoBQevQl-mn7LeScT-MbebMDu3UZt4X3G_WywPyr9BbdzEwuY5oNIvcFWuIEFcy23H396GDmWOcVAiFgUTvVZzjFIG5DsK) Whether it's in Fond du Lac, Oshkosh, Sheboygan, or anywhere else in our great district, [_**I hope to see you at a parade this summer!**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=a71e8403ac0248aa8fd25241cd5bdea1&_e=Qe7WkSZ5lpt0aAzHVvfojSwgTZH8xJGJZWhZUaOon2BZjXvXvjBZUUSrzz4si98zAdrMEC9k-9SxqJQ0HOCpEb5o-ZwkV_Y8w6bC3W859EXQr6Y_gkeILDGBDAgsRP4GnVEIOX-CLKJdjRG_hFpupO62pjhMxJHQSZdyDZ-7z15ra5jtHHma7C5AFeZTunBAch4Xh8eqDIpXW8k0t-6-VZAoENZtOOhq3Bys9VLa3aq8HTswh-Vji8pmzwsZUKRg)
---
| | Thank you for your support,
**Glenn Grothman**

clean_body: I hope I have a chance to talk with you| | | Summer is officially here, which can only mean one thing, my friend... It's Parade Season! I love spending my summers in Wisconsin and attending parades... It gives me an opportunity to meet with so many people and hear directly from them. There's something unique about getting to talk with families across Wisconsin as we all celebrate our shared love for our communities and country. What about you, my friend? Will I see you at an upcoming parade in your area? Whether it's in Fond du Lac, Oshkosh, Sheboygan, or anywhere else in our great district, | | Thank you for your support, Glenn Grothman | | | | Follow Glenn Grothman on Social Media! | | | ---|---|--- | | Glenn Grothman for Congress P.O. Box 1215 Fond du Lac, WI 54936 You are receiving this email because you expressed an interest in Glenn Grothman.

Fellow Conservative:

In 2018, West Virginia Sen. Joe Manchin spent $8.9 million – not including super PAC money – to win another term in the Senate. Sen. Manchin won by 3.3%; **former President Trump would win West Virginia two years later by 39%.**

Sen. Manchin eked out his 2018 win because of the decades of goodwill he’d built up around the state and because he vastly outspent his Republican opponent. Everyone in conservative politics – and on the other side of the aisle, for that matter, thinks they know what Manchin’s next move will be. **Will he run, or won’t he? That’s the $9 million question.**

While Sen. Manchin has not publicly announced his intention to seek a 4th term in the Senate (he’s waiting until December), his allies say it’s “crazy to count him out” at this point.

They’re right. New polling featured two hypothetical matchups – one between Manchin and Rep. Alex Mooney and the other between Manchin and Governor Jim Justice. The results from the two surveys couldn’t have been clearer: **the only West Virginia Republican who can beat Democrat Joe Manchin is Governor Jim Justice. **

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. Peter,
I’m Sean Frame, running for California State Assembly, District 6 - an open, Democratic seat in Sacramento that deserves a strong progressive.
I’m founder of the Six PAC, backed by thousands of grassroots donors without a single dime of corporate PAC money, which is proud to support my friend Derek Marshall again for Congress. Together, we’re fighting for single-payer healthcare, the Green New Deal, and a progressive California.
I’m a father, school employee, and former school board member running to defend public education from right-wing extremism.
**I’m running for us ... ALL of us. We’re facing a competitive primary in March, and need your help to get out the vote.**
**[Our movement isn’t taking any fossil fuel or corporate PAC money, which means we need your help. Please split a donation between Derek and my campaign now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65188634/412591371/1161394247?amount=20&refcode=pl_20230621&tandembox=show&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGRjYzEzNC02ZTEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L8GHokDThH7o54Y7k4fth5M_QrJB8P-ktGz-gADYigg=)**
I was called to public service after a friend and my child’s school principal was shot and killed.
I stepped up as School Board Trustee in the Sierra Nevada foothills to help my community heal, defending high-quality public education for 9 years.
Then, the wildfires came.
Flames didn’t engulf my home, but skyrocketing insurance rates and plummeting real estate values did. We moved to Sacramento where my wife, Ellyn, grew up.
Working with the Sacramento County Office of Education, I found 3 out of 4 of my colleagues didn’t receive a living wage. I stepped up as a union shop steward, because full-time jobs must support families.
I need the support of grassroots activists like you to ensure a strong launch for our campaign.

clean_body: I’m running for California State Assembly to pass single-payer healthcare, ensure living wages for all work, create more green jobs, and defend public education. = = Peter, I’m Sean Frame, running for California State Assembly, District 6 - an open, Democratic seat in Sacramento that deserves a strong progressive. I’m founder of the Six PAC, backed by thousands of grassroots donors without a single dime of corporate PAC money, which is proud to support my friend Derek Marshall again for Congress. Together, we’re fighting for single-payer healthcare, the Green New Deal, and a progressive California. I’m a father, school employee, and former school board member running to defend public education from right-wing extremism. I’m running for us ... ALL of us. We’re facing a competitive primary in March, and need your help to get out the vote. = I was called to public service after a friend and my child’s school principal was shot and killed. I stepped up as School Board Trustee in the Sierra Nevada foothills to help my community heal, defending high-quality public education for 9 years. Then, the wildfires came. Flames didn’t engulf my home, but skyrocketing insurance rates and plummeting real estate values did. We moved to Sacramento where my wife, Ellyn, grew up. Working with the Sacramento County Office of Education, I found 3 out of 4 of my colleagues didn’t receive a living wage. I stepped up as a union shop steward, because full-time jobs must support families. I need the support of grassroots activists like you to ensure a strong launch for our campaign. = Thanks for your support, Sean Frame = Derek Marshall is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. = To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. Box 2836 Victorville, CA 92395 (760) 486-2416 Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress | |

name: Team TNDP
subject: TAKE ACTION: Support the Equality Act! 🏳️‍🌈
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndp-em-june2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndp-em-june2023]
Peter — Breaking news: Democrats have JUST reintroduced the Equality Act in both the House and the Senate! Will you sign on right now as a community supporter? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/jwCZgF1ZS06CebEkGEi5bw2]

"As Congress Re-Introduces Equality Act, Human Rights Campaign President Calls for its Urgent Passage, Testifies Before Senate Judiciary Committee: “LGBTQ+ People are Living in a State of Emergency"
June 21st, 2023
“More than 525 anti-LGBTQ+ bills have been introduced this year in the states. More than 220 of those bills target the transgender community — many targeting our children specifically. And more than 75 of those anti-LGBTQ+ bills have now become law. This includes laws that ban books and censor curriculum in the classroom; forbid children from being able to safely use the bathroom at school; and criminalize doctors for providing live-saving, gender-affirming healthcare. The purpose of these laws is to facilitate a rise in political extremism by alienating and isolating LGBTQ+ Americans, and the impact of these laws is alarming.”
— HRC President Kelley Robinson
ADD YOUR NAME TO SUPPORT THE EQUALITY ACT [https://secure.ngpvan.com/jwCZgF1ZS06CebEkGEi5bw2]

This is huge, Peter. This bill would strengthen our existing civil rights protections and expand to protect gender identity and sexual orientation from discrimination nationwide.

Millions of people are left vulnerable to acts of discrimination without true recourse because their sexual orientation or gender identity aren’t protected under the letter of the law. Civil rights aren’t up for deba te, Peter — everyone, regardless of who they are, who they love, or how they identify deserve to live a life free from discrimination.

We’ve got a long way to go to pass this critical legislation, and we could use your support here. Will you stand with us today as a community supporter of the Equality Act? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/jwCZgF1ZS06CebEkGEi5bw2]

SIGN ON [https://secure.ngpvan.com/jwCZgF1ZS06CebEkGEi5bw2]

Thanks Peter,

Tennessee Democratic Party
Tennessee Democratic Party
4900 Centennial Blvd
Suite 300
Nashville, TN 37209
United States
tndp.org [https://www.tndp.org/] | info@tndp.org [info@tndp.org]
CAROL V. ABNEY, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.

name: Working Families Party
subject: Defend abortion rights in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
After last night’s victories, we know we have momentum on our side. But our work is far from over. | | | Last night was a big night for progressives in Virginia, Peter! **Of the 10 Working Families Party endorsed candidates on the ballot, 8 won their primary elections!** The list of WFP winners includes:
* **Lashrecse Aird** who took on the last anti-choice Democrat in the state Senate and defeated him by a more than 2-to-1 margin
* **Jennifer Carroll Foy** who defeated an opponent backed by the state’s dirty energy monopoly
* **Buta Biberaj** who retained her seat for Commonwealth's Attorney after facing a bipartisan barrage over her restorative justice policies

But our work is far from over.**With only a slim majority in the state Senate standing in the way of an outright abortion ban in Virginia and a Republican trifecta in the state, it’s imperative that we keep this momentum going and win in November.** With newly drawn districts and corporations prepared to spend millions to defeat our movement, we need to hit the ground running today. **[Will you contribute $10 now to elect our primary winners in November and stop an abortion ban in Virginia?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUO0Z7Nwa9XnEdIg9s5CZ05O0FPhzvX6c_IXnC2T5ju-RNKAk2b2sHMg8iZvxVfj5-Deh_DPveDKCyOOZa1IrbbOQyI7HvNhH2rmiQy3RrH6_bU24hzyDoA6iTal4KhghAdEdFcEgkLtGbmiXZDHgtNrCEwNLvQMXzcx1oIX9nxQPuwF0KpHOos2HeUIj04s7ABxnitkCyYpb5J4jZd8tb1UMZ6lpkT7tMHLdU2WzJh6uZqn2s9Zkv6mVrSJjW6zpXn9qIVQftbjybWuQxb_2uT19nW8hOsb1whazIB1Mr1pe_iY8M8UwhRBHTOI_55MtU5oH1ID7tJEuYzw_Ogiltkjs9uBiEs05J0UTPC5UFlSC2MMKD98KiP7rl03QhnzPl/3x8/2t6D2d-uS3y6koZPiVH-uQ/h0/U7roytk-iSVWclmwKN51YaXNWikRKq2atjemaXkmXHY)** **[Contribute now](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUO0Z7Nwa9XnEdIg9s5CZ05O0FPhzvX6c_IXnC2T5ju-RNKAk2b2sHMg8iZvxVfj5-x6SoGPhNLcTxKFfZiVHP9Clsptqqtsd9M_uAkB7GoIbnYFpO8Jk3hiTir9gaVA2ZksVIlT9Rc6vaHJA7jWlNmxSORw5Y9bg8KX643TYGLnK0DBwugv-xlT1GcAUJ3HxIdeRA6S0nkJpevfh8-KHpGeA9Ju-9OFgTx1QU18Bez-LApDfdjk92M8mbsh_W1VtjBXbXSRUiXS62OiZaSz4FtLElglE7SeoCNcn-QjSwwA0Y5yoU_d8zaQDaAqM9IHaLrQavgZL3feHhgGgTFbGptSVMcMjoYeecfOEjx8szlXQRMdyhJKGMssbKKbXc66O4/3x8/2t6D2d-uS3y6koZPiVH-uQ/h1/NnpXJGNQLfOojSbS4LzT9YqC4heRdRS8jNoMS-k45mA)** Victories like last night don’t just happen by themselves. They are the result of hard work. Together with our partners on the ground, we were able to knock on **32,000 doors** , make **120,000 phone calls** , send **1 million texts** , deliver**200,000 mailers** , and reach over **2 million voters with digital ads**. And we wouldn’t be able to do this without the generous support from our members like you. Now as we move into the General Election, we’ll have to kick our organizing into even higher gear. Because Virginia doesn’t have campaign donation limits, big corporations like Dominion Energy can spend millions to deliver a Republican trifecta to Governor Glenn Youngkin so he can give tax cuts to the rich and ban abortion. This November will also be the first General Election since new districts were drawn — and previously safe districts are now in play. **Both parties have a path to victory, and with every legislative seat up for election, it’s anyone's guess who will win control of the state legislature in Virginia this November.** Earlier this year, Democrats in the state Senate were able to narrowly defeat an abortion ban. And Governor Youngkin is dead set on trying again if he’s able to win a trifecta. But after last night’s victories, we know we have momentum on our side.**[Will you contribute $10 now to help elect our primary winners in November and defend abortion rights in Virginia?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUO0Z7Nwa9XnEdIg9s5CZ05O0FPhzvX6c_IXnC2T5ju-RNKAk2b2sHMg8iZvxVfj5-a6-iYbszwu0Iv20Ge48_qSGeNdM5rZ1G7HOcJV7oyKXkAINnWmtnOrJiSFudVQJjSN6qOrgc09obgV84CUrRaaa91sC_H8VQwCQsrRtAjfB7ak6HXFyyK93fqSZezT55F6V3g3_XZOEUG8SxanUqRAe0-xD0lRa7_XD6cm-45a4oa0MZE-b9s1v1X821Ju1gPrDnGsgyBt_eX0otMeR3DIiStVo0g-Qtz6SljfmE47sP6JD8K2NMAyYifarX2R6guSUJ15AnlumCCHm8ZVQeycN2netzKtJU02FScguXSJzy9FbjBhF2hinHhO0KooP8/3x8/2t6D2d-uS3y6koZPiVH-uQ/h2/clBRqJ_ho-0IOKAeoWIH-ZpFi-z4420_ao2uaZQhny0)** clean_body: After last night’s victories, we know we have momentum on our side. But our work is far from over. | | | Last night was a big night for progressives in Virginia, Peter! Of the 10 Working Families Party endorsed candidates on the ballot, 8 won their primary elections! The list of WFP winners includes: Lashrecse Aird who took on the last anti-choice Democrat in the state Senate and defeated him by a more than 2-to-1 margin Jennifer Carroll Foy who defeated an opponent backed by the state’s dirty energy monopoly Buta Biberaj who retained her seat for Commonwealth's Attorney after facing a bipartisan barrage over her restorative justice policies But our work is far from over.With only a slim majority in the state Senate standing in the way of an outright abortion ban in Virginia and a Republican trifecta in the state, it’s imperative that we keep this momentum going and win in November. With newly drawn districts and corporations prepared to spend millions to defeat our movement, we need to hit the ground running today. Victories like last night don’t just happen by themselves. They are the result of hard work. Together with our partners on the ground, we were able to knock on 32,000 doors , make 120,000 phone calls , send 1 million texts , deliver200,000 mailers , and reach over 2 million voters with digital ads. And we wouldn’t be able to do this without the generous support from our members like you. Now as we move into the General Election, we’ll have to kick our organizing into even higher gear. Because Virginia doesn’t have campaign donation limits, big corporations like Dominion Energy can spend millions to deliver a Republican trifecta to Governor Glenn Youngkin so he can give tax cuts to the rich and ban abortion. This November will also be the first General Election since new districts were drawn — and previously safe districts are now in play. Both parties have a path to victory, and with every legislative seat up for election, it’s anyone's guess who will win control of the state legislature in Virginia this November. Earlier this year, Democrats in the state Senate were able to narrowly defeat an abortion ban. And Governor Youngkin is dead set on trying again if he’s able to win a trifecta. But after last night’s victories, we know we have momentum on our side. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

body:
The fact that we’re already mid-way through the month is concerning to me for only one reason: we’re seriously behind on funds raised for my Senate campaign.

* * *
**_We're Being Watched_**
Peter,

I’m writing to ask for your help today on the occasion that as of today, we have just nine more days to hit our 2nd quarter fundraising goal.

The fact that we’re already more than half-way through the month is concerning to me for only one reason: _we’re seriously behind on funds raised for my Senate campaign._

**I’m not joking when I tell you that the during the first 20 days of fundraising in June, my campaign wound up raising just 45% what we did in May.**

[**HELP ME GET 333 DONATIONS TODAY
CHIP-IN NOW**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ee0515d94ca64252b02263e2e806931d&_e=VP6uWt_mvsZwpf77dPN2B00c6GXbv9AmmpNomOZDF97OHdL2ffw5J6iPmnrbsx6paiuv_YuWnzMCL-B3pb41vN-UGzMhrMpkQhEd9dS0dtp9sYauXVpEFBoZWruZYR7-H4Eg2xpVwMlO00dIxyea06yAn9Su7McYIV39kOA7Wjn7IXDu2RQyzmb2rQHfNE6fAODQ7cbpHfo4f7xmb7w9xJiTje3zuLBH0ddsZ7_3LLh5aVmiDJtseCAwS8yrzXWNoWyqaYNPLBRykReuMxzx_sk4oc2vFWkyXB33rGnCwb66_Z5XfN1Sx8Q1J4_dLY_5DxAZFbi2fpAmVzxehuGn4T5HdgtFx-MB2Dm9_pbm_3CIXjB5vfu2QaCWbSzjzEyAQVLaNfA8kRf2fp8mjxEz9k4Zz70OfZUeeUwUzeeRe18%3D)

That’s a real problem. **[I can’t seem to get folks like you to help this month.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ee0515d94ca64252b02263e2e806931d&_e=VP6uWt_mvsZwpf77dPN2B00c6GXbv9AmmpNomOZDF97OHdL2ffw5J6iPmnrbsx6paiuv_YuWnzMCL-B3pb41vN-UGzMhrMpkQhEd9dS0dtp9sYauXVpEFBoZWruZYR7-H4Eg2xpVwMlO00dIxyea06yAn9Su7McYIV39kOA7Wjn7IXDu2RQyzmb2rQHfNE6fAODQ7cbpHfo4f7xmb7w9xJiTje3zuLBH0ddsZ7_3LLh5aVmiDJtseCAwS8yrzXWN9gwlL8vRRVsmf3DVNQMiCRvBBCdNLscfyX41dpHHZvVYItmPhgNCC1twZ94WNqhICOePhqFyjMQ3LMGOL5jaE8dHoiOOkyJ1zhnn0ZMll842oddsd05ovn8zj3ALW1dhck69u4wlMrH5du0Q_n8UCZgK0U0ePeowxlo1ZkrIlBE%3D)**

And the thing is, the stakes are much higher in June than they were in May.**[We only have 9 more days until the end of the quarter](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ee0515d94ca64252b02263e2e806931d&_e=VP6uWt_mvsZwpf77dPN2B00c6GXbv9AmmpNomOZDF97OHdL2ffw5J6iPmnrbsx6paiuv_YuWnzMCL-B3pb41vN-UGzMhrMpkQhEd9dS0dtp9sYauXVpEFBoZWruZYR7-H4Eg2xpVwMlO00dIxyea06yAn9Su7McYIV39kOA7Wjn7IXDu2RQyzmb2rQHfNE6fAODQ7cbpHfo4f7xmb7w9xJiTje3zuLBH0ddsZ7_3LLh5aVmiDJtseCAwS8yrzXWNf3lWeHTMrzm1CUAXkBERCJQMFF-qxa67nsPdN2l_wwilcpZBm-cieWXq-LrYcqHTeZDZNrxubKgsCGKVLsbE38H8XGY_oFZvmaOX2SyLc0BDrFJg_JetD9FQD4NT_CFL_DntdZ6wyW8NbBP7zUISKYxulfbbrDonbxHK1j1eZEQ%3D)** , and I’m afraid if we don’t get cash flowing into the campaign accounts once more, we’ll miss our goal.

**Time is running out, and we have a lot of catching up to do in the final 9 days of the month.**

To hit our 2nd quarter fundraising goal, we’ve determined that **[we will need 3,000 donors to contribute $10 or more between now and June 30th](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ee0515d94ca64252b02263e2e806931d&_e=VP6uWt_mvsZwpf77dPN2B00c6GXbv9AmmpNomOZDF97OHdL2ffw5J6iPmnrbsx6paiuv_YuWnzMCL-B3pb41vN-UGzMhrMpkQhEd9dS0dtp9sYauXVpEFBoZWruZYR7-H4Eg2xpVwMlO00dIxyea06yAn9Su7McYIV39kOA7Wjn7IXDu2RQyzmb2rQHfNE6fAODQ7cbpHfo4f7xmb7w9xJiTje3zuLBH0ddsZ7_3LLh5aVmiDJtseCAwS8yrzXWN5Jr6dXBgJN-M4WjO2cj9QTmC2abZ5yIGx3N7uq4KeswUfjXGpL26vR7fq2Ca62d4tIdAFzE5R9LaBBeKWKnwAzuWjI49xIx53TrxrNOOnP8M9TU0bnEW10K2nhSPglSSNP65ULvixLLdFgU9gmwseyWl7R4f0AFe7_Xj7Uc9Pog%3D)** - that is 333 donors every day between now and then.

**Can I count on you to be one of the donors we need today?**

[**HELP ME GET 333 DONATIONS TODAY
CHIP-IN NOW**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ee0515d94ca64252b02263e2e806931d&_e=VP6uWt_mvsZwpf77dPN2B00c6GXbv9AmmpNomOZDF97OHdL2ffw5J6iPmnrbsx6paiuv_YuWnzMCL-B3pb41vN-UGzMhrMpkQhEd9dS0dtp9sYauXVpEFBoZWruZYR7-H4Eg2xpVwMlO00dIxyea06yAn9Su7McYIV39kOA7Wjn7IXDu2RQyzmb2rQHfNE6fAODQ7cbpHfo4f7xmb7w9xJiTje3zuLBH0ddsZ7_3LLh5aVmiDJtseCAwS8yrzXWNUVt7WDe940_1jhtQCg-CT501IrRd8sRa3TU7oqyyqr6tK7BNvkYcmteHss1_VWbULvZT4FeUrnnxB3Dqj3ige3NJW46__DC35NdTzOGjeOwlD6w3HY3n4zBVHjxxhYSHbHF9mYo33DtFPg4H0rGzcs-jFKgF2PkOIMBk9aD5BGU%3D)

When you’re running a U.S. Senate campaign and pacing 45% behind where you ought to be at the halfway point of the month like we are, **we must use every day available to catch up**.

In sum, **[we need 333 donations by the end of the day](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ee0515d94ca64252b02263e2e806931d&_e=VP6uWt_mvsZwpf77dPN2B00c6GXbv9AmmpNomOZDF97OHdL2ffw5J6iPmnrbsx6paiuv_YuWnzMCL-B3pb41vN-UGzMhrMpkQhEd9dS0dtp9sYauXVpEFBoZWruZYR7-H4Eg2xpVwMlO00dIxyea06yAn9Su7McYIV39kOA7Wjn7IXDu2RQyzmb2rQHfNE6fAODQ7cbpHfo4f7xmb7w9xJiTje3zuLBH0ddsZ7_3LLh5aVmiDJtseCAwS8yrzXWNGjFgGILxjYS9w6TkjMmf3CMXRfa5HpRXWR6Zazy3rJrvNtrbizMWBVUHPzaMzABEdla_2WLmIekCemhrc4rjjwtcrdToZu923MtMLEDwknTq19vhqURRcnbV7hRmL3B1F-Lad5hgz79lROumK3faw1_oLNtlWHF4rxBmDzx4k3g%3D)** and we will use every opportunity we can to engage with conservatives like you to get the job done.

Before tonight at midnight, we need **[333conservatives to pitch in $10 or more](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ee0515d94ca64252b02263e2e806931d&_e=VP6uWt_mvsZwpf77dPN2B00c6GXbv9AmmpNomOZDF97OHdL2ffw5J6iPmnrbsx6paiuv_YuWnzMCL-B3pb41vN-UGzMhrMpkQhEd9dS0dtp9sYauXVpEFBoZWruZYR7-H4Eg2xpVwMlO00dIxyea06yAn9Su7McYIV39kOA7Wjn7IXDu2RQyzmb2rQHfNE6fAODQ7cbpHfo4f7xmb7w9xJiTje3zuLBH0ddsZ7_3LLh5aVmiDJtseCAwS8yrzXWNJ9kPVLcJNnqH1nuUO_UbTZC25Mq5Vfm1cI4sagnXsVlI48d3x7FFkcSRVgdyoqwXq2ZLOQ7--GO2Cp9ZKWbFc2UK7KoDwEs6RHDcuAtOcb9iidKApT_dZ_t3ZpBqpbgkJx4M1JpQE0hF6Fo6KYbrxXM2SBMXJaz-IRDjS59MflE%3D)** if we’re going to reach our quarterly goal come June 30th.

[**HELP ME GET 333 DONATIONS TODAY
CHIP-IN NOW**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ee0515d94ca64252b02263e2e806931d&_e=VP6uWt_mvsZwpf77dPN2B00c6GXbv9AmmpNomOZDF97OHdL2ffw5J6iPmnrbsx6paiuv_YuWnzMCL-B3pb41vN-UGzMhrMpkQhEd9dS0dtp9sYauXVpEFBoZWruZYR7-H4Eg2xpVwMlO00dIxyea06yAn9Su7McYIV39kOA7Wjn7IXDu2RQyzmb2rQHfNE6fAODQ7cbpHfo4f7xmb7w9xJiTje3zuLBH0ddsZ7_3LLh5aVmiDJtseCAwS8yrzXWNrN-Qx2Um7M8es1R4ze5_WDXyAOj22-bH51AeLrnHlAEk-uRQ-K8UFl9hPvErlC1F-y6FhQN_9WSOnJcOcvMh6mgkSRuhAAYygqo6v__dyRqXXMq2E4I6sLfdnsCGjJM7QINl5aQrb2lgyz2sgHZssoQW0dHw8KadvhE5bTxOu-A%3D)

I’ll be honest with you, folks in both Arizona and Washington D.C. will be watching the amount of money my campaign brings in during the second quarter; potential opponents could decide to jump in and challenge me for the Republican nomination or sit this race out.

**The future of this race will be determined by whether we hit our fundraising goal or not.**

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. clean_body: The fact that we’re already mid-way through the month is concerning to me for only one reason: we’re seriously behind on funds raised for my Senate campaign. | | We're Being Watched Peter, I’m writing to ask for your help today on the occasion that as of today, we have just nine more days to hit our 2nd quarter fundraising goal. The fact that we’re already more than half-way through the month is concerning to me for only one reason: we’re seriously behind on funds raised for my Senate campaign. I’m not joking when I tell you that the during the first 20 days of fundraising in June, my campaign wound up raising just 45% what we did in May. That’s a real problem. And the thing is, the stakes are much higher in June than they were in May. , and I’m afraid if we don’t get cash flowing into the campaign accounts once more, we’ll miss our goal. Time is running out, and we have a lot of catching up to do in the final 9 days of the month. To hit our 2nd quarter fundraising goal, we’ve determined that - that is 333 donors every day between now and then. Can I count on you to be one of the donors we need today? When you’re running a U.S. Senate campaign and pacing 45% behind where you ought to be at the halfway point of the month like we are, we must use every day available to catch up. In sum, and we will use every opportunity we can to engage with conservatives like you to get the job done. Before tonight at midnight, we need if we’re going to reach our quarterly goal come June 30th. I’ll be honest with you, folks in both Arizona and Washington D.C. will be watching the amount of money my campaign brings in during the second quarter; potential opponents could decide to jump in and challenge me for the Republican nomination or sit this race out. The future of this race will be determined by whether we hit our fundraising goal or not. so we don’t have to scramble to hit our goal at the end of the month? subject: Summer is hard in rural America, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
It's not all pool days and backyard BBQs

| |
---
Hi Peter, Summer in rural America is difficult. Though we do have legendary BBQs, baking competitions, fairs and festivals, rural communities also face extreme hardship in the summer months. Summer in rural America means heat waves, floods, and storms. It means a lack of access to childcare and education, as well as an increase in food insecurity. Rural communities do not have the resources to address these challenges, and Republicans running to represent the areas that are most vulnerable are failing to provide any solutions. **Democrats are running to increase education, healthcare, and environmental resources. They are committed to fighting for access to affordable childcare and filling the hunger gap that exists in too many rural communities.** But many of the Democratic candidates who can make sure rural America can survive this summer **are going to be forced to make difficult decisions about their races in the coming weeks if fundraising doesn't pick up. ** We're approaching an important FEC filing deadline, and Democrats need your help to be able to stay competitive, especially in rural America. Every dollar makes a difference in a race like this one, and missing our goal has huge repercussions on our success. I need to put up a strong number from our first quarter – please help me before it’s too late.

Thank you and God bless,
Mark Walker

| Meet **Mark Walker**

Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan.

In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game.

Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children.

name: Tuttle Twins
subject: CNN hates these books. But isn't this the real danger?
body:
I called it "appalling" and landed on Fox News' home page...

| | | | | |
---
|
---
| Want a free trip for your family to Boston? ✈️ More on that in a sec... But first, a quick question for you. What grade did you get in social studies (history) in 8th grade? I think I got a C. It wasn't pretty. Turns out, I wasn't alone in struggling with learning history in government schools. Check out these recent headlines:
---
| |
---
| They're all talking about a new batch of data that came out showing that _only 13% of 8th graders in government schools are proficient in American history._ 😱 That's appalling! I get fired up about how poorly kids are learning history -- and part of it is from personal experience. In school, I hated learning history. I never understood why I was being forced to memorize dates and names and factoids of things that happened a long time ago. _Why does this stuff from 250 years ago matter to my life today?_ I often wondered. My teachers never really had an answer. That's why we've created our new _America's History_ books--and we're launching Volume 2, which covers 1776 to 1791. Like Glenn Beck says, "These are amazing history books that your freedom-loving family needs to inspire your kids!" Most social studies books try to cram kids' minds full of factoids like names and dates--what battle happened when, who said what to whom, etc. Yawn! Our books use storytelling to teach the powerful principles that motivated the founding fathers, as well as how those principles relate to our world today. **Bonus!** When you purchase you'll be entered to win our all-expenses paid vacation giveaway to Boston! ✈️ Details below...
---
| |
---

Your family will be able to celebrate Independence more meaningfully by reading these stories together. This new book covers the Revolutionary War, the creation of the Constitution, the ratification of the Bill of Rights, etc. Powerful ideas and inspiring stories to share! **And for each book you buy, you'll be entered to win our new Boston Vacation Giveaway to see all the amazing sites where the American Revolution started!** I was just there a few weeks ago and _loved_ it. name: Replace Sinema
subject: Investigation into Sinema
body:
Watch our newest video about Sinema’s spending scandal | | | Peter –
The Federal Election Commission has begun investigating our complaint into Kyrsten Sinema for illegal use of campaign funds – and the commission gave Sinema 15 days to respond to the facts documented in the complaint. If she submitted a response, she’s kept it from public view. Either way, the FEC will now continue its process of investigating her. **Watch our new video ad detailing Sinema’s scandal:** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wkoNdd8BsUTqR4i_4sLfwyHPeV-Bir3SYAg5LP1_6rgrE4ynypFhhG1SqOYiGGIJsnCgSF2MAvoYDhVudj4mcBLJLRnTq33miJ73pzgSIS_whJh6dgw9qp56Zv37dXTgngwv9-0k3VBmmGEGfxANkzLRlh5d8KF0wvkn-8GX57AXYTwVQDWTlhOCM7Z39MR2Vy1aFu71hzFw98I291VDe5K07merwfIy4uq95fJfrtX8vcVQQel92tC8IrfCOO0jrSB7mpUQZ6X03z7dFrZstR0eqNaPQCvDL4o9eLoXjVHw/3x8/ZWqAck3hQ_ONELeJ7h71PQ/h0/tfO_xS4xXZx8YxVVsN3OlGE4zhBEBmD_wjZas9kcPW0) **[WATCH HERE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wkoNdd8BsUTqR4i_4sLfwy1N_hrmfE-V5rn4RPlBoB2Y7nmJBfBnRsIWpfbesKC5wyoMNtysySnIEW8eebKoOAd4cJJMAJ_DLjz91DcX-8_1n0bvvqdwgajU0ZcIVNRssHdF5alj4_UTnKlvWgRgxea8gHqS81QQelQKo_iheqitJ-vVvuOTkvdvK6OgmyZPvCkjpt6tI1B2d81_yZmkbjGpWhlGxz0teKIYx0pP71SyVUrSHHKyDcryPb2Z5d8pZ_B2kW11cpI0rg9YHj91YshDD3etBgXr2M3RbITfYD4Q/3x8/ZWqAck3hQ_ONELeJ7h71PQ/h1/9odlM2ygug5WkSaY7EJ7R_913eelaoyG00_tHqlYP_E).** Yes you heard that right: Sinema used tens of thousands of campaign dollars on luxury hotels and resorts, international vacations, car services, charter flights, high-end restaurants, wine, and her athletic hobbies. The FEC complaint thoroughly documents what we already knew to be true: that Sinema does the bidding of special interests like Wall Street and Big Pharma in exchange for campaign cash, and then uses that campaign cash to fund her luxury lifestyle, including trips to Paris, Barcelona, London, and to participate in athletic competitions. **Arizona deserves a Senator who puts hardworking families first – not someone who sold out for personal gain. clean_body: Watch our newest video about Sinema’s spending scandal | | | Peter – The Federal Election Commission has begun investigating our complaint into Kyrsten Sinema for illegal use of campaign funds – and the commission gave Sinema 15 days to respond to the facts documented in the complaint. If she submitted a response, she’s kept it from public view. Either way, the FEC will now continue its process of investigating her. Watch our new video ad detailing Sinema’s scandal: . Yes you heard that right: Sinema used tens of thousands of campaign dollars on luxury hotels and resorts, international vacations, car services, charter flights, high-end restaurants, wine, and her athletic hobbies. The FEC complaint thoroughly documents what we already knew to be true: that Sinema does the bidding of special interests like Wall Street and Big Pharma in exchange for campaign cash, and then uses that campaign cash to fund her luxury lifestyle, including trips to Paris, Barcelona, London, and to participate in athletic competitions. Arizona deserves a Senator who puts hardworking families first – not someone who sold out for personal gain. That’s why we’re in this fight. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | A prominent Arizona ethics expert said:“When I read this FEC complaint, I was shocked – and I’ve seen a lot of political corruption in my life. You don’t get to mislead donors. You don’t get to take money that’s intended for a public use and turn it into a private benefit, and she has clearly done that in spades.” It’s time to elect a new Senator for Arizona. Thanks for all you do, -Replace Sinema & Change for Arizona 2024 | | Sent via . name: Team Cori
subject: Organizing workers: From Amazon warehouses to the halls of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Cori Bush’s congressional staff unionized. | |
---
Peter, As workers in St. Louis and across the country rise up for fair pay, fair scheduling, and benefits, billion-dollar corporations are fighting back with illegal union-busting tactics. **Starbucks** has engaged in a multimillion dollar union-busting campaign, firing labor organizers and intimidating workers.[1][2] **Amazon** has illegally interfered in a union election in Alabama and refused to accept a successful union vote at one of its warehouses in Staten Island.[3][4] At the same time, the National Labor Relations Board has accused Amazon CEO Andy Jassy of illegally coercing and intimidating workers.[5] And, just this week, more than 400 workers at an Amazon fulfillment center outside of St. Louis sent a letter to management demanding safer working conditions in response to hundreds of injuries at this fulfillment center alone.[6] **Rep. Cori Bush -- an activist, organizer, and the proud daughter of a union meat cutter -- is working to uplift the voices of working people because every worker deserves to have a union representing them.** [**Join Rep. Cori Bush and our allies. Add your name to oppose corporate union busting and support the _Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act_ today!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmBtHvR4ZJbIZ5GPX9_ey-4KKl1urWIuCDFAyAnOGIxq8mL0mN7w_eidNpop4tUr6TbanwNdsDgGSr24v4I3wKXVFa0SjyNHPiIFpouTQn56VjHKfBvpx-GfEo6vDBaUN_XW-As-FudwaCq_zMA3i3KG5kNQUzeKFqEW2OZOAXyixGkMRqYMdlT8rv4fZD97_Ezj-06lk7Y4e7gooBJO2VfX7er_axpP_Dwfq2F0uQ0pDut1CvRoDSJJ5xH2iNyQtQ9sJ1A4Q7MebNe2xoo9tx7oRtuaztwgFkInrFj21veSuxXnyscYg4G3y8BIGsLco2xY0lOpl8prx8vOaT_yTWXiyZ28JJcjm7rTFLyDWsu5eYgrMHAWeGp2AHKncnvEcHCvtDzrRPsPL4LA_ZOLZxJ0wrh2YQAkSuUBsnw_LzIYaLamGwIQAEbEjYYh7hK8Nc/3x8/0oWmPpqmQ6e7L7iu5by7eQ/h0/U9cdRqnD4bC0dNncMV9oyNnMx3fKpEtbRoWvWJMIp3A) **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmBtHvR4ZJbIZ5GPX9_ey-4KKl1urWIuCDFAyAnOGIxq8mL0mN7w_eidNpop4tUr6TbanwNdsDgGSr24v4I3wKXVFa0SjyNHPiIFpouTQn56VjHKfBvpx-GfEo6vDBaUN_XW-As-FudwaCq_zMA3i3KG5kNQUzeKFqEW2OZOAXyixGkMRqYMdlT8rv4fZD97_El5IhrwXAY9mH9eVxNomGa1x_2sDad8DYWBZOqhZkSLl-EcWcFk4CEDhrHFyDa0miLgxOt-QnKG_ntDKsAe3gEUOdBFqN15rKjNMykegfsPeUQcW4dkuEPpENpvH5dUuVw7qTGQ5maEsShq3IT5Ann-TI12mwEFTtIW8BoeB3e2OGk3GmLUcLYKAfqDX2EULZiMRRpEDlRXeTzS1NUij-hoWl9SDFhRRtZAGiNiIpD0IlKQ7DDZM6TUukeb2pn9nY/3x8/0oWmPpqmQ6e7L7iu5by7eQ/h1/JDEgQz9DroYAU7oPXUgZlDoMv4RRF3xyNZfJun-A7M4)** Last year, Cori celebrated her congressional staff’s successful vote to unionize, saying:
> _“Workers are stronger together, and I’m proud to stand in solidarity as they strive in making Congress a better workplace.”_
Cori has also paid her campaign staff a livable wage, paying staff to knock doors rather than recruiting volunteers. This has opened the doors of electoral politics to those who might otherwise not have been able to take part in a congressional race -- those who see politics as being distant or removed from their own lives because they're just struggling to survive. **Every worker, regardless of where they work, should have the right to a safe workplace, fair wages, and the right to come together in union. That’s why Cori has introduced multiple worker safety bills in Congress and is a proud co-sponsor of the _PRO Act_ , which strengthens workers’ rights to collectively bargain a fair wage with benefits.** [**Add your name to support the _Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act_ today!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmBtHvR4ZJbIZ5GPX9_ey-4KKl1urWIuCDFAyAnOGIxq8mL0mN7w_eidNpop4tUr6TbanwNdsDgGSr24v4I3wKXVFa0SjyNHPiIFpouTQn56VjHKfBvpx-GfEo6vDBaUN_XW-As-FudwaCq_zMA3i3KG5kNQUzeKFqEW2OZOAXyixGkMRqYMdlT8rv4fZD97_G1eI-9jZhcDGVVg9MnkVB6j45cpT7sfUgxEbVLkZs6phlmQeh17NaAsqKSJ-RvbORQm2_ZjrU4ZsFZKEHBq_EpUh9EC47xrLnKLK4Bd3eZEFHcPKxrLLiGuK2YHm3TOQF3pPKjeOvyqQ20k4BhmxR8HabuWYPMCSk2Xxq8nMc_Cqr0Ck9OVB8yNwVyZjxMMBNO0lVJQi47u4NTebr0K7j5pY-bv_WL2RoW95jMaVcDrxxxM0HYybjlbb8bqldRXrk/3x8/0oWmPpqmQ6e7L7iu5by7eQ/h2/LMHBHc-UioGrG2mZwDjqN-Z9Arxu5Ynq74v9SW3vyrM) Together, we’re uplifting the voices of working people everywhere while holding greedy, union-busting corporations accountable.
