clean_body: Cori Bush’s congressional staff unionized. | | Peter, As workers in St. Louis and across the country rise up for fair pay, fair scheduling, and benefits, billion-dollar corporations are fighting back with illegal union-busting tactics. Starbucks has engaged in a multimillion dollar union-busting campaign, firing labor organizers and intimidating workers.[1][2] Amazon has illegally interfered in a union election in Alabama and refused to accept a successful union vote at one of its warehouses in Staten Island.[3][4] At the same time, the National Labor Relations Board has accused Amazon CEO Andy Jassy of illegally coercing and intimidating workers.[5] And, just this week, more than 400 workers at an Amazon fulfillment center outside of St. Louis sent a letter to management demanding safer working conditions in response to hundreds of injuries at this fulfillment center alone.[6] Rep. Cori Bush -- an activist, organizer, and the proud daughter of a union meat cutter -- is working to uplift the voices of working people because every worker deserves to have a union representing them. Last year, Cori celebrated her congressional staff’s successful vote to unionize, saying: “Workers are stronger together, and I’m proud to stand in solidarity as they strive in making Congress a better workplace.” Cori has also paid her campaign staff a livable wage, paying staff to knock doors rather than recruiting volunteers. This has opened the doors of electoral politics to those who might otherwise not have been able to take part in a congressional race -- those who see politics as being distant or removed from their own lives because they're just struggling to survive. Every worker, regardless of where they work, should have the right to a safe workplace, fair wages, and the right to come together in union. That’s why Cori has introduced multiple worker safety bills in Congress and is a proud co-sponsor of the PRO Act , which strengthens workers’ rights to collectively bargain a fair wage with benefits. Together, we’re uplifting the voices of working people everywhere while holding greedy, union-busting corporations accountable. Thank you for taking action today, Team Cori [1] [2] [3] [4] [5] [6] Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Cori Bush for Congress, please .

body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Republican extremists are trying to lock in
their unpopular policies and guarantee they win the 2024 election by
passing laws to suppress as many voters as possible.

Ohio's far-right legislature has already passed draconian laws to restrict
reproductive freedom. Now they are calling a special election on August
8th to try to pass a resolution that would make it harder to amend the
Ohio Constitution, including initiatives to raise wages and protect
reproductive rights in Ohio.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8728?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230621_FR_Ohio_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Ohio&t=1011&akid=4385%2E5885482%2E44L8x9 ]They called this election over the summer because they hoped we
wouldn't be paying attention. That's why organizing as many people as
possible is crucial to save democracy in Ohio. With the 2024 election on
the line, can we count on you to rush a donation?

This undemocratic amendment would change the ballot initiative threshold
from a majority to 60% of the vote, effectively crushing initiatives to
reverse their evil abortion plan and raise wages.

That's why Our Revolution activists across Ohio are fighting back with One
Fair Wage and others. Workers can't thrive under fascist control, and
we're building the movement to restore democracy.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8728?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230621_FR_Ohio_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Ohio&t=1012&akid=4385%2E5885482%2E44L8x9 ]Rush a donation now so we can sound the alarm in Ohio before the

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Are you ready for the truth, Fellow American?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Somewhere along the way, America forgot it was founded on truth. The politicians and media don't want you to be reminded of these facts.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| [](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkE2PmzAQQH-NuRn5KzY-cIgEqFVFVdE0PVrGOMG7GJBtEu2_X6Gw972-0cx7mv-tarWb3Hz_rb0tg1chKhPVwz3sOxyXaYApbGmMiiBCIeKQYEWzoeSSiAJntsS8EFRiyVg2ljfNkZDkZNmtOGHeI2w4kYXlWCNkjMhcud9BnGCCsGAst8xIcdO96KUWEnHAULDr1k_O6NnrtyW49JHPNmVTOaa0RkDPgDSANNGaLdj86eZgh9wsHpDmlU0QYYA0GB3tcNUwANpEA2j18mOmrj-v9S9V1-rPWWEEL92_y4-_qquvqmsB4VvyKu0LXQu_mg8cly0YC2gV7ONARvtVu_sMaIXRy3pMvB3c5gGtrNduykI5rE83TS5yARi673CPz9J3n_8ZAAD__0aOiEk)

Fellow American,

**TRUTH.** There's only one. Not yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic political climate where spin is all the Administrative state knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to say them:

|
**God** is real.
There are **two** genders.
Human flourishing requires **fossil fuels**.
**Reverse racism** is racism.
An open border is **no border**.
**Parents** determine the education of their children.
The **nuclear family** is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
**Capitalism** lifts people up from poverty.
There are three branches of the U.S. government, **not four**.
The **U.S. Constitution** is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history.
| [** CHIP IN IF YOU BELIEVE IN THE TRUTH **](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkE2PmzAQQH-NuRn5KzY-cIgEqFVFVdE0PVrGOMG7GJBtEu2_X6Gw972-0cx7mv-tarWb3Hz_rb0tg1chKhPVwz3sOxyXaYApbGmMiiBCIeKQYEWzoeSSiAJntsS8EFRiyVg2ljfNkZDkZNmtOGHeI2w4kYXlWCNkjMhcud9BnGCCsGAst8xIcdO96KUWEnHAULDr1k_O6NnrtyW49JHPNmVTOaa0RkDPgDSANNGaLdj86eZgh9wsHpDmlU0QYYA0GB3tcNUwANpEA2j18mOmrj-v9S9V1-rPWWEEL92_y4-_qquvqmsB4VvyKu0LXQu_mg8cly0YC2gV7ONARvtVu_sMaIXRy3pMvB3c5gGtrNduykI5rE83TS5yARi673CPz9J3n_8ZAAD__0aOiEk)
---

America was founded on these truths that we find sacred and undeniable. **Without these truths, our standing as a nation would mean nothing.**

If you agree with these 10 TRUTHS, _**[I need you on my team.](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkE2PmzAQQH-NuRn5KzY-cIgEqFVFVdE0PVrGOMG7GJBtEu2_X6Gw972-0cx7mv-tarWb3Hz_rb0tg1chKhPVwz3sOxyXaYApbGmMiiBCIeKQYEWzoeSSiAJntsS8EFRiyVg2ljfNkZDkZNmtOGHeI2w4kYXlWCNkjMhcud9BnGCCsGAst8xIcdO96KUWEnHAULDr1k_O6NnrtyW49JHPNmVTOaa0RkDPgDSANNGaLdj86eZgh9wsHpDmlU0QYYA0GB3tcNUwANpEA2j18mOmrj-v9S9V1-rPWWEEL92_y4-_qquvqmsB4VvyKu0LXQu_mg8cly0YC2gV7ONARvtVu_sMaIXRy3pMvB3c5gGtrNduykI5rE83TS5yARi673CPz9J3n_8ZAAD__0aOiEk)**_

This is about more than a campaign. It is a movement to revive this great nation. **[Will you join me today by chipping in $1 or more?](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkE2PmzAQQH-NuRn5KzY-cIgEqFVFVdE0PVrGOMG7GJBtEu2_X6Gw972-0cx7mv-tarWb3Hz_rb0tg1chKhPVwz3sOxyXaYApbGmMiiBCIeKQYEWzoeSSiAJntsS8EFRiyVg2ljfNkZDkZNmtOGHeI2w4kYXlWCNkjMhcud9BnGCCsGAst8xIcdO96KUWEnHAULDr1k_O6NnrtyW49JHPNmVTOaa0RkDPgDSANNGaLdj86eZgh9wsHpDmlU0QYYA0GB3tcNUwANpEA2j18mOmrj-v9S9V1-rPWWEEL92_y4-_qquvqmsB4VvyKu0LXQu_mg8cly0YC2gV7ONARvtVu_sMaIXRy3pMvB3c5gGtrNduykI5rE83TS5yARi673CPz9J3n_8ZAAD__0aOiEk)**

Thanks,

[](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkE2PmzAQQH-NuRn5KzY-cIgEqFVFVdE0PVrGOMG7GJBtEu2_X6Gw972-0cx7mv-tarWb3Hz_rb0tg1chKhPVwz3sOxyXaYApbGmMiiBCIeKQYEWzoeSSiAJntsS8EFRiyVg2ljfNkZDkZNmtOGHeI2w4kYXlWCNkjMhcud9BnGCCsGAst8xIcdO96KUWEnHAULDr1k_O6NnrtyW49JHPNmVTOaa0RkDPgDSANNGaLdj86eZgh9wsHpDmlU0QYYA0GB3tcNUwANpEA2j18mOmrj-v9S9V1-rPWWEEL92_y4-_qquvqmsB4VvyKu0LXQu_mg8cly0YC2gV7ONARvtVu_sMaIXRy3pMvB3c5gGtrNduykI5rE83TS5yARi673CPz9J3n_8ZAAD__0aOiEk)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** STAND WITH THE TRUTH **](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkE2PmzAQQH-NuRn5KzY-cIgEqFVFVdE0PVrGOMG7GJBtEu2_X6Gw972-0cx7mv-tarWb3Hz_rb0tg1chKhPVwz3sOxyXaYApbGmMiiBCIeKQYEWzoeSSiAJntsS8EFRiyVg2ljfNkZDkZNmtOGHeI2w4kYXlWCNkjMhcud9BnGCCsGAst8xIcdO96KUWEnHAULDr1k_O6NnrtyW49JHPNmVTOaa0RkDPgDSANNGaLdj86eZgh9wsHpDmlU0QYYA0GB3tcNUwANpEA2j18mOmrj-v9S9V1-rPWWEEL92_y4-_qquvqmsB4VvyKu0LXQu_mg8cly0YC2gV7ONARvtVu_sMaIXRy3pMvB3c5gGtrNduykI5rE83TS5yARi673CPz9J3n_8ZAAD__0aOiEk)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkE2PmzAQQH-NuRn5KzY-cIgEqFVFVdE0PVrGOMG7GJBtEu2_X6Gw972-0cx7mv-tarWb3Hz_rb0tg1chKhPVwz3sOxyXaYApbGmMiiBCIeKQYEWzoeSSiAJntsS8EFRiyVg2ljfNkZDkZNmtOGHeI2w4kYXlWCNkjMhcud9BnGCCsGAst8xIcdO96KUWEnHAULDr1k_O6NnrtyW49JHPNmVTOaa0RkDPgDSANNGaLdj86eZgh9wsHpDmlU0QYYA0GB3tcNUwANpEA2j18mOmrj-v9S9V1-rPWWEEL92_y4-_qquvqmsB4VvyKu0LXQu_mg8cly0YC2gV7ONARvtVu_sMaIXRy3pMvB3c5gGtrNduykI5rE83TS5yARi673CPz9J3n_8ZAAD__0aOiEk)

---

| [](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMjz1u7CAYAE8DnS34QPwUFK9xt6-KkhJh-LwmC2sLs2vl9pFvkH40mvm6-VvIJT_v_0NF16pvh4-Hf-c3PoZ1K2no7dXXwwMDMTA1APeCJqcsaMMpOq6MFpZbKenqguZmUTKZxI3hiYtFSVwEYogcMCLN7vIwBRwY11KOKKPVS5j1bIO2TBHJGu6vueQYnjV8by33n_GJnRa39r4fRPwjMBGYzvMclxBx3rbHGLdKYPrAUD-vcmAgCUy0ubSfuZR8KE0ku9eQy8XS_tfV3wAAAP__9O9bVw)

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: SCOTUS Update (via the NDRC)
subject: Forbes: “Supreme Court Keeps Voting Rights Act Protections – Strikes Down Redrawn Alabama Map”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

| **The NDRC is fighting for fairness across the country – _and our movement is getting results._

Now, the end-of-quarter deadline is approaching at the end of this month, and we’re looking to raise $5,000 today to help us reach our goal. Will you pitch in to help us continue our democracy-saving work?**
| [Donate to the NDRC](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65189617/412596245/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230621_FR_6Y_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmYTBkZjRhLTcwMTAtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h1OmbsGO_Flew2Cv8WAqNtNbn1c-OsYA9jnmA6AC7B8=)
---
Team,

**First,** just a few weeks ago we were reading some truly scary headlines:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65189618/412596246/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230621_FR_6Y_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmYTBkZjRhLTcwMTAtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h1OmbsGO_Flew2Cv8WAqNtNbn1c-OsYA9jnmA6AC7B8=)
---
Alabama Republicans had asked the Supreme Court to dismantle Section 2 of the VRA, which prohibits manipulating maps to dilute the voting power of communities of color. Experts warned that, if the Court accepted the GOP lawmakers’ position, it would have grave consequences for our democracy.

**But then, something incredible happened:**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65189619/412596247/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230621_FR_6Y_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmYTBkZjRhLTcwMTAtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h1OmbsGO_Flew2Cv8WAqNtNbn1c-OsYA9jnmA6AC7B8=)
---
[**_Help win more victories for democracy across the country: Donate to the NDRC to help us hit our $5,000 goal >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65189620/412596248/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230621_FR_6Y_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmYTBkZjRhLTcwMTAtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h1OmbsGO_Flew2Cv8WAqNtNbn1c-OsYA9jnmA6AC7B8=)
Instead of weakening the Voting Rights Act, the Court reaffirmed its role as an important tool to make our democracy fairer and more representative. **A.G. Holder said, “This is a victory for all Americans -- and an important step toward equal voting power and representation for voters of color.”**
**He’s right, team – and grassroots supporters like you helped make it happen!**
This is a monumental example of how together, our movement can win huge victories for fair maps, and for our democracy.

[**_So now, we’re asking you to pitch in toward our one-day goal of raising $5,000 to power the NDRC’s work so we can keep fighting for fairness across the country._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65189621/412596249/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230621_FR_6Y_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmYTBkZjRhLTcwMTAtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h1OmbsGO_Flew2Cv8WAqNtNbn1c-OsYA9jnmA6AC7B8=)

name: Tuttle Twins
subject: CNN hates these books. But isn't this the real danger?
body:
I called it "appalling" and landed on Fox News' home page...

| | | | | |
---
|
---
| Want a free trip for your family to Boston? ✈️ More on that in a sec... But first, a quick question for you. What grade did you get in social studies (history) in 8th grade? I think I got a C. It wasn't pretty. Turns out, I wasn't alone in struggling with learning history in government schools. Check out these recent headlines:
---
| |
---
| They're all talking about a new batch of data that came out showing that _only 13% of 8th graders in government schools are proficient in American history._ 😱 That's appalling! I get fired up about how poorly kids are learning history — and part of it is from personal experience. In school, I hated learning history. I never understood why I was being forced to memorize dates and names and factoids of things that happened a long time ago. _Why does this stuff from 250 years ago matter to my life today?_ I often wondered. My teachers never really had an answer. That's why we've created our new _America's History_ books—and we're launching Volume 2, which covers 1776 to 1791. Like Glenn Beck says, "These are amazing history books that your freedom-loving family needs to inspire your kids!" Most social studies books try to cram kids' minds full of factoids like names and dates—what battle happened when, who said what to whom, etc. Yawn! Our books use storytelling to teach the powerful principles that motivated the founding fathers, as well as how those principles relate to our world today. **Bonus!** When you purchase you'll be entered to win our all-expenses paid vacation giveaway to Boston! ✈️ Details below...
---
| |
---
| Our [newest history book](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2c7f2c24f5ce49d18f420f4a94454fdd&_e=zp6TFuGR9aUXhgMmXpgwPrLAtFvjg4UhpaLWnS3jzN7sqHw9PVllgl_o2iTHQiTR5I-OfCUwYBmWWhI1btUn58wVY7BYBaMDupXoB5ylTOZZuIyhVifLXcC1HYQrhIzLjL9jXAYyDlJTx6hjsbqfRJsNK1QDP2dUhaX1dHlBf01Yu7kaRzwzNL5e_REv_SumZlhoGHxVNffaOWO3x563o3Ql0ZECoDb_4LTP3HbwFlrp-6UgXulFpJ1WfTSEiLNQYnhjCL285hMt997cxPT4rHstKVGSS8p5znv9JvRD73DOgARsSGSp04J6JBBNqkZ4W00EhuNXXrzlDg0wgMauRg%3D%3D) starts shipping in just a few days, so grab yours today! Your family will be able to celebrate Independence more meaningfully by reading these stories together. This new book covers the Revolutionary War, the creation of the Constitution, the ratification of the Bill of Rights, etc. Powerful ideas and inspiring stories to share! **And for each book you buy, you'll be entered to win our new Boston Vacation Giveaway to see all the amazing sites where the American Revolution started!** I was just there a few weeks ago and _loved_ it. We're sending a family of four and paying for the **entire** thing! Legal jargon and info at the link below, along with your options on getting the book — including the first book in case your family doesn't yet have it!
---
| | [GET THE BOOK + ENTER TO WIN! ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2c7f2c24f5ce49d18f420f4a94454fdd&_e=zp6TFuGR9aUXhgMmXpgwPrLAtFvjg4UhpaLWnS3jzN7sqHw9PVllgl_o2iTHQiTR5I-OfCUwYBmWWhI1btUn58wVY7BYBaMDupXoB5ylTOZZuIyhVifLXcC1HYQrhIzLjL9jXAYyDlJTx6hjsbqfRJsNK1QDP2dUhaX1dHlBf01Yu7kaRzwzNL5e_REv_Sump8N8y6eS336gLYaxscbbE0RumSYoP4UJD4OBfmHV68oe_VIQCeU-5kFVkQHqvXhvpbs1jLX67PDBuu7foHPEh4PvEOkaED6YKOm3hfV-XwBb0UlKF6NJiS-0La_5Qarq-eVnQHyjRVuTPKujCYKQJQ%3D%3D)
---
| |
---
| Most people celebrate the "4th of July" with BBQs, fireworks, and fun. And that's great. But what would it look like for your kids to elevate this year's experience? With only 13% of kids proficient in American history, it's critical that you help your kids be the exception rather than the rule — and it starts by helping them learn history that matters today. That's how our books are structured — storytelling that explains why the ideas of the past are relevant today. (You can see sample pages, and download an entire chapter, at the link below.) Hope your family enjoys! Let's level up our Independence Day this year. Get started here:

When I think about being the first woman and first person of color to represent Delaware in Congress, I think about my great-great-great grandfather. In 1867, he signed a document that afforded him the right to vote.
Fast forward to 2017, when I was being sworn in to Congress for the first time, my sister, Thea, found the document. That document has come to represent the importance of expanding rights and representation. It’s my proof of where we come from and it’s my inspiration for where we need to go.
The historic nature of our campaign is not lost on me. My family and other families of color have come so far just to be fairly represented. All the way from being enslaved, to finally getting the right to vote, to being elected to represent the First State.

Speaker McCarthy has recently suggested that he would create a commission to cut Social Security and Medicare, even as House Republicans prepare to pass another round of tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy.
During an ongoing pandemic, rising inflation, and an affordability crisis, we cannot afford to cut these critical programs for the middle class. Moreover, the American people deserve to know what this commission is discussing and who is pushing to cut these programs.
**[We’ve joined with organizations, nonprofits, and campaigns from across the country to share this petition to tell Congress to refuse to serve on McCarthy’s closed-door Social Security-cutting commission. body:
One where YOUR VOICE is once again the most important in Washington.
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kc2u2jAQhZ9mskuUjH8SL7Iotdig3kVV9XaHjG1gkO1EsXMRffoqCLr9ztHofBoT50Dnxwj9DhCv5DIgAvsGiAe--_MhD58HXQ9_u89aS8HvW4rfAbE8Zv-_-rrS-GgobLTXlRvRDmht5cdODj3rFRequo4dIu9QSuc6YTvFB8XPEnk7OGsEDkNFI7bIWokdtqwVqrGIvmdctIKfvDgh8PZOqXFTMsHdyrLGubFTrMJ4LWXOz0l7wH32dl18c6e0eLc1Nma-fG2iX8ia-jZRKvV5TW4xlCldajvFSKV4D7hPNlgjvTSohDNGIXJg-7XEY_SO1ghMv3zlBvO0LtYD05aO5sWsibOhSwKm307vZErFpwJMK94JQHlMgRww_XH6sfuF-aryEz4_wvTtSz7OP8PvU7WMbr5TCJRlD7y9bAs2t38BAAD__6fhjIM)

Friend,
When we won the White House and made history in 2016, we disrupted the status quo like never before.
_We turned a totally corrupt D.C. Swamp – full of warmongers and globalists who for decades profited off putting YOU dead last – completely on its head. _
And from that moment on, we made more enemies in Washington than any political movement in HISTORY...
We EXPOSED the rotten corruption of the establishment bureaucracy, and we restored YOUR government to its rightful place: **the hands of THE PEOPLE.**
But our long list of enemies (the globalist special interests, left-wing billionaires, Marxist Democrats, RINO elitists, and Deep State thugs) decided that never again would they allow their power to be threatened.
**So, they tried to stamp us out, to DESTROY our beautiful movement by burying us in never-ending witch hunts...**
_**...By attempting to throw me in JAIL for 400 YEARS despite committing NO CRIME! **_
They’ve taken their hatred of our movement – and of me – to an extreme our country has never seen before. The Left has truly become a Third World tin-pot dictatorship.
But what these sick and twisted radicals don’t understand is that YOU, the American people, will NEVER go back to their status quo...
**...We will NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER our country to their tyranny. **
And despite their most vicious attacks and even the threats of IMPRISONMENT from Crooked Joe’s corrupt DOJ, our resolve to peacefully SAVE America only grows that much STRONGER.
**Which is why I have no doubt in my mind that in 2024, we _WILL_ win back the White House and cement a NEW status quo in our country.**
One where YOU – hardworking Americans – will never again be forgotten, and where YOUR VOICE is once again the most important in Washington.
Friend, all that I ask today, is that you help me PROVE just how many American patriots are standing with me in our mission to deliver this new status quo and save our country.
[**So please, if you’re not doing too poorly despite Crooked Joe’s disastrous policies, make a contribution of any amount today – _truly, even just $1_ – to stand with me in our fight to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN.**](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kT-Pm0AQxT_N0oFg9h8UFLkgF2cpRYpcOmu8O7bH2V0QLIecTx9h-dL-5unp_TQYp8CXRy_smwC4sV8EgJDfBMBRvf3-YY4fx6Fs_zYf5WC02vYrfBcA-THR_-irpaKIHHZqh8L34FpwrqC-Ma2VtlO6K2494gW8MxIlgmqMbzx4K40FULKtvS24hxpkbaCBWta6qxwAWal0rdWZ9BmEqjdOlR8TBn_P8xqnyo2xCP0t52l5TjoIOCzk1pmqjdNMfk_sDD-pxEgzOyzvI6dcXtbkZ-SF07V0Y4ycM5GAQ3LBoSGD0GmP2AEoIQ9rjqdIntco5PDyNTtcxnV2JOTg-IQv5jBOyNck5PDl9HUZU6aUhRw61WgB5pQC-73yXb__sbSZ9gmfH5HD_dM8Lj_Dr3Mx937aOARejBWqvu4Ldrd_AQAA__-IKYz8)

clean_body: One where YOUR VOICE is once again the most important in Washington. | | | Friend, When we won the White House and made history in 2016, we disrupted the status quo like never before. We turned a totally corrupt D.C. Swamp – full of warmongers and globalists who for decades profited off putting YOU dead last – completely on its head. And from that moment on, we made more enemies in Washington than any political movement in HISTORY... We EXPOSED the rotten corruption of the establishment bureaucracy, and we restored YOUR government to its rightful place: the hands of THE PEOPLE. But our long list of enemies (the globalist special interests, left-wing billionaires, Marxist Democrats, RINO elitists, and Deep State thugs) decided that never again would they allow their power to be threatened. So, they tried to stamp us out, to DESTROY our beautiful movement by burying us in never-ending witch hunts... ...By attempting to throw me in JAIL for 400 YEARS despite committing NO CRIME! They’ve taken their hatred of our movement – and of me – to an extreme our country has never seen before. The Left has truly become a Third World tin-pot dictatorship. But what these sick and twisted radicals don’t understand is that YOU, the American people, will NEVER go back to their status quo... ...We will NEVER,EVER SURRENDER our country to their tyranny. And despite their most vicious attacks and even the threats of IMPRISONMENT from Crooked Joe’s corrupt DOJ, our resolve to peacefully SAVE America only grows that much STRONGER. Which is why I have no doubt in my mind that in 2024, we WILL win back the White House and cement a NEW status quo in our country. One where YOU – hardworking Americans – will never again be forgotten, and where YOUR VOICE is once again the most important in Washington. Friend, all that I ask today, is that you help me PROVE just how many American patriots are standing with me in our mission to deliver this new status quo and save our country. | Thank you, | Donald J. District Work Periods are sometimes called “Congressional recess," but that’s a super inaccurate name for the essential work that Sara will be doing back home in San Diego. The truth is that Sara will be focused on her constituents – cramming in as many meetings as possible to hear firsthand the concerns, priorities, and issues that matter most to her district.

Sara’s schedule is jam-packed to ensure that when she’s updating her priorities, drafting new to-do lists, and shaping her legislative agenda, they will be an accurate and honest reflection of the people she represents. **[This is where you come in – click here to take the survey and weigh in on what you think the House should focus on.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65190247/412598429/465328732?contactdata=Gpehhg+GwT5c6e4PPJHp05YpkDfN8iJXwxNwhYNpbLsYaD3fb4HiFp0zGKC/buclhQjjmL+M02VyaOa4KOnjWtcd12k17q7YGMKK29xL51y9pcjZmZZOZ+3GDSXXankY0dvfntiwXTKjR0M4HEwU2A==&refcode=230621em_hq_quarterlyissuesurvey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjVmYzAxNS03MzEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wR3TZmIVxK-SfEoYwoGHll-_JTsAMuIHusT3xe9hDs0=&emci=bdcd7169-b00f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=2b5fc015-7310-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=14239920)**

name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: NPP Present as PA House Votes To Raise Minimum Wage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter]
Good afternoon, friends, advocates and voters.
We hope this edition of the New Pennsylvania Project eBlast finds you well.
Please take a few moments to check out all the important news you can use, events happening in your neighborhood, career opportunities, and other updates.
New Pennsylvania Project on-site in Harrisburg to witness historic passing of minimum wage bill
Instagram post congratulating Heather Boyd for winning her special election [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Instagram%20Post%20Square.jpg]
The New Pennsylvania Project was honored to be an invited guest of Representative Patty Kim, a longtime champion of working people and raising the minimum wage in PA, to witness the House’s bipartisan passage of a minimum wage bill more than 13 years in the making.
As the only Mid-Atlantic state still stuck at the federal minimum wage of $7.25/hour, Tuesday evening’s vote was the first step towards Pennsylvanians being guaranteed something closer to a living wage by 2026, and permanently indexed to annual inflation thereafter. House Bill 1500 will help hundreds of thousands of Pennsylvanians, including the children of wage workers.
This monumental vote is also another reminder of what happens when we come together to vote each and every November. The New Pennsylvania Project worked on two special elections in Allegheny and Delaware county that ensured Democrats would control the PA State House, giving the gavel to Speaker Joanna McClinton -- without which Tuesday's vote would never have happened.
We look forward to the PA Senate passing this bill – just as they did in 2019 when the GOP-controlled Senate voted to raise the minimum wage – and then sending it to Governor Shapiro’s desk to be signed.
We thank everyone who made Tuesday's vote possible and offer a special note of gratitude to New Pennsylvania Project board members and House Bill 1500 sponsors Patty Kim and Speaker Joanna McClinton.
Tweet of the Week
Graphic welcoming a new staff member to the NPP team [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/IMG_0072.jpg]
NPP in the News
Metro Philadelphia Power Women 2023 [https://metrophiladelphia.com/power-lists/power-women-2023/page/3/#kadida-kenner] (Metro Philadelphia)
Kadida Kenner is the founding CEO of the New Pennsylvania Project. A tireless advocate for social and economic justice issues, Kadida is motivated to empower and excite the electorate to enthusiastically vote in every election. Kadida has led efforts to stop a problematic judicial gerrymandering constitutional amendment, raise the minimum wage, fairly fund public education, protect federal courts from problematic judicial nominees, and protect the state courts from extremist attempts to undermine their independence.
News You Can Use
Black Philadelphians are overrepresented at every stage of the criminal justice system, DA says [https://www.inquirer.com/news/philadelphia-district-attorney-larry-krasner-racism-policing-incarceration-report-20230619.html] (Philadelphia Inquirer)
“Past policy actions grounded in racism ... set neighborhoods on a long downward trajectory,” the report reads, “and continue to harm the futures of residents by putting them at higher risk of experiencing crime and violence.” Krasner said the goal of the report was not to offer an immediate corrective agenda, but to “put numbers to a problem.”
Philadelphia City Council is poised to pass a new budget tackling public safety. Here’s what’s in it [https://whyy.org/articles/philadelphia-city-council-budget-public-safety-what-to-know/?oref=cspa_firstread_nl] (WHYY)
The total amount of spending on anti-violence efforts for FY2024 won’t be determined until later this month. Funds will likely be spread over multiple areas including the Philadelphia Police Department, the Streets Department, the Parks and Recreation Department and the Managing Director’s Office.
Portion of I-95 that collapsed in Philadelphia will reopen this weekend, Pa. Gov. Shapiro says [https://6abc.com/i-95-repairs-construction-collapse-rebuild/13406575/] (6ABC)
"Based on the tremendous progress that we have made over the last 72 hours and the time it takes to complete the remaining steps, I can confidently state right here, right now, that traffic will be flowing here on I-95 this weekend," Shapiro said.
Pa. House passes $15 minimum wage bill [https://whyy.org/articles/pa-house-passes-15-minimum-wage-bill/] (WHYY)
Pennsylvania’s Democratic-controlled House of Representatives approved a measure by a close vote Tuesady that would raise the minimum wage to $15 by 2026, fulfilling a long-held party campaign plank that has run up against Republican legislative majorities for years.

Abigail has done so much for the security of our communities and our country.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65190832/412600524/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230621-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU5YTQwNTctNzYxMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Cj5wA2eCvCtQEy5RRGlR_nRIsr-EBrxC8UDbAaFnSB0=)

| Peter,

Our team wanted to pass along a note Abigail sent around a few days ago regarding the grave threat to our country posed by the former President’s mishandling of classified documents.

As a former CIA case officer, Abigail understands the importance of protecting our national security. And as a current Member of the House Intelligence Committee, she knows the devastating impacts of potential leaks on America’s servicemembers, defense facilities, and allies.

Abigail has done so much for the security of our communities and our country. [_**Will you support our campaign with a contribution today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65190833/412600525/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230621-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU5YTQwNTctNzYxMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Cj5wA2eCvCtQEy5RRGlR_nRIsr-EBrxC8UDbAaFnSB0=)

Here’s her message:
* * *
Peter,
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65190835/412600527/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230621-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU5YTQwNTctNzYxMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Cj5wA2eCvCtQEy5RRGlR_nRIsr-EBrxC8UDbAaFnSB0=)
Yesterday, I went on MSNBC to discuss the former President’s disregard for our nation’s secrets and the grave risk his actions pose to our national security.

As a former CIA officer, I used to collect the information and write up the intelligence reports that the former president so cavalierly stored in boxes at his home. The precautions U.S. intelligence agencies take to safeguard America’s secrets are extraordinary — because this information is paramount to our national security and the lives of America’s servicemembers. The idea that these would be haphazardly strewn across the floors of Mar-a-Lago is unthinkable.

It is vitally important that anyone with access to classified information do everything required of them by law and by duty to keep that information safe. As outlined in this indictment, the former President of the United States did not do that.

When asked to return documents so that they could be kept safe and stored as intended, the President joined with others to hide those documents and lie to federal investigators. This callous disregard for our nation’s secrets was at the detriment of national security and the safety and security of our servicemembers whose lives are on the line if classified information gets out to the public.

This incident further cements my resolve as a member of the House Intelligence Committee to defend our nation’s secrets and our servicemembers. [__**If you support my work, I hope you will consider contributing to my campaign today so I can continue to protect our intelligence, our national security, and our servicemembers.**__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65190836/412600528/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230621-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU5YTQwNTctNzYxMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Cj5wA2eCvCtQEy5RRGlR_nRIsr-EBrxC8UDbAaFnSB0=)

As a former CIA case officer, Abigail understands the importance of protecting our national security. And as a current Member of the House Intelligence Committee, she knows the devastating impacts of potential leaks on America’s servicemembers, defense facilities, and allies. Abigail has done so much for the security of our communities and our country. = | = Here’s her message: Peter, = Yesterday, I went on MSNBC to discuss the former President’s disregard for our nation’s secrets and the grave risk his actions pose to our national security. As a former CIA officer, I used to collect the information and write up the intelligence reports that the former president so cavalierly stored in boxes at his home. The precautions U.S. intelligence agencies take to safeguard America’s secrets are extraordinary — because this information is paramount to our national security and the lives of America’s servicemembers. The idea that these would be haphazardly strewn across the floors of Mar-a-Lago is unthinkable. It is vitally important that anyone with access to classified information do everything required of them by law and by duty to keep that information safe. As outlined in this indictment, the former President of the United States did not do that. When asked to return documents so that they could be kept safe and stored as intended, the President joined with others to hide those documents and lie to federal investigators. This callous disregard for our nation’s secrets was at the detriment of national security and the safety and security of our servicemembers whose lives are on the line if classified information gets out to the public. This incident further cements my resolve as a member of the House Intelligence Committee to defend our nation’s secrets and our servicemembers. = | = I am grateful for your support, Abigail | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. Box 3112 Fredericksburg, VA 22402 United States | | | ---|---|--- Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit . = = If you wish to receive fewer emails, .

Fellow Conservative:

In 2018, West Virginia Sen. Joe Manchin spent $8.9 million – not including super PAC money – to win another term in the Senate. Sen. Manchin won by 3.3%; **former President Trump would win West Virginia two years later by 39%.**

Sen. Manchin eked out his 2018 win because of the decades of goodwill he’d built up around the state and because he vastly outspent his Republican opponent. Everyone in conservative politics – and on the other side of the aisle, for that matter, thinks they know what Manchin’s next move will be. **Will he run, or won’t he? That’s the $9 million question.**

While Sen. Manchin has not publicly announced his intention to seek a 4th term in the Senate (he’s waiting until December), his allies say it’s “crazy to count him out” at this point.

They’re right. New polling featured two hypothetical matchups – one between Manchin and Rep. Alex Mooney and the other between Manchin and Governor Jim Justice. The results from the two surveys couldn’t have been clearer: **the only West Virginia Republican who can beat Democrat Joe Manchin is Governor Jim Justice. **

**[I’m personally asking you to chip in whatever you can to help Governor Justice today](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b158318ddac84231b1f2056047ba23bc&_e=4Vu35bol_JeTwqrNugC_y9a_w9EoIqbbt2qEGolas617aP8qH6ZSnOUES2XZWig7IjGgEvDEWomg3dqPAdLbww8Ojaj2kWebF0-lOKnpdShkUh4C-fybFwfcTpnGIISeXYYYeEnNetzd2jop3kH1eVAt0UOfJ0vmbv9KuPIWc76dwkAOL9bf4fHjaKMgIX4cqTf7GPMpCsdT8DMJZQEQRnk4id1o6tFJXcR3veiBgBpU_6DDgn56lNOBJYCZ5u9pmaGRwp-qJpJZ1VmapH1lcmbx6CYUe6F_HfZo_uEbG513PRcwizqOWF5hg9mPWcJm4qUHfz4AhNOY_gN09oahW4pPSGnWT4RwNjb3a6x1KmeRSsd-2yqfszd_oCAczaV2GQ2FW-XpLbOeu_Y3ALwQdTuLBdHgNZQ7O41VmR-4zFo%3D)**. | **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

[**June 21, 1788:** New Hampshire ratified the United States Constitution during a convention held in Concord, New Hampshire. Its ratification was significant because it was the ninth state to approve the Constitution, reaching the required threshold for the Constitution to become effective and binding between those states. New Hampshire played a crucial role in the eventual establishment of the new federal government under the Constitution.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=feda06814f4245a0aee591c8057fcef1&_e=_a249p1gWvh9ZzeseOwWns6HClTS4Z4gOTS8TaBe3W8XpJ_cjrf0MIsurWnkF0R-hhspLeCVc1gIO7FC9XqkCziAUZ7jE5prLvcqSMRqKkiDV1MBEVvOlLM7jvMwAW47J45WzTuRJG-GWl_AyJY4YRScZ1NiMBgICHLmVddRdx_M6uMCWSmFY-aytNRZXWqLsfuSLThWAXC3HBE8svv21WRSY4EXCnk2IS3kZznZ4E4tIbuw0mSEJ1iSB2iRJtOT) **Source -[teachingamericanhistory.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=feda06814f4245a0aee591c8057fcef1&_e=_a249p1gWvh9ZzeseOwWns6HClTS4Z4gOTS8TaBe3W8XpJ_cjrf0MIsurWnkF0R-hhspLeCVc1gIO7FC9XqkCziAUZ7jE5prLvcqSMRqKkjIPyV_Ak10J7_IKcjOd_Bh9MIlvWFglYeKZSNAnu8qcLIslJ1QTv1f7M3qcdG4XIL97atSlL_pV_n5n6-w4MTtAUaXGthIBd0xNozWXgL-aYvkvxcv0p4dGnVA04RhYOfi8lswpqenbLdL0dq3DorQ)**

name: Joe Kent
subject: Deadline!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
body:
Dear Peter,
My filing deadline is coming up at Midnight on June 30th. Can you please help my campaign with a contribution today?
Show your support at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/jWjDg4hxKNvXxMzhQw73zQ/gbPdwYqeKvWtHDQK1U2Knw).
Last election, I lost by less than one percentage point. My campaign was outspent 6-to-1 in the General Election by Marie Perez, a radical Democrat with financial support from major establishment donors.
You can help ensure we are not outspent this cycle by donating today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/jWjDg4hxKNvXxMzhQw73zQ/gbPdwYqeKvWtHDQK1U2Knw).
This election, the political landscape is completely different. Last cycle, the Republican party was divided, but this year I already have four county party endorsements. The Republican Party is unified in its support for me as the nominee in 2024.
In Washington, ballot collection is perfectly legal and the Democrats have weaponized it to secure their one-party control of our state. Our campaign will be working with local county parties and churches to collect ballots and beat Democrats at their own game.
But the mission can only succeed if we are able to raise the money to go on offense! Please contribute at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/jWjDg4hxKNvXxMzhQw73zQ/gbPdwYqeKvWtHDQK1U2Knw) to help us hit our goal before the month ends!
Respectfully,
Joe Kent
P.S. - Marie Perez is no moderate. She voted against repealing Biden's ban on pistol braces. Please help elect a common sense conservative who will protect the Second Amendment by donating today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/jWjDg4hxKNvXxMzhQw73zQ/gbPdwYqeKvWtHDQK1U2Knw).

[Unsubscribe here](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/unsubscribe/o2MugVE0sjPAeG1zwzE3zPwB377NamVJrtTtZu9DI892k/Aq892bLK7NUcUtSXFAg4JQAA/gbPdwYqeKvWtHDQK1U2Knw)
Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Happy Pride!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Hi friend,
Last weekend, I had the pleasure of walking in the Bisbee Pride Parade. It was a wonderful time celebrating love, diversity, and the LGBTQ+ community.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_062123_PrideMonth_B_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_062123_PrideMonth_B_act]
We have made so much progress in the fight for equality. But we must keep marching forward, especially as conservative attacks against LGBTQ+ rights have become more common.
Love is love. LGBTQ+ rights are human rights.
This Pride Month, I'm calling on Congress to pass legislation to protect LGBTQ+ rights across the country. Will you join me by signing on now? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/thumxNdITUmxEhdRL24goA2]
Happy pride to you and your loved ones!
— Kirsten
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Engel <info@kirstenengel.com>
Date: Wed, Jun 7, 2023 at 11:30 AM
Subject: Help us defend LGBTQ+ rights
Friend —
Right now, LGBTQ+ rights are under attack across the country — including here at home in Arizona.
In this year alone, Republicans in the Arizona Senate passed multiple anti-LGBTQ+ bills, attacking drag performers, trans people, and young kids struggling with their identities.
Kirsten Engel believes that no one should be punished for who they love or how they identify. We should celebrate our diversity, not try to destroy it.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/thumxNdITUmxEhdRL24goA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/thumxNdITUmxEhdRL24goA2]
This Pride Month, we're calling on Congress to introduce and pass the Equality Act, which would prevent discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation or gender identity nationwide. These protections could not be more important or timely.
It's time for Congress to step up and protect LGBTQ+ rights across the country. Will you join us in urging them to take action by adding your name to our petition? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/thumxNdITUmxEhdRL24goA2]
ADD YOUR NAME >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/thumxNdITUmxEhdRL24goA2]
ADD YOUR NAME >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/thumxNdITUmxEhdRL24goA2]
Thank you for helping us make a difference!
— Team Engel

clean_body: [] Hi friend, Last weekend, I had the pleasure of walking in the Bisbee Pride Parade. It was a wonderful time celebrating love, diversity, and the LGBTQ+ community. [] We have made so much progress in the fight for equality. But we must keep marching forward, especially as conservative attacks against LGBTQ+ rights have become more common. Love is love. LGBTQ+ rights are human rights. This Pride Month, I'm calling on Congress to pass legislation to protect LGBTQ+ rights across the country. Will you join me by signing on now? [] Happy pride to you and your loved ones! — Kirsten ---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team Engel <info@kirstenengel.com> Date: Wed, Jun 7, 2023 at 11:30 AM Subject: Help us defend LGBTQ+ rights Friend — Right now, LGBTQ+ rights are under attack across the country — including here at home in Arizona. In this year alone, Republicans in the Arizona Senate passed multiple anti-LGBTQ+ bills, attacking drag performers, trans people, and young kids struggling with their identities. Kirsten Engel believes that no one should be punished for who they love or how they identify. We should celebrate our diversity, not try to destroy it. [] This Pride Month, we're calling on Congress to introduce and pass the Equality Act, which would prevent discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation or gender identity nationwide. These protections could not be more important or timely. It's time for Congress to step up and protect LGBTQ+ rights across the country. Will you join us in urging them to take action by adding your name to our petition? [] ADD YOUR NAME >> [] ADD YOUR NAME >> [] Thank you for helping us make a difference! — Team Engel CHIP IN NOW >> [] CHIP IN NOW >> [] [] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer. name: =?utf-8?Q?Matthew=20Barton?=
subject: 81 Cars Burglarized
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bartonfordesoto/recidivist-violence-12609714?e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| |
---
|
---
| Just this week, 81 vehicles were broken into at or near Baptist DeSoto Hospital in Southaven.

NOW is the time to address this issue. If we aren’t careful, we will wake up and DeSoto County will look like Memphis. And that doesn’t need to happen.
This type of occurrence is part of normal everyday life in Memphis, but here in DeSoto County we value a more charming way of life - one that does not include criminal activity - of any sort.
Which leads me to this: There has been a lot of talk about “violent crime” in recent weeks, but what we don’t hear is that these property crimes have a 20% higher recidivism rate (repeat offenders), due mostly to the slap-on-the-wrist penalties they usually get compared to violent offenses.
Many criminals feel emboldened by getting away with property crimes like this, and, more times than not, eventually graduate to more violent crimes. What’s worse, these types of car burglaries result in many guns being taken from law abiding citizens, and ultimately being used as part of criminal enterprises (selling of stolen firearms, violent robberies, assaults, etc).
If you honor me with your vote on August 8th for District Attorney, I promise to devote adequate resources and efforts to provide uniform justice across all crime categories, including property crimes. My business model to improve efficiency within the office will allow us to prosecute these types of crimes much more aggressively than we’ve ever seen before.
I will not tolerate letting DeSoto County look like South Memphis.
---
| | |
---
| Matthew Barton
_Sent from my iPhone_

PS: _If you believe you’ve received this email message in error - or do not wish to receive future updates from me or my team for any reason - [you can click here to unsubscribe](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=af4898086e&e=3c5d31b5ad)[.](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=6f1e6b870d&e=3c5d31b5ad)_

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Needed: Plastic is KILLING sea turtles and the planet
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1835251?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Plastic pollution is destroying our planet. ** **About 11 million tons of plastic waste is dumped into our oceans every year. **And **_this number could TRIPLE by 2040. _**Marine and coastal species cannot survive with this rate of plastic waste invading our waters -- ocean wildlife will continue to die from ingestion or entanglement. Since plastics aren’t biodegradable, they never disappear and instead break down into small microplastics. If an animal like a sea turtle were to die from consuming plastic, its body would decompose and release the plastic back into the ocean to **KILL AGAIN. **In fact, scientific studies have even found baby sea turtles **born with plastic _ALREADY in their_ _STOMACHS._** **[If we don’t take action now, plastics and microplastics will completely take over the ocean and eventually the entire planet! SIGN NOW to stop this plastic apocalypse>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1835252?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1835253?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Corporate plastic manufacturers aren’t concerned with the negative environmental impacts of plastic. The production of plastic itself is made from harmful fossil fuels, and one of the ways these companies profit the most is from single-use plastics, **which account for almost half of ALL plastic produced every year.**
Single-use plastics serve a one-time purpose before being discarded, which means demand is always high. This “throw-away” culture results in more plastic and microplastics ending up in** our water supply, our food supply, and even the air we breathe. **
**_Plastics never go away once they are produced_** , so they will continue occupying more and more of our oceans and our earth until they completely take over our planet -- unless we take urgent action to HALT plastic production and pollution RIGHT AWAY. **[T](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1835254?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)[his cannot wait, Friend, please demand immediate action on the plastic crisis before it’s too late](https://action.foe.org/page/53900/action/1?ea.tracking.id=Email)[.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1835255?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1835253?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for your urgent action,
Friends of the Earth**

clean_body: | | | | | == ---|---|--- | | URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Plastic pollution is destroying our planet. About 11 million tons of plastic waste is dumped into our oceans every year. And this number could TRIPLE by 2040. Marine and coastal species cannot survive with this rate of plastic waste invading our waters -- ocean wildlife will continue to die from ingestion or entanglement. Since plastics aren’t biodegradable, they never disappear and instead break down into small microplastics. If an animal like a sea turtle were to die from consuming plastic, its body would decompose and release the plastic back into the ocean to KILL AGAIN. In fact, scientific studies have even found baby sea turtles born with plastic ALREADY in their STOMACHS. == | == Corporate plastic manufacturers aren’t concerned with the negative environmental impacts of plastic. The production of plastic itself is made from harmful fossil fuels, and one of the ways these companies profit the most is from single-use plastics, which account for almost half of ALL plastic produced every year. Single-use plastics serve a one-time purpose before being discarded, which means demand is always high. This “throw-away” culture results in more plastic and microplastics ending up in our water supply, our food supply, and even the air we breathe. Plastics never go away once they are produced , so they will continue occupying more and more of our oceans and our earth until they completely take over our planet -- unless we take urgent action to HALT plastic production and pollution RIGHT AWAY. == == Thanks for your urgent action, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 foe.org/about-us/contact/

subject: Big Pharma is suing for the right to keep price-gouging seniors

body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65192025/412605262/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODNjNDJjMi03ODEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lB4trhHFpdjug-qLFtqRAe4plCYQhfr4kkl8GdvP95w=&emci=b5114947-4e10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=d83c42c2-7810-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)

| | **Last year, I was proud to secure a big win in the Inflation Reduction Act: the ability for Medicare to negotiate directly with drug companies to ensure that seniors with Medicare get the best possible deal for their prescription medications.** That's a policy change I've been fighting for for years while using my power on the Senate Finance Committee to spotlight Big Pharma's ongoing price-gouging and its impact on seniors. And it should come as no surprise when I tell you that Big Pharma isn't happy about it. **Just days ago, a pharmaceutical company announced that it's suing the federal government over my new law. In short: Big Pharma is suing for the right to continue price-gouging seniors. This lawsuit is being filed by Merck, the same drug company that charges $189,000 per YEAR for life-saving cancer medicine.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65192026/412605263/-2044921950?refcode=2023-06-21-bigpharmalawsuit&recurring=&amount=5&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=d83c42c2-7810-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODNjNDJjMi03ODEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lB4trhHFpdjug-qLFtqRAe4plCYQhfr4kkl8GdvP95w=) While Big Pharma raked in record profits last year, it continues to mug seniors at the pharmacy counter. **I'll fight every step of the way to stop this trumped-up lawsuit. It's nothing but a desperate attempt to keep on gouging our seniors with sky-high prices.** The American people are sick and tired of getting ripped off at the pharmacy. clean_body: | | | | Last year, I was proud to secure a big win in the Inflation Reduction Act: the ability for Medicare to negotiate directly with drug companies to ensure that seniors with Medicare get the best possible deal for their prescription medications. That's a policy change I've been fighting for for years while using my power on the Senate Finance Committee to spotlight Big Pharma's ongoing price-gouging and its impact on seniors. And it should come as no surprise when I tell you that Big Pharma isn't happy about it. Just days ago, a pharmaceutical company announced that it's suing the federal government over my new law. In short: Big Pharma is suing for the right to continue price-gouging seniors. This lawsuit is being filed by Merck, the same drug company that charges $189,000 per YEAR for life-saving cancer medicine. = While Big Pharma raked in record profits last year, it continues to mug seniors at the pharmacy counter. I'll fight every step of the way to stop this trumped-up lawsuit. It's nothing but a desperate attempt to keep on gouging our seniors with sky-high prices. The American people are sick and tired of getting ripped off at the pharmacy. Giving Medicare the ability to negotiate drug prices was just the beginning.I won't back down until everyone can afford the medicine they need. In 2019, President Trump won in Michigan. In 2020, President Biden won Michigan by barely 3%.

body:
Each of these victories proves how important our work is, and the impact we can make with your support.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65192508/412607232/-1917331050?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAyNTMwYjUyLTdiMTAtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_aTqQwYH-vAmh6RouoGJiZ1A_vlRZm0NHqGp-JVUUp4=&emci=422c2e4b-7b10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=02530b52-7b10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)

| _**We’re reaching out to share an update on last night’s primary election in Virginia. While one key race is still too close to call, we are happy to report some key victories:**_
* **Saddam Salim overcame a nearly $1,000,000 fundraising disadvantage** and defeated a long-time incumbent in District 37. This is a major upset victory for the climate movement, and historic in many ways. Saddam will be the first Bengal-born elected official in the State Senate and a key ally in the fight against the climate crisis.

* **Lashrecse Aird** soundly defeated incumbent Joe Morrissey. Joe Morrisey is not only a climate villain in the pocket of the fossil fuel industry, but is the last “pro-life” Democrat in the State Legislature. Lashrecse’s victory not only gives the people of the district a true representative, but sends a strong signal that the people expect their elected officials to earn their votes.

* **Jennifer Carroll Foy** defeated her opponent, who broke her pledge to reject Dominion Energy money to the tune of $200,000 in this cycle. This is a true testament to the power of supporters like you.

* **Rae Cousins** defeated another Dominion-backed opponent in her primary for House of Delegates District 79.

* **Andres Jimenez** will be the next Fairfax County Supervisor for the Mason District after his narrow victory over a so-called Democrat whose campaign was bankrolled by Republican donors.

* **Rozia Henson** won in a close race against two other primary opponents for House of Delegates District 19.

[_**These primary victories are just the first step towards ensuring a sustainable clean energy future for all Virginians. Can you make a contribution today to support our candidates for the November election?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65192509/412607233/931978131?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230621-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAyNTMwYjUyLTdiMTAtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_aTqQwYH-vAmh6RouoGJiZ1A_vlRZm0NHqGp-JVUUp4=)

| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65192510/412607234/931978131?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230621-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAyNTMwYjUyLTdiMTAtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_aTqQwYH-vAmh6RouoGJiZ1A_vlRZm0NHqGp-JVUUp4=)

Each of these victories proves how important our work is, and the impact we can make with your support. Going up against the fossil fuel industry and fighting for a livable future for all is a bold step for these candidates, and knowing that we have their back makes all the difference.

With the primary election behind us, our team is gearing up for the next battle ahead of us; we will be announcing more endorsements in Virginia for the general election soon, and your support will make a big impact on how much of an impact we can make.

Thank you for your support,

Jane Fonda Climate PAC

Andres Jimenez will be the next Fairfax County Supervisor for the Mason District after his narrow victory over a so-called Democrat whose campaign was bankrolled by Republican donors. Rozia Henson won in a close race against two other primary opponents for House of Delegates District 19. = | = Each of these victories proves how important our work is, and the impact we can make with your support. Going up against the fossil fuel industry and fighting for a livable future for all is a bold step for these candidates, and knowing that we have their back makes all the difference. With the primary election behind us, our team is gearing up for the next battle ahead of us; we will be announcing more endorsements in Virginia for the general election soon, and your support will make a big impact on how much of an impact we can make. Thank you for your support, Jane Fonda Climate PAC | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. body:
As we see inflamed anti-immigrant rhetoric across the nation, I am reminded of my parents' sacrifices.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65192581/412607534/-1382951893?refcode=BLU-SAN-20230621-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjY2ZTZjMC03YjEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FuxS9kTQOt2EbFLqSJXFNLZiTD-36VNMFmi7bo8U63o=)

| Peter,

Growing up as the 6th of seven children, I saw my parents’ tireless work to provide for us and set us up for a bright future. They made sure all seven of us became first-generation college graduates. Thanks to their sacrifices, I learned the importance of dedication, hard work, and community – values I still uphold today.

As we see inflamed anti-immigrant rhetoric across the nation, I am reminded of my parents' sacrifices. The time, work, and love they put into ensuring our access to education is a reflection of the resilience of Latino families in the US.

In Congress, I am committed to paying it forward. As the newly elected chair of BOLD PAC, the campaign arm of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus, I am determined to take down barriers that impede Latino progressives from running for office.

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Donald Trump is blotting out the sun.
body:
The mainstream media is following Donald Trump’s every move, desperate to revive their sagging ratings and click rates.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1140%2E120351%2EXF2cWi)
After news broke about his federal indictment, Donald Trump got something he’s craved from the mainstream media for a long, long time: wall-to-wall coverage of his every move.
**It’s 2016 all over again, Peter!**
On the one hand, the intensity is understandable. Trump is the first President ever to face criminal charges. But history isn’t the only thing driving cable news outlets like CNN to cover Trump non-stop. Ratings are falling and they’re betting on Trump to help bring them back from the dead.
But here’s the thing: the more the mainstream media covers Trump’s chaos, the less they cover the local issues and politics that actually impact people’s lives.
**At Courier, our network of local newsrooms around the country are working hard to fill the gap.** But Peter, it takes resources to provide this kind of reliable, fact-based local news coverage across 8 battleground states, and we’re counting on donors like you to help us do it.
[**If you’re tired of the media’s sensationalized Trump coverage blotting out the sun, will you pitch in $5 right now to help us fight back and report on the local stories that actually matter?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230621?refcode=em20230621&refcode2=1140_120351_XF2cWi&akid=1140%2E120351%2EXF2cWi)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230621?refcode=em20230621&refcode2=1140_120351_XF2cWi&akid=1140%2E120351%2EXF2cWi)**
From the primary elections in Virginia to federal infrastructure grants in Michigan, our newsrooms are shining a light on stories that the mainstream media are ignoring in favor of profits and wall-to-wall coverage of Donald Trump.
Here are just a few examples of the local stories our on-the-ground reporters have been busy covering:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230621?refcode=em20230621&refcode2=1140_120351_XF2cWi&akid=1140%2E120351%2EXF2cWi)
**The communities we serve rely on our coverage.** Our audiences live in “news deserts” that lack other sources of reliable, fact-based reporting, and our journalists are committed to picking up the national media’s slack and calling out misinformation for what it is.
**But**** _none of it_****would be possible without you, Peter.**
[**So with the 2024 election approaching and the mainstream media’s focus on Trump intensifying, will you pitch in $5 today to help us pick us the mainstream media’s slack and deliver essential local news?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230621?refcode=em20230621&refcode2=1140_120351_XF2cWi&akid=1140%2E120351%2EXF2cWi)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230621?refcode=em20230621&refcode2=1140_120351_XF2cWi&akid=1140%2E120351%2EXF2cWi)**
Thank you,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1140_120351_XF2cWi&akid=1140%2E120351%2EXF2cWi)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1140%2E120351%2EXF2cWi)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

body:
Did you hear what happened in Will County?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65192684/412608065/-1153878952?refcode=EM_FR_230621WCGOP_TEAM_90DO_6_NG_A_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjdiYjQ5NzAtN2MxMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kaW7964iHkVgfecsqaEydPblMwaU2C1IxqU7yrI2NlQ=)
Fellow Democrats, last week, the Will County Board scheduled a vote to honor Moms for America, **an organization designated as a hate group by the widely respected Southern Poverty Law Center.**

The sponsor of the resolution, a Republican Will County Board Member, claimed he wanted to recognize the work they do to “promote families.”

**[Local Republicans continue to feed their message of hate as they openly support honoring known hate groups like Moms for America. Can you pitch in $10 today to help us defend our communities from the growing threat of local GOP extremists?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65192686/412608067/-1153878952?refcode=EM_FR_230621WCGOP_TEAM_90DO_6_NG_A_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjdiYjQ5NzAtN2MxMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kaW7964iHkVgfecsqaEydPblMwaU2C1IxqU7yrI2NlQ=)**
[**DONATE NOW**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65192688/412608069/-1153878952?refcode=EM_FR_230621WCGOP_TEAM_90DO_6_NG_A_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjdiYjQ5NzAtN2MxMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kaW7964iHkVgfecsqaEydPblMwaU2C1IxqU7yrI2NlQ=)
This group epitomizes the hate and fear the Republican movement has towards LGBTQ+ people. They are using tactics like banning books and wrongly labeling education on LGBTQ+ topics as “grooming” or “sexual indoctrination" to undo our progress on equality.

**Let’s be clear: Moms for America’s work has about as much to do with promoting families as the rocks segregationists threw at Ruby Bridges.**

Here’s the rest of the back story. The vote to honor this hate group was scheduled to take place at the same time the Will County Board was voting to recognize Pride Month and Juneteenth. Facing outrage from the community for placing a hate group on the same level as two nationally-recognized celebrations, the board’s Republican leaders pulled the vote from the agenda. Turns out adding this group to the agenda was the “poison pill” to halt the recognition of Pride Month and Juneteenth.

**[Illinois’ Democratic County Chairs and their County Parties are fighting against extremists like this across our state year-round, and they need your support. Will you donate $10 right now to help defeat extremists?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65192690/412608071/-1153878952?refcode=EM_FR_230621WCGOP_TEAM_90DO_6_NG_A_L2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjdiYjQ5NzAtN2MxMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kaW7964iHkVgfecsqaEydPblMwaU2C1IxqU7yrI2NlQ=)**

clean_body: Did you hear what happened in Will County? = Fellow Democrats, last week, the Will County Board scheduled a vote to honor Moms for America, an organization designated as a hate group by the widely respected Southern Poverty Law Center. The sponsor of the resolution, a Republican Will County Board Member, claimed he wanted to recognize the work they do to “promote families.” = = This group epitomizes the hate and fear the Republican movement has towards LGBTQ+ people. They are using tactics like banning books and wrongly labeling education on LGBTQ+ topics as “grooming” or “sexual indoctrination" to undo our progress on equality. Let’s be clear: Moms for America’s work has about as much to do with promoting families as the rocks segregationists threw at Ruby Bridges. Here’s the rest of the back story. The vote to honor this hate group was scheduled to take place at the same time the Will County Board was voting to recognize Pride Month and Juneteenth. Facing outrage from the community for placing a hate group on the same level as two nationally-recognized celebrations, the board’s Republican leaders pulled the vote from the agenda. Turns out adding this group to the agenda was the “poison pill” to halt the recognition of Pride Month and Juneteenth. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = = Thank you, Team IDCCA | | | | GET TEXT UPDATES FROM THE IDCCA! | | | | | | = = | | | | Contributions or gifts to the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association are not tax deductible. body:
None of this would have been possible without YOU, team.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65192768/412608352/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGJhZWRlMS03YzEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dw2BCf2JeKC_IedPhFZa7Oc9wlPkSKC6tQ6p2XMvFhE=) | We have some exciting news, team:

We've _officially_ turned in petition signatures to put a reproductive rights initiative on the ballot! This achievement would not have been possible without the dedication and hard work of each and every one of our volunteers and supporters.

**Thank you for your unwavering dedication to this fight for our rights! [Will you contribute $5 or more to fuel our work to restore and protect reproductive rights in Ohio?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65192769/412608353/1045760925?refcode=em23_230621_resend_fndd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230621_resend_fndd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=00baede1-7c10-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&noskip=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGJhZWRlMS03YzEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dw2BCf2JeKC_IedPhFZa7Oc9wlPkSKC6tQ6p2XMvFhE=)**

By gathering signatures from voters in every county in Ohio, we're showing Ohioans are READY to enshrine reproductive rights into our state constitution. Together, we are paving the way for progress and ensuring that the voices of Ohioans are heard.

But our work's not over yet. Anti-choice politicians forced "Issue 1" on the August 8 ballot to make it nearly impossible for Ohioans to pass citizen-led ballot initiatives.

Look, we need your continued support to maintain our momentum and fight back against these attacks on our rights. This achievement would not have been possible without the dedication and hard work of each and every one of our volunteers and supporters. Thank you for your unwavering dedication to this fight for our rights! = By gathering signatures from voters in every county in Ohio, we're showing Ohioans are READY to enshrine reproductive rights into our state constitution. Together, we are paving the way for progress and ensuring that the voices of Ohioans are heard. But our work's not over yet. Anti-choice politicians forced "Issue 1" on the August 8 ballot to make it nearly impossible for Ohioans to pass citizen-led ballot initiatives. Look, we need your continued support to maintain our momentum and fight back against these attacks on our rights. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Together, let's make history by safeguarding reproductive rights for future generations and ensuring the voices of Ohioans are heard loud and clear.
