name: Will Rollins
subject: Here’s how I found out I lost in 2022.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Will Rollins for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65192883/412608728/1321783056?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGRmMGU1OC03ZDEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N6i688ahtP2ayyTmAi1EE7sdgLq5Ei4unWc2pd2ZXws=)
Peter,

After the polls closed in my 2022 campaign against Ken Calvert, we were feeling pretty excited about our chances. The first few batches of votes released by the registrar showed us with a promising lead, and while the race hadn’t been called, things were good enough to get an invitation to attend new member orientation in Washington.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65192884/412608729/1321783056?refcode=em-6.21.23-nopnrs-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGRmMGU1OC03ZDEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N6i688ahtP2ayyTmAi1EE7sdgLq5Ei4unWc2pd2ZXws=)
_Day one of new member orientation last Fall. Credit: POLITICO._
It was awe-inspiring being inside the Capitol as a prospective member and learning about the job I’d spent a year running for and hoped to have. I also enjoyed getting to know some (we had hoped) soon-to-be colleagues.

**Then, literally as I was standing on the House floor, I got the alert on my phone: a new batch of votes finally put Ken Calvert’s vote share out of reach. The Associated Press called the race, and I officially lost.**

So my partner Paolo and I did what a lot of couples might do: we went to the hotel bar.

As we were sitting there, news broke on TV that Donald Trump had just announced his campaign for president.

And I knew in that moment that our fight wasn’t over yet — that our democracy remains fragile, and it’s on each of us to do what’s in our power to better our communities and our country.

Peter, running for Congress a second time was not a decision I came to lightly, but I'm back in it because I know exactly what is at stake. It’s not the time to give up, and I’ve been so humbled that so many across Riverside County who supported our campaign in 2022 haven’t given up either.

**We came closer than anyone expected in 2022 to flipping this seat, and I wouldn’t be in this if I wasn’t confident we could win. But I can’t do this alone:**

**[The end of this month marks our first public FEC fundraising deadline of my campaign. I’m counting on you to be a part of this effort, Peter. Please send in $3, or whatever you can afford, to help us flip CA-41 and finish the job against Ken Calvert.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65192885/412608730/1321783056?refcode=em-6.21.23-nopnrs-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGRmMGU1OC03ZDEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N6i688ahtP2ayyTmAi1EE7sdgLq5Ei4unWc2pd2ZXws=)**

name: Tim Scott
subject: The big guy has some explaining to do
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
One of the FIRST THINGS Sean Hannity and I talked about last night was how we Americans have lost faith in Biden's Justice Department.

| |
---
| | | Friend, one of the FIRST THINGS Sean Hannity and I talked about in our town hall was how we Americans have lost faith in Biden's Justice Department.

---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=51cc437b86744c8eb1715fa8ab48d6d2&_e=MYJdUOYHXn8cgftC7ffiKlaVAvelHv8DXkjM1GjCUEJ9TFUkVd5KGmFKPAj1amBtdytwxS6A9GOVfW3Av_cHTwQhRTjJYTtYa4nPLl4zcCUqSVXgc_lfQlC7N4xIC5rdDLsm8Nwdh6ebQOJmEl70RolYsj-eJdZ1rww4cfKQh9ukGzqDj9YUROCmuEw8U_8fVJmNFsWxwAX3CXc-ElMp8eFys6L55gnvRfCM41VhaMCdQ8g1x_HwPgKMdFGb0hFawWTychaY0it6zYg-G0ToxnrzhHCtSyNS0kB6jDIwtPloszo8ziAxxgACmcf5P0PB4LI0iW7lurLoc9azIP6_WcA_EuPN4Trx-jod0gfM5EwlxwSoi8pQqVazkRoOwO76WyxFHNxcePx8v2x2yh1fqvGVRa6TmLu63NLKBBUkAacnMFJD7TAv8A-gs7he-5pB "Sean and I on stage")
---

While the Biden family gets a slap on the wrist with kid gloves, the Department of Justice throws the kitchen sink at political opponents, raids the homes of pro-life advocates, and targets parents as "domestic terrorists."

If there's one thing I know, it's this: **The "big guy" has some explaining to do.** America cannot be the city on the hill if we are not first a nation of law and justice. We can't be the city on the hill, we cannot fulfill our destination, our destiny as America, if we do not have the Lady of Justice wearing a blindfold.
_**_And when the Biden's get away with that, we need to thank God for Senator Grassley and Congressman Comer for doing their job. If they can't finish their investigation, President Tim Scott will finish it. With your help, we're gonna fire Joe Biden!_**_

name: Tuttle Twins
subject: CNN hates these books. But isn't this the real danger?
body:
I called it "appalling" and landed on Fox News' home page...

| | | | | |
---
|
---
| Why does CNN think our books are "controversial," and why have leftists removed them from school libraries? Despite their opposition, we've sold over 5 million copies! Sean Hannity, and Clay & Buck recommend them. Glenn Beck said: "These are amazing history books that your freedom-loving family needs to inspire your kids!" Our books introduce kids to the inspiring ideas that made our country great. They help young readers to learn **from** history, not just learn**about** history (like other books do). These enjoyable books teach kids why the founding fathers made the decisions they did, and why those ideas still matter today.
---
| |
---
| | | | [GET AMERICA'S HISTORY SPECIAL LAUNCH SALE](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=80ca54d925f843fb8d2b595f89dd9a28&_e=81kIVNS8aKI42NOvE4cRDI0dIYa9wznqGOFcVJKRQYQIWf2w_D3BaZybydbvhl2tWVIducU4r2TfBGE5HkQ7Nt7ksHE5X6a3t-4H4YDdXoN3M_zwT2HW9lLJpOItXzzykf_N2E3dbWU_vo1xWfWpNZQzHYddRUrkVNmEfGkafbs39WRvJ5MecAPLnHOgOIFCh8xXn7KApMXIjWlO7Q-rX4W2862BTNWTcE3fT_q5dUoH2seb7KvIlhtkbPNetJWCGINvdeM8PkMFm3n1a1TCVPQdr8hDqLEmpJTnZj_2kpdG8TdnCzo6DyfC4kyPd0h2YvJrw-Oo3JmuOTHyC45-xg%3D%3D)
---
But that's exactly what CNN and the left don't want. They don't want schools teaching kids about these ideals. They'd much rather tear down statues and demonize our founding fathers. That way, they can teach their own version of history—one that promotes radical ideas like wokeism and socialism.
Schools no longer teach the ideals and concepts that are crucial for young people to learn the most important things about our country. That's why it's up to parents and grandparents to help support young people today!
As part of our launch sale, we're including—at no extra charge—an audiobook version, a 200-page workbook, and bonus videos to help your kids learn. We're also giving away an all-expenses-paid trip for four to Boston to see the sites of early American history! Your purchase of either of our history books gets you an entry into the giveaway.

The radical Left is no longer just wrong - they’re downright deranged. Today’s Democrats don’t just have different political preferences than us - they’re totally out of touch with reality. From believing that biological men can compete in women’s sports to trusting Joe Biden with our national security, they’re taking our country down a dangerous path.And they’re doing it while they rewrite reality in their own woke image. There’s no limit to how far they’ll go to tear apart our great country. But that’s where patriots like you come in. name: Katie Porter
subject: The Supreme Court desperately needs reform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Another report of a Justice taking undisclosed trips.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=25220%2E3422442%2E9WFob9)
A new ProPublica report shows that another conservative Supreme Court Justice has taken luxury trips on behalf of a Republican mega-donor. **This time, it’s Justice Alito, who went on an undisclosed trip to Alaska with hedge fund billionaire Paul Singer via private jet** (the plane would have cost him $100,000 each way, if he had paid for it). In the years following this vacation, Singer’s hedge fund came before the Supreme Court _at least ten times._
[__](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-reform-scotus/?source=EMAI21_1_ALI_20230621_V1_F&akid=25220%2E3422442%2E9WFob9)
First, the billionaire-funded yacht trips of Justice Thomas and now this. My students at UC Irvine had an easier time following the university's ethics code. Americans know this isn’t fair or right, and it’s why so many are losing faith in our democracy.
Congress must hold the Supreme Court accountable. **We should expand the court, enforce term limits, work to get politics out of our judicial system, and implement a judicial code of ethics** —it’s appalling that we don’t already have one!
I’m running for Senate because those in power need to be held accountable to the people they’re supposed to serve. I’m fighting to clean up corruption through real, substantive legislation. [**Sign on to show your support for reforming the Supreme Court.**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-reform-scotus/?source=EMAI21_1_ALI_20230621_V1_F&akid=25220%2E3422442%2E9WFob9)
**[Sign on ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-reform-scotus/?source=EMAI21_1_ALI_20230621_V1_F&akid=25220%2E3422442%2E9WFob9)**
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/17681?refcode=EMAI21_1_ALI_20230621_V1_F&t=2&akid=25220%2E3422442%2E9WFob9)**
Let’s clean this mess up!
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAI21_1_ALI_20230621_V1_F&t=3&refcode2=25220_3422442_9WFob9&akid=25220%2E3422442%2E9WFob9)**
---

Katie Porter for Senate

Irvine, CA 92616

name: (1) Signature Pending
subject: It’s Time to Push Back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
It’s Time to Push Back
Fellow American - Our heart sank when we heard that President Trump was being arraigned. **This follows the grievous political attack and raid on former President Trump launched by Biden’s FBI and Merrick Garland in the DOJ.**

**We have had enough, Fellow American.**

**DO YOU THINK BIDEN’S DOJ IS TARGETING DONALD TRUMP?**
[**YES**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2c44a26a544d47db835ad9975f2dedad&_e=hD-YHnWY-12RBrLpWePasOwxVjVIl0XIFB2aA3FAH_4ROkTUBFgEmiGaLPdD5Jg4YELUknjyaE6QGpf_vQpZbphpyn5bA2Fu4LjQ9Z0PcjjO4CzKh2L10X2-yTLAOupJi5Nh7HkS9gzEmGXG2DH-d6ndrpl87QngoEQshwF163zoEN0l4pUyqrZ86XYmmnvN1NXK-C1AsrAiftVXnuPBU3_h1_9jTYiVRzxELWAvI6RmoIJRkN3UQGRccVQabzuD8SCmu4J-2bTAF8v0DYrZ8bWziTDsXbl8iXejWRNT76AxIIrwpYp1wgs_blpk0vveV9-OJWpGlSxSPtngIalTxf6SS8puT0pqlis9e5KPzW13m2Q7-1nDrSKGtTJY7wh4Xy9zyygARf5yRV9WfK4W-jYS2Uf5TRMD7zhLeHtAFa9A9swM9211ECn1tMD0wl8rcm-3MA4xxWsYzV2XKoYuXQ%3D%3D)
[**NO**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2c44a26a544d47db835ad9975f2dedad&_e=hD-YHnWY-12RBrLpWePasOwxVjVIl0XIFB2aA3FAH_4ROkTUBFgEmiGaLPdD5Jg4YELUknjyaE6QGpf_vQpZbphpyn5bA2Fu4LjQ9Z0PcjjO4CzKh2L10X2-yTLAOupJi5Nh7HkS9gzEmGXG2DH-d6ndrpl87QngoEQshwF163zoEN0l4pUyqrZ86XYmmnvN1NXK-C1AsrAiftVXnuPBU3_h1_9jTYiVRzxELWAvI6RmoIJRkN3UQGRccVQabzuD8SCmu4J-2bTAF8v0DYrZ8bWziTDsXbl8iXejWRNT76DsYOyv88OOFlCznePxF_sEiG0uSpquHEhEDYtf0AXF39RGf_LDNoyO5HpwwdRfXbvh5vC-4PtIJUGxLC4I_JBXKklBFW_erYgbs561AXMNZIJ7suOURe3o4jif_a63UCfUenihAAfADxow9Ep8TGh6yVL0O_cN4lTDb-qVMsnrgQ%3D%3D)
With enough support, Trump’s Senate allies will be able to right these wrongs. They could end the Democrat Witch Hunt against President Trump. They could investigate impeach Merrick Garland for his political games. They could stall the attempt to reverse all of Trump’s accomplishments.

**SHOW YOU WON’T BACK DOWN BY STANDING WITH CONSERVATIVE SENATE ALLIES IN THE NEXT 60 SECONDS:**
This isn’t the time to ignore our call to action. Taking back the Senate and the White House, ensuring legitimate free and fair elections, and ending political retribution starts today. **_Your support is instrumental to achieving these ends, Fellow American._**

This attack on Trump is an attack on **all Republicans.** They’re coming for us next. We can’t let them surprise us while we’re waiting like sitting ducks.

**Act quickly. Act now.

Thanks,

Senate Republicans**

clean_body: It’s Time to Push Back Fellow American - Our heart sank when we heard that President Trump was being arraigned. This follows the grievous political attack and raid on former President Trump launched by Biden’s FBI and Merrick Garland in the DOJ. We have had enough, Fellow American. DO YOU THINK BIDEN’S DOJ IS TARGETING DONALD TRUMP? With enough support, Trump’s Senate allies will be able to right these wrongs. They could end the Democrat Witch Hunt against President Trump. They could investigate impeach Merrick Garland for his political games. They could stall the attempt to reverse all of Trump’s accomplishments. SHOW YOU WON’T BACK DOWN BY STANDING WITH CONSERVATIVE SENATE ALLIES IN THE NEXT 60 SECONDS: This isn’t the time to ignore our call to action. Taking back the Senate and the White House, ensuring legitimate free and fair elections, and ending political retribution starts today. Your support is instrumental to achieving these ends, Fellow American. This attack on Trump is an attack on all Republicans. They’re coming for us next. We can’t let them surprise us while we’re waiting like sitting ducks. Act quickly. Act now. Thanks, Senate Republicans If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. When I think about being the first woman and first person of color to represent Delaware in Congress, I think about my great-great-great grandfather. In 1867, he signed a document that afforded him the right to vote. Fast forward to 2017, when I was being sworn in to Congress for the first time, my sister, Thea, found the document. That document has come to represent the importance of expanding rights and representation. It’s my proof of where we come from and it’s my inspiration for where we need to go. The historic nature of our campaign is not lost on me. My family and other families of color have come so far just to be fairly represented. All the way from being enslaved, to finally getting the right to vote, to being elected to represent the First State.
**[To make history on launch day, my team and I have set a goal to earn the support of 30,000 Founding Donors, and we’re counting on generous donors like you to help get there. Can you rush anything right now, split between my campaign and my friend Kirsten Gillibrand's, so we can get the ball rolling on the race of a lifetime?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65194133/412613474/1029717239?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4216-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDZmOTgwZi04MTEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sUEkFaTMZDUCRMIvvt6HQd7VKFRjV0hXuxdVRcAbLmw=)**

name: Colin Allred
subject: Ted Cruz and book bans →
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65194537/412615086/949623258?refcode=em-6.21.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzc0MWI2NS04MzEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1z9njHtC5gwb8U8LS9wDxJOsDiQ27nTfzhExlvv-o2Q=)
Hi there, Peter.

I’m Rep. Colin Allred, and I’m running to beat Ted Cruz and represent Texas in the U.S. Senate.

I've always been a big reader. Growing up, my world was pretty small. I used to treat our local bookstore like a library, sitting there for hours, reading books cover to cover because I wasn’t able to buy them.

Reading opened my eyes to new perspectives, far-off places, and different career opportunities – it helped me dream big. Our kids deserve the same opportunity to learn and grow through books, but Ted Cruz and the GOP are fighting to ban books about anything that doesn't align with their far-right agenda.

**My colleague Rep. Eric Sorensen is familiar with the extreme right’s attack on schools and libraries, and their censorship of LGBTQ authors and stories. Eric’s been a leading voice on this issue, and we need to follow his example and take a stand against all far-right book bans, including those Ted Cruz supports.**

That's part of why I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz – to stop the Republicans' outrageous censorship and attacks on our kids' education. But I have to raise $50,000 every single day to power this campaign against Ted Cruz.

**[Will you please split a donation of $3 today between our campaign and Rep. Eric Sorensen’s to help send me to the Senate? →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65194538/412615087/949623258?refcode=em-6.21.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzc0MWI2NS04MzEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1z9njHtC5gwb8U8LS9wDxJOsDiQ27nTfzhExlvv-o2Q=)**
| [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65194539/412615088/949623258?refcode=em-6.21.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzc0MWI2NS04MzEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1z9njHtC5gwb8U8LS9wDxJOsDiQ27nTfzhExlvv-o2Q=)

Experts agree we have a real chance to win this thing: CNN says Ted Cruz is the most vulnerable Republican senator on the ballot, and we're just five points down in the polls. I know in my bones Texans are sick and tired of Ted Cruz and ready for change.

But this is already on track to be one of the most competitive and expensive races in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots Democrats like you to be by my side every step of the way.

**[So please, before my midnight fundraising deadline, will you split a donation of $3 or more between our campaign and Rep. clean_body: | = Hi there, Peter. I’m Rep. Colin Allred, and I’m running to beat Ted Cruz and represent Texas in the U.S. Senate. I've always been a big reader. Growing up, my world was pretty small. I used to treat our local bookstore like a library, sitting there for hours, reading books cover to cover because I wasn’t able to buy them. Reading opened my eyes to new perspectives, far-off places, and different career opportunities – it helped me dream big. Our kids deserve the same opportunity to learn and grow through books, but Ted Cruz and the GOP are fighting to ban books about anything that doesn't align with their far-right agenda. My colleague Rep. Eric Sorensen is familiar with the extreme right’s attack on schools and libraries, and their censorship of LGBTQ authors and stories. Eric’s been a leading voice on this issue, and we need to follow his example and take a stand against all far-right book bans, including those Ted Cruz supports. That's part of why I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz – to stop the Republicans' outrageous censorship and attacks on our kids' education. But I have to raise $50,000 every single day to power this campaign against Ted Cruz. = | = Experts agree we have a real chance to win this thing: CNN says Ted Cruz is the most vulnerable Republican senator on the ballot, and we're just five points down in the polls. I know in my bones Texans are sick and tired of Ted Cruz and ready for change. But this is already on track to be one of the most competitive and expensive races in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots Democrats like you to be by my side every step of the way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Every dollar makes a difference – thank you so much for giving what you can. Colin | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, = To volunteer on Eric's campaign, We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Eric Sorensen Eric Sorensen for Illinois P.O. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: We will never scare you into donating like the DCCC.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Did you know that Justice Democrats was formed by staff and
super-volunteers from the Bernie Sanders 2016 Presidential campaign? We
had just worked on this inspiring campaign for president. Bernie put a
progressive agenda front and center for millions of people for the first
time.

Over the last few years, we’ve accomplished some pretty incredible things.
We recruited AOC, Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, and Summer Lee to run for
Congress and stood by their campaigns from day #1.

Imagine Congress without AOC, Summer Lee, Cori Bush, or Jamaal Bowman. We
recruited each of these transformative leaders to run for Congress.

We will never scare you into donating like the DCCC. You shouldn’t kiss
all hope goodbye and the sky is not falling.

But we will politely ask: Will you make a contribution of $3
right now to help us make up for this shortfall?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135109?refcode=em20230621-29536&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=29536%2E1203867%2Ewopon2 ]→ Yes, I will contribute $3 right now to support Justice
Democrats’ work!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135109?refcode=em20230621-29536&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=29536%2E1203867%2Ewopon2 ]Contribute $3

As a grassroots-funded organization, every single contribution we receive
adds up to make a difference.

Thank you for fighting for a better future with us. We know that together,
there is so much more we can achieve.

-Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=29536%2E1203867%2Ewopon2 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=29536%2E1203867%2Ewopon2 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230621-29536-footer&t=1023&refcode2=29536_1203867_wopon2&akid=29536%2E1203867%2Ewopon2

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=29536%2E1203867%2Ewopon2

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932

name: Tim Scott
subject: The big guy has some explaining to do
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
One of the FIRST THINGS Sean Hannity and I talked about last night was how we Americans have lost faith in Biden's Justice Department.

| |
---
| | | Friend, one of the FIRST THINGS Sean Hannity and I talked about in our town hall was how we Americans have lost faith in Biden's Justice Department.

---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d60cb02440b74783ac6aafd1eaf8050c&_e=o8Z1oMqhJX4YutVzM11NbA026O7Um63Qcx4jY_igL8fxPnsMYvKi2O9PbE9bD9_lTTgL0SlHiQXy3dbgJHwW6iyyzkixLwOl8gD81pr0UkieWoqKabSxK6WBYh01ro8Y4FG-mrrIX9tpqoYCF0ddsXh3hj3XOjkMfrhD48dUhdmS-bDIFLpPaeE39Zkg3PVgHu3smqq58A5H3tj19glLwiNTOzZivdhOIsTu4QnbskrTlY4sThc_GkFZjL0rlE9WfLVzfU3VSY0uGucEdRdNDt34_1wKQZdmkyhNPNjW_MVGaAMZhyQsJtUFcvfg_zQJ91r4vwfCYRkuIS5NpfAUi0qFUTuGvm07Zc4G7bflY4FHTgpMuFlWYYH93-VpC6smchpBJZva7ZvSGIZLY-f8MvztsT_m_5Edx-5uHQG-b-gllGhkMRgL4NXnLsHhTBdn "Sean and I on stage")
---

While the Biden family gets a slap on the wrist with kid gloves, the Department of Justice throws the kitchen sink at political opponents, raids the homes of pro-life advocates, and targets parents as "domestic terrorists."

If there's one thing I know, it's this: **The "big guy" has some explaining to do.** America cannot be the city on the hill if we are not first a nation of law and justice. We can't be the city on the hill, we cannot fulfill our destination, our destiny as America, if we do not have the Lady of Justice wearing a blindfold.
_**_And when the Biden's get away with that, we need to thank God for Senator Grassley and Congressman Comer for doing their job. If they can't finish their investigation, President Tim Scott will finish it. With your help, we're gonna fire Joe Biden!_**_

name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: The National Republican Senatorial Committee is all-in on Missouri
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
These insiders aren’t just working hard to tear down Lucas — they’re determined to prop up Hawley and his flailing campaign. Let me explain:
#
Peter,
**The National Republican Senatorial Committee is all-in on Missouri this cycle — and for more than just the reason you’d expect.**
Before I ask you to **[chip in $10 or whatever you can toward our campaign to defeat Josh Hawley and elect Lucas Kunce,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34416?refcode=em20230621-3296&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3296%2E614464%2EWdE_SD)** please let me explain:
**[FIGHT BACK: DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34416?refcode=em20230621-3296&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3296%2E614464%2EWdE_SD)**
The National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC) is the big group of political insiders responsible for electing GOP candidates to the U.S. Senate.
They don’t always take a big interest in Missouri. **But this year, they’re not just working hard to tear down Lucas — they’re determined to prop up Josh Hawley and his flailing campaign.**
**JANUARY 6, 2023:** Just hours after Lucas Kunce made waves by launching his campaign on the two-year anniversary of Josh Hawley’s infamous incident outside the U.S. Capitol, a spokesperson for the NRSC called Lucas _“unhinged”_ for wanting to take on a coward like Hawley.
**FEBRUARY 2, 2023:** Less than a month later, the NRSC released one of its very first digital attack ads of the 2024 election cycle — targeting Lucas, a man from Missouri, for sounding like... a man from Missouri. It didn’t go well for them.
**MARCH 22, 2023:** A new report showed Josh Hawley facing “intensely negative sentiment” among Missouri voters, with a _net-negative approval rating._
**MARCH 31, 2023:** On the _very last day_ of our first fundraising quarter of the cycle, the NRSC used its joint fundraising committee with Hawley to funnel **$250,000** into his campaign. **This is one of the most significant investments the GOP has made into ANY U.S. Senate candidate so far this cycle.**
**[FIGHT BACK: DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34416?refcode=em20230621-3296&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3296%2E614464%2EWdE_SD)**
**APRIL 3, 2023:** The NRSC worked with their DC oppo shop to put out _another_ weird hit piece on Lucas — attacking him for playing the card game Magic: The Gathering and being a cheerleader in college.
**MAY 26, 2023:** Josh Hawley sent a panicked message to his top donors:
**_“Let me be clear: control of the Senate could come down to this seat.”_**
**AND NOW:** We’re just over a week away from our next major end-of-quarter deadline, and there’s no telling what else these insiders will do to keep tearing Lucas down and making Josh Hawley look strong.
It’s absolutely critical that we stay prepared to fight back at any moment — and the only way we’ll be able to do that is with help from real people just like you.
**[So Peter, will you chip in $10 or whatever you can toward our campaign to elect Lucas Kunce, defeat Josh Hawley, and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat? These GOP insiders might have corporate elites and shady mega-donors on their side — but they have nothing on our people power.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34416?refcode=em20230621-3296&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3296%2E614464%2EWdE_SD)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34417?refcode=em20230621-3296&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=3296%2E614464%2EWdE_SD) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34417?refcode=em20230621-3296&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=3296%2E614464%2EWdE_SD) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34417?refcode=em20230621-3296&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=3296%2E614464%2EWdE_SD) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34417?refcode=em20230621-3296&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=3296%2E614464%2EWdE_SD) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34417?refcode=em20230621-3296&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=3296%2E614464%2EWdE_SD) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34417?refcode=em20230621-3296&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=3296%2E614464%2EWdE_SD) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34416?refcode=em20230621-3296&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=3296%2E614464%2EWdE_SD)
---
Thanks for everything,
Emma Dillon
Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230621-3296-footer&t=12&refcode2=3296_614464_WdE_SD&akid=3296%2E614464%2EWdE_SD)**

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=3296%2E614464%2EWdE_SD). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

clean_body: Who knows how much next year?! | = Peter – Last year, the GOP and their dark money PACs spent $8 million trying to defeat Yadira. But thanks to supporters like you chipping in here and there, we were able to fight back and build a grassroots movement that won the support of voters across Colorado. Now, we’re gearing up for an even tougher fight, Peter. This race made Roll Call’s list of the top 10 most vulnerable House candidates , and a dark money group has already invested six figures attacking Yadira with misleading ads. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | ********=****** | ******=****** ---|--- ******=****** | ******=****** ******=****** | ******=******** Every single contribution makes a huge difference, so thank you Peter. — Caraveo HQ | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS Caraveo for Congress PO Box 953 Eastlake, CO 80614 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

With the help of this grassroots team, we made history last November – flipping four chambers and holding onto every single existing majority. **But we can’t stop now.**
We’re already preparing for our next big fight – state Democrats have a slew of special elections over the next several months, and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November. President Obama is calling out the importance of Democratic leadership in the states – it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to listen to him and help elect state Democrats now. **By chipping in _today,_ you can help pave a path for Democratic wins this year and beyond. **
**With your investment in our movement, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight against state Republicans’ extreme agenda, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future for states like yours. So, can we count you in?**

subject: Literally building Alaska’s future

body:
Investing in infrastructure is fundamental to a region’s success. Here in the largest state with the harshest terrain, it’s absolutely essential.

| | | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65194990/412616862/1859846009?amount=25&utm_campaign=em_230621_infrastructure&utm_source=em&utm_medium=em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjA3NDIxMC04NzEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gSexk0chRguwdqnM9w6J06A0KsGkL2oOy-xFLzEa-io=&emci=bdc1403d-7710-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0b074210-8710-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9512399)
---
| | | Friend, The Bipartisan Infrastructure Law passed and signed in 2021 has been delivering for communities across the country — creating jobs, facilitating commerce, and modernizing the ways we connect with one another. The federal government is making record investments in building up Alaska’s infrastructure, including:
* A projected $3.7 billion over 5 years to upgrade Alaska’s roads and bridges.
* At least $100 million to connect all parts of the state through broadband internet.
* Roughly $400 million to expand sustainable public transit options in Alaska.
* Over $50 million to build an extensive electric vehicle charging network throughout the state.

We know that investing in infrastructure is fundamental to a region’s success. In the largest state with the most challenging terrain, robust infrastructure is essential. **As we invest more in connecting Alaskans, we will create jobs, advance our state’s economy, and build Alaska’s future.** Our work is not over. We will continue advocating for infrastructure investments here in Alaska and around the country. [**If you support our work to build the future for Alaska and America, will you pitch in with a contribution now?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65194991/412616863/1859846009?refcode=E3092-20230621-Infrastructure-SL-Other&amount=25&utm_campaign=em_230621_infrastructure&utm_source=em&utm_medium=em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjA3NDIxMC04NzEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gSexk0chRguwdqnM9w6J06A0KsGkL2oOy-xFLzEa-io=&emci=bdc1403d-7710-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0b074210-8710-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9512399) | [**DONATE NOW »** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65194992/412616864/1859846009?refcode=E3092-20230621-Infrastructure-SB-Other&amount=25&utm_campaign=em_230621_infrastructure&utm_source=em&utm_medium=em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjA3NDIxMC04NzEwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gSexk0chRguwdqnM9w6J06A0KsGkL2oOy-xFLzEa-io=&emci=bdc1403d-7710-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0b074210-8710-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9512399)

subject: Today We Voted To Hold Adam Schiff Accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc _Copyright © 2023 Kean for Congress_
body:
I voted YES to censure Adam Schiff and hold him accountable for his misconduct.| | |
---
[](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=b44f891d0fc64bd8b706d3dd6e7759bf&_e=hnzqdb14_jFJYMQYQ4GtVyFfWWzDeCXBecH3C7vGCTkX-G040xWj5xxg08mvm5R9MXgMs29W6-KhPMuZQlyUCQXZOHSS9cyH7O0JtW7O0tPtaczwPLXVKyf64PyhilhZuMU_jHgDF0AS3vlTaI7zaOLOO1wJG9wWeUas_G66Ukp7GwiICBkoyfXN-EfI9wZe)
---
| | Friends, I have always believed in upholding the highest standards of integrity and transparency in public service. Representative Schiff’s actions have blatantly disregarded those principles, **which is why I supported his removal from the Intelligence Committee earlier this year and why I supported his censure in the House today.** The resolution we voted on today addressed the constitutional concerns that many of my fellow Republicans and I had during last week’s vote series. I believe today’s censure was a necessary and appropriate response to hold Representative Schiff accountable for his misconduct. **\- Congressman Tom Kean, Jr.**

clean_body: I voted YES to censure Adam Schiff and hold him accountable for his misconduct.| | | | | Friends, I have always believed in upholding the highest standards of integrity and transparency in public service. Representative Schiff’s actions have blatantly disregarded those principles, which is why I supported his removal from the Intelligence Committee earlier this year and why I supported his censure in the House today. The resolution we voted on today addressed the constitutional concerns that many of my fellow Republicans and I had during last week’s vote series. I believe today’s censure was a necessary and appropriate response to hold Representative Schiff accountable for his misconduct. \- Congressman Tom Kean, Jr. | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2023 Kean for Congress Our mailing address is: Kean for Congress Inc PO Box 999 Edison, NJ 08818 Click to mail your donation. If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . Be sure to follow the campaign on , , , and . If you have any suggestions, comments, complaints, or feedback, please send your ideas to mailto:info@TomKean.com.

Team -- **Justice Sonia Sotomayor’s birthday is fast approaching, and we’re calling on TOP Democrats like you to sign her birthday card before it’s too late!**

Justice Sotomayor has been a passionate defender of our most important rights -- and now it's time for us to honor her continued commitment to advocating for our freedoms.

We’re reaching out to grassroots Democrats nationwide to sign Justice Sotomayor’s birthday card and thank her for her tireless work, but we’re missing your name! **Please, help us reach our 75,000 signature goal:**

**From:[ dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://go.dscc.org/go/14253?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230621-AddYourName-SotomayorBirthdayCard-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230621-AddYourName-SotomayorBirthdayCard-ETG-sl1&akid=11136%2E9716520%2ERPERby)**

| | [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2623?t=9&amount=25&akid=173%2E52803%2EQwJHhc) **FIRST:** Multi-millionaire David Trone, who has made a fortune as the owner of a wine store, broke self-funding records by giving tens of millions to his own Congressional campaigns. **THEN:** Trone announced his bid for Maryland’s Senate seat, with news outlets commenting he _“doesn’t have to spend time fundraising like other candidates”_ and that he’s _“willing to spend whatever it takes, regardless of what that number is, to win this race.”_ **NOW:** Angela Alsobrooks is at risk of losing momentum in Maryland’s U.S. Senate race if her small-dollar, grassroots fundraising falls behind the deep, seemingly limitless pockets of the _“Wine King.”_ **And with only 9 days before Angela’s first FEC End-of-Quarter filing deadline, there’s never been a more important time to support her campaign than right now, Peter.** **[So please, will you chip in $25 or whatever you can afford to help Angela keep pace with her self-funded, multi-millionaire primary opponent and win Maryland’s U.S. Senate race?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2623?t=10&amount=25&akid=173%2E52803%2EQwJHhc)** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ | | | [Chip in $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2623?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=173%2E52803%2EQwJHhc)

name: Team Rashida
subject: [take action] Workers deserve the right to organize for fair pay and benefits
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Workers are rising up, demanding fair pay with benefits. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvVdNQ3nngPm4VgRMEOG6tYWi4sqjfwul2_e4mYQeVemEwySjKlhlQkxyCAJnoxyUz__tCGcDRxJEBAc1QCMqf-MyOknpPDD2-BopZ4EvU-hBqwD7wbJWX7AY0K-hyan6J5abyCPk13QirvZFGV6uRt6sq0m9A6VpnvVBdSYpISiNIWk1k1ME9kMApahbudcMBVPHkY4e6_-rGMp_FYfPZSYI_5a5u1RVaAeJZ1IRptloLT9-RXHf80BkzVfKNIsUx17SfSNGf0oIKKvJINSO9xQ/3x8/etN3z-2YRESQwcfaKBhQqQ/h0/3sTwQPOShhvw49vBQbG2fSgP-NJyUiXQt_-ahFvfN10)
---
Friend, Whether it’s in the halls of Congress or in the streets with striking workers, Rep. Rashida Tlaib is an activist-legislator who fights for the rights and wages of working people everywhere. **Born and raised in Detroit, Rashida learned at a young age the value of a union.** When her father joined the United Auto Workers union, her family started receiving healthcare benefits for the first time. **At a time of out-of-control corporate profits and runaway CEO pay, the fight for workers’ rights is more urgent than ever.** Rashida has introduced bold legislation and she’s a proud co-sponsor of the _Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act_ , which she helped strengthen in past legislative sessions with a successful amendment ensuring that people get timely notice for union elections. [**Join Rashida and our national allies in fighting to pass the**** _PRO Act_****and strengthen the rights of working people everywhere. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I want you to hear it from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek, I wanted you to hear this from me: **The first poll on Wisconsin’s Senate race shows me in a statistical tie with a potential GOP candidate.**
The truth is, this is not the first time political pundits have shared how challenging our race will be — _CNN_ and _The Hill_ have already named my Senate seat one of the most vulnerable in the country.
Since day one, we’ve known Republicans are ready to spend millions to try to unseat me. They know our state’s track record of close-margin elections and will try to use that to their advantage every step of the way.
We can’t afford to let them take the lead. That’s why I am personally reaching out today asking for your support to make sure our team can come up with the resources we need to fight back.
**[Please, will you split an urgent contribution between John Fetterman and our campaign? Your donation will help us prepare, organize, and mobilize in the months ahead so we can protect this seat, and our Democratic Senate majority with it.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230621?refcode=em20230621-1-8420&refcode2=8420_434096_EOvQpQ&akid=8420%2E434096%2EEOvQpQ)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230621?amount=5&refcode=em20230621-8420&refcode2=8420_434096_EOvQpQ&akid=8420%2E434096%2EEOvQpQ)**
By having our back today, you are supporting the groundwork needed to fight back tomorrow. Thank you, Derek.
—Tammy

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230621-8420-footer&t=1&refcode2=8420_434096_EOvQpQ&akid=8420%2E434096%2EEOvQpQ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8420%2E434096%2EEOvQpQ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8420%2E434096%2EEOvQpQ)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Rep. Angie Craig
subject: What Marjorie Taylor Greene said about parents like me:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By The Future Forum Political Action Committee And Not Authorized By Any Candidate Or Candidate's Committee
body:
As the first openly lesbian mom in Congress, I know firsthand what it’s like to have to fight for equal treatment.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-CraigSplit?refcode=E21719-20230615-CraigSplit-header-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-CraigSplit?refcode=E21719-20230615-CraigSplit-header-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-CraigSplit?refcode=E21719-20230615-CraigSplit-graphic-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-CraigSplit?refcode=E21719-20230615-CraigSplit-graphic-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5] Peter,As the first openly lesbian mom in Congress, I know firsthand what it’s like to have to fight for equal treatment and basic decency.
This year, my Republican colleague Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene said that adoptive parents, step parents, LGBTQ+ parents, or anyone not biologically related to their children aren’t “real” parents. A disgusting and outrageous attempt to strip us of our humanity.
Our campaign is up against a lot right now. From the National Republican Congressional Committee’s mounting attacks, to a rise in hatred towards LGBTQ+ elected officials like me, we need to send a clear message that Democrats everywhere are standing with the LGBTQ+ community – and we’re ready to take back the House in 2024.
Can you split a donation between me and Future Forum PAC today to help me and other Future Forum Frontliners defend our seats and take back the House in 2024? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-CraigSplit?refcode=E21719-20230615-CraigSplit-SL-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
$5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-CraigSplit?express_lane=true&refcode=E21719-20230615-CraigSplit-EL-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5] $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-CraigSplit?express_lane=true&refcode=E21719-20230615-CraigSplit-EL-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10]
$15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-CraigSplit?express_lane=true&refcode=E21719-20230615-CraigSplit-EL-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15] $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-CraigSplit?express_lane=true&refcode=E21719-20230615-CraigSplit-EL-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25]
$50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-CraigSplit?express_lane=true&refcode=E21719-20230615-CraigSplit-EL-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=50] More [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-CraigSplit?express_lane=true&refcode=E21719-20230615-CraigSplit-EL-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=other]
For the first time in history, the Human Rights Campaign has officially declared a state of emergency for LGBTQ+ people in the United States in 2023.
More than 75 anti-LGBTQ+ bills have been signed into law this year alone, more than doubling last year’s number, which was previously the worst year on record.
As bigots and opponents of LGBTQ+ rights gain momentum, our work to keep MN-02 blue becomes that much more critical. As one of only 11 openly-LGBTQ+ Members of Congress, I will undoubtedly be a target. And last year, I hung onto my seat with just 51% of the vote. In a race that close, grassroots support from our team made all of the difference in propelling us to victory.
Can you split a donation between me and Future Forum PAC today to help us make sure we can defend the 6 LGBTQ+ Future Forum Democrats running for re-election next year and help us take back the House? With your help, we will DEFEAT hate at the ballot box. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-CraigSplit?refcode=E21719-20230615-CraigSplit-SL-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-CraigSplit?refcode=E21719-20230615-CraigSplit-SB-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5]
Thank you so much for your support,
Rep. Angie Craig (MN-02)
Future Forum Frontliner
